import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import List, Optional, Dict

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    Text,
    DateTime,
    Float,
    ForeignKey,
    UniqueConstraint,
    Index,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/yahoo.db")
engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

app = FastAPI(title="Simplified Yahoo API", version="1.0.0")


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    full_name = Column(String)
    profile_data = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class FinanceSymbol(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_symbols"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    symbol = Column(String, nullable=False, unique=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String)
    type = Column(String, nullable=False, index=True)
    currency = Column(String)
    exchange = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class FinancePortfolio(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_portfolios"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("user_id", "name"),)


class FinancePortfolioHolding(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_portfolio_holdings"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    portfolio_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("finance_portfolios.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    symbol_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("finance_symbols.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("portfolio_id", "symbol_id"),)
    symbol = relationship("FinanceSymbol", foreign_keys=[symbol_id])


class FinanceRealtimeQuote(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_realtime_quotes"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    symbol_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("finance_symbols.id"), nullable=False, unique=True, index=True)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    price_change = Column(Float)
    price_change_percent = Column(Float)
    last_update_time = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    symbol = relationship("FinanceSymbol", foreign_keys=[symbol_id])


class FinancePriceHistoryDaily(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_price_history_daily"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    symbol_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("finance_symbols.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    date = Column(String, nullable=False)
    open = Column(Float)
    high = Column(Float)
    low = Column(Float)
    close = Column(Float)
    volume = Column(Integer)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("symbol_id", "date"),)


class FinanceIntradayPrice(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_intraday_prices"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    symbol_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("finance_symbols.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    ts = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    volume = Column(Integer)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class FinancePriceAlert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "finance_price_alerts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    symbol_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("finance_symbols.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    direction = Column(String, nullable=False)
    threshold_price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    is_active = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1, index=True)
    triggered_at = Column(DateTime)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class SportsTeam(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sports_teams"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    short_name = Column(String)
    city = Column(String)
    country = Column(String)
    league = Column(String)
    sport = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("name", "league", "sport"),)


class SportsPlayer(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sports_players"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    full_name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    position = Column(String)
    sport = Column(String, nullable=False)
    primary_team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_teams.id"))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class SportsGame(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sports_games"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    sport = Column(String, nullable=False, index=True)
    league = Column(String)
    season = Column(String)
    start_time = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, index=True)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False, index=True)
    period = Column(String)
    home_team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_teams.id"), nullable=False)
    away_team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_teams.id"), nullable=False)
    home_score = Column(Integer, default=0)
    away_score = Column(Integer, default=0)
    venue = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    home_team = relationship("SportsTeam", foreign_keys=[home_team_id])
    away_team = relationship("SportsTeam", foreign_keys=[away_team_id])


class SportsPlayerStat(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sports_player_stats"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    game_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_games.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    player_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_players.id"), nullable=False)
    team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_teams.id"), nullable=False)
    points = Column(Float)
    assists = Column(Float)
    rebounds = Column(Float)
    stat_json = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("game_id", "player_id"),)
    player = relationship("SportsPlayer", foreign_keys=[player_id])
    team = relationship("SportsTeam", foreign_keys=[team_id])


class SportsLeagueSeason(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sports_league_seasons"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    sport = Column(String, nullable=False)
    league = Column(String, nullable=False)
    season = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("sport", "league", "season"),)


class SportsLeagueStanding(Base):
    __tablename__ = "sports_league_standings"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    league_season_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_league_seasons.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("sports_teams.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    rank = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    played = Column(Integer)
    wins = Column(Integer)
    draws = Column(Integer)
    losses = Column(Integer)
    goals_for = Column(Integer)
    goals_against = Column(Integer)
    goal_difference = Column(Integer)
    points = Column(Integer)
    updated_time = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("league_season_id", "team_id"),)
    team = relationship("SportsTeam", foreign_keys=[team_id])


class MailFolder(Base):
    __tablename__ = "mail_folders"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    system_name = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("user_id", "name"),)


class MailMessage(Base):
    __tablename__ = "mail_messages"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    folder_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("mail_folders.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    external_message_id = Column(String)
    sender = Column(String, nullable=False)
    subject = Column(String)
    body_snippet = Column(Text)
    date_received = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, index=True)
    is_read = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class SearchQuery(Base):
    __tablename__ = "search_queries"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"))
    query_text = Column(Text, nullable=False, index=True)
    source = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class SearchResult(Base):
    __tablename__ = "search_results"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    query_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("search_queries.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    rank = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    title = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    url = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    snippet = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("query_id", "rank"),)


class Location(Base):
    __tablename__ = "locations"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False, index=True)
    city = Column(String)
    state = Column(String)
    country = Column(String)
    latitude = Column(Float)
    longitude = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("name", "city", "state", "country"),)


class WeatherCurrent(Base):
    __tablename__ = "weather_current"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    location_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("locations.id"), nullable=False, unique=True, index=True)
    temperature = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    condition = Column(String)
    humidity = Column(Float)
    wind_speed = Column(Float)
    observation_time = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class WeatherForecastDaily(Base):
    __tablename__ = "weather_forecast_daily"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    location_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("locations.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    forecast_date = Column(String, nullable=False)
    high_temp = Column(Float)
    low_temp = Column(Float)
    condition = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("location_id", "forecast_date"),)


class WeatherAlert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "weather_alerts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    location_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("locations.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    alert_type = Column(String)
    title = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text)
    severity = Column(String)
    start_time = Column(DateTime)
    end_time = Column(DateTime)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class HomepageTopic(Base):
    __tablename__ = "homepage_topics"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False, unique=True, index=True)
    category = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class HomepageUserTopic(Base):
    __tablename__ = "homepage_user_topics"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    topic_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("homepage_topics.id"), nullable=False, index=True)
    following = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("user_id", "topic_id"),)
    topic = relationship("HomepageTopic", foreign_keys=[topic_id])


Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)


class FinanceSymbolItem(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
    id: int = Field(..., description="Primary key from finance_symbols.", example=10)
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Ticker or instrument symbol.", example="AAPL")
    name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Descriptive name of the instrument.", example="Apple Inc.")
    type: str = Field(..., description="Instrument type, e.g. EQUITY, CRYPTO.", example="EQUITY")
    currency: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Trading currency code.", example="USD")
    exchange: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Exchange code or name.", example="NASDAQ")
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Row creation timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T10:00:00Z")
    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Row last update timestamp.", example="2025-01-02T10:00:00Z")


class FinanceSymbolsResponse(BaseModel):
    symbols: List[FinanceSymbolItem] = Field(..., description="List of matching symbols.", example=[])


class RealtimeQuoteResponse(BaseModel):
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Requested symbol.", example="TSLA")
    symbol_id: int = Field(..., description="finance_symbols.id associated with the symbol.", example=42)
    price: float = Field(..., description="Latest traded price.", example=255.31)
    price_change: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Absolute price change since previous close.", example=3.12)
    price_change_percent: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Percentage price change since previous close.", example=1.24)
    last_update_time: datetime = Field(..., description="Timestamp of the quote update.", example="2025-01-01T15:35:00Z")
    currency: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Trading currency from finance_symbols.", example="USD")
    exchange: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Exchange from finance_symbols.", example="NASDAQ")


class PriceHistoryDailyItem(BaseModel):
    date_str: str = Field(..., serialization_alias="date", description="Trading day date in YYYY-MM-DD.", example="2025-09-15")
    open: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Opening price.", example=26000.5)
    high: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Highest price.", example=27010.1)
    low: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Lowest price.", example=25800.2)
    close: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Closing price.", example=26550.7)
    volume: Optional[int] = Field(None, description="Trading volume for the day.", example=123456789)


class DailyPriceHistoryResponse(BaseModel):
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Symbol requested.", example="BTC-USD")
    symbol_id: int = Field(..., description="finance_symbols.id of the symbol.", example=55)
    prices: List[PriceHistoryDailyItem] = Field(..., description="Daily price history rows.", example=[])


class CreatePortfolioRequest(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(..., description="Name of the portfolio (unique per user).", example="Tech Watch 2025")
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Optional description of the portfolio.", example="My watchlist of major tech stocks for 2025.")


class PortfolioItem(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
    id: int = Field(..., description="Portfolio id.", example=5)
    user_id: int = Field(..., description="Portfolio owner (always 1).", example=1)
    name: str = Field(..., description="Portfolio name.", example="Tech Watch 2025")
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Portfolio description.", example="My watchlist of major tech stocks for 2025.")
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Creation timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T12:00:00Z")
    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Last update timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T12:00:00Z")


class PortfolioListResponse(BaseModel):
    portfolios: List[PortfolioItem] = Field(..., description="List of portfolios.", example=[])


class AddHoldingRequest(BaseModel):
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Symbol to add to the portfolio as a holding.", example="AAPL")


class HoldingItem(BaseModel):
    holding_id: int = Field(..., description="finance_portfolio_holdings.id.", example=101)
    portfolio_id: int = Field(..., description="Associated finance_portfolios.id.", example=5)
    symbol_id: int = Field(..., description="Associated finance_symbols.id for the symbol.", example=10)
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Symbol string for convenience.", example="AAPL")
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Creation timestamp for the holding.", example="2025-01-01T12:05:00Z")
    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Last update timestamp for the holding.", example="2025-01-01T12:05:00Z")


class HoldingListItem(BaseModel):
    holding_id: int = Field(..., description="finance_portfolio_holdings.id.", example=101)
    symbol_id: int = Field(..., description="finance_symbols.id.", example=10)
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Symbol string.", example="AAPL")
    symbol_name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Descriptive name of the symbol.", example="Apple Inc.")
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Holding creation time.", example="2025-01-01T12:05:00Z")
    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Holding last update time.", example="2025-01-01T12:05:00Z")


class HoldingsListResponse(BaseModel):
    portfolio_id: int = Field(..., description="Portfolio id for the holdings.", example=5)
    holdings: List[HoldingListItem] = Field(..., description="List of holdings.", example=[])


class CreatePriceAlertRequest(BaseModel):
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Symbol to monitor for price triggers.", example="META")
    direction: str = Field(..., description="Direction for alert, must be ABOVE or BELOW.", example="BELOW")
    threshold_price: float = Field(..., description="Trigger threshold price in symbol currency.", example=300.0)
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Field(True, description="Whether alert starts active or inactive.", example=True)


class PriceAlertItem(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(..., description="finance_price_alerts.id for the new alert.", example=2001)
    user_id: int = Field(..., description="Owner user id (1).", example=1)
    symbol_id: int = Field(..., description="finance_symbols.id for the symbol.", example=77)
    symbol: str = Field(..., description="Symbol value.", example="META")
    direction: str = Field(..., description="Direction condition for the alert.", example="BELOW")
    threshold_price: float = Field(..., description="Trigger price.", example=300.0)
    is_active: bool = Field(..., description="True if alert is active, else False.", example=True)
    triggered_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="When alert was last triggered, if any.", example=None)
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Creation timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T13:00:00Z")
    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Last update timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T13:00:00Z")


class PriceAlertListResponse(BaseModel):
    alerts: List[PriceAlertItem] = Field(..., description="List of alerts.", example=[])


class UpdatePriceAlertRequest(BaseModel):
    direction: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="New direction if changing, ABOVE or BELOW.", example="ABOVE")
    threshold_price: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="New threshold price if changing.", example=380.0)
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Field(None, description="Set to True to activate, False to deactivate.", example=True)


class SportsTeamItem(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
    id: int = Field(..., description="sports_teams.id.", example=301)
    name: str = Field(..., description="Full team name.", example="Los Angeles Lakers")
    short_name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Short name or abbreviation.", example="LAL")
    city: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="City associated with the team.", example="Los Angeles")
    country: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Country of the team.", example="USA")
    league: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="League code.", example="NBA")
    sport: str = Field(..., description="Sport type.", example="basketball")

    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Row last update time.", example="2025-01-02T10:00:00Z")


class SportsTeamsResponse(BaseModel):
    teams: List[SportsTeamItem] = Field(..., description="Matching sports teams.", example=[])


class LiveGameItem(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(..., description="sports_games.id.", example=8001)
    sport: str = Field(..., description="Sport type, e.g. basketball.", example="basketball")
    league: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="League for the game.", example="NBA")
    season: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Season identifier such as 2025-2026.", example="2025-2026")
    start_time: datetime = Field(..., description="Scheduled start time of the game.", example="2025-01-01T03:00:00Z")
    status: str = Field(..., description="Game status such as LIVE or FINAL.", example="LIVE")
    period: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Current period or quarter description.", example="Q3 08:15")
    home_team_id: int = Field(..., description="sports_teams.id for home team.", example=301)
    away_team_id: int = Field(..., description="sports_teams.id for away team.", example=302)
    home_team_name: str = Field(..., description="Home team name.", example="Los Angeles Lakers")
    away_team_name: str = Field(..., description="Away team name.", example="Golden State Warriors")
    home_score: int = Field(..., description="Current home team score.", example=88)
    away_score: int = Field(..., description="Current away team score.", example=85)
    venue: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Venue name if available.", example="Crypto.com Arena")
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Game record creation timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z")
    updated_at: Optional[datetime] = Field(None, description="Game record last update timestamp.", example="2025-01-01T03:45:00Z")


class LiveGamesResponse(BaseModel):
    games: List[LiveGameItem] = Field(..., description="List of live games.", example=[])


class GameTopPlayerItem(BaseModel):
    player_id: int = Field(..., description="sports_players.id.", example=9001)
    player_name: str = Field(..., description="Full player name from sports_players.", example="LeBron James")
    team_id: int = Field(..., description="sports_teams.id for the player's team.", example=301)
    team_name: str = Field(..., description="Player team name.", example="Los Angeles Lakers")
    points: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Points scored in the game.", example=32.0)
    assists: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Assists in the game.", example=8.0)
    rebounds: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Rebounds in the game.", example=10.0)
    stat_json: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="JSON string with extended stats.", example='{"steals":2,"blocks":1}')


class GameTopPlayersResponse(BaseModel):
    game_id: int = Field(..., description="Game id for the stats.", example=8001)
    players: List[GameTopPlayerItem] = Field(..., description="Top players by points.", example=[])


class LeagueSeasonItem(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
    id: int = Field(..., description="sports_league_seasons.id.", example=6001)
    sport: str = Field(..., description="Sport type.", example="soccer")
    league: str = Field(..., description="League code.", example="EPL")
    season: str = Field(..., description="Season identifier.", example="2025-2026")

@app.get(
    "/api/finance/symbols",
    response_model=FinanceSymbolsResponse,
    summary="Search finance symbols",
    description="Search finance_symbols by exact symbol or prefix.",
    tags=["finance", "symbols"],
    operation_id="search_finance_symbols",
)
async def search_finance_symbols(
    symbol: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Exact symbol to match.", example="AAPL"),
    symbol_prefix: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Prefix to search symbols with LIKE prefix%.", example="AA"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(20, description="Maximum number of results to return.", example=20),
) -> FinanceSymbolsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(FinanceSymbol)
    if symbol is not None:
        query = query.filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol == symbol)
    elif symbol_prefix is not None:
        like_pattern = symbol_prefix + "%"
        query = query.filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol.like(like_pattern))
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    symbols = []
    for r in rows:
        symbols.append(
            FinanceSymbolItem(
                id=r.id,
                symbol=r.symbol,
                name=r.name,
                type=r.type,
                currency=r.currency,
                exchange=r.exchange,
                created_at=r.created_at,
                updated_at=r.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return FinanceSymbolsResponse(symbols=symbols)


@app.get(
    "/api/finance/quotes/realtime",
    response_model=Optional[RealtimeQuoteResponse],
    summary="Get real-time quote",
    description="Get latest finance_realtime_quotes row for a given symbol.",
    tags=["finance", "quotes"],
    operation_id="get_realtime_quote_by_symbol",
)
async def get_realtime_quote_by_symbol(
    symbol: str = Query(..., description="Symbol to fetch the latest real-time quote for.", example="TSLA")
) -> Optional[RealtimeQuoteResponse]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    sym = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol == symbol).first()
    if sym is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    qr = session.query(FinanceRealtimeQuote).filter(FinanceRealtimeQuote.symbol_id == sym.id).first()
    if qr is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    resp = RealtimeQuoteResponse(
        symbol=sym.symbol,
        symbol_id=sym.id,
        price=qr.price,
        price_change=qr.price_change,
        price_change_percent=qr.price_change_percent,
        last_update_time=qr.last_update_time,
        currency=sym.currency,
        exchange=sym.exchange,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp


@app.get(
    "/api/finance/history/daily",
    response_model=Optional[DailyPriceHistoryResponse],
    summary="Get daily price history",
    description="Get finance_price_history_daily rows between start and end dates.",
    tags=["finance", "history"],
    operation_id="get_daily_price_history",
)
async def get_daily_price_history(
    symbol: str = Query(..., description="Symbol to get history for.", example="BTC-USD"),
    start_date: str = Query(..., description="Start date in YYYY-MM-DD inclusive.", example="2025-07-01"),
    end_date: str = Query(..., description="End date in YYYY-MM-DD inclusive.", example="2025-12-31"),
) -> Optional[DailyPriceHistoryResponse]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    sym = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol == symbol).first()
    if sym is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    q = (
        session.query(FinancePriceHistoryDaily)
        .filter(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.symbol_id == sym.id)
        .filter(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.date >= start_date)
        .filter(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.date <= end_date)
        .order_by(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.date)
    )
    rows = q.all()
    prices: List[PriceHistoryDailyItem] = []
    for r in rows:
        prices.append(
            PriceHistoryDailyItem(
                date_str=r.date,
                open=r.open,
                high=r.high,
                low=r.low,
                close=r.close,
                volume=r.volume,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return DailyPriceHistoryResponse(symbol=sym.symbol, symbol_id=sym.id, prices=prices)


@app.get(
    "/api/finance/history/daily/1y_chart",
    response_model=Optional[DailyPriceHistoryResponse],
    summary="Get 1-year price chart",
    description="Get last 1 year of finance_price_history_daily rows for a symbol.",
    tags=["finance", "history"],
    operation_id="get_1y_price_chart",
)
async def get_1y_price_chart(
    symbol: str = Query(..., description="Symbol to get 1-year chart data for.", example="TSLA")
) -> Optional[DailyPriceHistoryResponse]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    sym = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol == symbol).first()
    if sym is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    now = datetime.utcnow().date()
    start = now - timedelta(days=365)
    start_str = start.isoformat()
    end_str = now.isoformat()
    q = (
        session.query(FinancePriceHistoryDaily)
        .filter(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.symbol_id == sym.id)
        .filter(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.date >= start_str)
        .filter(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.date <= end_str)
        .order_by(FinancePriceHistoryDaily.date)
    )
    rows = q.all()
    prices: List[PriceHistoryDailyItem] = []
    for r in rows:
        prices.append(
            PriceHistoryDailyItem(
                date_str=r.date,
                open=r.open,
                high=r.high,
                low=r.low,
                close=r.close,
                volume=r.volume,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return DailyPriceHistoryResponse(symbol=sym.symbol, symbol_id=sym.id, prices=prices)

@app.post(
    "/api/finance/portfolios/{portfolio_id}/holdings",
    response_model=Optional[HoldingItem],
    summary="Add holding to portfolio",
    description="Insert a finance_portfolio_holdings row linking portfolio_id and finance_symbols.id.",
    tags=["finance", "portfolios", "holdings"],
    operation_id="add_portfolio_holding",
)
async def add_portfolio_holding(
    portfolio_id: int = Path(..., description="Target finance_portfolios.id owned by current user.", example=5),
    payload: AddHoldingRequest = Body(..., description="Holding creation payload."),
) -> Optional[HoldingItem]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    portfolio = (
        session.query(FinancePortfolio)
        .filter(FinancePortfolio.id == portfolio_id)
        .filter(FinancePortfolio.user_id == user_id)
        .first()
    )
    if portfolio is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    symbol_obj = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol == payload.symbol).first()
    if symbol_obj is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    existing = (
        session.query(FinancePortfolioHolding)
        .filter(FinancePortfolioHolding.portfolio_id == portfolio.id)
        .filter(FinancePortfolioHolding.symbol_id == symbol_obj.id)
        .first()
    )
    if existing is not None:
        holding = existing
    else:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        holding = FinancePortfolioHolding(
            portfolio_id=portfolio.id,
            symbol_id=symbol_obj.id,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(holding)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(holding)
    resp = HoldingItem(
        holding_id=holding.id,
        portfolio_id=holding.portfolio_id,
        symbol_id=holding.symbol_id,
        symbol=symbol_obj.symbol,
        created_at=holding.created_at,
        updated_at=holding.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp


@app.get(
    "/api/finance/portfolios/{portfolio_id}/holdings",
    response_model=HoldingsListResponse,
    summary="List portfolio holdings",
    description="Retrieve all finance_portfolio_holdings rows for a portfolio_id.",
    tags=["finance", "portfolios", "holdings"],
    operation_id="list_portfolio_holdings",
)
async def list_portfolio_holdings(
    portfolio_id: int = Path(..., description="finance_portfolios.id owned by user_id=1.", example=5)
) -> HoldingsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    portfolio = (
        session.query(FinancePortfolio)
        .filter(FinancePortfolio.id == portfolio_id)
        .filter(FinancePortfolio.user_id == user_id)
        .first()
    )
    if portfolio is None:
        session.close()
        return HoldingsListResponse(portfolio_id=portfolio_id, holdings=[])
    holdings_rows = (
        session.query(FinancePortfolioHolding)
        .filter(FinancePortfolioHolding.portfolio_id == portfolio.id)
        .all()
    )
    holdings: List[HoldingListItem] = []
    for h in holdings_rows:
        sym = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.id == h.symbol_id).first()
        symbol_name = sym.name if sym is not None else None
        symbol_code = sym.symbol if sym is not None else ""
        holdings.append(
            HoldingListItem(
                holding_id=h.id,
                symbol_id=h.symbol_id,
                symbol=symbol_code,
                symbol_name=symbol_name,
                created_at=h.created_at,
                updated_at=h.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return HoldingsListResponse(portfolio_id=portfolio.id, holdings=holdings)


@app.post(
    "/api/finance/alerts",
    response_model=Optional[PriceAlertItem],
    summary="Create price alert",
    description="Insert a finance_price_alerts row for user_id=1.",
    tags=["finance", "alerts"],
    operation_id="create_price_alert",
)
async def create_price_alert(
    payload: CreatePriceAlertRequest = Body(..., description="Price alert creation payload.")
) -> Optional[PriceAlertItem]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    symbol_obj = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.symbol == payload.symbol).first()
    if symbol_obj is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    is_active_int = 1 if (payload.is_active is None or payload.is_active) else 0
    alert = FinancePriceAlert(
        user_id=user_id,
        symbol_id=symbol_obj.id,
        direction=payload.direction,
        threshold_price=payload.threshold_price,
        is_active=is_active_int,
        triggered_at=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(alert)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(alert)
    resp = PriceAlertItem(
        id=alert.id,
        user_id=alert.user_id,
        symbol_id=alert.symbol_id,
        symbol=symbol_obj.symbol,
        direction=alert.direction,
        threshold_price=alert.threshold_price,
        is_active=alert.is_active == 1,
        triggered_at=alert.triggered_at,
        created_at=alert.created_at,
        updated_at=alert.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()

@app.get(
    "/api/finance/alerts",
    response_model=PriceAlertListResponse,
    summary="List price alerts",
    description="List all finance_price_alerts rows for user_id=1 with optional filters.",
    tags=["finance", "alerts"],
    operation_id="list_price_alerts",
)
async def list_price_alerts(
    symbol: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Optional symbol to filter alerts by.", example="META"),
    is_active: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="1 for active, 0 for inactive.", example=1),
) -> PriceAlertListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    query = session.query(FinancePriceAlert).filter(FinancePriceAlert.user_id == user_id)
    if is_active is not None:
        query = query.filter(FinancePriceAlert.is_active == is_active)
    alerts_rows = query.all()
    alerts: List[PriceAlertItem] = []
    symbol_cache: Dict[int, str] = {}
    for a in alerts_rows:
        sym_name: Optional[str] = None
        if a.symbol_id in symbol_cache:
            sym_name = symbol_cache[a.symbol_id]
        else:
            sym = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.id == a.symbol_id).first()
            if sym is not None:
                sym_name = sym.symbol
                symbol_cache[a.symbol_id] = sym.symbol
        if symbol is not None and sym_name is not None and sym_name != symbol:
            continue
        alerts.append(
            PriceAlertItem(
                id=a.id,
                user_id=a.user_id,
                symbol_id=a.symbol_id,
                symbol=sym_name if sym_name is not None else "",
                direction=a.direction,
                threshold_price=a.threshold_price,
                is_active=a.is_active == 1,
                triggered_at=a.triggered_at,
                created_at=a.created_at,
                updated_at=a.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return PriceAlertListResponse(alerts=alerts)


@app.patch(
    "/api/finance/alerts/{alert_id}",
    response_model=Optional[PriceAlertItem],
    summary="Update price alert",
    description="Update is_active, threshold_price, or direction of a price alert.",
    tags=["finance", "alerts"],
    operation_id="update_price_alert",
)
async def update_price_alert(
    alert_id: int = Path(..., description="Target finance_price_alerts.id belonging to user_id=1.", example=2001),
    payload: UpdatePriceAlertRequest = Body(..., description="Price alert update payload."),
) -> Optional[PriceAlertItem]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    alert = (
        session.query(FinancePriceAlert)
        .filter(FinancePriceAlert.id == alert_id)
        .filter(FinancePriceAlert.user_id == user_id)
        .first()
    )
    if alert is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    if payload.direction is not None:
        alert.direction = payload.direction
    if payload.threshold_price is not None:
        alert.threshold_price = payload.threshold_price
    if payload.is_active is not None:
        alert.is_active = 1 if payload.is_active else 0
    alert.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    sym = session.query(FinanceSymbol).filter(FinanceSymbol.id == alert.symbol_id).first()
    sym_code = sym.symbol if sym is not None else ""
    resp = PriceAlertItem(
        id=alert.id,
        user_id=alert.user_id,
        symbol_id=alert.symbol_id,
        symbol=sym_code,
        direction=alert.direction,
        threshold_price=alert.threshold_price,
        is_active=alert.is_active == 1,
        triggered_at=alert.triggered_at,
        created_at=alert.created_at,
        updated_at=alert.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.get(
    "/api/sports/games/live",
    response_model=LiveGamesResponse,
    summary="Get live games by teams",
    description="Find LIVE sports_games rows for given home and away team names.",
    tags=["sports", "games"],
    operation_id="get_live_game_by_teams",
)
async def get_live_game_by_teams(
    home_team_name: str = Query(..., description="Full name of the home team.", example="Los Angeles Lakers"),
    away_team_name: str = Query(..., description="Full name of the away team.", example="Golden State Warriors"),
    league: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="League code such as NBA, used to disambiguate teams.", example="NBA"),
) -> LiveGamesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    home_team_q = session.query(SportsTeam).filter(SportsTeam.name == home_team_name)
    away_team_q = session.query(SportsTeam).filter(SportsTeam.name == away_team_name)
    if league is not None:
        home_team_q = home_team_q.filter(SportsTeam.league == league)
        away_team_q = away_team_q.filter(SportsTeam.league == league)
    home_team = home_team_q.first()
    away_team = away_team_q.first()
    if home_team is None or away_team is None:
        session.close()
        return LiveGamesResponse(games=[])
    games_q = (
        session.query(SportsGame)
        .filter(SportsGame.home_team_id == home_team.id)
        .filter(SportsGame.away_team_id == away_team.id)
        .filter(SportsGame.status == "LIVE")
    )
    if league is not None:
        games_q = games_q.filter(SportsGame.league == league)
    games_rows = games_q.all()
    games: List[LiveGameItem] = []
    for g in games_rows:
        games.append(
            LiveGameItem(
                id=g.id,
                sport=g.sport,
                league=g.league,
                season=g.season,
                start_time=g.start_time,
                status=g.status,
                period=g.period,
                home_team_id=g.home_team_id,
                away_team_id=g.away_team_id,
                home_team_name=home_team.name,
                away_team_name=away_team.name,
                home_score=g.home_score,
                away_score=g.away_score,
                venue=g.venue,
                created_at=g.created_at,
                updated_at=g.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return LiveGamesResponse(games=games)

@app.get(
    "/api/sports/standings/team",
    response_model=TeamStandingsResponse,
    summary="Get team standings by name",
    description="Filter sports_league_standings for a league_season_id by team names.",
    tags=["sports", "standings"],
    operation_id="get_team_standings_by_name",
)
async def get_team_standings_by_name(
    league_season_id: int = Query(..., description="sports_league_seasons.id to pull standings from.", example=6001),
    team_names: str = Query(..., description="Comma-separated list of team names to filter, exact match.", example="Arsenal,Manchester City,Liverpool"),
) -> TeamStandingsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    names_list = [n.strip() for n in team_names.split(",") if n.strip() != ""]
    standings: List[TeamStandingItem] = []
    for name in names_list:
        team = session.query(SportsTeam).filter(SportsTeam.name == name).first()
        if team is None:
            continue
        s = (
            session.query(SportsLeagueStanding)
            .filter(SportsLeagueStanding.league_season_id == league_season_id)
            .filter(SportsLeagueStanding.team_id == team.id)
            .first()
        )
        if s is None:
            continue
        standings.append(
            TeamStandingItem(
                team_id=team.id,
                team_name=team.name,
                rank=s.rank,
                points=s.points,
                goal_difference=s.goal_difference,
                played=s.played,
                wins=s.wins,
                draws=s.draws,
                losses=s.losses,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return TeamStandingsResponse(league_season_id=league_season_id, teams=standings)

@app.get(
    "/api/mail/messages/search",
    response_model=MailMessagesResponse,
    summary="Search mail messages",
    description="Search mail_messages for user_id=1 with subject filter and date range.",
    tags=["mail", "messages"],
    operation_id="search_mail_messages",
)
async def search_mail_messages(
    folder_system_name: str = Query(..., description="System name of the folder to search in, e.g., INBOX.", example="INBOX"),
    subject_contains: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Substring to search in subject using LIKE %substring%.", example="invoice"),
    received_after: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter messages received on or after this ISO datetime.", example="2025-12-01T00:00:00Z"),
    received_before: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter messages received on or before this ISO datetime.", example="2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(10, description="Maximum number of messages to return.", example=10),
) -> MailMessagesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    folder = (
        session.query(MailFolder)
        .filter(MailFolder.user_id == user_id)
        .filter(MailFolder.system_name == folder_system_name)
        .first()
    )
    if folder is None:
        session.close()
        return MailMessagesResponse(messages=[])
    q = (
        session.query(MailMessage)
        .filter(MailMessage.user_id == user_id)
        .filter(MailMessage.folder_id == folder.id)
        .order_by(MailMessage.date_received.desc())
    )
    if subject_contains is not None:
        pattern = "%" + subject_contains + "%"
        q = q.filter(MailMessage.subject.like(pattern))
    if received_after is not None:
        try_after = datetime.fromisoformat(received_after.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
        q = q.filter(MailMessage.date_received >= try_after)
    if received_before is not None:
        try_before = datetime.fromisoformat(received_before.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
        q = q.filter(MailMessage.date_received <= try_before)
    if limit is not None:
        q = q.limit(limit)
    rows = q.all()
    messages: List[MailMessageItem] = []
    for m in rows:
        messages.append(
            MailMessageItem(
                id=m.id,
                folder_id=m.folder_id,
                sender=m.sender,
                subject=m.subject,
                body_snippet=m.body_snippet,
                date_received=m.date_received,
                is_read=m.is_read == 1,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return MailMessagesResponse(messages=messages)


@app.post(
    "/api/search/queries",
    response_model=SearchQueryItem,
    summary="Create search query",
    description="Insert a search_queries row for current user and query_text.",
    tags=["search"],
    operation_id="create_search_query",
)
async def create_search_query(
    payload: CreateSearchQueryRequest = Body(..., description="Search query creation payload.")
) -> SearchQueryItem:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    sq = SearchQuery(
        user_id=user_id,
        query_text=payload.query_text,
        source=payload.source,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(sq)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(sq)
    resp = SearchQueryItem(
        id=sq.id,
        user_id=sq.user_id,
        query_text=sq.query_text,
        source=sq.source,
        created_at=sq.created_at,
        updated_at=sq.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp


@app.post(
    "/api/search/results",
    response_model=CreateSearchResultsResponse,
    summary="Store search results batch",
    description="Insert multiple search_results rows for a given query_id.",
    tags=["search"],
    operation_id="create_search_results_batch",
)
async def create_search_results_batch(
    payload: CreateSearchResultsRequest = Body(..., description="Search results batch payload.")
) -> CreateSearchResultsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    inserted_count = 0
    for r in payload.results:
        sr = SearchResult(
            query_id=payload.query_id,
            rank=r.rank,
            title=r.title,
            url=r.url,
            snippet=r.snippet,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(sr)
        inserted_count += 1
    session.commit()
    session.close()
    return CreateSearchResultsResponse(query_id=payload.query_id, inserted_count=inserted_count)

@app.get(
    "/api/weather/forecast/daily",
    response_model=DailyWeatherForecastResponse,
    summary="Get daily weather forecast",
    description="Read weather_forecast_daily rows for a location between dates.",
    tags=["weather"],
    operation_id="get_daily_weather_forecast",
)
async def get_daily_weather_forecast(
    location_id: int = Query(..., description="locations.id to get forecast for.", example=3001),
    start_date: str = Query(..., description="Start forecast_date YYYY-MM-DD inclusive.", example="2026-01-01"),
    end_date: str = Query(..., description="End forecast_date YYYY-MM-DD inclusive.", example="2026-01-05"),
) -> DailyWeatherForecastResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    q = (
        session.query(WeatherForecastDaily)
        .filter(WeatherForecastDaily.location_id == location_id)
        .filter(WeatherForecastDaily.forecast_date >= start_date)
        .filter(WeatherForecastDaily.forecast_date <= end_date)
        .order_by(WeatherForecastDaily.forecast_date)
    )
    rows = q.all()
    forecasts: List[DailyForecastItem] = []
    for f in rows:
        forecasts.append(
            DailyForecastItem(
                forecast_date=f.forecast_date,
                high_temp=f.high_temp,
                low_temp=f.low_temp,
                condition=f.condition,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return DailyWeatherForecastResponse(location_id=location_id, forecasts=forecasts)


@app.get(
    "/api/weather/alerts",
    response_model=WeatherAlertsResponse,
    summary="Get weather alerts",
    description="Read weather_alerts rows for a location id with optional active filter.",
    tags=["weather"],
    operation_id="get_weather_alerts_by_location",
)
async def get_weather_alerts_by_location(
    location_id: int = Query(..., description="locations.id to retrieve alerts for.", example=3001),
    active_only: Optional[int] = Query(1, description="If 1, return only alerts currently active; if 0, return all.", example=1),
) -> WeatherAlertsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    q = session.query(WeatherAlert).filter(WeatherAlert.location_id == location_id)
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if active_only is not None and active_only == 1:
        q = q.filter(WeatherAlert.start_time <= now).filter(WeatherAlert.end_time >= now)
    rows = q.all()
    alerts: List[WeatherAlertItem] = []
    for a in rows:
        alerts.append(
            WeatherAlertItem(
                id=a.id,
                alert_type=a.alert_type,
                title=a.title,
                description=a.description,
                severity=a.severity,
                start_time=a.start_time,
                end_time=a.end_time,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return WeatherAlertsResponse(location_id=location_id, alerts=alerts)


@app.get(
    "/api/homepage/topics",
    response_model=HomepageTopicsResponse,
    summary="List homepage topics",
    description="Read all homepage_topics rows that can be followed by users.",
    tags=["homepage", "topics"],
    operation_id="list_homepage_topics",
)
async def list_homepage_topics() -> HomepageTopicsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rows = session.query(HomepageTopic).all()
    topics: List[HomepageTopicItem] = []
    for t in rows:
        topics.append(
            HomepageTopicItem(
                id=t.id,
                name=t.name,
                category=t.category,
                created_at=t.created_at,
                updated_at=t.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return HomepageTopicsResponse(topics=topics)


@app.get(
    "/api/homepage/user-topics",
    response_model=HomepageUserTopicsResponse,
    summary="List user homepage topics",
    description="Retrieve homepage_user_topics rows for user_id=1.",
    tags=["homepage", "topics"],
    operation_id="list_homepage_user_topics",
)
async def list_homepage_user_topics() -> HomepageUserTopicsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    rows = session.query(HomepageUserTopic).filter(HomepageUserTopic.user_id == user_id).all()
    topics: List[HomepageUserTopicItem] = []
    for ut in rows:
        topic = session.query(HomepageTopic).filter(HomepageTopic.id == ut.topic_id).first()
        if topic is None:
            continue
        topics.append(
            HomepageUserTopicItem(
                topic_id=topic.id,
                topic_name=topic.name,
                following=ut.following == 1,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return HomepageUserTopicsResponse(user_id=user_id, topics=topics)


@app.post(
    "/api/homepage/user-topics",
    response_model=Optional[SetHomepageUserTopicResponse],
    summary="Set homepage topic follow",
    description="Insert or update a homepage_user_topics row for user_id=1.",
    tags=["homepage", "topics"],
    operation_id="set_homepage_user_topic",
)
async def set_homepage_user_topic(
    payload: SetHomepageUserTopicRequest = Body(..., description="User topic follow/unfollow payload.")
) -> Optional[SetHomepageUserTopicResponse]:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    topic = session.query(HomepageTopic).filter(HomepageTopic.name == payload.topic_name).first()
    if topic is None:
        session.close()
        return None
    ut = (
        session.query(HomepageUserTopic)
        .filter(HomepageUserTopic.user_id == user_id)
        .filter(HomepageUserTopic.topic_id == topic.id)
        .first()
    )
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if ut is None:
        ut = HomepageUserTopic(
            user_id=user_id,
            topic_id=topic.id,
            following=1 if payload.following else 0,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(ut)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(ut)
    else:
        ut.following = 1 if payload.following else 0
        ut.updated_at = now
        session.commit()
    resp = SetHomepageUserTopicResponse(
        user_id=user_id,
        topic_id=topic.id,
        topic_name=topic.name,
        following=ut.following == 1,
        created_at=ut.created_at,
        updated_at=ut.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp

    port = int(os.getenv("PORT", "8000"))
    uvicorn.run(app, host=host, port=port)

@app.get(
    "/api/customers",
    response_model=CustomersListResponse,
    summary="Search and list customers",
    description="List customers with optional filters by name, type, email, or phone.",
    tags=["customers"],
    operation_id="list_customers",
)
async def list_customers_endpoint(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Partial match filter on customer name", example="Greenfield"),
    customer_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by customer type: Residential or Commercial", example="Commercial"),
    email: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Exact or partial email filter", example="blue.sky@example.com"),
    phone: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Exact or partial phone filter", example="555-01"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(50, description="Maximum number of customers to return", example=50),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Offset for pagination", example=0),
) -> CustomersListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Customer)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Customer.name.like(f"%{name}%"))
    if customer_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(Customer.customer_type == customer_type)
    if email is not None:
        query = query.filter(Customer.email.like(f"%{email}%"))
    if phone is not None:
        query = query.filter(Customer.phone.like(f"%{phone}%"))
    total = query.count()
    records = query.offset(offset).limit(limit).all()
    items = [CustomersListItem.model_validate(r) for r in records]
    resp = CustomersListResponse(items=items, total=total)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.post(
    "/api/jobs/{job_id}/tags",
    response_model=JobTagsResponse,
    summary="Attach tags to a job",
    description="Associate one or more existing tags with a job via job_tags records.",
    tags=["jobs", "tags"],
    operation_id="add_tags_to_job",
)
async def add_tags_to_job_endpoint(
    job_id: int = Path(..., description="Job ID to tag", example=9001),
    body: JobTagsRequest = Body(...),
) -> JobTagsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    existing = session.query(JobTag).filter(JobTag.job_id == job_id).all()
    existing_ids = {jt.tag_id for jt in existing}
    for tid in body.tag_ids:
        if tid not in existing_ids:
            jt = JobTag(job_id=job_id, tag_id=tid)
            session.add(jt)
    session.commit()
    all_links = session.query(JobTag).filter(JobTag.job_id == job_id).all()
    tag_ids = [jt.tag_id for jt in all_links]
    resp = JobTagsResponse(job_id=job_id, tag_ids=tag_ids)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.get(
    "/api/dispatch/technicians/{technician_id}/schedule",
    response_model=TechnicianScheduleResponse,
    summary="Get technician schedule for a date",
    description="Return ordered job_assignments for a technician on a given date.",
    tags=["dispatch", "job_assignments", "jobs"],
    operation_id="get_technician_schedule_for_date",
)
async def get_technician_schedule_for_date_endpoint(
    technician_id: int = Path(..., description="Technician whose schedule is requested", example=9),
    date_param: str = Query(..., alias="date", description="Target date in YYYY-MM-DD for schedule view", example="2025-01-01"),
) -> TechnicianScheduleResponse:
    schedule_date = datetime.strptime(date_param, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    start_dt = datetime.combine(schedule_date, datetime.min.time())
    end_dt = datetime.combine(schedule_date, datetime.max.time())
    session = SessionLocal()
    assignments = (
        session.query(JobAssignment, Job)
        .join(Job, JobAssignment.job_id == Job.id)
        .filter(
            JobAssignment.technician_id == technician_id,
            JobAssignment.start_datetime >= start_dt,
            JobAssignment.start_datetime <= end_dt,
        )
        .order_by(JobAssignment.start_datetime)
        .all()
    )
    items: List[TechnicianScheduleAssignmentItem] = []
    for a, j in assignments:
        job_number = j.job_number if j is not None else ""
        item = TechnicianScheduleAssignmentItem(
            assignment_id=a.id,
            job_id=a.job_id,
            job_number=job_number,
            start_datetime=a.start_datetime,
            end_datetime=a.end_datetime,
            assignment_order=a.assignment_order,
        )
        items.append(item)
    resp = TechnicianScheduleResponse(technician_id=technician_id, schedule_date=schedule_date, assignments=items)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.post(
    "/api/estimates/{estimate_id}/line_items",
    response_model=EstimateLineItemResponse,
    summary="Add line item to estimate",
    description="Create a new estimate_line_items row using a pricebook item and quantity.",
    tags=["estimates"],
    operation_id="create_estimate_line_item",
)
async def create_estimate_line_item_endpoint(
    estimate_id: int = Path(..., description="Estimate ID to add a line to", example=7001),
    body: EstimateLineItemCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> EstimateLineItemResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    line_number_value = body.line_number
    if line_number_value is None:
        max_line = (
            session.query(EstimateLineItem)
            .filter(EstimateLineItem.estimate_id == estimate_id)
            .order_by(EstimateLineItem.line_number.desc())
            .first()
        )
        if max_line is None:
            line_number_value = 1
        else:
            line_number_value = max_line.line_number + 1
    line_total_value = body.quantity * body.unit_price
    line = EstimateLineItem(
        estimate_id=estimate_id,
        line_number=line_number_value,
        pricebook_item_id=body.pricebook_item_id,
        description=body.description,
        quantity=body.quantity,
        unit_price=body.unit_price,
        line_total=line_total_value,
    )
    session.add(line)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(line)
    result = EstimateLineItemResponse.model_validate(line)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(

            created_by_user_id=1,
        )
        session.add(estimate)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(estimate)
    lines = session.query(EstimateLineItem).filter(EstimateLineItem.estimate_id == estimate_id).all()
    subtotal_value = 0.0
    for l in lines:
        subtotal_value += l.line_total
    tax_rate_value = body.tax_rate if body.tax_rate is not None else 0.0
    tax_amount_value = subtotal_value * tax_rate_value
    total_amount_value = subtotal_value + tax_amount_value
    estimate.subtotal = subtotal_value
    estimate.tax_amount = tax_amount_value
    estimate.total_amount = total_amount_value
    estimate.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(estimate)
    result = EstimateTotalsResponse.model_validate(estimate)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(
    "/api/estimates/{estimate_id}/convert_to_invoice",
    response_model=EstimateConvertToInvoiceResponse,
    summary="Convert estimate to invoice",
    description="Create an invoice and invoice_line_items from an approved estimate.",
    tags=["estimates", "invoices"],
    operation_id="convert_estimate_to_invoice",
)
async def convert_estimate_to_invoice_endpoint(
    estimate_id: int = Path(..., description="Estimate ID to convert", example=7001),
    body: EstimateConvertToInvoiceRequest = Body(...),
) -> EstimateConvertToInvoiceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    estimate = session.query(Estimate).filter(Estimate.id == estimate_id).first()
    if estimate is None:
        estimate = Estimate(
            id=estimate_id,
            estimate_number=None,
            job_id=0,
            customer_id=0,
            status="Draft",
            subtotal=0.0,
            tax_amount=0.0,
            total_amount=0.0,
            created_by_user_id=1,
        )
        session.add(estimate)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(estimate)
    invoice_number_value = body.invoice_number
    if invoice_number_value is None:
        existing_count = session.query(Invoice).count()
        invoice_number_value = f"INV-{88000 + existing_count + 1}"
    invoice = Invoice(
        invoice_number=invoice_number_value,
        job_id=estimate.job_id,
        customer_id=estimate.customer_id,
        source_estimate_id=estimate.id,
        status="Draft",
        subtotal=estimate.subtotal,
        tax_amount=estimate.tax_amount,
        total_amount=estimate.total_amount,
        balance_due=estimate.total_amount,
        invoice_date=body.invoice_date,
        created_by_user_id=1,
    )
    session.add(invoice)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(invoice)
    line_items = session.query(EstimateLineItem).filter(EstimateLineItem.estimate_id == estimate_id).order_by(EstimateLineItem.line_number).all()
    for li in line_items:
        inv_line = InvoiceLineItem(
            invoice_id=invoice.id,
            line_number=li.line_number,
            pricebook_item_id=li.pricebook_item_id,
            description=li.description,
            quantity=li.quantity,
            unit_price=li.unit_price,
            line_total=li.line_total,
        )
        session.add(inv_line)
    estimate.status = "Converted"
    estimate.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    resp = EstimateConvertToInvoiceResponse(
        invoice_id=invoice.id,
        invoice_number=invoice.invoice_number,
        status=invoice.status,
        subtotal=invoice.subtotal,
        tax_amount=invoice.tax_amount,
        total_amount=invoice.total_amount,
        balance_due=invoice.balance_due,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.post(
    "/api/invoices/{invoice_id}/recalculate_balance",
    response_model=InvoiceRecalculateBalanceResponse,
    summary="Recalculate invoice balance from payments",
    description="Recompute invoice balance_due and possibly update status based on payments.",
    tags=["invoices", "payments"],
    operation_id="recalculate_invoice_balance",
)
async def recalculate_invoice_balance_endpoint(
    invoice_id: int = Path(..., description="Invoice ID whose balance will be recalculated", example=8001)
) -> InvoiceRecalculateBalanceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    invoice = session.query(Invoice).filter(Invoice.id == invoice_id).first()
    if invoice is None:
        invoice = Invoice(
            id=invoice_id,
            invoice_number="",
            job_id=None,
            customer_id=0,
            source_estimate_id=None,
            status="Draft",
            subtotal=0.0,
            tax_amount=0.0,
            total_amount=0.0,
            balance_due=0.0,
            invoice_date=date.today(),
            created_by_user_id=1,
        )
        session.add(invoice)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(invoice)
    payments = session.query(Payment).filter(Payment.invoice_id == invoice_id).all()
    paid_amount_value = 0.0
    for p in payments:
        paid_amount_value += p.amount
    balance_due_value = invoice.total_amount - paid_amount_value
    if balance_due_value <= 0:
        invoice.status = "Paid"
        balance_due_value = 0.0
    elif paid_amount_value == 0:
        invoice.status = "Sent"
    else:
        invoice.status = "PartiallyPaid"
    invoice.balance_due = balance_due_value
    invoice.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(invoice)
    resp = InvoiceRecalculateBalanceResponse(
        id=invoice.id,
        invoice_number=invoice.invoice_number,
        total_amount=invoice.total_amount,
        paid_amount=paid_amount_value,
        balance_due=invoice.balance_due,
        status=invoice.status,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp

)

    equipment_id: int = Path(..., description="Equipment ID to tag", example=4001),
    body: EquipmentTagsRequest = Body(...),
) -> EquipmentTagsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    existing = session.query(EquipmentTag).filter(EquipmentTag.equipment_id == equipment_id).all()
    existing_ids = {et.tag_id for et in existing}
    for tid in body.tag_ids:
        if tid not in existing_ids:
            et = EquipmentTag(equipment_id=equipment_id, tag_id=tid)
            session.add(et)
    session.commit()
    all_links = session.query(EquipmentTag).filter(EquipmentTag.equipment_id == equipment_id).all()
    tag_ids = [et.tag_id for et in all_links]
    resp = EquipmentTagsResponse(equipment_id=equipment_id, tag_ids=tag_ids)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.get(
    "/api/reports/performance_summary",
    response_model=PerformanceSummaryResponse,
    summary="Performance summary by job type and technician",
    description="Compute last month revenue totals and average ticket by job type and technician.",
    tags=["reports"],
    operation_id="get_performance_summary_last_month",
)
async def get_performance_summary_last_month_endpoint(
    start_date_param: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="start_date", description="Override start date (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-11-01"),
    end_date_param: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="end_date", description="Override end date (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-11-30"),
) -> PerformanceSummaryResponse:
    today = date.today()
    if start_date_param is not None and end_date_param is not None:
        start_period = datetime.strptime(start_date_param, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
        end_period = datetime.strptime(end_date_param, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    else:
        first_this_month = date(today.year, today.month, 1)
        last_month_end = first_this_month - datetime.resolution
        last_month_start = date(last_month_end.year, last_month_end.month, 1)
        start_period = last_month_start
        end_period = last_month_end
    start_dt = datetime.combine(start_period, datetime.min.time())
    end_dt = datetime.combine(end_period, datetime.max.time())
    session = SessionLocal()
    invoices = (
        session.query(Invoice, Job, JobAssignment, Technician, JobType)
        .join(Job, Invoice.job_id == Job.id, isouter=True)
        .join(JobAssignment, Job.id == JobAssignment.job_id, isouter=True)
        .join(Technician, JobAssignment.technician_id == Technician.id, isouter=True)
        .join(JobType, Job.job_type_id == JobType.id, isouter=True)
        .filter(Invoice.invoice_date >= start_period, Invoice.invoice_date <= end_period)
        .all()
    )
    tech_data = {}
    job_type_data = {}
    for inv, job, assign, tech, jt in invoices:
        amount = inv.total_amount
        if assign is not None and tech is not None:
            key = tech.id
            if key not in tech_data:
                tech_data[key] = {
                    "technician_id": tech.id,
                    "technician_name": tech.name,
                    "total_revenue": 0.0,
                    "job_ids": set(),
                }
            tech_data[key]["total_revenue"] += amount
            if job is not None:
                tech_data[key]["job_ids"].add(job.id)
        if job is not None and jt is not None:
            key_jt = jt.id
            if key_jt not in job_type_data:
                job_type_data[key_jt] = {
                    "job_type_id": jt.id,
                    "job_type_name": jt.name,
                    "total_revenue": 0.0,
                    "job_ids": set(),
                }
            job_type_data[key_jt]["total_revenue"] += amount
            job_type_data[key_jt]["job_ids"].add(job.id)
    by_technician_items: List[PerformanceSummaryTechnicianItem] = []
    for val in tech_data.values():
        job_count_value = len(val["job_ids"])
        average_ticket_value = val["total_revenue"] / job_count_value if job_count_value > 0 else 0.0
        item = PerformanceSummaryTechnicianItem(
            technician_id=val["technician_id"],
            technician_name=val["technician_name"],
            total_revenue=val["total_revenue"],
            job_count=job_count_value,
            average_ticket=average_ticket_value,
        )
        by_technician_items.append(item)
    by_job_type_items: List[PerformanceSummaryJobTypeItem] = []
    for val in job_type_data.values():
        job_count_value = len(val["job_ids"])
        average_ticket_value = val["total_revenue"] / job_count_value if job_count_value > 0 else 0.0
        item = PerformanceSummaryJobTypeItem(
            job_type_id=val["job_type_id"],
            job_type_name=val["job_type_name"],
            total_revenue=val["total_revenue"],
            job_count=job_count_value,
            average_ticket=average_ticket_value,
        )
        by_job_type_items.append(item)
    sorted_techs = sorted(by_technician_items, key=lambda x: x.total_revenue, reverse=True)
    top_techs = []
    for item in sorted_techs[:3]:
        top_item = PerformanceSummaryTopTechnicianItem(
            technician_id=item.technician_id,
            technician_name=item.technician_name,
            total_revenue=item.total_revenue,
        )
        top_techs.append(top_item)
    resp = PerformanceSummaryResponse(
        start_date=start_period,
        end_date=end_period,
        by_technician=by_technician_items,
        by_job_type=by_job_type_items,
        top_technicians=top_techs,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp

    import uvicorn, os

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import List, Optional, Dict
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text, ForeignKey, UniqueConstraint, Index, Float
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker
import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/opentable_for_restaurants.db")
engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    email = Column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    full_name = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Restaurant(Base):
    __tablename__ = "restaurants"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    timezone = Column(Text)
    address = Column(Text)
    phone = Column(Text)
    created_by_user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class MealPeriod(Base):
    __tablename__ = "meal_periods"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    restaurant_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("restaurants.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    start_time = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    end_time = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("restaurant_id", "name"), Index("idx_meal_periods_restaurant", "restaurant_id"))

class FloorPlan(Base):
    __tablename__ = "floor_plans"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    restaurant_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("restaurants.id"), nullable=False)

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants",
    response_model=RestaurantsListResponse,
    summary="List restaurants for current user",
    description="Return all restaurants created by the current authenticated user, optionally filtered by name.",
    tags=["restaurants"],
    operation_id="list_restaurants",
)
async def list_restaurants(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter restaurants by exact name match", example="Riverfront Bistro"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Maximum number of restaurants to return", example=20),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Number of restaurants to skip for pagination", example=0),
) -> RestaurantsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Restaurant).filter(Restaurant.created_by_user_id == 1)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Restaurant.name == name)
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    restaurants_list = []
    for r in rows:
        restaurants_list.append(
            RestaurantModel(
                id=r.id,
                name=r.name,
                timezone=r.timezone,
                address=r.address,
                phone=r.phone,
                created_by_user_id=r.created_by_user_id,
                created_at=r.created_at,
                updated_at=r.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return RestaurantsListResponse(restaurants=restaurants_list)

    "/api/restaurants/by-name/{restaurant_name}",

                id=0,
                name="",
                timezone=None,
                address=None,
                phone=None,
                created_by_user_id=1,
                created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
                updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            )
        )
    restaurant_model = RestaurantModel(
        id=r.id,
        name=r.name,
        timezone=r.timezone,
        address=r.address,
        phone=r.phone,
        created_by_user_id=r.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=r.created_at,
        updated_at=r.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return RestaurantSingleResponse(restaurant=restaurant_model)

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/floor-plans",
    response_model=FloorPlansListResponse,
    summary="List floor plans for a restaurant",
    description="Return all floor_plans for a restaurant; optionally filter by active status.",
    tags=["floor_plans"],
    operation_id="list_floor_plans",
)
async def list_floor_plans(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID that owns the floor plans", example=1),
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by active status", example=True),
) -> FloorPlansListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(FloorPlan).filter(FloorPlan.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
    if is_active is not None:
        query = query.filter(FloorPlan.is_active == (1 if is_active else 0))
    rows = query.all()
    floor_plans_list = []
    for f in rows:
        floor_plans_list.append(
            FloorPlanModel(
                id=f.id,
                restaurant_id=f.restaurant_id,
                name=f.name,
                is_active=bool(f.is_active),
                created_at=f.created_at,
                updated_at=f.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return FloorPlansListResponse(floor_plans=floor_plans_list)
