@app.post(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/tables",
    response_model=TableSingleResponse,
    summary="Create a table for a restaurant",
    description="Create a new table record in tables for a restaurant and a specific floor plan.",
    tags=["tables"],
    operation_id="create_table",
)
async def create_table(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID that owns this table", example=1),
    body: TableCreateBody = Body(...),
) -> TableSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    is_active_value = 1 if (body.is_active is None or body.is_active) else 0
    t = Table(
        restaurant_id=restaurant_id,
        floor_plan_id=body.floor_plan_id,
        label=body.label,
        capacity_min=body.capacity_min,
        capacity_max=body.capacity_max,
        default_turn_time_minutes=body.default_turn_time_minutes,
        is_active=is_active_value,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(t)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(t)
    table_model = TableModel(
        id=t.id,
        restaurant_id=t.restaurant_id,
        floor_plan_id=t.floor_plan_id,
        label=t.label,
        capacity_min=t.capacity_min,
        capacity_max=t.capacity_max,
        default_turn_time_minutes=t.default_turn_time_minutes,
        is_active=bool(t.is_active),
        created_at=t.created_at,
        updated_at=t.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return TableSingleResponse(table=table_model)

async def update_table(
    table_id: int = Path(..., description="Table ID to update", example=21),
    body: TableUpdateBody = Body(...),
) -> TableSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    t = session.query(Table).filter(Table.id == table_id).first()
    if t is not None:
        if body.label is not None:
            t.label = body.label
        if body.capacity_min is not None:
            t.capacity_min = body.capacity_min
        if body.capacity_max is not None:
            t.capacity_max = body.capacity_max
        if body.default_turn_time_minutes is not None:
            t.default_turn_time_minutes = body.default_turn_time_minutes
        if body.is_active is not None:
            t.is_active = 1 if body.is_active else 0
        t.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(t)
        table_model = TableModel(
            id=t.id,
            restaurant_id=t.restaurant_id,
            floor_plan_id=t.floor_plan_id,
            label=t.label,
            capacity_min=t.capacity_min,
            capacity_max=t.capacity_max,
            default_turn_time_minutes=t.default_turn_time_minutes,
            is_active=bool(t.is_active),
            created_at=t.created_at,
            updated_at=t.updated_at,
        )
        session.close()
        return TableSingleResponse(table=table_model)
    session.close()
    return TableSingleResponse(
        table=TableModel(
            id=0,
            restaurant_id=0,
            floor_plan_id=0,
            label="",
            capacity_min=None,
            capacity_max=0,
            default_turn_time_minutes=None,
            is_active=False,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
    )

@app.get(

    response_model=PacingRulesListResponse,
    summary="List pacing rules for a restaurant",
    description="Retrieve pacing_rules for a restaurant filtered by day_of_week and meal period.",
    tags=["pacing_rules"],
    operation_id="list_pacing_rules",
)
async def list_pacing_rules(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID whose pacing rules are queried", example=1),
    day_of_week: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by day of week 0=Mon..6=Sun", example=5),
    meal_period_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by meal period ID", example=3),
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by active status", example=True),
) -> PacingRulesListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(PacingRule).filter(PacingRule.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
    if day_of_week is not None:
        query = query.filter(PacingRule.day_of_week == day_of_week)
    if meal_period_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(PacingRule.meal_period_id == meal_period_id)
    if is_active is not None:
        query = query.filter(PacingRule.is_active == (1 if is_active else 0))
    rows = query.all()
    rules_list = []
    for pr in rows:
        rules_list.append(
            PacingRuleModel(
                id=pr.id,
                restaurant_id=pr.restaurant_id,
                meal_period_id=pr.meal_period_id,
                day_of_week=pr.day_of_week,
                start_time=pr.start_time,
                end_time=pr.end_time,
                slot_interval_minutes=pr.slot_interval_minutes,
                max_covers_per_slot=pr.max_covers_per_slot,
                online_capacity_multiplier=pr.online_capacity_multiplier,
                is_active=bool(pr.is_active),
                created_at=pr.created_at,
                updated_at=pr.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return PacingRulesListResponse(pacing_rules=rules_list)

    response_model=PacingRuleSingleResponse,

    tags=["pacing_rules"],
    operation_id="update_pacing_rule",
)
async def update_pacing_rule(
    pacing_rule_id: int = Path(..., description="Pacing rule ID to update", example=4),
    body: PacingRuleUpdateBody = Body(...),
) -> PacingRuleSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pr = session.query(PacingRule).filter(PacingRule.id == pacing_rule_id).first()
    if pr is not None:
        if body.max_covers_per_slot is not None:
            pr.max_covers_per_slot = body.max_covers_per_slot
        if body.online_capacity_multiplier is not None:
            pr.online_capacity_multiplier = body.online_capacity_multiplier
        if body.is_active is not None:
            pr.is_active = 1 if body.is_active else 0
        pr.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(pr)
        pr_model = PacingRuleModel(
            id=pr.id,
            restaurant_id=pr.restaurant_id,
            meal_period_id=pr.meal_period_id,
            day_of_week=pr.day_of_week,
            start_time=pr.start_time,
            end_time=pr.end_time,
            slot_interval_minutes=pr.slot_interval_minutes,
            max_covers_per_slot=pr.max_covers_per_slot,
            online_capacity_multiplier=pr.online_capacity_multiplier,
            is_active=bool(pr.is_active),
            created_at=pr.created_at,
            updated_at=pr.updated_at,
        )
        session.close()
        return PacingRuleSingleResponse(pacing_rule=pr_model)
    session.close()
    return PacingRuleSingleResponse(
        pacing_rule=PacingRuleModel(
            id=0,
            restaurant_id=0,
            meal_period_id=None,
            day_of_week=None,
            start_time="00:00:00",
            end_time="00:00:00",
            slot_interval_minutes=0,
            max_covers_per_slot=0,
            online_capacity_multiplier=1.0,
            is_active=False,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
    )

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/guests/search",
    response_model=GuestsListResponse,
    summary="Search guests by name or email",
    description="Look up guest records for a restaurant using full_name or email.",
    tags=["guests"],
    operation_id="search_guests",
)
async def search_guests(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID whose guests to search", example=1),
    full_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter guests by full name (partial match)", example="Emily Chen"),
    email: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter guests by exact email", example="echen@example.com"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Maximum results to return", example=20),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Number of results to skip", example=0),
) -> GuestsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Guest).filter(Guest.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
    if full_name is not None:
        pattern = f"%{full_name}%"
        query = query.filter(Guest.full_name.like(pattern))
    if email is not None:
        query = query.filter(Guest.email == email)
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    guests_list = []
    for g in rows:
        guests_list.append(
            GuestModel(
                id=g.id,
                restaurant_id=g.restaurant_id,
                full_name=g.full_name,
                email=g.email,
                phone=g.phone,
                created_at=g.created_at,
                updated_at=g.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return GuestsListResponse(guests=guests_list)

) -> GuestNotesListResponse:

@app.patch(
    "/api/reservations/{reservation_id}",
    response_model=ReservationSingleResponse,
    summary="Update reservation status and times",
    description="Partially update status, check-in, seating, completion, or POS reference.",
    tags=["reservations"],
    operation_id="update_reservation",
)
async def update_reservation(
    reservation_id: int = Path(..., description="Reservation ID to update", example=300),
    body: ReservationUpdateBody = Body(...),
) -> ReservationSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    r = session.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.id == reservation_id).first()
    if r is not None:
        if body.status is not None:
            r.status = body.status
        if body.checkin_status is not None:
            r.checkin_status = body.checkin_status
        if body.actual_seated_time is not None:
            r.actual_seated_time = body.actual_seated_time
        if body.completed_time is not None:
            r.completed_time = body.completed_time
        if body.pos_check_reference is not None:
            r.pos_check_reference = body.pos_check_reference
        if body.no_show_marked_at is not None:
            try:
                r.no_show_marked_at = datetime.fromisoformat(body.no_show_marked_at.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
            except Exception:
                r.no_show_marked_at = datetime.utcnow()
        r.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(r)
        r_model = ReservationModel(
            id=r.id,
            restaurant_id=r.restaurant_id,
            guest_id=r.guest_id,
            booking_channel=r.booking_channel,
            party_size=r.party_size,
            status=r.status,
            checkin_status=r.checkin_status,
            scheduled_date=r.scheduled_date,
            scheduled_time=r.scheduled_time,
            estimated_end_time=r.estimated_end_time,
            source=r.source,
            is_waitlist=bool(r.is_waitlist),
            quoted_wait_minutes=r.quoted_wait_minutes,
            actual_seated_time=r.actual_seated_time,
            completed_time=r.completed_time,
            no_show_marked_at=r.no_show_marked_at,
            pos_check_reference=r.pos_check_reference,
            created_by_user_id=r.created_by_user_id,
            created_at=r.created_at,
            updated_at=r.updated_at,
        )
        session.close()
        return ReservationSingleResponse(reservation=r_model)
    session.close()
    return ReservationSingleResponse(
        reservation=ReservationModel(
            id=0,
            restaurant_id=0,
            guest_id=None,
            booking_channel="",
            party_size=0,
            status="",
            checkin_status=None,
            scheduled_date="0000-00-00",
            scheduled_time="00:00:00",
            estimated_end_time=None,
            source=None,
            is_waitlist=False,
            quoted_wait_minutes=None,
            actual_seated_time=None,
            completed_time=None,
            no_show_marked_at=None,
            pos_check_reference=None,
            created_by_user_id=None,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
    )

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/availability",
    response_model=AvailabilityListResponse,
    summary="Search reservation availability for a party size",
    description="Compute available time slots based on shifts, reservations, and pacing.",
    tags=["availability"],
    operation_id="search_availability",
)
async def search_availability(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID to search availability for", example=1),
    date: str = Query(..., description="Date in YYYY-MM-DD to search on", example="2026-04-02"),
    start_time: str = Query(..., description="Start of search window in HH:MM:SS", example="18:00:00"),
    end_time: str = Query(..., description="End of search window in HH:MM:SS", example="20:00:00"),
    party_size: int = Query(..., description="Number of covers requested", example=5),
    max_results: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Maximum number of earliest available slots to return", example=3),
) -> AvailabilityListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    shifts = (
        session.query(ShiftOccurrence)
        .filter(ShiftOccurrence.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
        .filter(ShiftOccurrence.date == date)
        .all()
    )
    time_slots = []
    for shift in shifts:
        interval = shift.slot_interval_minutes
        dt_start = datetime.strptime(shift.start_time, "%H:%M:%S")
        dt_end = datetime.strptime(shift.end_time, "%H:%M:%S")
        current = dt_start
        while current < dt_end:
            slot_str = current.strftime("%H:%M:%S")
            if slot_str >= start_time and slot_str <= end_time:
                time_slots.append((slot_str, shift))
            current += timedelta(minutes=interval)
    pacing_rules = (
        session.query(PacingRule)
        .filter(PacingRule.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
        .filter(PacingRule.is_active == 1)
        .all()
    )
    pacing_slots = (
        session.query(ReservationPacingSlot)
        .filter(ReservationPacingSlot.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
        .filter(ReservationPacingSlot.date == date)
        .all()
    )
    pacing_map: Dict[str, ReservationPacingSlot] = {}
    for ps in pacing_slots:
        pacing_map[ps.time_slot] = ps
    reservations = (
        session.query(Reservation)
        .filter(Reservation.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
        .filter(Reservation.scheduled_date == date)
        .filter(Reservation.status != "canceled")
        .all()
    )
    covers_by_slot: Dict[str, int] = {}
    online_covers_by_slot: Dict[str, int] = {}
    for r in reservations:
        slot = r.scheduled_time
        covers_by_slot[slot] = covers_by_slot.get(slot, 0) + r.party_size
        if r.booking_channel == "online_widget":
            online_covers_by_slot[slot] = online_covers_by_slot.get(slot, 0) + r.party_size
    availability_list: List[AvailabilitySlotModel] = []
    for slot_str, shift in sorted(time_slots, key=lambda x: x[0]):
        max_covers = shift.max_covers_per_slot if shift.max_covers_per_slot is not None else 0
        dt_slot = datetime.strptime(slot_str, "%H:%M:%S")
        day_of_week = datetime.strptime(date, "%Y-%m-%d").weekday()
        for pr in pacing_rules:
            if pr.day_of_week is not None and pr.day_of_week != day_of_week:
                continue
            if slot_str >= pr.start_time and slot_str < pr.end_time:
                max_covers = pr.max_covers_per_slot
        booked = covers_by_slot.get(slot_str, 0)
        online_booked = online_covers_by_slot.get(slot_str, 0)
        ps_row = pacing_map.get(slot_str)
        if ps_row is not None:
            booked = ps_row.covers_booked
            online_booked = ps_row.online_covers_booked
        online_max = max_covers
        for pr in pacing_rules:
            if pr.day_of_week is not None and pr.day_of_week != day_of_week:
                continue
            if slot_str >= pr.start_time and slot_str < pr.end_time:
                online_max = int(max_covers * pr.online_capacity_multiplier)
        if max_covers >= party_size and (max_covers - booked) >= party_size and (online_max - online_booked) >= 0:
            availability_list.append(
                AvailabilitySlotModel(
                    time_slot=slot_str,
                    party_size=party_size,
                    max_covers_allowed=max_covers,
                    covers_booked=booked,
                    online_covers_allowed=online_max,
                    online_covers_booked=online_booked,
                )
            )
    if max_results is not None:
        availability_list = availability_list[:max_results]
    session.close()
    return AvailabilityListResponse(availability_slots=availability_list)

@app.post(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/auto-no-show",
    response_model=AutoNoShowResponse,
    summary="Mark past reservations as no-show for a time window",
    description="Flag reservations past grace period and not seated or completed as no-show.",
    tags=["reservations", "automation"],
    operation_id="auto_mark_no_show",
)
async def auto_mark_no_show(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant whose reservations to evaluate", example=1),
    body: AutoNoShowBody = Body(...),
) -> AutoNoShowResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    try:
        current_time = datetime.fromisoformat(body.current_time_iso.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    except Exception:
        current_time = datetime.utcnow()
    grace = body.grace_minutes if body.grace_minutes is not None else 30
    rows = (
        session.query(Reservation)
        .filter(Reservation.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
        .filter(Reservation.scheduled_date == body.date)
        .filter(Reservation.scheduled_time >= body.start_time)
        .filter(Reservation.scheduled_time <= body.end_time)
        .all()
    )
    updated_list: List[AutoNoShowUpdatedReservationModel] = []
    for r in rows:
        scheduled_dt_str = body.date + "T" + r.scheduled_time + "Z"
        try:
            scheduled_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(scheduled_dt_str.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
        except Exception:
            scheduled_dt = current_time
        if r.actual_seated_time is None and r.completed_time is None:
            if current_time >= scheduled_dt + timedelta(minutes=grace):
                r.status = "no_show"
                r.no_show_marked_at = current_time
                r.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
                updated_list.append(
                    AutoNoShowUpdatedReservationModel(
                        id=r.id,
                        status=r.status,
                        no_show_marked_at=r.no_show_marked_at,
                        scheduled_date=r.scheduled_date,
                        scheduled_time=r.scheduled_time,
                        actual_seated_time=r.actual_seated_time,
                        completed_time=r.completed_time,
                    )
                )
    session.commit()
    session.close()
    return AutoNoShowResponse(updated_reservations=updated_list)

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/reports/covers-and-channels",
    response_model=CoversAndChannelsReportResponse,
    summary="Report covers, turn time, and booking channels",
    description="Generate aggregated stats for a date range of reservations.",
    tags=["reports"],
    operation_id="report_covers_and_channels",
)
async def report_covers_and_channels(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID to report on", example=1),
    start_date: str = Query(..., description="Start date in YYYY-MM-DD inclusive", example="2026-06-01"),
    end_date: str = Query(..., description="End date in YYYY-MM-DD inclusive", example="2026-06-30"),
) -> CoversAndChannelsReportResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rows = (
        session.query(Reservation)
        .filter(Reservation.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
        .filter(Reservation.scheduled_date >= start_date)
        .filter(Reservation.scheduled_date <= end_date)
        .all()
    )
    total_covers = 0
    channel_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
    channel_covers: Dict[str, int] = {}
    seat_complete_rows = []
    for r in rows:
        if r.status in ["seated", "completed"]:
            total_covers += r.party_size
            seat_complete_rows.append(r)
        channel_counts[r.booking_channel] = channel_counts.get(r.booking_channel, 0) + 1
        channel_covers[r.booking_channel] = channel_covers.get(r.booking_channel, 0) + r.party_size
    total_covers_for_percentage = sum(channel_covers.values())
    channel_distribution: List[ReportChannelDistributionModel] = []
    for ch, count in channel_counts.items():
        covers = channel_covers.get(ch, 0)
        percentage = 0.0
        if total_covers_for_percentage > 0:
            percentage = (covers / total_covers_for_percentage) * 100.0
        channel_distribution.append(
            ReportChannelDistributionModel(
                booking_channel=ch,
                reservation_count=count,
                covers=covers,
                percentage_of_covers=percentage,
            )
        )
    meal_periods = session.query(MealPeriod).filter(MealPeriod.restaurant_id == restaurant_id).all()
    mp_list = []
    for mp in meal_periods:
        mp_list.append(mp)
    meal_period_turns: Dict[Optional[int], List[float]] = {}
    for r in seat_complete_rows:
        if r.actual_seated_time is not None and r.completed_time is not None:
            try:
                seated_dt_str = r.scheduled_date + "T" + r.actual_seated_time + "Z"
                completed_dt_str = r.scheduled_date + "T" + r.completed_time + "Z"
                seated_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(seated_dt_str.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
                completed_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(completed_dt_str.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
                diff_minutes = (completed_dt - seated_dt).total_seconds() / 60.0
            except Exception:
                diff_minutes = 0.0
            meal_period_id_value: Optional[int] = None
            for mp in mp_list:
                if r.scheduled_time >= mp.start_time and r.scheduled_time < mp.end_time:
                    meal_period_id_value = mp.id
                    break
            existing_list = meal_period_turns.get(meal_period_id_value, [])
            existing_list.append(diff_minutes)
            meal_period_turns[meal_period_id_value] = existing_list
    average_turns: List[ReportMealPeriodTurnTimeModel] = []
    for mp_id, diffs in meal_period_turns.items():
        avg = 0.0
        if len(diffs) > 0:
            avg = sum(diffs) / float(len(diffs))
        mp_name = None
        for mp in mp_list:
            if mp_id is not None and mp.id == mp_id:
                mp_name = mp.name
                break
        average_turns.append(
            ReportMealPeriodTurnTimeModel(
                meal_period_id=mp_id,
                meal_period_name=mp_name,
                average_turn_time_minutes=avg,
            )
        )
    date_range_model = ReportDateRangeModel(start_date_value=start_date, end_date_value=end_date)
    session.close()
    return CoversAndChannelsReportResponse(
        date_range=date_range_model,
        total_covers=total_covers,
        average_turn_time_by_meal_period=average_turns,
        booking_channel_distribution=channel_distribution,
    )

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import Optional, List, Dict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    DateTime,
    Text,
    ForeignKey,
    UniqueConstraint,
    Index,
    REAL
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import os
import uuid
import json

database_path = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/formforge.db")
engine = create_engine(database_path, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_path.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(Text, nullable=False, unique=True)
    email = Column(Text, nullable=False, unique=True)
    full_name = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class Form(Base):
    __tablename__ = "forms"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    slug = Column(Text, unique=True)
    status = Column(Text, nullable=False, default="draft")
    created_by_user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    published_at = Column(DateTime)
    archived_at = Column(DateTime)
    created_at = Column(DateTime)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class FormVersion(Base):
    __tablename__ = "form_versions"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    form_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("forms.id"), nullable=False)
    version_number = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    is_active = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)
    created_at = Column(DateTime)
    created_by_user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    notes = Column(Text)

class Question(Base):

app = FastAPI(title="FormForge Simplified API", version="1.0.0")

def to_bool(value: Optional[int]) -> Optional[bool]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return bool(value)

def now_utc() -> datetime:
    return datetime.utcnow()

def generate_slug(text_value: str) -> str:
    lower = text_value.strip().lower()
    parts = []
    for c in lower:
        if c.isalnum():
            parts.append(c)
        elif c in [" ", "-", "_"]:
            parts.append("-")
    slug = "".join(parts).strip("-")
    if not slug:
        slug = str(uuid.uuid4())
    return slug

def serialize_datetime(dt: Optional[datetime]) -> Optional[str]:
    if dt is None:
        return None
    return dt.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"

def parse_json(text_value: Optional[str]) -> Optional[Dict[str, object]]:
    if text_value is None:
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(text_value)
    except Exception:
        return None

def dump_json(obj: Optional[Dict[str, object]]) -> Optional[str]:
    if obj is None:
        return None
    return json.dumps(obj)

@app.post(
    "/api/forms",
    summary="Create a new form in draft status",
    description="Create a new form row in forms table as draft for the current user.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="create_form",
    response_model=FormResponse,
)
async def create_form_endpoint(body: FormCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> FormResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    slug_value = body.slug if body.slug is not None else generate_slug(body.title)
    existing_slug = session.query(Form).filter(Form.slug == slug_value).first()
    if existing_slug is not None:
        slug_value = slug_value + "-" + str(uuid.uuid4()).split("-")[0]
    existing_title = session.query(Form).filter(Form.title == body.title).first()
    title_value = body.title
    if existing_title is not None:
        title_value = body.title + " " + str(uuid.uuid4()).split("-")[0]
    now = now_utc()
    form = Form(
        title=title_value,
        slug=slug_value,
        status="draft",
        created_by_user_id=user_id,
        published_at=None,
        archived_at=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(form)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(form)
    result = FormResponse(
        id=form.id,
        title=form.title,
        slug=form.slug,
        status=form.status,
        created_by_user_id=form.created_by_user_id,
        published_at=serialize_datetime(form.published_at),
        archived_at=serialize_datetime(form.archived_at),
        created_at=serialize_datetime(form.created_at),
        updated_at=serialize_datetime(form.updated_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return result

@app.get(
    "/api/forms",
    summary="List forms owned by current user",
    description="Retrieve forms created by the current user with optional status or title filters.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="list_forms",
    response_model=FormsListResponse,
)
async def list_forms_endpoint(
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by form status (draft, published, archived)", example="published"),
    title_contains: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by substring match on title", example="Internship Application"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(50, description="Max number of forms to return", example=50),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Offset for pagination", example=0),
) -> FormsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    query = session.query(Form).filter(Form.created_by_user_id == user_id)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Form.status == status)
    if title_contains is not None:
        query = query.filter(Form.title.like("%" + title_contains + "%"))
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    forms = query.all()
    items: List[FormsListItem] = []
    for f in forms:
        items.append(
            FormsListItem(
                id=f.id,
                title=f.title,
                slug=f.slug,
                status=f.status,
                published_at=serialize_datetime(f.published_at),
                archived_at=serialize_datetime(f.archived_at),
                created_at=serialize_datetime(f.created_at),
                updated_at=serialize_datetime(f.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return FormsListResponse(forms=items)

@app.patch(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}",
    summary="Update basic form properties",
    description="Update title, slug, status, or archive on a form owned by current user.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="update_form",
    response_model=FormUpdateResponse,
)
async def update_form_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID to update", example=42),
    body: FormUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> FormUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    if form is None:
        form = Form(
            id=form_id,
            title=body.title if body.title is not None else "",
            slug=body.slug,
            status=body.status if body.status is not None else "draft",
            created_by_user_id=user_id,
            published_at=None,
            archived_at=None,
            created_at=now_utc(),
            updated_at=now_utc(),
        )
        session.add(form)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(form)
    if body.title is not None:
        form.title = body.title
    if body.slug is not None:
        form.slug = body.slug
    if body.status is not None:
        form.status = body.status
        if body.status == "published" and form.published_at is None:
            form.published_at = now_utc()
    if body.archived_at is not None:
        if body.archived_at == "":
            form.archived_at = None
        else:
            form.archived_at = now_utc()
    form.updated_at = now_utc()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(form)
    result = FormUpdateResponse(
        id=form.id,
        title=form.title,
        slug=form.slug,
        status=form.status,
        published_at=serialize_datetime(form.published_at),
        archived_at=serialize_datetime(form.archived_at),
        updated_at=serialize_datetime(form.updated_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/publish",
    summary="Publish a form and set status to published",
    description="Mark a form as published and set published_at timestamp.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="publish_form",
    response_model=FormPublishResponse,
)
async def publish_form_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID to publish", example=42)
) -> FormPublishResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    now = now_utc()
    if form is None:
        form = Form(
            id=form_id,
            title="",
            slug=None,
            status="published",
            created_by_user_id=user_id,
            published_at=now,
            archived_at=None,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(form)
    else:
        form.status = "published"
        form.published_at = now
        form.updated_at = now
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(form)
    result = FormPublishResponse(
        id=form.id,
        status=form.status,
        published_at=serialize_datetime(form.published_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/clone",
    summary="Clone a form and its active version",
    description="Create a new form by cloning an existing form and its active form_version and questions.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="clone_form",
    response_model=FormCloneResponse,
)
async def clone_form_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Source form ID to clone", example=15),
    body: FormCloneRequest = Body(...),
) -> FormCloneResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    source_form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    now = now_utc()
    new_form = Form(
        title=body.new_title,
        slug=body.new_slug if body.new_slug is not None else generate_slug(body.new_title),
        status=source_form.status if source_form is not None else "draft",
        created_by_user_id=user_id,
        published_at=None,
        archived_at=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(new_form)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(new_form)
    active_source_version = None
    if source_form is not None:
        active_source_version = session.query(FormVersion).filter(
            FormVersion.form_id == source_form.id,
            FormVersion.is_active == 1,
        ).order_by(FormVersion.version_number.desc()).first()
    cloned_version_id: Optional[int] = None
    if active_source_version is not None:
        max_version = session.query(FormVersion).filter(FormVersion.form_id == new_form.id).order_by(FormVersion.version_number.desc()).first()
        next_version_number = 1
        if max_version is not None:
            next_version_number = max_version.version_number + 1
        new_version = FormVersion(
            form_id=new_form.id,
            version_number=next_version_number,
            is_active=active_source_version.is_active,
            created_at=now,
            created_by_user_id=user_id,
            notes=active_source_version.notes,
        )
        session.add(new_version)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(new_version)
        cloned_version_id = new_version.id
        source_questions = session.query(Question).filter(Question.form_version_id == active_source_version.id).all()
        question_id_map: Dict[int, int] = {}
        for q in source_questions:
            new_q = Question(
                form_version_id=new_version.id,
                label=q.label,
                description=q.description,
                type=q.type,
                is_required=q.is_required,
                position=q.position,
                is_active=q.is_active,
                validation_min_value=q.validation_min_value,
                validation_max_value=q.validation_max_value,
                validation_pattern=q.validation_pattern,
                metadata_json=q.metadata_json,
                created_at=now,
                updated_at=now,
            )
            session.add(new_q)
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(new_q)
            question_id_map[q.id] = new_q.id
            source_options = session.query(QuestionOption).filter(QuestionOption.question_id == q.id).all()
            for opt in source_options:
                new_opt = QuestionOption(
                    question_id=new_q.id,
                    label=opt.label,
                    value=opt.value,
                    position=opt.position,
                    is_active=opt.is_active,
                    created_at=now,
                    updated_at=now,
                )
                session.add(new_opt)
                session.commit()
        logic_rules = session.query(FormLogicRule).filter(FormLogicRule.form_version_id == active_source_version.id).all()
        for rule in logic_rules:
            new_rule = FormLogicRule(
                form_version_id=new_version.id,
                rule_type=rule.rule_type,
                source_question_id=question_id_map.get(rule.source_question_id, rule.source_question_id),
                condition_operator=rule.condition_operator,
                condition_value=rule.condition_value,
                target_question_id=question_id_map.get(rule.target_question_id, rule.target_question_id),
                action_type=rule.action_type,
                metadata_json=rule.metadata_json,
                created_at=now,
                created_by_user_id=user_id,
            )
            session.add(new_rule)
            session.commit()
        calc_fields = session.query(CalculatedField).filter(CalculatedField.form_version_id == active_source_version.id).all()
        for cf in calc_fields:
            new_cf = CalculatedField(
                form_version_id=new_version.id,
                name=cf.name,
                expression=cf.expression,
                result_type=cf.result_type,
                is_active=cf.is_active,
                created_at=now,
                created_by_user_id=user_id,
            )
            session.add(new_cf)
            session.commit()
        auto_rules = session.query(AutoTagRule).filter(AutoTagRule.form_version_id == active_source_version.id).all()
        for ar in auto_rules:
            new_ar = AutoTagRule(
                form_version_id=new_version.id,
                tag_id=ar.tag_id,
                source_type=ar.source_type,
                source_id=ar.source_id,
                condition_operator=ar.condition_operator,
                condition_value=ar.condition_value,
                is_active=ar.is_active,
                created_at=now,
                created_by_user_id=user_id,
            )
            session.add(new_ar)
            session.commit()
    session.close()
    return FormCloneResponse(form_id=new_form.id, form_version_id=cloned_version_id)

@app.post(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/versions",
    summary="Create a new form version",
    description="Create a new form_versions row for a form, auto-incrementing version_number.",
    tags=["form_versions"],
    operation_id="create_form_version",
    response_model=FormVersionResponse,
)
async def create_form_version_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID the version belongs to", example=42),
    body: FormVersionCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> FormVersionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    existing_form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    now = now_utc()
    if existing_form is None:
        new_form = Form(
            id=form_id,
            title="",
            slug=None,
            status="draft",
            created_by_user_id=user_id,
            published_at=None,
            archived_at=None,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(new_form)
        session.commit()
    max_version = session.query(FormVersion).filter(FormVersion.form_id == form_id).order_by(FormVersion.version_number.desc()).first()
    next_version_number = 1
    if max_version is not None:
        next_version_number = max_version.version_number + 1
    is_active_value = 1
    if body.is_active is not None:
        is_active_value = 1 if body.is_active else 0
    form_version = FormVersion(
        form_id=form_id,
        version_number=next_version_number,
        is_active=is_active_value,
        created_at=now,
        created_by_user_id=user_id,
        notes=body.notes,
    )
    session.add(form_version)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(form_version)
    result = FormVersionResponse(
        id=form_version.id,
        form_id=form_version.form_id,
        version_number=form_version.version_number,
        is_active=to_bool(form_version.is_active),
        notes=form_version.notes,
        created_by_user_id=form_version.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=serialize_datetime(form_version.created_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/responses",
    summary="Submit a response with answers",
    description="Create a responses row then related answers rows in one call.",
    tags=["responses", "answers"],
    operation_id="submit_response_with_answers",
    response_model=SubmitResponseResponse,
)
async def submit_response_with_answers_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID being answered", example=110),
    body: SubmitResponseRequest = Body(...),
) -> SubmitResponseResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    now = now_utc()
    if form is None:
        form = Form(
            id=form_id,
            title="",
            slug=None,
            status="draft",
            created_by_user_id=user_id,
            published_at=None,
            archived_at=None,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(form)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(form)
    active_version = session.query(FormVersion).filter(FormVersion.form_id == form.id, FormVersion.is_active == 1).order_by(FormVersion.version_number.desc()).first()
    if active_version is None:
        active_version = FormVersion(
            form_id=form.id,
            version_number=1,
            is_active=1,
            created_at=now,
            created_by_user_id=user_id,
            notes=None,
        )
        session.add(active_version)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(active_version)
    response_row = Response(
        form_id=form.id,
        form_version_id=active_version.id,
        respondent_identifier=body.respondent_identifier,
        status="submitted",
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=None,
    )
    session.add(response_row)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(response_row)
    answer_items: List[AnswerResponseItem] = []
    for ans in body.answers:
        value_json_text = dump_json(ans.value_json)
        answer = Answer(
            response_id=response_row.id,
            question_id=ans.question_id,
            value_text=ans.value_text,
            value_number=ans.value_number,
            value_json=value_json_text,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.add(answer)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(answer)
        answer_items.append(
            AnswerResponseItem(
                id=answer.id,
                response_id=answer.response_id,
                question_id=answer.question_id,
                value_text=answer.value_text,
                value_number=answer.value_number,
                value_json=parse_json(answer.value_json),
                created_at=serialize_datetime(answer.created_at),
            )
        )
    response_item = ResponseItem(
        id=response_row.id,
        form_id=response_row.form_id,
        form_version_id=response_row.form_version_id,
        respondent_identifier=response_row.respondent_identifier,
        status=response_row.status,
        created_at=serialize_datetime(response_row.created_at),
        updated_at=serialize_datetime(response_row.updated_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return SubmitResponseResponse(response=response_item, answers=answer_items)

@app.get(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/responses",
    summary="List responses for a form with filters",
    description="Retrieve responses for a form with date and question-based filters.",
    tags=["responses"],
    operation_id="list_responses_with_filters",
    response_model=ListResponsesResponse,
)
async def list_responses_with_filters_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID", example=120),
    created_after: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Only responses created after this ISO8601 datetime", example="2025-02-01T00:00:00Z"),
    created_before: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Only responses created before this ISO8601 datetime", example="2025-03-01T00:00:00Z"),
    question_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter based on a specific question's numeric answer", example=1300),
    min_numeric_answer: Optional[float] = Query(None, description="Minimum numeric answer value when question_id is used", example=8),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by response status", example="submitted"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(100, description="Max number of responses to return", example=100),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Offset for pagination", example=0),
) -> ListResponsesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    items: List[ResponseListItem] = []
    total_count = 0
    if form is not None:
        query = session.query(Response).filter(Response.form_id == form.id)
        if created_after is not None:
            try:
                dt_after = datetime.fromisoformat(created_after.replace("Z", ""))
                query = query.filter(Response.created_at >= dt_after)
            except Exception:
                pass
        if created_before is not None:
            try:
                dt_before = datetime.fromisoformat(created_before.replace("Z", ""))
                query = query.filter(Response.created_at <= dt_before)
            except Exception:
                pass
        if status is not None:
            query = query.filter(Response.status == status)
        if question_id is not None and min_numeric_answer is not None:
            matching_answers = session.query(Answer.response_id).filter(
                Answer.question_id == question_id,
                Answer.value_number >= min_numeric_answer,
            ).all()
            response_ids = [r[0] for r in matching_answers]
            if len(response_ids) > 0:
                query = query.filter(Response.id.in_(response_ids))
            else:
                query = query.filter(Response.id == -1)
        total_count = query.count()
        if offset is not None:
            query = query.offset(offset)
        if limit is not None:
            query = query.limit(limit)
        responses = query.order_by(Response.created_at.desc()).all()
        for r in responses:
            items.append(
                ResponseListItem(
                    id=r.id,
                    form_id=r.form_id,
                    form_version_id=r.form_version_id,
                    respondent_identifier=r.respondent_identifier,
                    status=r.status,
                    created_at=serialize_datetime(r.created_at),
                )
            )
    session.close()
    return ListResponsesResponse(responses=items, total_count=total_count)

@app.get(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/analytics/high-stress-summary",
    summary="Get high-stress responses summary",
    description="Compute count, average stress, and department distribution for filtered responses.",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="get_high_stress_summary",
    response_model=HighStressSummaryResponse,
)
async def get_high_stress_summary_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID of Employee Wellness Check-In", example=130),
    stress_question_id: int = Query(..., description="Question ID for 'Stress Level (1–10)'", example=1400),
    department_question_id: int = Query(..., description="Question ID for department question", example=1401),
    min_stress_level: Optional[float] = Query(8, description="Minimum stress level to be considered high", example=8),
    days_lookback: Optional[int] = Query(30, description="Number of past days to include", example=30),
) -> HighStressSummaryResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    form = session.query(Form).filter(Form.id == form_id, Form.created_by_user_id == user_id).first()
    high_stress_count = 0
    average_stress_level: Optional[float] = None
    department_distribution: List[HighStressDepartmentItem] = []
    if form is not None:
        resp_query = session.query(Response).filter(Response.form_id == form.id)
        if days_lookback is not None:
            cutoff = now_utc() - timedelta(days=days_lookback)
            resp_query = resp_query.filter(Response.created_at >= cutoff)
        responses = resp_query.all()
        stress_values: List[float] = []
        dept_counts: Dict[Optional[str], int] = {}
        for r in responses:
            stress_answer = session.query(Answer).filter(
                Answer.response_id == r.id,
                Answer.question_id == stress_question_id,
            ).first()
            if stress_answer is None or stress_answer.value_number is None:
                continue
            if min_stress_level is not None and stress_answer.value_number < min_stress_level:
                continue
            high_stress_count += 1
            stress_values.append(stress_answer.value_number)
            dept_answer = session.query(Answer).filter(
                Answer.response_id == r.id,
                Answer.question_id == department_question_id,
            ).first()
            dept_value = None
            if dept_answer is not None:
                dept_value = dept_answer.value_text
            current_count = dept_counts.get(dept_value, 0)
            dept_counts[dept_value] = current_count + 1
        if len(stress_values) > 0:
            average_stress_level = sum(stress_values) / float(len(stress_values))
        for dept, count in dept_counts.items():
            department_distribution.append(
                HighStressDepartmentItem(
                    department_value=dept,
                    count=count,
                )
            )
    session.close()
    return HighStressSummaryResponse(
        high_stress_count=high_stress_count,
        average_stress_level=average_stress_level,
        department_distribution=department_distribution,
    )

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    host = os.getenv("HOST", "127.0.0.1")
    port = int(os.getenv("PORT", "8000"))
    uvicorn.run(app, host=host, port=port)

import os
from datetime import datetime, date, time, timedelta
from typing import List, Optional, Dict

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    DateTime,
    Date,
    Text,
    ForeignKey,
    REAL,
    CheckConstraint,
    Index,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/zentime_wellness_scheduler.db")

engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

Base = declarative_base()

app = FastAPI(title="ZenTime Wellness Scheduler API", version="1.0.0")

class ServiceCategoryModel(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
    id: int = Field(..., description="Service category ID", example=1)
    name: str = Field(..., description="Category name", example="Massage Therapy")
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Category description", example="Hands-on body services for relaxation and therapy.")
    created_at: datetime = Field(..., description="Category creation timestamp (ISO8601)", example="2024-12-01T10:00:00Z")
    updated_at: datetime = Field(..., description="Category last update timestamp (ISO8601)", example="2024-12-05T10:00:00Z")


class ServiceCategoryListResponse(BaseModel):
    service_categories: List[ServiceCategoryModel] = Field(..., description="List of service categories", example=[])


class ServiceCategoryCreateRequest(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(..., description="Unique category name", example="Massage Therapy")
    description: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Optional description of the service category", example="All massage therapy services.")


class ServiceCategoryCreateResponse(ServiceCategoryModel):
    pass

@app.patch(
    "/api/services/{service_id}",
    summary="Update a service partially",
    description="Apply partial updates to an existing service without overwriting all fields.",
    tags=["services"],
    operation_id="update_service_partial",
    response_model=ServiceModel,
)
async def update_service_partial(

    body: ServiceUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> ServiceModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = session.query(Service).filter(Service.id == service_id).first()
    if obj is not None:
        if body.name is not None:
            obj.name = body.name
        if body.description is not None:
            obj.description = body.description
        if body.duration_minutes is not None:
            obj.duration_minutes = body.duration_minutes
        if body.base_price is not None:
            obj.base_price = body.base_price
        if body.requires_room is not None:
            obj.requires_room = body.requires_room
        if body.requires_table is not None:
            obj.requires_table = body.requires_table
        if body.is_active is not None:
            obj.is_active = body.is_active
        obj.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(obj)
    session.close()
    if obj is None:
        return ServiceModel(
            id=0,
            category_id=0,
            name="",
            description=None,
            duration_minutes=0,
            base_price=0.0,
            requires_room=0,

        )

@app.patch(
    "/api/appointments/{appointment_id}",
    summary="Update appointment core fields",
    description="Apply partial updates to appointment including status, payment_state, and pricing.",
    tags=["appointments"],
    operation_id="update_appointment_partial",
    response_model=AppointmentUpdateResponse,
)
async def update_appointment_partial(
    appointment_id: int = Path(..., description="Appointment ID to update", example=560),
    body: AppointmentUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> AppointmentUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = session.query(Appointment).filter(Appointment.id == appointment_id).first()
    if obj is not None:
        if body.status is not None:
            obj.old_status = obj.status if hasattr(obj, "old_status") else None
            obj.status = body.status
        if body.cancellation_reason is not None:
            obj.cancellation_reason = body.cancellation_reason
        if body.cancellation_policy_ok is not None:
            obj.cancellation_policy_ok = body.cancellation_policy_ok
        if body.payment_state is not None:
            obj.payment_state = body.payment_state
        if body.base_price is not None:
            obj.base_price = body.base_price
        if body.total_price is not None:
            obj.total_price = body.total_price
        if body.notes is not None:
            obj.notes = body.notes
        obj.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        obj.updated_by_user_id = 1
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(obj)
    session.close()
    if obj is None:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        return AppointmentUpdateResponse(
            id=0,
            client_id=0,
            staff_id=0,
            service_id=0,
            location_id=0,
            room_id=None,
            start_datetime=now,
            end_datetime=now,
            status="pending",
            cancellation_reason=None,
            cancellation_policy_ok=None,
            payment_state="unpaid",
            base_price=0.0,
            total_price=0.0,
            notes=None,
            updated_at=now,
            updated_by_user_id=None,
        )
    return AppointmentUpdateResponse.model_validate(obj)

@app.get(
    "/api/appointments/staff/{staff_id}/upcoming",
    summary="List staff appointments in date range",
    description="Retrieve appointments for a staff between start and end datetimes for tracking.",
    tags=["appointments", "staff"],
    operation_id="list_staff_appointments_in_range",
    response_model=StaffAppointmentsListResponse,
)
async def list_staff_appointments_in_range(
    staff_id: int = Path(..., description="Staff whose appointments to retrieve", example=12),
    start_datetime: datetime = Query(..., description="Range start datetime (ISO8601)", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    end_datetime: datetime = Query(..., description="Range end datetime (ISO8601)", example="2025-01-08T00:00:00Z"),
    include_canceled: Optional[bool] = Query(False, description="If false, exclude canceled appointments", example=False),
) -> StaffAppointmentsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Appointment).filter(
        Appointment.staff_id == staff_id,
        Appointment.start_datetime >= start_datetime,
        Appointment.start_datetime <= end_datetime,
    )
    if not include_canceled:
        query = query.filter(Appointment.status != "canceled")
    rows = query.all()
    session.close()
    items = [StaffAppointmentListItem.model_validate(r) for r in rows]
    return StaffAppointmentsListResponse(appointments=items)

@app.get(
    "/api/availability/slots",
    summary="Get available appointment slots",
    description="Compute free time slots for a staff, service, and location on a given date.",
    tags=["availability", "appointments"],
    operation_id="get_available_appointment_slots",
    response_model=AvailabilitySlotsResponse,
)
async def get_available_appointment_slots(
    date_param: date = Query(..., alias="date", description="Calendar date to search (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-02-10"),
    location_id: int = Query(..., description="Location where appointment will occur", example=2),
    service_id: int = Query(..., description="Service to be booked", example=7),
    staff_id: int = Query(..., description="Staff requested for the service", example=21),
    start_time_from: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Earliest start time boundary HH:MM", example="14:00"),
    max_results: Optional[int] = Query(10, description="Maximum number of slots to return", example=10),
) -> AvailabilitySlotsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    service = session.query(Service).filter(Service.id == service_id).first()
    if service is None:
        session.close()
        return AvailabilitySlotsResponse(slots=[])
    weekday = date_param.weekday()
    availability_rows = session.query(StaffRecurringAvailability).filter(
        StaffRecurringAvailability.staff_id == staff_id,
        StaffRecurringAvailability.location_id == location_id,
        StaffRecurringAvailability.weekday == weekday,
        StaffRecurringAvailability.is_active == 1,
    ).all()
    if not availability_rows:
        session.close()
        return AvailabilitySlotsResponse(slots=[])
    breaks_map: Dict[int, List[StaffRecurringBreak]] = {}
    for a in availability_rows:
        brks = session.query(StaffRecurringBreak).filter(
            StaffRecurringBreak.staff_availability_id == a.id
        ).all()
        breaks_map[a.id] = brks
    blackout_rows = session.query(StaffBlackoutDate).filter(
        StaffBlackoutDate.staff_id == staff_id,
        StaffBlackoutDate.start_datetime < datetime.combine(date_param, time(23, 59, 59)),
        StaffBlackoutDate.end_datetime > datetime.combine(date_param, time(0, 0, 0)),
    ).all()
    blackout_ranges = [(b.start_datetime, b.end_datetime) for b in blackout_rows]
    appts = session.query(Appointment).filter(
        Appointment.staff_id == staff_id,
        Appointment.location_id == location_id,
        Appointment.start_datetime < datetime.combine(date_param, time(23, 59, 59)),
        Appointment.end_datetime > datetime.combine(date_param, time(0, 0, 0)),
        Appointment.status.in_(["pending", "confirmed", "completed"]),
    ).all()
    occupied_ranges = [(a.start_datetime, a.end_datetime) for a in appts]
    free_slots: List[AvailabilitySlotModel] = []
    slot_delta = timedelta(minutes=service.duration_minutes)
    min_time = None
    if start_time_from is not None:
        parts = start_time_from.split(":")
        if len(parts) == 2:
            min_time = time(int(parts[0]), int(parts[1]))
    rooms = session.query(Room).filter(
        Room.location_id == location_id,
        Room.is_active == 1,
    ).all()
    room_id_val = rooms[0].id if rooms else None
    for a in availability_rows:
        start_h, start_m = a.start_time.split(":")
        end_h, end_m = a.end_time.split(":")
        block_start = datetime.combine(date_param, time(int(start_h), int(start_m)))
        block_end = datetime.combine(date_param, time(int(end_h), int(end_m)))
        break_ranges: List[tuple] = []
        for br in breaks_map.get(a.id, []):
            bh, bm = br.start_time.split(":")
            eh, em = br.end_time.split(":")
            break_start = datetime.combine(date_param, time(int(bh), int(bm)))
            break_end = datetime.combine(date_param, time(int(eh), int(em)))
            break_ranges.append((break_start, break_end))
        current_start = block_start
        while current_start + slot_delta <= block_end:
            if min_time is not None and current_start.time() < min_time:
                current_start += timedelta(minutes=15)
                continue
            current_end = current_start + slot_delta
            conflict = False
            for bs, be in break_ranges:
                if current_start < be and current_end > bs:
                    conflict = True
                    break
            if not conflict:
                for s, e in blackout_ranges:
                    if current_start < e and current_end > s:
                        conflict = True
                        break
            if not conflict:
                for s, e in occupied_ranges:
                    if current_start < e and current_end > s:
                        conflict = True
                        break
            if not conflict:
                free_slots.append(
                    AvailabilitySlotModel(
                        start_datetime=current_start,
                        end_datetime=current_end,
                        staff_id=staff_id,
                        location_id=location_id,
                        room_id=room_id_val if service.requires_room == 1 else None,
                    )
                )
            if max_results is not None and len(free_slots) >= max_results:
                break
            current_start += timedelta(minutes=15)
        if max_results is not None and len(free_slots) >= max_results:
            break
    session.close()
    return AvailabilitySlotsResponse(slots=free_slots)


@app.get(
    "/api/reports/utilization",
    summary="Get staff and room utilization report",
    description="Aggregate completed appointments and room usage for a location and date range.",
    tags=["reports"],
    operation_id="get_location_utilization_report",
    response_model=UtilizationReportResponse,
)
async def get_location_utilization_report(
    location_id: int = Query(..., description="Location to report on", example=1),
    start_date: date = Query(..., description="Start date inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-01-01"),
    end_date: date = Query(..., description="End date inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-01-31"),
) -> UtilizationReportResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    start_dt = datetime.combine(start_date, time(0, 0, 0))
    end_dt = datetime.combine(end_date, time(23, 59, 59))
    appts = session.query(Appointment).filter(
        Appointment.location_id == location_id,
        Appointment.status == "completed",
        Appointment.start_datetime >= start_dt,
        Appointment.start_datetime <= end_dt,
    ).all()
    staff_map: Dict[int, StaffUtilizationItem] = {}
    room_map: Dict[int, RoomUtilizationItem] = {}
    staff_names: Dict[int, str] = {}
    room_names: Dict[int, str] = {}
    staff_ids = list({a.staff_id for a in appts})
    room_ids = list({a.room_id for a in appts if a.room_id is not None})
    if staff_ids:
        staff_rows = session.query(Staff).filter(Staff.id.in_(staff_ids)).all()
        for s in staff_rows:
            staff_names[s.id] = s.full_name
    if room_ids:
        room_rows = session.query(Room).filter(Room.id.in_(room_ids)).all()
        for r in room_rows:
            room_names[r.id] = r.name
    for a in appts:
        duration_hours = (a.end_datetime - a.start_datetime).total_seconds() / 3600.0
        if a.staff_id not in staff_map:
            staff_map[a.staff_id] = StaffUtilizationItem(
                staff_id=a.staff_id,
                staff_name=staff_names.get(a.staff_id, ""),
                completed_appointments=0,
                booked_hours=0.0,
            )
        si = staff_map[a.staff_id]
        si.completed_appointments += 1
        si.booked_hours += duration_hours
        if a.room_id is not None:
            if a.room_id not in room_map:
                room_map[a.room_id] = RoomUtilizationItem(
                    room_id=a.room_id,
                    room_name=room_names.get(a.room_id, ""),
                    booked_hours=0.0,
                    utilization_percent=0.0,
                )
            ri = room_map[a.room_id]
            ri.booked_hours += duration_hours
    open_hours_per_day = 10.0
    num_days = (end_date - start_date).days + 1
    total_open_hours = open_hours_per_day * num_days if num_days > 0 else 1.0
    for ri in room_map.values():
        ri.utilization_percent = (ri.booked_hours / total_open_hours) * 100.0 if total_open_hours > 0 else 0.0
    session.close()
    return UtilizationReportResponse(
        location_id=location_id,
        start_date=start_date,
        end_date=end_date,
        staff_utilization=list(staff_map.values()),
        room_utilization=list(room_map.values()),
    )

        )
    return ClinicalNoteModel.model_validate(obj)


@app.post(
    "/api/appointments/bulk_mark_no_show",
    summary="Bulk mark past-due appointments as no-show",
    description="Update multiple appointments to no-show if past-due without outcome and add notes.",
    tags=["appointments", "automation"],
    operation_id="bulk_mark_appointments_no_show",
    response_model=BulkNoShowResponse,
)
async def bulk_mark_appointments_no_show(
    body: BulkNoShowRequest = Body(...)
) -> BulkNoShowResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rows = session.query(Appointment).filter(
        Appointment.staff_id == body.staff_id,
        Appointment.start_datetime < body.cutoff_datetime,
        Appointment.status.in_(["pending", "confirmed"]),
    ).all()
    updated_items: List[BulkNoShowItem] = []
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    for a in rows:
        old_status = a.status
        a.status = "no-show"
        a.updated_at = now
        a.updated_by_user_id = 1
        note_obj = AppointmentNote(
            appointment_id=a.id,
            note_type="system",
            content=body.note_content,
            created_at=now,
            created_by_user_id=1,
        )
        hist_obj = AppointmentStatusHistory(
            appointment_id=a.id,
            old_status=old_status,
            new_status="no-show",
            changed_at=now,
            changed_by_user_id=1,
            note=body.note_content,
        )
        session.add(note_obj)
        session.add(hist_obj)
        updated_items.append(
            BulkNoShowItem(appointment_id=a.id, old_status=old_status, new_status="no-show")
        )
    session.commit()
    session.close()
    return BulkNoShowResponse(updated_appointments=updated_items)

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import Optional, List, Dict
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, DateTime, ForeignKey, Text, Float, UniqueConstraint, Index, REAL
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, sessionmaker, relationship
import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/mailchimp.db")
engine = create_engine(database_url, echo=False, future=True)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, autocommit=False)
Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    full_name = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class Audience(Base):
    __tablename__ = "audiences"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class AudienceField(Base):
    __tablename__ = "audience_fields"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    audience_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("audiences.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    data_type = Column(String, nullable=False)
    required = Column(Integer, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class Contact(Base):
    __tablename__ = "contacts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    audience_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("audiences.id"), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String, nullable=False)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    city = Column(String)
    signup_source = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="subscribed")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class Tag(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tags"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    audience_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("audiences.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class ContactTag(Base):
    __tablename__ = "contact_tags"
    contact_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("contacts.id"), primary_key=True)
    tag_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("tags.id"), primary_key=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Segment(Base):
    __tablename__ = "segments"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    audience_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("audiences.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    is_dynamic = Column(Integer, default=1)
    logic = Column(Text)
    definition_json = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class Template(Base):
    __tablename__ = "templates"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    layout = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class TemplateBlock(Base):
    __tablename__ = "template_blocks"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    template_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("templates.id"), nullable=False)
    position = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    block_type = Column(String, nullable=False)
    content_text = Column(Text)
    image_url = Column(Text)
    button_label = Column(Text)
    button_url = Column(Text)
    settings_json = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class Campaign(Base):
    __tablename__ = "campaigns"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    audience_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("audiences.id"), nullable=False)
    segment_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("segments.id"))
    template_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("templates.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    subject_line = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    from_name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    from_email = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    status = Column(String, default="draft")
    scheduled_at = Column(DateTime)
    timezone = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)

class CampaignRecipient(Base):
    __tablename__ = "campaign_recipients"

@app.post("/api/audiences", response_model=AudienceResponse, summary="Create audience", description="Create a new audience for user 1", tags=["audiences"], operation_id="create_audience")
async def create_audience(audience_req: AudienceCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> AudienceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user = session.query(User).filter(User.id == 1).first()
    if user is None:
        user = User(id=1, username="user1", email="user1@example.com", full_name="User One", created_at=datetime.utcnow())
        session.add(user)
        session.commit()
    audience = Audience(user_id=1, name=audience_req.name, created_at=datetime.utcnow())
    session.add(audience)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(audience)
    resp = AudienceResponse(id=audience.id, user_id=audience.user_id, name=audience.name, created_at=audience.created_at, updated_at=audience.updated_at)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.get("/api/audiences", response_model=AudienceListResponse, summary="List audiences", description="List audiences for user 1", tags=["audiences"], operation_id="list_audiences")
async def list_audiences(name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by exact audience name", example="Monthly Newsletter Subscribers")) -> AudienceListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.user_id == 1)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Audience.name == name)
    rows = query.all()
    audiences = [AudienceResponse(id=r.id, user_id=r.user_id, name=r.name, created_at=r.created_at, updated_at=r.updated_at) for r in rows]
    session.close()
    return AudienceListResponse(audiences=audiences)

    session.close()
    return resp
