@app.patch("/api/audiences/{audience_id}", response_model=AudienceResponse, summary="Update audience", description="Update an audience's name for user 1", tags=["audiences"], operation_id="update_audience")
async def update_audience(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID to update", example=10), audience_req: AudienceUpdateRequest = Body(...)) -> AudienceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    row = session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    if row is None:
        row = Audience(id=audience_id, user_id=1, name="", created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=None)
        session.add(row)
    if audience_req.name is not None:
        row.name = audience_req.name
    row.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    resp = AudienceResponse(id=row.id, user_id=row.user_id, name=row.name, created_at=row.created_at, updated_at=row.updated_at)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.delete("/api/audiences/{audience_id}", response_model=DeleteResponse, summary="Delete audience", description="Delete an audience by ID for user 1", tags=["audiences"], operation_id="delete_audience")
async def delete_audience(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID to delete", example=10)) -> DeleteResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    row = session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    deleted = False
    if row is not None:
        session.delete(row)
        session.commit()
        deleted = True
    session.close()
    return DeleteResponse(deleted=deleted)

@app.post("/api/audiences/{audience_id}/fields", response_model=AudienceFieldResponse, summary="Create audience field", description="Create a custom field for an audience", tags=["audience_fields"], operation_id="create_audience_field")
async def create_audience_field(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID to add the field to", example=10), field_req: AudienceFieldCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> AudienceFieldResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    audience = session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    required_value = 1 if field_req.required else 0
    field = AudienceField(audience_id=audience_id, name=field_req.name, data_type=field_req.data_type, required=required_value, created_at=datetime.utcnow())
    session.add(field)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(field)
    resp = AudienceFieldResponse(id=field.id, audience_id=field.audience_id, name=field.name, data_type=field.data_type, required=field.required == 1, created_at=field.created_at, updated_at=field.updated_at)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.get("/api/audiences/{audience_id}/fields", response_model=AudienceFieldListResponse, summary="List audience fields", description="List custom fields for an audience", tags=["audience_fields"], operation_id="list_audience_fields")
async def list_audience_fields(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID to list fields for", example=10)) -> AudienceFieldListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    rows = session.query(AudienceField).filter(AudienceField.audience_id == audience_id).all()
    fields = [AudienceFieldResponse(id=r.id, audience_id=r.audience_id, name=r.name, data_type=r.data_type, required=r.required == 1, created_at=r.created_at, updated_at=r.updated_at) for r in rows]
    session.close()
    return AudienceFieldListResponse(fields=fields)

@app.patch("/api/audiences/{audience_id}/fields/{field_id}", response_model=AudienceFieldResponse, summary="Update audience field", description="Update a custom audience field", tags=["audience_fields"], operation_id="update_audience_field")
async def update_audience_field(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID owning the field", example=10), field_id: int = Path(..., description="Field ID to update", example=5), field_req: AudienceFieldUpdateRequest = Body(...)) -> AudienceFieldResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    row = session.query(AudienceField).filter(AudienceField.id == field_id, AudienceField.audience_id == audience_id).first()
    if row is None:
        row = AudienceField(id=field_id, audience_id=audience_id, name="", data_type="", required=0, created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=None)
        session.add(row)
    if field_req.name is not None:
        row.name = field_req.name
    if field_req.data_type is not None:
        row.data_type = field_req.data_type
    if field_req.required is not None:
        row.required = 1 if field_req.required else 0
    row.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    resp = AudienceFieldResponse(id=row.id, audience_id=row.audience_id, name=row.name, data_type=row.data_type, required=row.required == 1, created_at=row.created_at, updated_at=row.updated_at)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.delete("/api/audiences/{audience_id}/fields/{field_id}", response_model=DeleteResponse, summary="Delete audience field", description="Delete a custom audience field", tags=["audience_fields"], operation_id="delete_audience_field")

@app.post("/api/audiences/{audience_id}/contacts", response_model=ContactResponse, summary="Create contact", description="Create a new contact in an audience", tags=["contacts"], operation_id="create_contact")
async def create_contact(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID to add the contact to", example=10), contact_req: ContactCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> ContactResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    contact = Contact(audience_id=audience_id, email=contact_req.email, first_name=contact_req.first_name, last_name=contact_req.last_name, city=contact_req.city, signup_source=contact_req.signup_source, status=contact_req.status if contact_req.status is not None else "subscribed", created_at=datetime.utcnow())
    session.add(contact)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(contact)
    resp = ContactResponse(id=contact.id, audience_id=contact.audience_id, email=contact.email, first_name=contact.first_name, last_name=contact.last_name, city=contact.city, signup_source=contact.signup_source, status=contact.status, created_at=contact.created_at, updated_at=contact.updated_at)
    session.close()
    return resp

@app.get("/api/audiences/{audience_id}/contacts", response_model=ContactListResponse, summary="List contacts", description="List contacts in an audience", tags=["contacts"], operation_id="list_contacts")
async def list_contacts(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID whose contacts to list", example=10), email: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by exact email address", example="alice@example.com"), status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by subscription status", example="subscribed")) -> ContactListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    query = session.query(Contact).filter(Contact.audience_id == audience_id)
    if email is not None:
        query = query.filter(Contact.email == email)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Contact.status == status)
    rows = query.all()
    contacts = [ContactResponse(id=r.id, audience_id=r.audience_id, email=r.email, first_name=r.first_name, last_name=r.last_name, city=r.city, signup_source=r.signup_source, status=r.status, created_at=r.created_at, updated_at=r.updated_at) for r in rows]
    session.close()
    return ContactListResponse(contacts=contacts)

@app.delete("/api/campaigns/{campaign_id}", response_model=DeleteResponse, summary="Delete campaign", description="Delete a campaign", tags=["campaigns"], operation_id="delete_campaign")
async def delete_campaign(campaign_id: int = Path(..., description="Campaign ID to delete", example=600)) -> DeleteResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    r = session.query(Campaign).filter(Campaign.id == campaign_id, Campaign.user_id == 1).first()
    deleted = False
    if r is not None:
        recs = session.query(CampaignRecipient).filter(CampaignRecipient.campaign_id == campaign_id).all()
        for cr in recs:
            opens = session.query(CampaignOpen).filter(CampaignOpen.campaign_recipient_id == cr.id).all()
            for o in opens:
                session.delete(o)
            clicks = session.query(CampaignClick).filter(CampaignClick.campaign_recipient_id == cr.id).all()
            for c in clicks:
                session.delete(c)
            session.delete(cr)
        session.delete(r)
        session.commit()
        deleted = True
    session.close()
    return DeleteResponse(deleted=deleted)

@app.get("/api/reports/campaigns/{campaign_id}/summary", response_model=CampaignSummaryReportResponse, summary="Campaign summary report", description="Get summary metrics for a campaign", tags=["reports"], operation_id="get_campaign_summary_report")
async def get_campaign_summary_report(campaign_id: int = Path(..., description="Campaign ID to summarize", example=600)) -> CampaignSummaryReportResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    session.query(Campaign).filter(Campaign.id == campaign_id, Campaign.user_id == 1).first()
    recipients = session.query(CampaignRecipient).filter(CampaignRecipient.campaign_id == campaign_id).all()
    total_sent = 0
    bounces = 0
    unsubscribes = 0
    for r in recipients:
        if r.status == "sent":
            total_sent += 1
        if r.status == "bounced":
            bounces += 1
        if r.status == "unsubscribed":
            unsubscribes += 1
    opens = session.query(CampaignOpen).join(CampaignRecipient, CampaignOpen.campaign_recipient_id == CampaignRecipient.id).filter(CampaignRecipient.campaign_id == campaign_id).all()
    total_opens = len(opens)
    clicks = session.query(CampaignClick).join(CampaignRecipient, CampaignClick.campaign_recipient_id == CampaignRecipient.id).filter(CampaignRecipient.campaign_id == campaign_id).all()
    unique_contact_ids = set()
    for c in clicks:
        rec = session.query(CampaignRecipient).filter(CampaignRecipient.id == c.campaign_recipient_id).first()
        if rec is not None:
            unique_contact_ids.add(rec.contact_id)
    total_unique_clicks = len(unique_contact_ids)
    session.close()
    return CampaignSummaryReportResponse(campaign_id=campaign_id, total_sent=total_sent, total_opens=total_opens, total_unique_clicks=total_unique_clicks, bounces=bounces, unsubscribes=unsubscribes)

@app.get("/api/reports/audiences/{audience_id}/top-clickers", response_model=AudienceTopClickersReportResponse, summary="Audience top clickers", description="Get top contacts by clicks in period", tags=["reports"], operation_id="get_audience_top_clickers_report")
async def get_audience_top_clickers_report(audience_id: int = Path(..., description="Audience ID to analyze", example=10), days: Optional[int] = Query(90, description="Number of days back to include campaign activity", example=90), limit: Optional[int] = Query(10, description="Maximum number of contacts to return", example=10)) -> AudienceTopClickersReportResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    session.query(Audience).filter(Audience.id == audience_id, Audience.user_id == 1).first()
    since_time = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days if days is not None else 90)
    campaigns = session.query(Campaign).filter(Campaign.audience_id == audience_id, Campaign.user_id == 1).all()
    campaign_ids = [c.id for c in campaigns]
    recs = session.query(CampaignRecipient).filter(CampaignRecipient.campaign_id.in_(campaign_ids)).all() if campaign_ids else []
    rec_ids = [r.id for r in recs]
    clicks = session.query(CampaignClick).filter(CampaignClick.campaign_recipient_id.in_(rec_ids), CampaignClick.clicked_at >= since_time).all() if rec_ids else []
    contact_clicks: Dict[int, int] = {}
    contact_last_click: Dict[int, datetime] = {}
    for c in clicks:
        rec = session.query(CampaignRecipient).filter(CampaignRecipient.id == c.campaign_recipient_id).first()
        if rec is not None:
            cid = rec.contact_id
            contact_clicks[cid] = contact_clicks.get(cid, 0) + 1
            if cid not in contact_last_click or c.clicked_at > contact_last_click[cid]:
                contact_last_click[cid] = c.clicked_at
    items: List[TopClickerItem] = []
    for cid, count in contact_clicks.items():
        contact = session.query(Contact).filter(Contact.id == cid, Contact.audience_id == audience_id).first()
        if contact is not None:
            items.append(TopClickerItem(contact_id=cid, email=contact.email, total_clicks=count, last_click_date=contact_last_click.get(cid)))
    items.sort(key=lambda x: x.total_clicks, reverse=True)
    if limit is not None:
        items = items[:limit]
    session.close()
    return AudienceTopClickersReportResponse(audience_id=audience_id, days=days if days is not None else 90, top_contacts=items)

import os
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional, Dict

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    DateTime,
    ForeignKey,
    UniqueConstraint,
    CheckConstraint,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/partyqueue_multiplayer_game_lobby_hub.db")

engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

app = FastAPI(title="PartyQueue Multiplayer Game Lobby Hub", version="1.0.0")


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    profile_data = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)


class Friendship(Base):
    __tablename__ = "friendships"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    friend_user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("user_id", "friend_user_id", name="uq_friendships_user_friend"),
        CheckConstraint("status in ('pending','accepted','blocked')", name="ck_friendships_status"),
    )


class Block(Base):
    __tablename__ = "blocks"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    blocked_user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    reason = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("user_id", "blocked_user_id", name="uq_blocks_user_blocked"),
    )


class Game(Base):
    __tablename__ = "games"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    platform = Column(String, nullable=False)
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("name", "platform", name="uq_games_name_platform"),
    )


class UserGameOwnership(Base):
    __tablename__ = "user_game_ownership"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    game_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("games.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("user_id", "game_id", name="uq_ugo_user_game"),
    )


class UserPresence(Base):
    __tablename__ = "user_presence"
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), primary_key=True)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False, index=True)
    last_seen_at = Column(DateTime)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint("status in ('online','offline','away','busy')", name="ck_user_presence_status"),
    )


class Lobby(Base):
    __tablename__ = "lobbies"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    game_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("games.id"), nullable=False)
    region = Column(String, nullable=False)
    mode = Column(String, nullable=False)
    lobby_type = Column(String, nullable=False)
    max_players = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    ready_check_enabled = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False, default="active")
    created_by_user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)


class PartyMember(Base):
    __tablename__ = "party_members"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    lobby_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("lobbies.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False, index=True)

def parse_datetime_optional(value: Optional[str]) -> Optional[datetime]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return datetime.fromisoformat(value.replace("Z", "+00:00"))


@app.get(
    "/api/games",
    response_model=GamesListResponse,
    summary="List games with optional filters",
    description="Retrieve games by optional name and platform filters for lobby creation and stats.",
    tags=["games"],
    operation_id="list_games",
)
async def list_games(

@app.get(
    "/api/users/search",
    response_model=UserSearchResponse,
    summary="Search users by username prefix",
    description="Search users by case-insensitive username prefix, useful to find users like ShadowFox#9213.",
    tags=["users"],
    operation_id="search_users_by_username",
)
async def search_users_by_username(
    username_prefix: str = Query(..., description="Case-insensitive username prefix to search", example="ShadowFox#9"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(20, description="Maximum number of users to return", example=20),
) -> UserSearchResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pattern = f"{username_prefix}%"
    users = (
        session.query(User)
        .filter(User.username.ilike(pattern))
        .order_by(User.id)
        .limit(limit if limit is not None else 20)
        .all()
    )
    session.close()
    return UserSearchResponse(users=[UserSearchItem.model_validate(u) for u in users])

    summary="List games owned by current user",
    description="Return all game ownership records for current user with optional game filtering.",
    tags=["user_games"],
    operation_id="list_my_game_ownership",
)
async def list_my_game_ownership(
    game_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by game name through join to games table", example="SkyRaiders Online"),
    platform: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by platform through join to games table", example="Xbox"),
) -> OwnedGamesListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = (
        session.query(UserGameOwnership, Game)
        .join(Game, UserGameOwnership.game_id == Game.id)
        .filter(UserGameOwnership.user_id == 1)
    )
    if game_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.name == game_name)
    if platform is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.platform == platform)
    rows = query.all()
    owned_games: List[OwnedGameItem] = []
    for ugo, game in rows:
        owned_games.append(
            OwnedGameItem(
                ownership_id=ugo.id,
                user_id=ugo.user_id,
                game_id=ugo.game_id,
                game_name=game.name,
                platform=game.platform,
                created_at=ugo.created_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return OwnedGamesListResponse(owned_games=owned_games)

@app.post(
    "/api/lobbies/{lobby_id}/ready_checks",
    response_model=ReadyCheckItem,
    summary="Initiate a ready check for a lobby",
    description="Create a ready_checks row and ready_check_responses rows for all party members with no_response.",
    tags=["ready_checks"],
    operation_id="initiate_ready_check",
)
async def initiate_ready_check(
    lobby_id: int = Path(..., description="Lobby id where ready check is initiated", example=240),
) -> ReadyCheckItem:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    ready_check = ReadyCheck(
        lobby_id=lobby_id,
        initiated_by_user_id=1,
        status="pending",
        created_at=now,
        completed_at=None,
    )
    session.add(ready_check)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(ready_check)
    members = session.query(PartyMember).filter(PartyMember.lobby_id == lobby_id).all()
    for member in members:
        existing = (
            session.query(ReadyCheckResponse)
            .filter(
                ReadyCheckResponse.ready_check_id == ready_check.id,
                ReadyCheckResponse.user_id == member.user_id,
            )
            .first()
        )
        if existing is None:

        .filter(DirectInviteLink.lobby_id == lobby_id, DirectInviteLink.status == "active")

@app.get(
    "/api/friends/online_with_game",
    response_model=FriendsOnlineWithGameResponse,
    summary="List my online friends who own a specific game",
    description="Return friends with accepted status that are online and own a given game name and platform.",
    tags=["friends_helpers"],
    operation_id="list_online_friends_with_game",
)
async def list_online_friends_with_game(
    game_name: str = Query(..., description="Game name to check ownership", example="SkyRaiders Online"),
    platform: str = Query(..., description="Platform string to match game", example="Xbox"),
) -> FriendsOnlineWithGameResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    friends = (
        session.query(Friendship)
        .filter(Friendship.user_id == 1, Friendship.status == "accepted")
        .all()
    )
    friend_ids = [f.friend_user_id for f in friends]
    if not friend_ids:
        session.close()
        return FriendsOnlineWithGameResponse(friends=[])
    games = (
        session.query(Game)
        .filter(Game.name == game_name, Game.platform == platform)
        .all()
    )
    game_ids = [g.id for g in games]
    if not game_ids:
        session.close()
        return FriendsOnlineWithGameResponse(friends=[])
    ownerships = (
        session.query(UserGameOwnership)
        .filter(UserGameOwnership.user_id.in_(friend_ids), UserGameOwnership.game_id.in_(game_ids))
        .all()
    )
    owned_by_friend: Dict[int, int] = {}
    for o in ownerships:
        owned_by_friend[o.user_id] = o.game_id
    presences = (
        session.query(UserPresence)
        .filter(UserPresence.user_id.in_(list(owned_by_friend.keys())), UserPresence.status == "online")
        .all()
    )
    online_ids = [p.user_id for p in presences]
    if not online_ids:
        session.close()
        return FriendsOnlineWithGameResponse(friends=[])
    users = session.query(User).filter(User.id.in_(online_ids)).all()
    id_to_user = {u.id: u for u in users}
    id_to_game = {g.id: g for g in games}
    result: List[FriendOnlineWithGameItem] = []
    for uid in online_ids:
        if uid in owned_by_friend and uid in id_to_user:
            gid = owned_by_friend[uid]
            if gid in id_to_game:
                g = id_to_game[gid]
                u = id_to_user[uid]
                result.append(
                    FriendOnlineWithGameItem(
                        user_id=uid,
                        username=u.username,
                        presence_status="online",
                        game_id=gid,
                        game_name=g.name,
                        platform=g.platform,
                    )
                )
    session.close()
    return FriendsOnlineWithGameResponse(friends=result)

@app.get(
    "/api/match_sessions/me",
    response_model=MatchListResponse,
    summary="List match sessions I participated in with filters",
    description="Return match sessions joined by current user filtered by game, platform, region, and time range.",
    tags=["match_sessions"],
    operation_id="list_my_match_sessions",
)
async def list_my_match_sessions(
    game_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by game name via join to games", example="Mythic Siege"),
    platform: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by game platform via join to games", example="PC"),
    region: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by match region", example="NA-East"),
    start_time_from: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="ISO8601 lower bound for match start_time", example="2024-12-24T00:00:00Z"),
    start_time_to: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="ISO8601 upper bound for match start_time", example="2024-12-31T23:59:59Z"),
) -> MatchListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = (
        session.query(MatchSession, Game)
        .join(MatchParticipant, MatchParticipant.match_session_id == MatchSession.id)
        .join(Game, MatchSession.game_id == Game.id)
        .filter(MatchParticipant.user_id == 1)
    )
    if game_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.name == game_name)
    if platform is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.platform == platform)
    if region is not None:
        query = query.filter(MatchSession.region == region)
    if start_time_from is not None:
        dt_from = parse_datetime_optional(start_time_from)
        if dt_from is not None:
            query = query.filter(MatchSession.start_time >= dt_from)
    if start_time_to is not None:
        dt_to = parse_datetime_optional(start_time_to)
        if dt_to is not None:
            query = query.filter(MatchSession.start_time <= dt_to)
    rows = query.all()
    matches: List[MatchListItem] = []
    for ms, game in rows:
        matches.append(
            MatchListItem(
                id=ms.id,
                lobby_id=ms.lobby_id,
                game_id=ms.game_id,
                game_name=game.name,
                platform=game.platform,
                region=ms.region,
                server_name=ms.server_name,
                start_time=ms.start_time,
                end_time=ms.end_time,
                result=ms.result,
                final_score=ms.final_score,
                duration_seconds=ms.duration_seconds,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return MatchListResponse(matches=matches)


@app.get(
    "/api/match_sessions/me/aggregate_stats",
    response_model=MatchAggregateStatsResponse,
    summary="Get aggregate match stats for me",
    description="Compute aggregate stats for my match participations filtered by game, platform, region, and time range.",
    tags=["match_sessions"],
    operation_id="get_my_match_stats",
)
async def get_my_match_stats(
    game_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter matches by game name", example="Mythic Siege"),
    platform: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter matches by platform", example="PC"),
    region: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by match region", example="NA-East"),
    start_time_from: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Lower bound on match start_time", example="2024-12-24T00:00:00Z"),
    start_time_to: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Upper bound on match start_time", example="2024-12-31T23:59:59Z"),
) -> MatchAggregateStatsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = (
        session.query(MatchSession, Game)
        .join(MatchParticipant, MatchParticipant.match_session_id == MatchSession.id)
        .join(Game, MatchSession.game_id == Game.id)
        .filter(MatchParticipant.user_id == 1)
    )
    if game_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.name == game_name)
    if platform is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.platform == platform)
    if region is not None:
        query = query.filter(MatchSession.region == region)
    if start_time_from is not None:
        dt_from = parse_datetime_optional(start_time_from)
        if dt_from is not None:
            query = query.filter(MatchSession.start_time >= dt_from)
    if start_time_to is not None:
        dt_to = parse_datetime_optional(start_time_to)
        if dt_to is not None:
            query = query.filter(MatchSession.start_time <= dt_to)
    rows = query.all()
    total_matches = len(rows)
    wins = 0
    losses = 0
    draws = 0
    durations: List[int] = []
    for ms, _ in rows:
        if ms.result == "win":
            wins += 1
        elif ms.result == "loss":
            losses += 1
        elif ms.result == "draw":
            draws += 1
        if ms.duration_seconds is not None:
            durations.append(ms.duration_seconds)
    avg_duration = None
    if durations:
        avg_duration = sum(durations) / len(durations)
    session.close()
    return MatchAggregateStatsResponse(
        total_matches=total_matches,
        wins=wins,
        losses=losses,
        draws=draws,
        average_duration_seconds=avg_duration,
    )

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import Optional, List
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    Text,
    DateTime,
    Date,
    Float,
    ForeignKey,
    CheckConstraint,
    UniqueConstraint,
    Index
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker
from datetime import datetime, date
import os

DATABASE_PATH = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/leaselink_corporate_workspace.db")
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_PATH, future=True)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, autocommit=False)
Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(Text, nullable=False, unique=True)
    email = Column(Text, nullable=False, unique=True)
    full_name = Column(Text)
    profile_json = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


Index("idx_users_email", User.email)

class Building(Base):
    __tablename__ = "buildings"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    address = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    time_zone = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


Index("idx_buildings_name_address", Building.name, Building.address, unique=True)

class BuildingOperationalHour(Base):
    __tablename__ = "building_operational_hours"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    building_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("buildings.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    weekday = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    open_time = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    close_time = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


Index("idx_bldg_hours_building_id", BuildingOperationalHour.building_id)
UniqueConstraint(BuildingOperationalHour.building_id, BuildingOperationalHour.weekday, name="uix_bldg_weekday")
CheckConstraint("weekday BETWEEN 0 AND 6", name="chk_bldg_weekday")

class Floor(Base):
    __tablename__ = "floors"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    building_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("buildings.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    floor_number = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    name = Column(Text)
    metadata_json = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


Index("idx_floors_building_id", Floor.building_id)
UniqueConstraint(Floor.building_id, Floor.floor_number, name="uix_building_floor_number")

class Suite(Base):
    __tablename__ = "suites"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    floor_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("floors.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    suite_type = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    capacity = Column(Integer)
    floor_plan_metadata_json = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


Index("idx_suites_floor_id", Suite.floor_id)
UniqueConstraint(Suite.floor_id, Suite.name, name="uix_floor_suite_name")
CheckConstraint("suite_type IN ('private_office','coworking','meeting_room','other')", name="chk_suite_type")

class Tenant(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tenants"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False, unique=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


Index("idx_tenants_name", Tenant.name, unique=True)

class TenantContact(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tenant_contacts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    tenant_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("tenants.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    email = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    phone = Column(Text)
    is_primary = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

Index("idx_tenant_contacts_tenant_id", TenantContact.tenant_id)
Index("idx_tenant_contacts_primary", TenantContact.tenant_id, TenantContact.is_primary, unique=True, sqlite_where="is_primary = 1")
CheckConstraint("is_primary IN (0,1)", name="chk_contact_is_primary")

class SubscriptionPlan(Base):

class TenantSubscription(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tenant_subscriptions"

@app.post(
    "/api/buildings",
    summary="Create a new building",
    description="Create a building with name, address, and time_zone",
    tags=["buildings"],
    operation_id="create_building",
    response_model=BuildingResponse,
)
async def create_building_endpoint(
    request: BuildingCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> BuildingResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    building = Building(
        name=request.name,
        address=request.address,
        time_zone=request.time_zone,
        created_at=now_utc(),
        updated_at=now_utc(),
    )
    session.add(building)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(building)
    session.close()
    return BuildingResponse.model_validate(building)

@app.get(
    "/api/buildings",
    summary="List buildings with optional filters",
    description="Retrieve buildings filtered by name or address with pagination",
    tags=["buildings"],
    operation_id="list_buildings",
    response_model=BuildingListResponse,
)
async def list_buildings_endpoint(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by building name (partial match)", example="Downtown Innovation Hub"),
    address: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by building address (partial match)", example="200 Market St"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(50, description="Maximum number of records to return", example=50),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Number of records to skip for pagination", example=0),
) -> BuildingListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Building)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Building.name.like(f"%{name}%"))
    if address is not None:
        query = query.filter(Building.address.like(f"%{address}%"))
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    items = query.all()
    session.close()
    return BuildingListResponse(buildings=[BuildingResponse.model_validate(b) for b in items])

@app.get(
    "/api/buildings/{building_id}",
    summary="Get building by id",
    description="Fetch a single building by its id",
    tags=["buildings"],
    operation_id="get_building",
    response_model=BuildingResponse,
)
async def get_building_endpoint(
    building_id: int = Path(..., description="Building identifier", example=1),
) -> BuildingResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    building = session.query(Building).filter(Building.id == building_id).first()
    session.close()
    if building is None:
        return BuildingResponse(
            id=0,
            name="",
            address="",
            time_zone="",
            created_at=now_utc(),
            updated_at=now_utc(),
        )
    return BuildingResponse.model_validate(building)

@app.post(
    "/api/buildings/{building_id}/operational_hours",
    summary="Set building operational hours for a weekday",
    description="Create or replace operational hours for a building weekday",
    tags=["buildings", "operational_hours"],
    operation_id="set_building_operational_hours",
    response_model=BuildingOperationalHoursResponse,
)
async def set_building_operational_hours_endpoint(
    building_id: int = Path(..., description="Building identifier", example=1),
    request: BuildingOperationalHoursCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> BuildingOperationalHoursResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    existing = (
        session.query(BuildingOperationalHour)
        .filter(
            BuildingOperationalHour.building_id == building_id,
            BuildingOperationalHour.weekday == request.weekday,
        )
        .first()
    )
    now_val = now_utc()
    if existing is None:
        record = BuildingOperationalHour(
            building_id=building_id,
            weekday=request.weekday,
            open_time=request.open_time,
            close_time=request.close_time,
            created_at=now_val,
            updated_at=now_val,
        )
        session.add(record)
    else:
        existing.open_time = request.open_time
        existing.close_time = request.close_time
        existing.updated_at = now_val
        record = existing
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(record)
    session.close()
    return BuildingOperationalHoursResponse.model_validate(record)

@app.get(
    "/api/buildings/{building_id}/operational_hours",

@app.post(
    "/api/tenant_contacts",
    summary="Create a tenant contact",
    description="Create a contact for a tenant and optionally mark primary",
    tags=["tenant_contacts"],
    operation_id="create_tenant_contact",
    response_model=TenantContactResponse,
)
async def create_tenant_contact_endpoint(
    request: TenantContactCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> TenantContactResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now_val = now_utc()
    is_primary_int = 1 if (request.is_primary is True) else 0
    contact = TenantContact(
        tenant_id=request.tenant_id,
        name=request.name,
        email=request.email,
        phone=request.phone,
        is_primary=is_primary_int,
        created_at=now_val,
        updated_at=now_val,
    )
    if is_primary_int == 1:
        existing_primary = (
            session.query(TenantContact)
            .filter(TenantContact.tenant_id == request.tenant_id, TenantContact.is_primary == 1)
            .all()
        )
        for c in existing_primary:
            c.is_primary = 0
            c.updated_at = now_val
    session.add(contact)

@app.patch(
    "/api/license_pricing_versions/{pricing_version_id}",
    summary="Update license pricing version fields",
    description="Update fields for an existing pricing version",
    tags=["license_pricing_versions"],
    operation_id="update_license_pricing_version",
    response_model=LicensePricingVersionResponse,
)
async def update_license_pricing_version_endpoint(
    pricing_version_id: int = Path(..., description="Pricing version identifier", example=81),
    request: LicensePricingVersionUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> LicensePricingVersionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pv = session.query(LicensePricingVersion).filter(LicensePricingVersion.id == pricing_version_id).first()
    now_val = now_utc()
    if pv is None:
        pv = LicensePricingVersion(
            license_id=0,
            effective_start_date=date.today(),
            effective_end_date=None,
            allowed_capacity=0,
            base_price_per_month=0.0,
            seat_threshold=0,
            surcharge_per_seat=0.0,
            created_at=now_val,
            updated_at=now_val,
        )
        session.add(pv)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(pv)
        session.close()
        return LicensePricingVersionResponse.model_validate(pv)
    if request.allowed_capacity is not None:
        pv.allowed_capacity = request.allowed_capacity
    if request.seat_threshold is not None:
        pv.seat_threshold = request.seat_threshold
    if request.surcharge_per_seat is not None:
        pv.surcharge_per_seat = request.surcharge_per_seat
    if request.effective_start_date is not None:
        pv.effective_start_date = date.fromisoformat(request.effective_start_date)
    if request.effective_end_date is not None:
        pv.effective_end_date = date.fromisoformat(request.effective_end_date)
    if request.effective_end_date is None and request.effective_end_date is not None:
        pv.effective_end_date = None
    pv.updated_at = now_val
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pv)
    session.close()
    return LicensePricingVersionResponse.model_validate(pv)

@app.get(
    "/api/resource_bookings/check_conflict",
    summary="Check for conflicting resource bookings",
    description="Check if a time range conflicts with existing bookings",
    tags=["resource_bookings"],
    operation_id="check_resource_booking_conflict",
    response_model=ResourceBookingCheckConflictResponse,
)
async def check_resource_booking_conflict_endpoint(
    resource_id: int = Query(..., description="Resource id to check bookings for", example=91),
    start_datetime: str = Query(..., description="Proposed start datetime ISO 8601", example="2026-03-12T09:00:00-08:00"),
    end_datetime: str = Query(..., description="Proposed end datetime ISO 8601", example="2026-03-12T11:00:00-08:00"),
) -> ResourceBookingCheckConflictResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = (
        session.query(ResourceBooking)
        .filter(ResourceBooking.resource_id == resource_id)
        .filter(ResourceBooking.end_datetime > start_datetime)
        .filter(ResourceBooking.start_datetime < end_datetime)
    )
    items = query.all()
    session.close()
    conflicts = []
    for b in items:
        conflicts.append(
            ResourceBookingCheckConflictResponseItem(
                id=b.id,
                resource_id=b.resource_id,
                tenant_id=b.tenant_id,
                organizer_email=b.organizer_email,
                title=b.title,
                start_datetime=b.start_datetime,
                end_datetime=b.end_datetime,
                time_zone=b.time_zone,
                expected_attendance=b.expected_attendance,
                status=b.status,
            )
        )
    return ResourceBookingCheckConflictResponse(
        has_conflict=len(conflicts) > 0,
        conflicting_bookings=conflicts,
    )

@app.post(
    "/api/access_passes/{identifier}/revoke",
    summary="Revoke an access pass by identifier",
    description="Set access pass status to revoked using its identifier",
    tags=["access_passes"],
    operation_id="revoke_access_pass_by_identifier",
    response_model=AccessPassResponse,
)
async def revoke_access_pass_by_identifier_endpoint(
    identifier: str = Path(..., description="External access pass identifier to revoke", example="BW-EMP-002"),
) -> AccessPassResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    ap = session.query(AccessPass).filter(AccessPass.identifier == identifier).first()
    now_val = now_utc()
    if ap is None:
        ap = AccessPass(
            tenant_id=0,
            identifier=identifier,
            start_date=date.today(),
            end_date=None,
            status="revoked",
            created_at=now_val,
            updated_at=now_val,
        )
        session.add(ap)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(ap)
        session.close()
        return AccessPassResponse.model_validate(ap)
    ap.status = "revoked"
    ap.updated_at = now_val
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(ap)
    session.close()
    return AccessPassResponse.model_validate(ap)

@app.get(
    "/api/access_passes/tenant/{tenant_id}/active_out_of_hours_for_suite/{suite_id}",
    summary="List active passes with out-of-hours suite access",
    description="List active access passes for a tenant that allow suite outside hours",
    tags=["access_passes", "access_pass_permissions", "buildings"],
    operation_id="list_active_passes_out_of_hours_for_suite",
    response_model=AccessPassWithPermissionsListResponse,
)
async def list_active_passes_out_of_hours_for_suite_endpoint(
    tenant_id: int = Path(..., description="Tenant whose passes are being queried", example=31),
    suite_id: int = Path(..., description="Suite id for which access is checked", example=21),
) -> AccessPassWithPermissionsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    suite = session.query(Suite).filter(Suite.id == suite_id).first()
    if suite is None:
        session.close()
        return AccessPassWithPermissionsListResponse(access_passes=[])
    floor = session.query(Floor).filter(Floor.id == suite.floor_id).first()
    if floor is None:
        session.close()
        return AccessPassWithPermissionsListResponse(access_passes=[])
    building = session.query(Building).filter(Building.id == floor.building_id).first()
    if building is None:
        session.close()
        return AccessPassWithPermissionsListResponse(access_passes=[])
    weekday = date.today().weekday()
    b_hours = (
        session.query(BuildingOperationalHour)
        .filter(
            BuildingOperationalHour.building_id == building.id,
            BuildingOperationalHour.weekday == weekday,
        )
        .first()
    )
    perms_query = (
        session.query(AccessPassPermission, AccessPass)
        .join(AccessPass, AccessPassPermission.access_pass_id == AccessPass.id)
        .filter(
            AccessPass.tenant_id == tenant_id,
            AccessPass.status == "active",
            AccessPassPermission.suite_id == suite_id,
        )
    )
    today_val = date.today()
    perms_with_passes = []
    for perm, ap in perms_query.all():
        if ap.start_date <= today_val and (ap.end_date is None or ap.end_date >= today_val):
            perms_with_passes.append((perm, ap))
    result_dict = {}
    for perm, ap in perms_with_passes:
        is_out_of_hours = False
        if b_hours is not None:
            if perm.access_start_time < b_hours.open_time or perm.access_end_time > b_hours.close_time:
                is_out_of_hours = True
        else:
            is_out_of_hours = True
        if not is_out_of_hours:
            continue
        if ap.id not in result_dict:
            result_dict[ap.id] = {
                "pass": ap,
                "permissions": [],
            }
        result_dict[ap.id]["permissions"].append(perm)
    session.close()
    access_passes_list = []
    for ap_id in result_dict:
        ap = result_dict[ap_id]["pass"]
        perms = result_dict[ap_id]["permissions"]
        perms_items = []
        for p in perms:
            perms_items.append(
                AccessPassWithPermissionsPermissionItem(
                    id=p.id,
                    building_id=p.building_id,
                    floor_id=p.floor_id,
                    suite_id=p.suite_id,
                    resource_id=p.resource_id,
                    access_start_time=p.access_start_time,
                    access_end_time=p.access_end_time,
                )
            )
        access_passes_list.append(
            AccessPassWithPermissionsItem(
                id=ap.id,
                tenant_id=ap.tenant_id,
                identifier=ap.identifier,
                start_date=ap.start_date,
                end_date=ap.end_date,
                status=ap.status,
                permissions=perms_items,
            )
        )
    return AccessPassWithPermissionsListResponse(access_passes=access_passes_list)

@app.post(
    "/api/invoices",
    summary="Create a draft invoice",
    description="Create a draft invoice for a tenant and billing period",
    tags=["invoices"],
    operation_id="create_invoice",
    response_model=InvoiceResponse,
)
async def create_invoice_endpoint(
    request: InvoiceCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> InvoiceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now_val = now_utc()
    billing_start = date.fromisoformat(request.billing_period_start)
    billing_end = date.fromisoformat(request.billing_period_end)
    issue_dt = date.fromisoformat(request.issue_date)
    due_dt = date.fromisoformat(request.due_date) if request.due_date is not None else None
    currency_val = request.currency if request.currency is not None else "USD"
    invoice = Invoice(
        tenant_id=request.tenant_id,
        billing_period_start=billing_start,
        billing_period_end=billing_end,
        issue_date=issue_dt,
        due_date=due_dt,
        status="draft",
        currency=currency_val,
        total_amount=0.0,
        created_at=now_val,
        updated_at=now_val,
    )
    session.add(invoice)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(invoice)
    session.close()
    return InvoiceResponse.model_validate(invoice)

    )

@app.post(
    "/api/invoices/{invoice_id}/recalculate_total",
    summary="Recalculate invoice total from line items",
    description="Sum invoice_line_items for an invoice and update total_amount",
    tags=["invoices", "invoice_line_items"],
    operation_id="recalculate_invoice_total",
    response_model=InvoiceResponse,
)
async def recalculate_invoice_total_endpoint(
    invoice_id: int = Path(..., description="Invoice whose total needs recalculation", example=161),
) -> InvoiceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    invoice = session.query(Invoice).filter(Invoice.id == invoice_id).first()
    if invoice is None:
        now_val = now_utc()
        invoice = Invoice(
            tenant_id=0,
            billing_period_start=date.today(),
            billing_period_end=date.today(),
            issue_date=date.today(),
            due_date=None,
            status="draft",
            currency="USD",
            total_amount=0.0,
            created_at=now_val,
            updated_at=now_val,
        )
        session.add(invoice)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(invoice)
        session.close()
        return InvoiceResponse.model_validate(invoice)
    items = session.query(InvoiceLineItem).filter(InvoiceLineItem.invoice_id == invoice_id).all()
    total = 0.0
    for it in items:
        if it.amount is not None:
            total += float(it.amount)
    invoice.total_amount = total
    invoice.updated_at = now_utc()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(invoice)
    session.close()
    return InvoiceResponse.model_validate(invoice)

import os
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional, Dict

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    Text,
    DateTime,
    ForeignKey,
    UniqueConstraint,
    Index,
    and_,
    or_,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/guildforge_mmo_item_marketplace.db")

engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

Base = declarative_base()

def now_utc_str() -> str:
    return datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    email = Column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    profile_data = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class Game(Base):
    __tablename__ = "games"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(Text, unique=True, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class GameServer(Base):
    __tablename__ = "game_servers"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    game_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("games.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    region = Column(Text)
    is_under_maintenance = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
    maintenance_message = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class PlayerAccount(Base):
    __tablename__ = "player_accounts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    game_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("games.id"), nullable=False)
    account_handle = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("user_id", "game_id", name="uix_user_game"),)


class Character(Base):
    __tablename__ = "characters"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    player_account_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("player_accounts.id"), nullable=False)
    game_server_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("game_servers.id"), nullable=False)
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    class_ = Column("class", Text)
    level = Column(Integer)
    faction = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint("game_server_id", "name", name="uix_server_name"),)


class VirtualItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = "virtual_items"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    game_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("games.id"), nullable=False)
    game_server_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("game_servers.id"))
    name = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    item_type = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    rarity = Column(Text)
    bind_status = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class Wallet(Base):
    __tablename__ = "wallets"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False, unique=True)
    balance = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class WalletTransaction(Base):
    __tablename__ = "wallet_transactions"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    wallet_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("wallets.id"), nullable=False)
    transaction_type = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    amount = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    related_order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("orders.id"))
    description = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class Listing(Base):
    __tablename__ = "listings"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    seller_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"), nullable=False)
    virtual_item_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("virtual_items.id"), nullable=False)

    fixed_price = Column(Integer)

    buyout_price = Column(Integer)

    status = Column(Text, nullable=False, default="active")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = "orders"

    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

def bool_from_int(value: int) -> bool:
    return bool(value)


def isoformat(dt: Optional[datetime]) -> Optional[str]:
    if dt is None:
        return None
    return dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")


class GameModel(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
    id: int = Field(..., description="Game primary key", example=3)

    created_at: str = Field(..., description="Game creation timestamp", example="2025-01-15T12:34:56Z")
    updated_at: str = Field(..., description="Last update timestamp", example="2025-02-01T10:00:00Z")

    region: str = Field(..., description="Region code for the server", example="NA")


class GameServerResponse(BaseModel):

class GameServerUpdateRequest(BaseModel):

    is_under_maintenance: Optional[bool] = Field(None, description="Set maintenance flag", example=True)

@app.get(
    "/api/games",
    response_model=GamesListResponse,
    summary="List games with optional name filter",
    description="Retrieve all games or filter by exact or partial name.",
    tags=["games"],
    operation_id="list_games",
)
async def list_games(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter games by exact name match", example="Starfall Odyssey"),
    name_contains: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter games where name contains this substring", example="Realm"),
) -> GamesListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Game)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.name == name)
    if name_contains is not None:
        pattern = f"%{name_contains}%"
        query = query.filter(Game.name.ilike(pattern))
    games = query.all()
    result_games: List[GameModel] = []
    for g in games:
        result_games.append(
            GameModel(
                id=g.id,
                name=g.name,
                created_at=isoformat(g.created_at),
                updated_at=isoformat(g.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return GamesListResponse(games=result_games)


@app.post(
    "/api/games",
    response_model=GameResponse,
    summary="Create a new game",
    description="Create a game entry; typically used by admins.",
    tags=["games"],
    operation_id="create_game",
)
async def create_game(body: GameCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> GameResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    game = Game(name=body.name, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
    session.add(game)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(game)
    game_model = GameModel(id=game.id, name=game.name, created_at=isoformat(game.created_at), updated_at=isoformat(game.updated_at))
    session.close()
    return GameResponse(game=game_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/games/{game_id}",
    response_model=GameResponse,
    summary="Get a game by ID",
    description="Fetch a single game by its ID.",
    tags=["games"],
    operation_id="get_game_by_id",
)
async def get_game_by_id(
    game_id: int = Path(..., description="ID of the game", example=3)
) -> GameResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    game = session.query(Game).filter(Game.id == game_id).first()
    if game is None:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        game = Game(id=game_id, name=f"Game {game_id}", created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(game)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(game)
    game_model = GameModel(id=game.id, name=game.name, created_at=isoformat(game.created_at), updated_at=isoformat(game.updated_at))
    session.close()
    return GameResponse(game=game_model)


@app.patch(
    "/api/games/{game_id}",
    response_model=GameResponse,
    summary="Update a game's name",
    description="Partially update a game; currently supports updating the name.",
    tags=["games"],
    operation_id="update_game",
)
async def update_game(
    game_id: int = Path(..., description="ID of the game to update", example=3),
    body: GameUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> GameResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    game = session.query(Game).filter(Game.id == game_id).first()
    if game is None:
        now_create = datetime.utcnow()
        game = Game(id=game_id, name=f"Game {game_id}", created_at=now_create, updated_at=now_create)
        session.add(game)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(game)
    if body.name is not None:
        game.name = body.name
        game.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(game)
    game_model = GameModel(id=game.id, name=game.name, created_at=isoformat(game.created_at), updated_at=isoformat(game.updated_at))
    session.close()
    return GameResponse(game=game_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/games/{game_id}/servers",
    response_model=GameServersListResponse,
    summary="List servers for a game with filters",
    description="Retrieve servers for a game; filter by name, region, or maintenance status.",
    tags=["game_servers"],
    operation_id="list_game_servers",
)
async def list_game_servers(
    game_id: int = Path(..., description="Game ID whose servers to list", example=4),
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Exact server name filter", example="EU-Trade-02"),
    region: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter servers by region code", example="EU"),
    is_under_maintenance: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by maintenance state", example=False),
) -> GameServersListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(GameServer).filter(GameServer.game_id == game_id)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(GameServer.name == name)
    if region is not None:
        query = query.filter(GameServer.region == region)
    if is_under_maintenance is not None:
        int_val = 1 if is_under_maintenance else 0
        query = query.filter(GameServer.is_under_maintenance == int_val)
    servers = query.all()
    result_servers: List[GameServerModel] = []
    for s in servers:
        result_servers.append(
            GameServerModel(
                id=s.id,
                game_id=s.game_id,
                name=s.name,
                region=s.region,
                is_under_maintenance=bool_from_int(s.is_under_maintenance),
                maintenance_message=s.maintenance_message,
                created_at=isoformat(s.created_at),
                updated_at=isoformat(s.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return GameServersListResponse(servers=result_servers)


@app.post(
    "/api/games/{game_id}/servers",
    response_model=GameServerResponse,
    summary="Create a game server",
    description="Create a new server for a game with name and region.",
    tags=["game_servers"],
    operation_id="create_game_server",
)
async def create_game_server(
    game_id: int = Path(..., description="Game ID to attach this server to", example=5),
    body: GameServerCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> GameServerResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    server = GameServer(
        game_id=game_id,
        name=body.name,
        region=body.region,
        is_under_maintenance=0,
        maintenance_message=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(server)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(server)

@app.post(
    "/api/admin/games/{game_id}/servers/maintenance",
    response_model=BulkMaintenanceResponse,
    summary="Bulk update server maintenance for a game",
    description="Set maintenance state and message for servers of a game in a region.",
    tags=["admin", "game_servers", "listings"],
    operation_id="bulk_update_game_servers_maintenance",
)
async def bulk_update_game_servers_maintenance(
    game_id: int = Path(..., description="Target game ID", example=7),
    body: BulkMaintenanceRequest = Body(...),
) -> BulkMaintenanceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    servers = (
        session.query(GameServer)
        .filter(GameServer.game_id == game_id, GameServer.region == body.region)
        .all()
    )
    updated_servers: List[BulkMaintenanceServerInfo] = []
    for s in servers:
        s.is_under_maintenance = 1 if body.is_under_maintenance else 0
        s.maintenance_message = body.maintenance_message
        s.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    for s in servers:
        active_listings_count = (
            session.query(Listing)
            .filter(Listing.game_server_id == s.id, Listing.status == "active")
            .count()
        )
        updated_servers.append(
            BulkMaintenanceServerInfo(
                server_id=s.id,
                name=s.name,
                region=s.region if s.region is not None else "",
                is_under_maintenance=bool_from_int(s.is_under_maintenance),
                maintenance_message=s.maintenance_message if s.maintenance_message is not None else "",
                active_listings_affected=active_listings_count,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return BulkMaintenanceResponse(
        game_id=game_id,
        region=body.region,
        servers_updated=len(updated_servers),
        servers=updated_servers,
    )


@app.get(
    "/api/virtual-items",
    response_model=VirtualItemsSearchResponse,
    summary="Search virtual items across games and servers",
    description="Query virtual_items with flexible filters to resolve item_ids.",
    tags=["virtual_items"],
    operation_id="search_virtual_items",
)
async def search_virtual_items(
    game_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by related game name", example="Starfall Odyssey"),
    server_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by related game server name", example="EU-Trade-02"),
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Exact item name filter", example="Crimson Dragonslayer Sword"),
    name_contains: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Substring match on item name", example="Dragonslayer"),
    item_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by item_type", example="weapon"),
    rarity: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by rarity", example="epic"),
    bind_status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by bind_status", example="unbound"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Maximum number of items to return", example=20),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Number of items to skip", example=0),
) -> VirtualItemsSearchResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(VirtualItem)
    if game_name is not None:
        query = query.join(Game, Game.id == VirtualItem.game_id).filter(Game.name == game_name)
    if server_name is not None:
        query = query.join(GameServer, GameServer.id == VirtualItem.game_server_id).filter(GameServer.name == server_name)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.name == name)
    if name_contains is not None:
        pattern = f"%{name_contains}%"
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.name.ilike(pattern))
    if item_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.item_type == item_type)
    if rarity is not None:
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.rarity == rarity)
    if bind_status is not None:
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.bind_status == bind_status)
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    items = query.all()
    result_items: List[VirtualItemModel] = []
    for i in items:
        result_items.append(
            VirtualItemModel(
                id=i.id,
                game_id=i.game_id,
                game_server_id=i.game_server_id,
                name=i.name,
                item_type=i.item_type,
                rarity=i.rarity,
                bind_status=i.bind_status,
                created_at=isoformat(i.created_at),
                updated_at=isoformat(i.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return VirtualItemsSearchResponse(items=result_items)

    else:

        if body.class_name is not None:
            character.class_ = body.class_name
            changed = True
        if body.level is not None:
            character.level = body.level
            changed = True
        if body.faction is not None:
            character.faction = body.faction
            changed = True
        if changed:
            character.updated_at = now
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(character)
    char_model = CharacterModel.from_orm_character(character)
    session.close()
    return CharacterResponse(character=char_model)

@app.get(
    "/api/listings",
    response_model=ListingsSearchResponse,
    summary="Search active listings with price filters",
    description="Retrieve listings with filters for game, server, item attributes, type, and price.",
    tags=["listings", "marketplace"],
    operation_id="search_listings",
)
async def search_listings(
    game_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by game name", example="Starfall Odyssey"),
    server_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by game server name", example="EU-Trade-02"),
    item_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by virtual_items.item_type", example="mount"),
    rarity: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by virtual_items.rarity", example="legendary"),
    listing_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by listing_type", example="fixed_price"),
    max_price: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Maximum unit price", example=5000),
    status: Optional[str] = Query("active", description="Listing status filter", example="active"),
    sort_by_price_asc: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Sort by price ascending if true", example=True),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Maximum number of listings to return", example=10),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Pagination offset", example=0),
) -> ListingsSearchResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = (
        session.query(Listing, VirtualItem, Game, GameServer)
        .join(VirtualItem, VirtualItem.id == Listing.virtual_item_id)
        .join(Game, Game.id == VirtualItem.game_id)
        .outerjoin(GameServer, GameServer.id == Listing.game_server_id)
    )
    if game_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Game.name == game_name)
    if server_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(GameServer.name == server_name)
    if item_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.item_type == item_type)
    if rarity is not None:
        query = query.filter(VirtualItem.rarity == rarity)
    if listing_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(Listing.listing_type == listing_type)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Listing.status == status)
    if max_price is not None:
        query = query.filter(or_(Listing.fixed_price <= max_price, Listing.fixed_price.is_(None)))
    if sort_by_price_asc:
        query = query.order_by(Listing.fixed_price.asc().nulls_last())
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    results: List[ListingSearchItem] = []
    for listing, item, game, server in rows:
        results.append(
            ListingSearchItem(
                listing_id=listing.id,
                seller_id=listing.seller_id,
                virtual_item_id=listing.virtual_item_id,
                game_server_id=listing.game_server_id,
                listing_type=listing.listing_type,
                fixed_price=listing.fixed_price,
                starting_price=listing.starting_price,
                buyout_price=listing.buyout_price,
                quantity_total=listing.quantity_total,
                quantity_available=listing.quantity_available,
                expiration_date=isoformat(listing.expiration_date),
                status=listing.status,
                item_name=item.name,
                item_type=item.item_type,
                rarity=item.rarity,
                bind_status=item.bind_status,
                game_name=game.name,
                server_name=server.name if server is not None else None,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListingsSearchResponse(listings=results)

@app.patch(
    "/api/listings/{listing_id}",
    response_model=ListingResponse,
    summary="Update my listing status or quantities",
    description="Modify status or quantity_available of a listing belonging to the current user.",
    tags=["listings", "marketplace", "me"],
    operation_id="update_my_listing",
)
async def update_my_listing(
    listing_id: int = Path(..., description="Listing ID I own", example=9001),
    body: ListingUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> ListingResponse:
    current_user_id = 1
    session = SessionLocal()
    listing = (
        session.query(Listing)
        .filter(Listing.id == listing_id, Listing.seller_id == current_user_id)
        .first()
    )
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if listing is None:
        listing = Listing(
            id=listing_id,
            seller_id=current_user_id,
            virtual_item_id=1,
            listing_type="fixed_price",
            game_server_id=None,
            fixed_price=100,
            starting_price=None,
            buyout_price=None,
            quantity_total=1,
            quantity_available=1,
            expiration_date=now,
            status="active",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(listing)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(listing)
    changed = False
    if body.status is not None:
        listing.status = body.status
        changed = True
    if body.quantity_available is not None:
        if body.quantity_available <= listing.quantity_total:
            listing.quantity_available = body.quantity_available
            changed = True
    if body.expiration_date is not None:
        listing.expiration_date = datetime.strptime(body.expiration_date, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
        changed = True
    if changed:
        listing.updated_at = now
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(listing)
    listing_model = ListingModel(
        id=listing.id,
        seller_id=listing.seller_id,
        virtual_item_id=listing.virtual_item_id,
        listing_type=listing.listing_type,
        game_server_id=listing.game_server_id,
        fixed_price=listing.fixed_price,
        starting_price=listing.starting_price,
        buyout_price=listing.buyout_price,
        quantity_total=listing.quantity_total,
        quantity_available=listing.quantity_available,
        expiration_date=isoformat(listing.expiration_date),
        status=listing.status,
        created_at=isoformat(listing.created_at),
        updated_at=isoformat(listing.updated_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return ListingResponse(listing=listing_model)
