@app.get(
    "/api/me/wallet/transactions",
    response_model=WalletTransactionsListResponse,
    summary="List my wallet transactions",
    description="Retrieve wallet_transactions for the current user's wallet.",
    tags=["wallets", "wallet_transactions", "me"],
    operation_id="list_my_wallet_transactions",
)
async def list_my_wallet_transactions(
    from_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Include transactions on or after this ISO date", example="2025-02-01T00:00:00Z"),
    to_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Include transactions on or before this ISO date", example="2025-03-01T00:00:00Z"),
    transaction_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by transaction_type", example="purchase"),
) -> WalletTransactionsListResponse:
    current_user_id = 1
    session = SessionLocal()
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.user_id == current_user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if wallet is None:
        wallet = Wallet(user_id=current_user_id, balance=0, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(wallet)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(wallet)
    query = session.query(WalletTransaction).filter(WalletTransaction.wallet_id == wallet.id)
    if from_date is not None:
        from_dt = datetime.strptime(from_date, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
        query = query.filter(WalletTransaction.created_at >= from_dt)
    if to_date is not None:
        to_dt = datetime.strptime(to_date, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
        query = query.filter(WalletTransaction.created_at <= to_dt)
    if transaction_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(WalletTransaction.transaction_type == transaction_type)
    txs = query.order_by(WalletTransaction.created_at.desc()).all()
    result_txs: List[WalletTransactionModel] = []
    for t in txs:
        result_txs.append(
            WalletTransactionModel(
                id=t.id,
                wallet_id=t.wallet_id,
                transaction_type=t.transaction_type,
                amount=t.amount,
                related_order_id=t.related_order_id,
                description=t.description,
                created_at=isoformat(t.created_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return WalletTransactionsListResponse(transactions=result_txs)


@app.get(
    "/api/me/wallet/transactions/summary",
    response_model=WalletTransactionSummaryResponse,
    summary="Get my wallet transaction summary",
    description="Return aggregate sums for deposits, purchases, fees, and refunds.",
    tags=["wallets", "wallet_transactions", "me"],
    operation_id="get_my_wallet_transaction_summary",
)
async def get_my_wallet_transaction_summary(
    from_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Start date-time inclusive", example="2025-02-01T00:00:00Z"),
    to_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="End date-time inclusive", example="2025-03-01T00:00:00Z"),
) -> WalletTransactionSummaryResponse:
    current_user_id = 1
    session = SessionLocal()
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.user_id == current_user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if wallet is None:
        wallet = Wallet(user_id=current_user_id, balance=0, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(wallet)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(wallet)
    query = session.query(WalletTransaction).filter(WalletTransaction.wallet_id == wallet.id)
    if from_date is not None:
        from_dt = datetime.strptime(from_date, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
        query = query.filter(WalletTransaction.created_at >= from_dt)
    if to_date is not None:
        to_dt = datetime.strptime(to_date, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
        query = query.filter(WalletTransaction.created_at <= to_dt)
    txs = query.all()
    total_deposits = 0
    total_purchases = 0
    total_fees = 0
    total_refunds = 0
    for t in txs:
        if t.transaction_type == "deposit":
            if t.amount > 0:
                total_deposits += t.amount
        elif t.transaction_type == "purchase":
            if t.amount < 0:
                total_purchases += -t.amount
        elif t.transaction_type == "fee":
            if t.amount < 0:
                total_fees += -t.amount
        elif t.transaction_type == "refund":
            if t.amount > 0:
                total_refunds += t.amount
    response = WalletTransactionSummaryResponse(
        wallet_id=wallet.id,
        from_date=from_date,
        to_date=to_date,
        total_deposits=total_deposits,
        total_purchases=total_purchases,
        total_fees=total_fees,
        total_refunds=total_refunds,
    )
    session.close()
    return response


@app.post(
    "/api/orders",
    response_model=OrderWithTransactionResponse,
    summary="Create an order and escrow payment for a listing",
    description="Create an order, reserve quantity, deduct wallet funds to escrow.",
    tags=["orders", "wallets", "marketplace", "me"],
    operation_id="create_order_with_escrow",
)
async def create_order_with_escrow(
    body: OrderCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> OrderWithTransactionResponse:
    current_user_id = 1
    session = SessionLocal()
    listing = session.query(Listing).filter(Listing.id == body.listing_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if listing is None:
        listing = Listing(
            id=body.listing_id,
            seller_id=2,
            virtual_item_id=1,
            listing_type="fixed_price",
            game_server_id=None,
            fixed_price=100,
            starting_price=None,
            buyout_price=None,
            quantity_total=10,
            quantity_available=10,
            expiration_date=now,
            status="active",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(listing)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(listing)
    if listing.fixed_price is None:
        unit_price = listing.starting_price if listing.starting_price is not None else 0
    else:
        unit_price = listing.fixed_price
    if body.quantity > listing.quantity_available:
        quantity = listing.quantity_available
    else:
        quantity = body.quantity
    total_price = unit_price * quantity
    listing.quantity_available = listing.quantity_available - quantity
    listing.updated_at = now
    session.commit()
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.user_id == current_user_id).first()
    if wallet is None:
        wallet = Wallet(user_id=current_user_id, balance=0, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(wallet)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(wallet)
    wallet.balance = wallet.balance - total_price
    wallet.updated_at = now
    order = Order(
        buyer_id=current_user_id,
        listing_id=listing.id,
        quantity=quantity,
        unit_price=unit_price,
        total_price=total_price,
        escrow_amount=total_price,
        payment_status="escrowed",
        delivery_status="pending",
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(order)
    tx = WalletTransaction(
        wallet_id=wallet.id,
        transaction_type="purchase",
        amount=-total_price,
        related_order_id=order.id,
        description=f"Escrow hold for order {order.id}",
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(wallet)
    session.refresh(order)
    session.refresh(tx)
    order_model = OrderModel(
        id=order.id,
        buyer_id=order.buyer_id,
        listing_id=order.listing_id,
        quantity=order.quantity,
        unit_price=order.unit_price,
        total_price=order.total_price,
        escrow_amount=order.escrow_amount,
        payment_status=order.payment_status,
        delivery_status=order.delivery_status,
        created_at=isoformat(order.created_at),
        updated_at=isoformat(order.updated_at),
    )
    tx_model = WalletTransactionSimpleModel(
        id=tx.id,
        wallet_id=tx.wallet_id,
        transaction_type=tx.transaction_type,
        amount=tx.amount,
        related_order_id=tx.related_order_id,
        description=tx.description,
        created_at=isoformat(tx.created_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return OrderWithTransactionResponse(order=order_model, wallet_transaction=tx_model)

@app.post(
    "/api/orders/{order_id}/mark-delivered",
    response_model=OrderDeliveryAndPayoutResponse,
    summary="Mark an order as delivered and release escrow",
    description="Set delivery_status=delivered and payment_status=released, paying seller.",
    tags=["orders", "delivery", "wallets"],
    operation_id="mark_order_delivered_and_release_escrow",
)
async def mark_order_delivered_and_release_escrow(
    order_id: int = Path(..., description="Order ID to mark as delivered", example=774210),
    body: MarkDeliveredRequest = Body(...),
) -> OrderDeliveryAndPayoutResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    order = session.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if order is None:
        order = Order(
            id=order_id,
            buyer_id=1,
            listing_id=1,
            quantity=1,
            unit_price=100,
            total_price=100,
            escrow_amount=100,
            payment_status="escrowed",
            delivery_status="pending",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(order)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(order)
    listing = session.query(Listing).filter(Listing.id == order.listing_id).first()
    if listing is None:
        listing = Listing(
            id=order.listing_id,
            seller_id=2,
            virtual_item_id=1,
            listing_type="fixed_price",
            game_server_id=None,
            fixed_price=order.unit_price,
            starting_price=None,
            buyout_price=None,
            quantity_total=1,
            quantity_available=0,
            expiration_date=now,
            status="active",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(listing)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(listing)
    meta = session.query(OrderDeliveryMetadata).filter(OrderDeliveryMetadata.order_id == order.id).first()
    if meta is None:
        meta = OrderDeliveryMetadata(
            order_id=order.id,
            trade_location=body.trade_location,
            recipient_character_name=body.recipient_character_name,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(meta)
    else:
        meta.trade_location = body.trade_location
        meta.recipient_character_name = body.recipient_character_name
        meta.updated_at = now
    seller_wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.user_id == listing.seller_id).first()
    if seller_wallet is None:
        seller_wallet = Wallet(user_id=listing.seller_id, balance=0, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(seller_wallet)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(seller_wallet)
    seller_wallet.balance = seller_wallet.balance + order.escrow_amount
    seller_wallet.updated_at = now
    payout_tx = WalletTransaction(
        wallet_id=seller_wallet.id,
        transaction_type="payout",
        amount=order.escrow_amount,
        related_order_id=order.id,
        description=f"Escrow release for delivered order {order.id}",
        created_at=now,
    )
    order.escrow_amount = 0
    order.payment_status = "released"
    order.delivery_status = "delivered"
    order.updated_at = now
    session.add(payout_tx)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(order)
    session.refresh(meta)
    session.refresh(seller_wallet)
    session.refresh(payout_tx)
    order_model = OrderModel(
        id=order.id,
        buyer_id=order.buyer_id,
        listing_id=order.listing_id,
        quantity=order.quantity,
        unit_price=order.unit_price,
        total_price=order.total_price,
        escrow_amount=order.escrow_amount,
        payment_status=order.payment_status,
        delivery_status=order.delivery_status,
        created_at=isoformat(order.created_at),
        updated_at=isoformat(order.updated_at),
    )
    meta_model = DeliveryMetadataModel(
        order_id=meta.order_id,
        trade_location=meta.trade_location,
        recipient_character_name=meta.recipient_character_name,
        created_at=isoformat(meta.created_at),
        updated_at=isoformat(meta.updated_at),
    )
    tx_model = WalletTransactionSimpleModel(
        id=payout_tx.id,
        wallet_id=payout_tx.wallet_id,
        transaction_type=payout_tx.transaction_type,
        amount=payout_tx.amount,
        related_order_id=payout_tx.related_order_id,
        description=payout_tx.description,
        created_at=isoformat(payout_tx.created_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return OrderDeliveryAndPayoutResponse(order=order_model, delivery_metadata=meta_model, wallet_transaction=tx_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/disputes",
    response_model=DisputeTicketResponse,
    summary="Create a dispute ticket for an order",
    description="Create a dispute_tickets row for an order owned by current user.",
    tags=["disputes", "orders", "me"],
    operation_id="create_dispute_ticket",
)
async def create_dispute_ticket(
    body: DisputeTicketCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> DisputeTicketResponse:
    current_user_id = 1
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    status_val = body.resolution_status if body.resolution_status is not None else "open"
    dispute = DisputeTicket(
        order_id=body.order_id,
        user_id=current_user_id,
        reason=body.reason,
        description=body.description,
        resolution_status=status_val,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(dispute)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(dispute)
    model = DisputeTicketModel(
        id=dispute.id,
        order_id=dispute.order_id,
        user_id=dispute.user_id,
        reason=dispute.reason,
        description=dispute.description,
        resolution_status=dispute.resolution_status,
        created_at=isoformat(dispute.created_at),
        updated_at=isoformat(dispute.updated_at),
    )
    session.close()
    return DisputeTicketResponse(dispute_ticket=model)


@app.get(
    "/api/disputes",
    response_model=DisputeTicketsListResponse,
    summary="List my dispute tickets",
    description="Retrieve dispute_tickets created by the current user.",
    tags=["disputes", "me"],
    operation_id="list_my_disputes",
)
async def list_my_disputes(
    resolution_status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by dispute resolution_status", example="open"),
) -> DisputeTicketsListResponse:
    current_user_id = 1
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(DisputeTicket).filter(DisputeTicket.user_id == current_user_id)
    if resolution_status is not None:
        query = query.filter(DisputeTicket.resolution_status == resolution_status)
    disputes = query.all()
    result: List[DisputeTicketModel] = []
    for d in disputes:
        result.append(
            DisputeTicketModel(
                id=d.id,
                order_id=d.order_id,
                user_id=d.user_id,
                reason=d.reason,
                description=d.description,
                resolution_status=d.resolution_status,
                created_at=isoformat(d.created_at),
                updated_at=isoformat(d.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return DisputeTicketsListResponse(dispute_tickets=result)

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import List, Optional, Dict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    Text,
    DateTime,
    Date,
    ForeignKey,
    UniqueConstraint,
    Index,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker
import datetime
import os

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH") or "sqlite:///outputs/databases/collabnote_product_specs_hub.db"
engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

app = FastAPI(title="CollabNote Product Specs Hub", version="1.0.0")

Index("idx_teams_org", Team.organization_id)

def now_iso() -> str:
    return datetime.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"


def date_from_string(date_str: Optional[str]) -> Optional[datetime.date]:
    if date_str is None:
        return None
    return datetime.datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d").date()


def date_to_string(d: Optional[datetime.date]) -> Optional[str]:
    if d is None:
        return None
    return d.isoformat()

@app.get(

    operation_id="list_organizations",
)
async def list_organizations_endpoint() -> ListOrganizationsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    objs = session.query(Organization).all()
    organizations: List[OrganizationModel] = []
    for o in objs:
        created_at = o.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(o.created_at, datetime.datetime) else now_iso()
        updated_at = o.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(o.updated_at, datetime.datetime) else None
        organizations.append(
            OrganizationModel(
                id=o.id,
                name=o.name,
                created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
                updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListOrganizationsResponse(organizations=organizations)

@app.get(
    "/api/users",
    response_model=SearchUsersResponse,
    summary="Search users by email or username",
    description="Find users to assign as owners, reviewers, or mentions.",
    tags=["users"],
    operation_id="search_users",
)
async def search_users_endpoint(
    q: str = Query(..., description="Search text for email or username", example="alice@company.com"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(20, description="Max number of users to return", example=20),
) -> SearchUsersResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pattern = f"%{q}%"
    query = session.query(User).filter((User.email.like(pattern)) | (User.username.like(pattern))).limit(limit if limit is not None else 20)
    objs = query.all()
    users: List[UserModel] = []
    for u in objs:
        created_at = u.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(u.created_at, datetime.datetime) else now_iso()
        updated_at = u.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(u.updated_at, datetime.datetime) else None
        users.append(
            UserModel(
                id=u.id,
                username=u.username,
                email=u.email,
                full_name=u.full_name,
                profile_data=u.profile_data,
                created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
                updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return SearchUsersResponse(users=users)

)

    organization_id: str = Path(..., description="Organization id to own the product area", example="org-42"),

        pa = existing
    model = ProductAreaModel(id=pa.id, organization_id=pa.organization_id, name=pa.name)

@app.post(
    "/api/spec-documents",
    response_model=CreateSpecDocumentResponse,
    summary="Create a spec document",
    description="Create a new spec_document row with basic fields.",
    tags=["spec_documents"],
    operation_id="create_spec_document",
)
async def create_spec_document_endpoint(
    body: CreateSpecDocumentRequest = Body(...),
) -> CreateSpecDocumentResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    spec_id_value = body.id if body.id is not None and body.id != "" else f"spec-{int(datetime.datetime.utcnow().timestamp())}"
    due_date_value = date_from_string(body.due_date) if body.due_date is not None else None
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    obj = SpecDocument(
        id=spec_id_value,
        organization_id=body.organization_id,
        team_id=body.team_id,
        template_id=body.template_id,
        title=body.title,
        product_area_id=body.product_area_id,
        status=body.status,
        due_date=due_date_value,
        created_by=1,
        created_at=now_dt,
        updated_at=now_dt,
    )
    session.add(obj)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = SpecDocumentModel(
        id=obj.id,
        organization_id=obj.organization_id,
        team_id=obj.team_id,
        template_id=obj.template_id,
        title=obj.title,
        product_area_id=obj.product_area_id,
        status=obj.status,
        due_date=date_to_string(obj.due_date),
        created_by=obj.created_by,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateSpecDocumentResponse(spec_document=model)

@app.patch(
    "/api/spec-documents/{spec_id}",
    response_model=PatchSpecDocumentResponse,
    summary="Update spec document fields",
    description="Partially update mutable fields of a spec_document.",
    tags=["spec_documents"],
    operation_id="patch_spec_document",
)
async def patch_spec_document_endpoint(
    spec_id: str = Path(..., description="Spec document id to update", example="spec-1023"),
    body: PatchSpecDocumentRequest = Body(...),
) -> PatchSpecDocumentResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = session.query(SpecDocument).filter(SpecDocument.id == spec_id).first()
    if obj is None:
        now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
        obj = SpecDocument(
            id=spec_id,
            organization_id=None,
            team_id=None,
            template_id=None,
            title=body.title if body.title is not None else "",
            product_area_id=body.product_area_id,
            status=body.status if body.status is not None else "draft",
            due_date=date_from_string(body.due_date) if body.due_date is not None else None,
            created_by=1,
            created_at=now_dt,
            updated_at=now_dt,
        )
        session.add(obj)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(obj)
    else:
        if body.status is not None:
            obj.status = body.status
        if body.title is not None:
            obj.title = body.title
        if body.product_area_id is not None:
            obj.product_area_id = body.product_area_id
        if body.due_date is not None:
            obj.due_date = date_from_string(body.due_date)
        obj.updated_at = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = SpecDocumentModel(
        id=obj.id,
        organization_id=obj.organization_id,
        team_id=obj.team_id,
        template_id=obj.template_id,
        title=obj.title,
        product_area_id=obj.product_area_id,
        status=obj.status,
        due_date=date_to_string(obj.due_date),
        created_by=obj.created_by,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return PatchSpecDocumentResponse(spec_document=model)

@app.get(
    "/api/spec-documents/{spec_id}/sections",
    response_model=ListSpecSectionsResponse,
    summary="List sections for a spec",
    description="Return all spec_sections for a spec_document.",
    tags=["spec_sections"],
    operation_id="list_spec_sections",
)
async def list_spec_sections_endpoint(
    spec_id: str = Path(..., description="Spec id whose sections to list", example="spec-3001")
) -> ListSpecSectionsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    objs = session.query(SpecSection).filter(SpecSection.spec_id == spec_id).all()
    sections: List[SpecSectionModel] = []
    for s in objs:
        created_at = s.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(s.created_at, datetime.datetime) else now_iso()
        updated_at = s.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(s.updated_at, datetime.datetime) else None
        sections.append(
            SpecSectionModel(
                id=s.id,
                spec_id=s.spec_id,
                section_key=s.section_key,
                title=s.title,
                content=s.content,
                created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
                updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListSpecSectionsResponse(sections=sections)


@app.post(
    "/api/spec-documents/{spec_id}/sections",
    response_model=UpsertSpecSectionResponse,
    summary="Create or upsert a section",
    description="Create a spec_sections entry or update by (spec_id, section_key).",
    tags=["spec_sections"],
    operation_id="upsert_spec_section",
)
async def upsert_spec_section_endpoint(
    spec_id: str = Path(..., description="Parent spec id", example="spec-3001"),
    body: UpsertSpecSectionRequest = Body(...),
) -> UpsertSpecSectionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = (
        session.query(SpecSection)
        .filter(SpecSection.spec_id == spec_id, SpecSection.section_key == body.section_key)
        .first()
    )
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    if obj is None:
        obj = SpecSection(
            spec_id=spec_id,
            section_key=body.section_key,
            title=body.title,
            content=body.content,
            created_at=now_dt,
            updated_at=now_dt,
        )
        session.add(obj)
    else:
        obj.title = body.title
        obj.content = body.content
        obj.updated_at = now_dt
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = SpecSectionModel(
        id=obj.id,
        spec_id=obj.spec_id,
        section_key=obj.section_key,
        title=obj.title,
        content=obj.content,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return UpsertSpecSectionResponse(section=model)

@app.post(
    "/api/spec-documents/{spec_id}/review-requests",
    response_model=CreateReviewRequestResponse,
    summary="Create a review request",
    description="Create a review_requests row for a spec with status and due_date.",
    tags=["review_requests"],
    operation_id="create_review_request",
)
async def create_review_request_endpoint(
    spec_id: str = Path(..., description="Spec id to request review for", example="spec-2045"),
    body: CreateReviewRequestRequest = Body(...),
) -> CreateReviewRequestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    review_id = body.id if body.id is not None and body.id != "" else f"rev-{int(datetime.datetime.utcnow().timestamp())}"
    due_date_value = date_from_string(body.due_date) if body.due_date is not None else None
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    obj = ReviewRequest(
        id=review_id,
        spec_id=spec_id,
        requestor_id=1,
        review_status=body.review_status,
        due_date=due_date_value,
        message=body.message,
        created_at=now_dt,
        updated_at=now_dt,
    )
    session.add(obj)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = ReviewRequestModel(
        id=obj.id,
        spec_id=obj.spec_id,
        requestor_id=obj.requestor_id,
        review_status=obj.review_status,
        due_date=date_to_string(obj.due_date),
        message=obj.message,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateReviewRequestResponse(review_request=model)

@app.patch(
    "/api/review-requests/{review_request_id}",
    response_model=PatchReviewRequestResponse,
    summary="Update review request status",
    description="Update review_requests.review_status, due_date, or message.",
    tags=["review_requests"],
    operation_id="patch_review_request",
)
async def patch_review_request_endpoint(
    review_request_id: str = Path(..., description="Review request id", example="rev-3301"),
    body: PatchReviewRequestRequest = Body(...),
) -> PatchReviewRequestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = session.query(ReviewRequest).filter(ReviewRequest.id == review_request_id).first()
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    if obj is None:
        obj = ReviewRequest(
            id=review_request_id,
            spec_id="",
            requestor_id=1,
            review_status=body.review_status if body.review_status is not None else "pending",
            due_date=date_from_string(body.due_date) if body.due_date is not None else None,
            message=body.message,
            created_at=now_dt,
            updated_at=now_dt,
        )
        session.add(obj)
    else:
        if body.review_status is not None:
            obj.review_status = body.review_status
        if body.due_date is not None:
            obj.due_date = date_from_string(body.due_date)
        if body.message is not None:
            obj.message = body.message
        obj.updated_at = now_dt
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = ReviewRequestModel(
        id=obj.id,
        spec_id=obj.spec_id,
        requestor_id=obj.requestor_id,
        review_status=obj.review_status,
        due_date=date_to_string(obj.due_date),
        message=obj.message,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return PatchReviewRequestResponse(review_request=model)

@app.post(
    "/api/spec-documents/{spec_id}/access-permissions",
    response_model=SetAccessPermissionsResponse,
    summary="Set role permissions for a spec",
    description="Create or update an access_permissions row for a role on a spec_document.",
    tags=["access_control"],
    operation_id="set_access_permissions",
)
async def set_access_permissions_endpoint(
    spec_id: str = Path(..., description="Spec id to configure permissions for", example="spec-777"),
    body: SetAccessPermissionsRequest = Body(...),
) -> SetAccessPermissionsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = (
        session.query(AccessPermission)
        .filter(AccessPermission.spec_id == spec_id, AccessPermission.role_id == body.role_id)
        .first()
    )
    if obj is None:
        obj = AccessPermission(
            spec_id=spec_id,
            role_id=body.role_id,
            can_view=1 if body.can_view else 0,
            can_comment=1 if body.can_comment else 0,
            can_edit=1 if body.can_edit else 0,
        )
        session.add(obj)
    else:
        obj.can_view = 1 if body.can_view else 0
        obj.can_comment = 1 if body.can_comment else 0
        obj.can_edit = 1 if body.can_edit else 0
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    model = AccessPermissionModel(
        id=obj.id,
        role_id=obj.role_id,
        spec_id=obj.spec_id,
        can_view=bool(obj.can_view),
        can_comment=bool(obj.can_comment),
        can_edit=bool(obj.can_edit),
    )
    session.close()
    return SetAccessPermissionsResponse(access_permission=model)

@app.post(
    "/api/spec-documents/{spec_id}/notifications",
    response_model=NotifySpecSubscribersResponse,
    summary="Notify subscribers of spec event",
    description="Create notifications for all spec_subscriptions users for a spec.",
    tags=["notifications"],
    operation_id="notify_spec_subscribers",
)
async def notify_spec_subscribers_endpoint(
    spec_id: str = Path(..., description="Spec id whose subscribers to notify", example="spec-2045"),
    body: NotifySpecSubscribersRequest = Body(...),
) -> NotifySpecSubscribersResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    subs = session.query(SpecSubscription).filter(SpecSubscription.spec_id == spec_id).all()
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    notifications_created: List[NotificationModel] = []
    for sub in subs:
        obj = Notification(
            user_id=sub.user_id,
            spec_id=spec_id,
            review_request_id=body.review_request_id,
            type=body.type,
            payload=body.payload,
            created_at=now_dt,
            read_at=None,
        )
        session.add(obj)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(obj)
        created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
        read_at = obj.read_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(obj.read_at, datetime.datetime) else None
        notifications_created.append(
            NotificationModel(
                id=obj.id,
                user_id=obj.user_id,
                spec_id=obj.spec_id,
                review_request_id=obj.review_request_id,
                type=obj.type,
                payload=obj.payload,
                created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
                read_at=(read_at if read_at is None or read_at.endswith("Z") else read_at + "Z"),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return NotifySpecSubscribersResponse(notifications=notifications_created)


@app.post(
    "/api/release-packages",
    response_model=CreateReleasePackageResponse,
    summary="Create a release package",
    description="Create a release_packages row for grouping spec_documents.",
    tags=["release_packages"],
    operation_id="create_release_package",
)
async def create_release_package_endpoint(
    body: CreateReleasePackageRequest = Body(...),
) -> CreateReleasePackageResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rp_id = body.id if body.id is not None and body.id != "" else f"rel-{int(datetime.datetime.utcnow().timestamp())}"
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    obj = ReleasePackage(
        id=rp_id,
        organization_id=body.organization_id,
        name=body.name,
        workflow_status=body.workflow_status,
        created_by=1,
        created_at=now_dt,
        updated_at=now_dt,
    )
    session.add(obj)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = ReleasePackageModel(
        id=obj.id,
        organization_id=obj.organization_id,
        name=obj.name,
        workflow_status=obj.workflow_status,
        created_by=obj.created_by,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateReleasePackageResponse(release_package=model)


@app.post(
    "/api/release-packages/{release_package_id}/specs",
    response_model=AddSpecToReleasePackageResponse,
    summary="Add a spec to a release package",
    description="Create a release_package_specs row linking a spec_document.",
    tags=["release_packages"],
    operation_id="add_spec_to_release_package",
)
async def add_spec_to_release_package_endpoint(
    release_package_id: str = Path(..., description="Release package id", example="rel-q2-payments"),
    body: AddSpecToReleasePackageRequest = Body(...),
) -> AddSpecToReleasePackageResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    existing = (
        session.query(ReleasePackageSpec)
        .filter(
            ReleasePackageSpec.release_package_id == release_package_id,
            ReleasePackageSpec.spec_id == body.spec_id,
        )
        .first()
    )
    if existing is None:
        obj = ReleasePackageSpec(
            release_package_id=release_package_id,
            spec_id=body.spec_id,
        )
        session.add(obj)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(obj)
    else:
        obj = existing
    model = ReleasePackageSpecModel(
        id=obj.id,
        release_package_id=obj.release_package_id,
        spec_id=obj.spec_id,
    )
    session.close()
    return AddSpecToReleasePackageResponse(release_package_spec=model)


@app.patch(
    "/api/release-packages/{release_package_id}",
    response_model=PatchReleasePackageResponse,
    summary="Update release package status",
    description="Update release_packages.workflow_status when readiness criteria are met.",
    tags=["release_packages"],
    operation_id="patch_release_package",
)
async def patch_release_package_endpoint(
    release_package_id: str = Path(..., description="Release package id", example="rel-q2-payments"),
    body: PatchReleasePackageRequest = Body(...),
) -> PatchReleasePackageResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = session.query(ReleasePackage).filter(ReleasePackage.id == release_package_id).first()
    now_dt = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
    if obj is None:
        obj = ReleasePackage(
            id=release_package_id,
            organization_id="",
            name="",
            workflow_status=body.workflow_status,
            created_by=1,
            created_at=now_dt,
            updated_at=now_dt,
        )
        session.add(obj)
    else:
        obj.workflow_status = body.workflow_status
        obj.updated_at = now_dt
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    created_at = obj.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
    updated_at = obj.updated_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if obj.updated_at is not None else None
    model = ReleasePackageModel(
        id=obj.id,
        organization_id=obj.organization_id,
        name=obj.name,
        workflow_status=obj.workflow_status,
        created_by=obj.created_by,
        created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
        updated_at=(updated_at if updated_at is None or updated_at.endswith("Z") else updated_at + "Z"),
    )
    session.close()
    return PatchReleasePackageResponse(release_package=model)


@app.get(
    "/api/activity-logs",
    response_model=ListActivityLogsResponse,
    summary="Query activity logs by team and action",
    description="Fetch filtered activity_logs rows with optional filters.",
    tags=["activity_logs"],
    operation_id="list_activity_logs",
)
async def list_activity_logs_endpoint(
    team_id: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by team id", example="team-backend-platform"),
    action_types: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Comma-separated list of action_type values to include", example="status_change,approval_submitted"),
    from_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Start of inclusive date range in YYYY-MM-DD", example="2025-12-01"),
    to_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="End of inclusive date range in YYYY-MM-DD", example="2025-12-31"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(50, description="Maximum number of log rows to return", example=50),
) -> ListActivityLogsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(ActivityLog)
    if team_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(ActivityLog.team_id == team_id)
    if action_types is not None and action_types != "":
        types_list = [t.strip() for t in action_types.split(",") if t.strip() != ""]
        if len(types_list) > 0:
            query = query.filter(ActivityLog.action_type.in_(types_list))
    if from_date is not None:
        from_dt = datetime.datetime.strptime(from_date, "%Y-%m-%d")
        query = query.filter(ActivityLog.created_at >= from_dt)
    if to_date is not None:
        to_dt = datetime.datetime.strptime(to_date, "%Y-%m-%d") + datetime.timedelta(days=1)
        query = query.filter(ActivityLog.created_at < to_dt)
    query = query.order_by(ActivityLog.created_at.desc()).limit(limit if limit is not None else 50)
    objs = query.all()
    logs: List[ActivityLogModel] = []
    for a in objs:
        created_at = a.created_at.isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z") if isinstance(a.created_at, datetime.datetime) else now_iso()
        logs.append(
            ActivityLogModel(
                id=a.id,
                spec_id=a.spec_id,
                team_id=a.team_id,
                user_id=a.user_id,
                action_type=a.action_type,
                old_value=a.old_value,
                new_value=a.new_value,
                created_at=created_at if created_at.endswith("Z") else created_at + "Z",
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListActivityLogsResponse(activity_logs=logs)

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/prepsync_kitchen_display_production.db")

engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})

def bool_from_int(value: Optional[int]) -> Optional[bool]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return bool(value)


def int_from_bool(value: Optional[bool]) -> Optional[int]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return 1 if value else 0

@app.get(
    "/api/prep_stations",
    response_model=PrepStationListResponse,
    summary="List all prep stations",
    description="Retrieve all prep stations for mapping station names to ids.",
    tags=["prep_stations"],
    operation_id="list_prep_stations",
)
async def list_prep_stations() -> PrepStationListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    stations = session.query(PrepStation).order_by(PrepStation.display_order.is_(None), PrepStation.display_order, PrepStation.id).all()
    session.close()
    return PrepStationListResponse(prep_stations=stations)


@app.get(
    "/api/prep_stations/by_name/{station_name}",
    response_model=PrepStationSingleResponse,
    summary="Get a prep station by name",
    description="Resolve a prep station by its name to obtain its id.",
    tags=["prep_stations"],
    operation_id="get_prep_station_by_name",
)
async def get_prep_station_by_name(
    station_name: str = Path(..., description="Exact name of the prep station", example="Fry Station")
) -> PrepStationSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    station = session.query(PrepStation).filter(PrepStation.name == station_name).first()
    session.close()
    return PrepStationSingleResponse(prep_station=station)


@app.post(
    "/api/recipes",
    response_model=RecipeSingleResponse,
    summary="Create a new recipe",
    description="Create a recipe row; steps and ingredients are added separately.",
    tags=["recipes"],
    operation_id="create_recipe",
)
async def create_recipe(
    payload: RecipeCreateRequest = Body(..., description="Recipe data")
) -> RecipeSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    recipe = Recipe(
        name=payload.name,
        estimated_prep_time_minutes=payload.estimated_prep_time_minutes,
        yield_quantity=payload.yield_quantity,
        yield_unit=payload.yield_unit,
        is_active=int_from_bool(payload.is_active if payload.is_active is not None else True),
        created_by_user_id=1,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(recipe)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(recipe)
    result = RecipeModel(
        id=recipe.id,
        name=recipe.name,
        estimated_prep_time_minutes=recipe.estimated_prep_time_minutes,
        yield_quantity=recipe.yield_quantity,
        yield_unit=recipe.yield_unit,
        is_active=bool_from_int(recipe.is_active),
        created_by_user_id=recipe.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=recipe.created_at,
        updated_at=recipe.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return RecipeSingleResponse(recipe=result)


@app.get(
    "/api/recipes",
    response_model=RecipeListResponse,
    summary="List recipes with optional filters",
    description="Retrieve recipes, optionally filtered by name or active status.",
    tags=["recipes"],
    operation_id="list_recipes",
)
async def list_recipes(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by recipe name (exact or partial match)", example="Spicy Garlic Wings"),
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by active status", example=True),
) -> RecipeListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Recipe)
    if name is not None:
        like_pattern = f"%{name}%"
        query = query.filter(Recipe.name.like(like_pattern))
    if is_active is not None:
        query = query.filter(Recipe.is_active == int_from_bool(is_active))
    rows = query.all()
    recipes: List[RecipeModel] = []
    for r in rows:
        recipes.append(
            RecipeModel(
                id=r.id,
                name=r.name,
                estimated_prep_time_minutes=r.estimated_prep_time_minutes,
                yield_quantity=r.yield_quantity,
                yield_unit=r.yield_unit,
                is_active=bool_from_int(r.is_active),
                created_by_user_id=r.created_by_user_id,
                created_at=r.created_at,
                updated_at=r.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return RecipeListResponse(recipes=recipes)

@app.patch(
    "/api/recipes/{recipe_id}",
    response_model=RecipeSingleResponse,
    summary="Update core fields of a recipe",
    description="Partially update recipe fields such as name or prep time.",
    tags=["recipes"],
    operation_id="update_recipe",
)
async def update_recipe(
    recipe_id: int = Path(..., description="Recipe id to update", example=10),
    payload: RecipeUpdateRequest = Body(..., description="Fields to update"),
) -> RecipeSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    recipe = session.query(Recipe).filter(Recipe.id == recipe_id).first()

    summary="List ingredients for a recipe",
    description="Retrieve all recipe_ingredients rows with ingredient details.",
    tags=["recipe_ingredients"],
    operation_id="list_recipe_ingredients",
)
async def list_recipe_ingredients(
    recipe_id: int = Path(..., description="Recipe id whose ingredients to list", example=10)
) -> RecipeIngredientListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    links = session.query(RecipeIngredient).filter(RecipeIngredient.recipe_id == recipe_id).all()
    ingredient_ids = [l.ingredient_id for l in links]
    ingredients_map: Dict[int, Ingredient] = {}
    if ingredient_ids:
        ingredients = session.query(Ingredient).filter(Ingredient.id.in_(ingredient_ids)).all()
        for ing in ingredients:
            ingredients_map[ing.id] = ing
    items: List[RecipeIngredientListItem] = []
    for l in links:
        ing = ingredients_map.get(l.ingredient_id)
        name = ing.name if ing is not None else ""
        unit = ing.unit_of_measure if ing is not None else None
        items.append(
            RecipeIngredientListItem(
                recipe_ingredient_id=l.id,
                recipe_id=l.recipe_id,
                ingredient_id=l.ingredient_id,
                ingredient_name=name,
                quantity=l.quantity,
                ingredient_unit_of_measure=unit,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return RecipeIngredientListResponse(ingredients=items)

@app.post(
    "/api/stations/{station_id}/tasks/next",
    response_model=StationTaskSingleResponse,
    summary="Claim the next queued station task",
    description="Atomically claim the next queued station task for a station.",
    tags=["station_tasks"],
    operation_id="claim_next_station_task",
)
async def claim_next_station_task(
    station_id: int = Path(..., description="Prep station id that is claiming the task", example=6),
    task_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Optional filter by task_type", example="assemble"),
    payload: StationTaskClaimRequest = Body(..., description="Claim parameters"),
) -> StationTaskSingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(StationTask).filter(StationTask.station_id == station_id, StationTask.status == "queued")
    if task_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(StationTask.task_type == task_type)
    task = (
        query.order_by(
            StationTask.priority.desc(),
            StationTask.scheduled_start_time,
            StationTask.id,
        )
        .first()
    )
    if task is not None:
        task.status = "in_progress"
        task.actual_start_time = payload.current_time
        task.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(task)
    session.close()
    return StationTaskSingleResponse(station_task=task)

    response_model=StationTaskCompleteResponse,
    summary="Mark a station task as done",
    description="Set station task status to done and record completion time.",
    tags=["station_tasks"],
    operation_id="complete_station_task",
)
async def complete_station_task(
    task_id: int = Path(..., description="Station task id to mark done", example=930),
    payload: StationTaskCompleteRequest = Body(..., description="Completion data"),
) -> StationTaskCompleteResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    task = session.query(StationTask).filter(StationTask.id == task_id).first()
    if task is not None:
        task.status = "done"
        task.actual_end_time = payload.completion_time
        task.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(task)
    session.close()
    task_model: Optional[StationTaskModel] = None
    if task is not None:
        task_model = StationTaskModel.model_validate(task)
    return StationTaskCompleteResponse(station_task=task_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/stations/{station_id}/tasks/snooze",
    response_model=SnoozedTasksResponse,
    summary="Snooze queued tasks for a station by keyword",
    description="Bulk snooze queued station tasks by description keyword.",
    tags=["station_tasks"],
    operation_id="snooze_station_tasks_for_station",
)
async def snooze_station_tasks_for_station(
    station_id: int = Path(..., description="Prep station id whose tasks to snooze", example=3),
    payload: SnoozeStationTasksRequest = Body(..., description="Snooze parameters"),
) -> SnoozedTasksResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    lower_keywords = [k.lower() for k in payload.keywords]
    query = session.query(StationTask).filter(StationTask.station_id == station_id, StationTask.status == "queued")
    tasks = query.all()
    updated: List[SnoozedTaskModel] = []
    for t in tasks:
        description_text = t.description or ""
        desc_lower = description_text.lower()
        match = False
        for kw in lower_keywords:
            if kw in desc_lower:
                match = True
                break
        if match:
            t.snoozed_until = payload.current_time + timedelta(minutes=payload.snooze_minutes)
            if t.scheduled_start_time is not None:
                t.scheduled_start_time = t.scheduled_start_time + timedelta(minutes=payload.snooze_minutes)
            if t.scheduled_end_time is not None:
                t.scheduled_end_time = t.scheduled_end_time + timedelta(minutes=payload.snooze_minutes)
            t.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    for t in tasks:
        if t.snoozed_until is not None and t.station_id == station_id:
            updated.append(
                SnoozedTaskModel(
                    id=t.id,
                    station_id=t.station_id,
                    description=t.description,
                    status=t.status,
                    scheduled_start_time=t.scheduled_start_time,
                    scheduled_end_time=t.scheduled_end_time,
                    snoozed_until=t.snoozed_until,
                )
            )
    session.close()
    return SnoozedTasksResponse(updated_tasks=updated)


@app.get(
    "/api/analytics/late_tickets",
    response_model=LateTicketsResponse,
    summary="List late tickets within a timeframe",
    description="Identify tickets whose completed_time exceeds due_time by a threshold.",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="list_late_tickets",
)
async def list_late_tickets(
    from_time: datetime = Query(..., description="Start of timeframe (ISO 8601, based on created_time)", example="2025-02-01T16:00:00Z"),
    to_time: datetime = Query(..., description="End of timeframe (ISO 8601, based on created_time)", example="2025-02-01T18:00:00Z"),
    late_minutes: Optional[int] = Query(10, description="Minimum minutes late threshold", example=10),
) -> LateTicketsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(OrderTicket).filter(
        OrderTicket.created_time >= from_time,
        OrderTicket.created_time <= to_time,
        OrderTicket.completed_time.isnot(None),
    )
    tickets = query.all()
    late_list: List[LateTicketModel] = []
    threshold = late_minutes if late_minutes is not None else 0
    for t in tickets:
        if t.completed_time is not None:
            diff = t.completed_time - t.due_time
            minutes_late = diff.total_seconds() / 60.0
            if minutes_late > threshold:
                late_list.append(
                    LateTicketModel(
                        ticket_id=t.id,
                        ticket_number=t.ticket_number,
                        due_time=t.due_time,
                        completed_time=t.completed_time,
                        lateness_minutes=minutes_late,
                    )
                )
    session.close()
    return LateTicketsResponse(late_tickets=late_list)


@app.get(
    "/api/analytics/station_load",
    response_model=StationLoadResponse,
    summary="Compute station load for a timeframe",
    description="Calculate station load as count and total task-minutes per prep station.",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="get_station_load",
)
async def get_station_load(
    from_time: datetime = Query(..., description="Start of timeframe for load calculation (ISO 8601)", example="2025-02-01T16:00:00Z"),
    to_time: datetime = Query(..., description="End of timeframe for load calculation (ISO 8601)", example="2025-02-01T18:00:00Z"),
) -> StationLoadResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    tasks = (
        session.query(StationTask)
        .filter(
            StationTask.scheduled_start_time.isnot(None),
            StationTask.scheduled_end_time.isnot(None),
            StationTask.scheduled_start_time >= from_time,
            StationTask.scheduled_start_time <= to_time,
        )
        .all()
    )
    station_ids = list({t.station_id for t in tasks})
    stations_map: Dict[int, PrepStation] = {}
    if station_ids:
        stations = session.query(PrepStation).filter(PrepStation.id.in_(station_ids)).all()
        for s in stations:
            stations_map[s.id] = s
    load_map: Dict[int, Dict[str, float]] = {}
    for t in tasks:
        duration = (t.scheduled_end_time - t.scheduled_start_time).total_seconds() / 60.0
        entry = load_map.get(t.station_id)
        if entry is None:
            load_map[t.station_id] = {"count": 1.0, "minutes": duration}
        else:
            entry["count"] = entry["count"] + 1.0
            entry["minutes"] = entry["minutes"] + duration
    result: List[StationLoadModel] = []
    for sid, data in load_map.items():
        name = ""
        station = stations_map.get(sid)
        if station is not None:
            name = station.name
        result.append(
            StationLoadModel(
                station_id=sid,
                station_name=name,
                task_count=int(data["count"]),
                total_task_minutes=data["minutes"],
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return StationLoadResponse(station_loads=result)


@app.post(
    "/api/analytics/kitchen_performance",
    response_model=KitchenPerformanceSummarySingleResponse,
    summary="Generate and store kitchen performance summary",
    description="Compute late tickets and station load and store a summary row.",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="create_kitchen_performance_summary",
)
async def create_kitchen_performance_summary(
    payload: KitchenPerformanceSummaryCreateRequest = Body(..., description="Summary generation parameters")
) -> KitchenPerformanceSummarySingleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    late_response = await list_late_tickets(payload.timeframe_start, payload.timeframe_end, payload.late_threshold_minutes)
    late_tickets = late_response.late_tickets
    late_count = len(late_tickets)
    avg_late = 0.0
    if late_count > 0:
        total = 0.0
        for lt in late_tickets:
            total = total + lt.lateness_minutes
        avg_late = total / float(late_count)
    load_response = await get_station_load(payload.timeframe_start, payload.timeframe_end)
    station_loads = load_response.station_loads
    sorted_loads = sorted(station_loads, key=lambda x: x.total_task_minutes, reverse=True)
    top1_id = None
    top1_load = None
    top2_id = None
    top2_load = None
    if len(sorted_loads) > 0:
        top1_id = sorted_loads[0].station_id
        top1_load = sorted_loads[0].total_task_minutes
    if len(sorted_loads) > 1:
        top2_id = sorted_loads[1].station_id
        top2_load = sorted_loads[1].total_task_minutes
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    summary = KitchenPerformanceSummary(
        timeframe_start=payload.timeframe_start,
        timeframe_end=payload.timeframe_end,
        late_ticket_count=late_count,
        average_lateness_minutes=avg_late,
        top_station1_id=top1_id,
        top_station1_load=top1_load,
        top_station2_id=top2_id,
        top_station2_load=top2_load,
        generated_at=now,
        generated_by_user_id=1,
    )
    session.add(summary)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(summary)
    session.close()
    return KitchenPerformanceSummarySingleResponse(kitchen_performance_summary=summary)


@app.post(
    "/api/simulations/dinner_rush",
    response_model=SimulationDinnerRushResponse,
    summary="Simulate a dinner rush with random orders",
    description="Generate tickets, items, and tasks to simulate a dinner rush.",
    tags=["simulations"],
    operation_id="simulate_dinner_rush",
)
async def simulate_dinner_rush(
    payload: SimulationDinnerRushRequest = Body(..., description="Simulation parameters")
) -> SimulationDinnerRushResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    recipes = session.query(Recipe).all()
    stations = session.query(PrepStation).all()
    if not recipes or not stations or payload.order_count <= 0 or payload.window_minutes <= 0:
        session.close()
        return SimulationDinnerRushResponse(
            orders_created=0,
            ticket_items_created=0,
            station_tasks_created=0,
            station_loads=[],
        )
    tasks_map: Dict[int, Dict[str, float]] = {}
    orders_created = 0
    ticket_items_created = 0
    station_tasks_created = 0
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    for i in range(payload.order_count):
        recipe = recipes[i % len(recipes)]
        station = stations[i % len(stations)]
        order_created_time = payload.start_time + timedelta(minutes=(i * payload.window_minutes) / max(payload.order_count, 1))
        due_time = order_created_time + timedelta(minutes=recipe.estimated_prep_time_minutes)
        ticket = OrderTicket(
            ticket_number=f"SIM-{now.strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}-{i}",
            due_time=due_time,
            created_time=order_created_time,
            priority="normal",
            status="open",
            completed_time=None,
            created_by_user_id=1,
            created_at=order_created_time,
            updated_at=order_created_time,
        )
        session.add(ticket)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(ticket)
        orders_created = orders_created + 1
        quantity = (i % 3) + 1
        item = TicketItem(
            order_ticket_id=ticket.id,
            recipe_id=recipe.id,
            quantity=quantity,
            modifier_text=None,
            status="queued",
            created_at=order_created_time,
            updated_at=order_created_time,
        )
        session.add(item)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(item)
        ticket_items_created = ticket_items_created + 1
        start_time = order_created_time + timedelta(minutes=5)
        end_time = start_time + timedelta(minutes=recipe.estimated_prep_time_minutes)
        task = StationTask(
            station_id=station.id,
            task_type="cook",
            order_ticket_id=ticket.id,
            ticket_item_id=item.id,
            recipe_id=recipe.id,
            recipe_step_id=None,
            prep_batch_id=None,
            description=f"Cook {quantity}x {recipe.name}",
            quantity=float(quantity),
            unit="orders",
            priority="normal",
            status="queued",
            scheduled_start_time=start_time,
            scheduled_end_time=end_time,
            actual_start_time=None,
            actual_end_time=None,
            snoozed_until=None,
            created_at=order_created_time,
            updated_at=order_created_time,
        )
        session.add(task)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(task)
        station_tasks_created = station_tasks_created + 1
        duration = (end_time - start_time).total_seconds() / 60.0
        entry = tasks_map.get(station.id)
        if entry is None:
            tasks_map[station.id] = {"count": 1.0, "minutes": duration}
        else:
            entry["count"] = entry["count"] + 1.0
            entry["minutes"] = entry["minutes"] + duration
    station_by_id: Dict[int, PrepStation] = {s.id: s for s in stations}
    station_loads: List[SimulationStationLoadModel] = []
    for sid, data in tasks_map.items():
        station = station_by_id.get(sid)
        name = station.name if station is not None else ""
        station_loads.append(
            SimulationStationLoadModel(
                station_id=sid,
                station_name=name,
                task_count=int(data["count"]),
                total_task_minutes=data["minutes"],
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return SimulationDinnerRushResponse(
        orders_created=orders_created,
        ticket_items_created=ticket_items_created,
        station_tasks_created=station_tasks_created,
        station_loads=station_loads,
    )

    project_progress_snapshot_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("project_progress_snapshots.id", ondelete="CASCADE"), nullable=False)
    phase_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("phases.id"), nullable=False)
    planned_start_date = Column(String)
    planned_end_date = Column(String)
    actual_start_date = Column(String)
    actual_end_date = Column(String)
    planned_cost = Column(REAL)
    actual_cost_to_date = Column(REAL)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

Index("idx_phase_progress_snapshots_snapshot_id", PhaseProgressSnapshot.project_progress_snapshot_id)
Index("idx_phase_progress_snapshots_phase_id", PhaseProgressSnapshot.phase_id)

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

@app.post(
    "/api/projects",
    response_model=ProjectResponse,
    summary="Create a new project",
    description="Create a project for the current user using project_code and other fields",
    tags=["projects"],
    operation_id="create_project",
)
async def create_project(project: ProjectCreate = Body(..., description="Project creation payload")) -> ProjectResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    existing = session.query(User).filter(User.id == 1).first()
    if existing is None:
        user = User(id=1, username="default", email="default@example.com")
        session.add(user)
        session.commit()
    db_project = Project(
        project_code=project.project_code,
        name=project.name,
        client_name=project.client_name,
        budget=project.budget,
        start_date=project.start_date,
        end_date=project.end_date,
        status=project.status,
        health_status=project.health_status,
        created_by=1,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(db_project)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(db_project)
    result = ProjectResponse.model_validate(db_project)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.get(
    "/api/projects",
    response_model=ProjectListResponse,
    summary="List projects for current user",
    description="Retrieve all projects created by current user with optional filters",
    tags=["projects"],
    operation_id="list_projects",
)
async def list_projects(
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter projects by status", example="active"),
    client_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter projects by client name substring", example="Summit"),
    project_code: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by exact project_code", example="MALL-RENOV-24"),
) -> ProjectListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Project).filter(Project.created_by == 1)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Project.status == status)
    if client_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Project.client_name.contains(client_name))
    if project_code is not None:
        query = query.filter(Project.project_code == project_code)
    items = query.all()
    projects_list = [ProjectListItem.model_validate(p) for p in items]
    session.close()
    return ProjectListResponse(projects=projects_list)

@app.patch(
    "/api/projects/{project_id}",
    response_model=ProjectResponse,
    summary="Update project fields",
    description="Partially update a project owned by current user",
    tags=["projects"],
    operation_id="update_project",
)
async def update_project(
    project_id: int = Path(..., description="Project id to update", example=10),
    project_updates: ProjectUpdate = Body(..., description="Fields to update on the project"),
) -> ProjectResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    db_project = session.query(Project).filter(Project.id == project_id, Project.created_by == 1).first()
    if db_project is not None:
        if project_updates.name is not None:
            db_project.name = project_updates.name
        if project_updates.client_name is not None:
            db_project.client_name = project_updates.client_name
        if project_updates.budget is not None:
            db_project.budget = project_updates.budget
        if project_updates.start_date is not None:
            db_project.start_date = project_updates.start_date
        if project_updates.end_date is not None:
            db_project.end_date = project_updates.end_date
        if project_updates.status is not None:
            db_project.status = project_updates.status
        if project_updates.health_status is not None:
            db_project.health_status = project_updates.health_status
        db_project.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(db_project)
    else:
        db_project = Project(
            id=0,
            project_code="",
            name=None,
            client_name="",
            budget=0.0,
            start_date="",
            end_date=None,
            status="",
            health_status=None,
            created_by=1,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
    result = ProjectResponse.model_validate(db_project)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(
    "/api/task-resource-usage",
    response_model=TaskResourceUsageResponse,
    summary="Record task resource usage",
    description="Create a task_resource_usage record for a resource used on a task",
    tags=["task_resource_usage"],
    operation_id="create_task_resource_usage",
)
async def create_task_resource_usage(
    usage: TaskResourceUsageCreate = Body(..., description="Resource usage payload")
) -> TaskResourceUsageResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    cost_value = usage.cost
    if cost_value is None:
        res = session.query(Resource).filter(Resource.id == usage.resource_id).first()
        if res is not None and res.unit_cost is not None:
            cost_value = res.unit_cost * usage.hours
        else:
            cost_value = 0.0
    db_usage = TaskResourceUsage(
        task_id=usage.task_id,
        resource_id=usage.resource_id,
        usage_date=usage.usage_date,
        hours=usage.hours,
        cost=cost_value,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(db_usage)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(db_usage)
    result = TaskResourceUsageResponse.model_validate(db_usage)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.patch(

    description="Update a change order's approval_status, approved_date, or other fields",
    tags=["change_orders"],

)
async def update_change_order(

) -> ChangeOrderResponse:

        if change_order_updates.approved_date is not None:
