@app.get(
    "/api/projects/{project_id}/progress-snapshots/latest",
    response_model=LatestProjectProgressSnapshotEnvelope,
    summary="Get latest project progress snapshot",
    description="Retrieve the most recent project_progress_snapshot and its phase snapshots",
    tags=["project_progress_snapshots"],
    operation_id="get_latest_project_progress_snapshot",
)
async def get_latest_project_progress_snapshot(
    project_id: int = Path(..., description="Project id whose latest snapshot to fetch", example=40)
) -> LatestProjectProgressSnapshotEnvelope:
    session = SessionLocal()
    snapshot = (
        session.query(ProjectProgressSnapshot)
        .filter(ProjectProgressSnapshot.project_id == project_id)
        .order_by(ProjectProgressSnapshot.snapshot_date.desc())
        .first()
    )
    if snapshot is None:
        session.close()
        return LatestProjectProgressSnapshotEnvelope(snapshot=None)
    phase_snapshots = (
        session.query(PhaseProgressSnapshot)
        .filter(PhaseProgressSnapshot.project_progress_snapshot_id == snapshot.id)
        .all()
    )
    phase_summaries: List[LatestPhaseSummary] = []
    for ps in phase_snapshots:
        phase_summaries.append(
            LatestPhaseSummary(
                phase_id=ps.phase_id,
                planned_start_date=ps.planned_start_date,
                planned_end_date=ps.planned_end_date,
                actual_start_date=ps.actual_start_date,
                actual_end_date=ps.actual_end_date,
                planned_cost=ps.planned_cost,
                actual_cost_to_date=ps.actual_cost_to_date if ps.actual_cost_to_date is not None else 0.0,
            )
        )
    snapshot_model = LatestProjectProgressSnapshotWithPhases(
        id=snapshot.id,
        project_id=snapshot.project_id,
        snapshot_date=snapshot.snapshot_date,
        health_status=snapshot.health_status,
        notes=snapshot.notes,
        phase_summaries=phase_summaries,
    )
    session.close()
    return LatestProjectProgressSnapshotEnvelope(snapshot=snapshot_model)

@app.get(
    "/api/projects/{project_id}/progress-snapshot-summary",
    response_model=GeneratedProjectProgressSnapshotSummary,
    summary="Generate progress snapshot summary by date",
    description="Compute on-demand phase-level planned vs actual data without writing snapshot rows",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="generate_project_progress_snapshot_summary",
)
async def generate_project_progress_snapshot_summary(
    project_id: int = Path(..., description="Project to summarize", example=40),
    as_of_date: str = Query(..., description="Date for which to compute progress (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-03-31"),
) -> GeneratedProjectProgressSnapshotSummary:
    session = SessionLocal()
    project = session.query(Project).filter(Project.id == project_id, Project.created_by == 1).first()
    if project is None:
        project = Project(
            id=project_id,
            project_code="",
            name=None,
            client_name="",
            budget=0.0,
            start_date="",
            end_date=None,
            status="",
            health_status=None,
            created_by=1,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
        session.add(project)
        session.commit()
    phases = session.query(Phase).filter(Phase.project_id == project_id).all()
    phase_summaries: List[GeneratedPhaseSummary] = []
    total_planned_cost = 0.0
    total_actual_cost = 0.0
    for ph in phases:
        tasks = (
            session.query(Task)
            .filter(Task.phase_id == ph.id, Task.updated_at <= datetime.fromisoformat(as_of_date + "T23:59:59"))
            .all()
        )
        actual_cost_to_date = 0.0
        for t in tasks:
            if t.actual_cost is not None:
                actual_cost_to_date += t.actual_cost
        planned_cost = ph.planned_cost if ph.planned_cost is not None else 0.0
        total_planned_cost += planned_cost
        total_actual_cost += actual_cost_to_date
        phase_summaries.append(
            GeneratedPhaseSummary(
                phase_id=ph.id,
                phase_name=ph.name,
                planned_start_date=ph.planned_start_date,
                planned_end_date=ph.planned_end_date,
                actual_start_date=ph.actual_start_date,
                actual_end_date=ph.actual_end_date,
                planned_cost=ph.planned_cost,
                actual_cost_to_date=actual_cost_to_date,
            )
        )
    health_status = None
    if total_planned_cost > 0:
        ratio = total_actual_cost / total_planned_cost
        if ratio <= 1.0:
            health_status = "green"
        elif ratio <= 1.2:
            health_status = "yellow"
        else:
            health_status = "red"
    summary = GeneratedProjectProgressSnapshotSummary(
        project_id=project_id,
        project_code=project.project_code,
        as_of_date=as_of_date,
        health_status=health_status,
        phases=phase_summaries,
    )
    session.close()
    return summary

@app.get(
    "/api/dashboard/projects",
    response_model=DashboardProjectsResponse,
    summary="Get cross-project portfolio health dashboard",
    description="Return active projects grouped by site with budgets and analytics",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="get_cross_project_dashboard",
)
async def get_cross_project_dashboard(
    days_for_timesheets: Optional[int] = Query(30, description="Number of past days for timesheet hour totals", example=30)
) -> DashboardProjectsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    projects = session.query(Project).filter(Project.created_by == 1).all()
    project_ids = [p.id for p in projects]
    sites = session.query(ProjectSite).filter(ProjectSite.project_id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    project_to_sites: Dict[int, List[ProjectSite]] = {}
    for s in sites:
        project_to_sites.setdefault(s.project_id, []).append(s)
    change_orders = session.query(ChangeOrder).filter(ChangeOrder.project_id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    rfis = session.query(Rfi).filter(Rfi.project_id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    phases = session.query(Phase).filter(Phase.project_id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    phase_ids = [ph.id for ph in phases]
    tasks = session.query(Task).filter(Task.phase_id.in_(phase_ids)).all() if phase_ids else []
    task_ids = [t.id for t in tasks]
    start_dt = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days_for_timesheets if days_for_timesheets is not None else 30)
    start_str = start_dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    timesheets = (
        session.query(Timesheet)
        .filter(Timesheet.task_id.in_(task_ids), Timesheet.work_date >= start_str)
        .all()
        if task_ids
        else []
    )
    project_to_phases: Dict[int, List[Phase]] = {}
    for ph in phases:
        project_to_phases.setdefault(ph.project_id, []).append(ph)
    phase_to_tasks: Dict[int, List[Task]] = {}
    for t in tasks:
        phase_to_tasks.setdefault(t.phase_id, []).append(t)
    task_to_project: Dict[int, int] = {}
    for ph in phases:
        for t in phase_to_tasks.get(ph.id, []):
            task_to_project[t.id] = ph.project_id
    project_to_timesheet_hours: Dict[int, float] = {}
    for ts in timesheets:
        proj_id = task_to_project.get(ts.task_id)
        if proj_id is not None:
            project_to_timesheet_hours[proj_id] = project_to_timesheet_hours.get(proj_id, 0.0) + (ts.hours if ts.hours is not None else 0.0)
    project_to_open_rfis: Dict[int, int] = {}
    for r in rfis:
        if r.resolution_status != "answered":
            project_to_open_rfis[r.project_id] = project_to_open_rfis.get(r.project_id, 0) + 1
    project_to_pending_cos: Dict[int, int] = {}
    project_to_approved_co_cost: Dict[int, float] = {}
    for co in change_orders:
        if co.approval_status == "approved":
            project_to_approved_co_cost[co.project_id] = project_to_approved_co_cost.get(co.project_id, 0.0) + (co.cost_impact if co.cost_impact is not None else 0.0)
        if "pending" in co.approval_status:
            project_to_pending_cos[co.project_id] = project_to_pending_cos.get(co.project_id, 0) + 1
    site_groups: Dict[Optional[int], DashboardSiteSummary] = {}
    for p in projects:
        attached_sites = project_to_sites.get(p.id, [])
        if attached_sites:
            for s in attached_sites:
                site_key = s.id
                if site_key not in site_groups:
                    site_groups[site_key] = DashboardSiteSummary(
                        site_id=s.id,
                        site_name=s.site_name,
                        address=s.address,
                        projects=[],
                    )
                phases_for_project = project_to_phases.get(p.id, [])
                phase_summaries: List[DashboardPhaseSummary] = []
                for ph in phases_for_project:
                    tasks_for_phase = phase_to_tasks.get(ph.id, [])
                    total_tasks = len(tasks_for_phase)
                    completed_tasks = 0
                    for t in tasks_for_phase:
                        if t.progress_status == "complete":
                            completed_tasks += 1
                    percent_completed = 0.0
                    if total_tasks > 0:
                        percent_completed = (completed_tasks / total_tasks) * 100.0
                    phase_summaries.append(
                        DashboardPhaseSummary(
                            phase_id=ph.id,
                            phase_name=ph.name,
                            percent_tasks_completed=percent_completed,
                        )
                    )
                proj_summary = DashboardProjectSummary(
                    project_id=p.id,
                    project_code=p.project_code,
                    name=p.name,
                    status=p.status,
                    health_status=p.health_status,
                    total_budget=p.budget,
                    total_committed_change_order_cost=project_to_approved_co_cost.get(p.id, 0.0),
                    phases=phase_summaries,
                    total_timesheet_hours_last_period=project_to_timesheet_hours.get(p.id, 0.0),
                    open_rfis_count=project_to_open_rfis.get(p.id, 0),
                    pending_change_orders_count=project_to_pending_cos.get(p.id, 0),
                )
                site_groups[site_key].projects.append(proj_summary)
        else:
            site_key = None
            if site_key not in site_groups:
                site_groups[site_key] = DashboardSiteSummary(
                    site_id=None,
                    site_name=None,
                    address=None,
                    projects=[],
                )
            phases_for_project = project_to_phases.get(p.id, [])
            phase_summaries: List[DashboardPhaseSummary] = []
            for ph in phases_for_project:
                tasks_for_phase = phase_to_tasks.get(ph.id, [])
                total_tasks = len(tasks_for_phase)
                completed_tasks = 0
                for t in tasks_for_phase:
                    if t.progress_status == "complete":
                        completed_tasks += 1
                percent_completed = 0.0
                if total_tasks > 0:
                    percent_completed = (completed_tasks / total_tasks) * 100.0
                phase_summaries.append(
                    DashboardPhaseSummary(
                        phase_id=ph.id,
                        phase_name=ph.name,
                        percent_tasks_completed=percent_completed,
                    )
                )
            proj_summary = DashboardProjectSummary(
                project_id=p.id,
                project_code=p.project_code,
                name=p.name,
                status=p.status,
                health_status=p.health_status,
                total_budget=p.budget,
                total_committed_change_order_cost=project_to_approved_co_cost.get(p.id, 0.0),
                phases=phase_summaries,
                total_timesheet_hours_last_period=project_to_timesheet_hours.get(p.id, 0.0),
                open_rfis_count=project_to_open_rfis.get(p.id, 0),
                pending_change_orders_count=project_to_pending_cos.get(p.id, 0),
            )
            site_groups[site_key].projects.append(proj_summary)
    sites_list = list(site_groups.values())
    session.close()
    return DashboardProjectsResponse(sites=sites_list)

import os
from datetime import datetime, date, time, timedelta
from typing import Optional, List, Dict

from fastapi import FastAPI, Query, Path, Body, Depends
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import (
    create_engine,
    Column,
    Integer,
    String,
    DateTime,
    Float,
    Text,
    ForeignKey,
    CheckConstraint,
    Index,
    and_,
    or_,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, relationship, sessionmaker, Session

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/petpath_veterinary_client_portal.db")

engine = create_engine(database_url, future=True)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, autocommit=False, future=True)

Base = declarative_base()

app = FastAPI(title="PetPath Veterinary Client Portal Simulation")

    full_name = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class AppointmentRequest(Base):

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    appointment_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("appointments.id"), nullable=False)

    requested_vet_specialty = Column(Text)
    notes = Column(Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Invoice(Base):
    __tablename__ = "invoices"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    appointment_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("appointments.id"), nullable=False)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    currency = Column(String, nullable=False, default="USD")
    status = Column(String, nullable=False)
    issued_at = Column(DateTime)
    paid_at = Column(DateTime)
    metadata_ = Column("metadata", Text)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    appointment = relationship("Appointment", foreign_keys=[appointment_id])
    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint("status IN ('unpaid','paid','void')", name="ck_invoices_status"),
    )


Index("idx_invoices_appointment_id", Invoice.appointment_id)
Index("idx_invoices_status", Invoice.status)
Index("idx_invoices_issued_at", Invoice.issued_at)

class VaccineRecord(Base):

    dose_number = Column(Integer)
    lot_number = Column(String)

    pet = relationship("Pet", foreign_keys=[pet_id])

class CarePlan(Base):

class CarePlanItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = "care_plan_items"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    care_plan_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("care_plans.id"), nullable=False)
    item_type = Column(String, nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text)
    frequency = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    care_plan = relationship("CarePlan", foreign_keys=[care_plan_id])
    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint("item_type IN ('appointment','medication','vaccine','other')", name="ck_care_plan_items_type"),
    )

class CarePlanReminder(Base):
    __tablename__ = "care_plan_reminders"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    pet_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("pets.id"), nullable=False)
    care_plan_item_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("care_plan_items.id"))
    related_type = Column(String)
    related_id = Column(Integer)
    due_date = Column(DateTime, nullable=False)
    notify_at = Column(DateTime)
    delivery_channel = Column(String, nullable=False)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False, default="scheduled")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    pet = relationship("Pet", foreign_keys=[pet_id])
    care_plan_item = relationship("CarePlanItem", foreign_keys=[care_plan_item_id])
    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint("related_type IN ('appointment','vaccine_record') OR related_type IS NULL", name="ck_related_type"),
        CheckConstraint("delivery_channel IN ('email','sms','push')", name="ck_delivery_channel"),
        CheckConstraint("status IN ('scheduled','sent','cancelled')", name="ck_reminder_status"),
    )


Index("idx_care_plan_reminders_pet_id", CarePlanReminder.pet_id)
Index("idx_care_plan_reminders_due_date", CarePlanReminder.due_date)
Index("idx_care_plan_reminders_related", CarePlanReminder.related_type, CarePlanReminder.related_id)

def current_user_id() -> int:
    return 1


@app.post(
    "/api/pets",
    response_model=CreatePetResponse,
    summary="Create a new pet for the current user",
    description="Create a pet record for user_id=1 and optional initial medical history note.",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="create_pet",
)
async def create_pet_endpoint(body: CreatePetRequest = Body(...), session: Session = Depends(get_session)) -> CreatePetResponse:
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    pet = Pet(
        user_id=current_user_id(),
        name=body.name,
        species=body.species,
        breed=body.breed,
        birth_date=body.birth_date,
        weight_kg=body.weight_kg,
        microchip_id=body.microchip_id,
        primary_clinic_id=body.primary_clinic_id,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(pet)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pet)
    created_note = None
    if body.initial_medical_history_note:
        note = MedicalHistoryNote(
            pet_id=pet.id,
            note_text=body.initial_medical_history_note,
            source="user",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(note)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(note)
        created_note = note
    pet_model = PetModel.model_validate(pet)
    note_model = MedicalHistoryNoteModel.model_validate(created_note) if created_note else None
    session.close()
    return CreatePetResponse(pet=pet_model, initial_medical_history_note=note_model)


@app.get(

@app.patch(
    "/api/pets/{pet_id}",
    response_model=UpdatePetResponse,

    description="Partially update pet fields for a pet owned by user_id=1.",
    tags=["pets"],

    body: UpdatePetRequest = Body(...),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> UpdatePetResponse:
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == pet_id, Pet.user_id == current_user_id()).first()
    if pet:
        if body.name is not None:
            pet.name = body.name
        if body.species is not None:
            pet.species = body.species
        if body.breed is not None:

        if body.birth_date is not None:

        if body.weight_kg is not None:

            pet.microchip_id = body.microchip_id
        if body.primary_clinic_id is not None:

        pet.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(pet)
    pet_model = PetModel.model_validate(pet) if pet else None
    session.close()
    return UpdatePetResponse(pet=pet_model)

@app.get(
    "/api/clinics/{clinic_id}/vets",
    response_model=ListClinicVetsResponse,
    summary="List vets for a clinic with specialties",
    description="Return vets at a clinic with their specialties for choosing providers.",
    tags=["vets"],
    operation_id="list_clinic_vets",
)
async def list_clinic_vets_endpoint(
    clinic_id: int = Path(..., description="Clinic whose vets to list", example=1),
    specialty: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter vets who have this specialty substring", example="dermatology"),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> ListClinicVetsResponse:
    vets_query = session.query(Vet).filter(Vet.clinic_id == clinic_id)
    vets = vets_query.all()
    vet_models: List[VetModel] = []
    for v in vets:
        specs_query = session.query(VetSpecialty).filter(VetSpecialty.vet_id == v.id)
        if specialty is not None:
            specs_query = specs_query.filter(VetSpecialty.specialty.ilike(f"%{specialty}%"))
        specs = specs_query.all()
        if specialty is not None and len(specs) == 0:
            continue
        specs_models = [VetSpecialtyModel.model_validate(s) for s in specs]
        vm = VetModel(
            id=v.id,
            clinic_id=v.clinic_id,
            full_name=v.full_name,
            email=v.email,
            phone_number=v.phone_number,
            created_at=v.created_at,
            updated_at=v.updated_at,
            specialties=specs_models,
        )
        vet_models.append(vm)
    session.close()
    return ListClinicVetsResponse(vets=vet_models)

@app.post(
    "/api/appointments",
    response_model=CreateAppointmentResponse,
    summary="Create an appointment for a pet",
    description="Insert an appointments row for a pet owned by user_id=1; status set as provided.",
    tags=["appointments"],
    operation_id="create_appointment",
)
async def create_appointment_endpoint(
    body: CreateAppointmentRequest = Body(...),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> CreateAppointmentResponse:
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == body.pet_id, Pet.user_id == current_user_id()).first()
    created = None
    if pet:
        status_value = body.status if body.status is not None else "pending"
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        appt = Appointment(
            pet_id=pet.id,
            clinic_id=body.clinic_id,
            vet_id=body.vet_id,
            appointment_type=body.appointment_type,
            status=status_value,
            requested_by_user_id=current_user_id(),
            start_datetime=body.start_datetime,
            end_datetime=body.end_datetime,
            reason=body.reason,
            cancellation_reason=None,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(appt)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(appt)
        created = appt
    appt_model = AppointmentModel.model_validate(created) if created else None
    session.close()
    return CreateAppointmentResponse(appointment=appt_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/appointments",
    response_model=ListAppointmentsResponse,
    summary="List appointments for current user pets",
    description="Return appointments joined via pets.user_id=1 with optional filters.",
    tags=["appointments"],
    operation_id="list_appointments_for_user",
)
async def list_appointments_for_user_endpoint(
    pet_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter appointments for a specific pet", example=11),
    appointment_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by appointment_type", example="vaccine_visit"),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by appointment status", example="confirmed"),
    from_datetime: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Return appointments starting on or after this ISO datetime", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    to_datetime: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Return appointments starting on or before this ISO datetime", example="2025-01-31T23:59:59Z"),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> ListAppointmentsResponse:
    q = session.query(Appointment).join(Pet, Appointment.pet_id == Pet.id).filter(Pet.user_id == current_user_id())
    if pet_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(Appointment.pet_id == pet_id)
    if appointment_type is not None:
        q = q.filter(Appointment.appointment_type == appointment_type)
    if status is not None:
        q = q.filter(Appointment.status == status)
    if from_datetime is not None:
        q = q.filter(Appointment.start_datetime >= from_datetime)
    if to_datetime is not None:
        q = q.filter(Appointment.start_datetime <= to_datetime)
    appts = q.order_by(Appointment.start_datetime.asc()).all()
    appts_models = [AppointmentModel.model_validate(a) for a in appts]
    session.close()
    return ListAppointmentsResponse(appointments=appts_models)

@app.patch(
    "/api/appointments/{appointment_id}",
    response_model=UpdateAppointmentResponse,
    summary="Update an appointment fields",
    description="Partially update appointment attributes for current user pets.",
    tags=["appointments"],
    operation_id="update_appointment",
)
async def update_appointment_endpoint(
    appointment_id: int = Path(..., description="Appointment ID to update; must be linked to user_id=1 pet", example=101),
    body: UpdateAppointmentRequest = Body(...),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> UpdateAppointmentResponse:
    appt = (
        session.query(Appointment)
        .join(Pet, Appointment.pet_id == Pet.id)
        .filter(Appointment.id == appointment_id, Pet.user_id == current_user_id())
        .first()
    )
    if appt:
        if body.clinic_id is not None:
            appt.clinic_id = body.clinic_id
        if body.vet_id is not None:
            appt.vet_id = body.vet_id
        if body.appointment_type is not None:
            appt.appointment_type = body.appointment_type
        if body.status is not None:
            appt.status = body.status
        if body.start_datetime is not None:
            appt.start_datetime = body.start_datetime
        if body.end_datetime is not None:
            appt.end_datetime = body.end_datetime
        if body.reason is not None:
            appt.reason = body.reason
        if body.cancellation_reason is not None:
            appt.cancellation_reason = body.cancellation_reason
        appt.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(appt)
    appt_model = AppointmentModel.model_validate(appt) if appt else None
    session.close()
    return UpdateAppointmentResponse(appointment=appt_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/appointments/search/earliest",
    response_model=SearchEarliestSlotResponse,
    summary="Find earliest matching appointment slot",
    description="Search appointments for earliest available slot by type, date range, and vet specialty.",
    tags=["appointments", "search"],
    operation_id="search_earliest_appointment_slot",
)
async def search_earliest_appointment_slot_endpoint(
    appointment_type: str = Query(..., description="Desired appointment_type to search for", example="wellness_exam"),
    from_datetime: datetime = Query(..., description="Start of search window ISO8601", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    to_datetime: datetime = Query(..., description="End of search window ISO8601", example="2025-01-14T23:59:59Z"),
    required_vet_specialty: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Required vet specialty substring", example="canine internal medicine"),
    clinic_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Restrict search to a single clinic ID if provided", example=1),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> SearchEarliestSlotResponse:
    q = session.query(Appointment).filter(
        Appointment.appointment_type == appointment_type,
        Appointment.start_datetime >= from_datetime,
        Appointment.start_datetime <= to_datetime,
    )
    if clinic_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(Appointment.clinic_id == clinic_id)
    if required_vet_specialty is not None:
        q = q.join(Vet, Appointment.vet_id == Vet.id).join(VetSpecialty, VetSpecialty.vet_id == Vet.id).filter(
            VetSpecialty.specialty.ilike(f"%{required_vet_specialty}%")
        )
    appt = q.order_by(Appointment.start_datetime.asc()).first()
    slot_model = None
    if appt:
        clinic = session.query(Clinic).filter(Clinic.id == appt.clinic_id).first()
        vet = session.query(Vet).filter(Vet.id == appt.vet_id).first() if appt.vet_id is not None else None
        slot_model = EarliestSlotModel(
            clinic_id=appt.clinic_id,
            clinic_name=clinic.name if clinic else "",
            vet_id=appt.vet_id,
            vet_name=vet.full_name if vet else None,
            appointment_type=appt.appointment_type,
            start_datetime=appt.start_datetime,
            end_datetime=appt.end_datetime if appt.end_datetime is not None else appt.start_datetime,
        )
    session.close()
    return SearchEarliestSlotResponse(earliest_slot=slot_model)

    summary="List care_plan_reminders for current user",
    description="Return reminders for pets belonging to user_id=1 with optional filters.",
    tags=["care_plan_reminders"],
    operation_id="list_care_plan_reminders_for_user",
)
async def list_care_plan_reminders_for_user_endpoint(
    pet_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter reminders for a specific pet ID", example=10),
    from_due_date: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Return reminders with due_date on or after this ISO datetime", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    to_due_date: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Return reminders with due_date on or before this ISO datetime", example="2025-01-31T23:59:59Z"),
    related_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by related_type", example="vaccine_record"),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by reminder status", example="scheduled"),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> ListCarePlanRemindersResponse:
    pets_sub = session.query(Pet.id).filter(Pet.user_id == current_user_id()).subquery()
    q = session.query(CarePlanReminder).filter(CarePlanReminder.pet_id.in_(pets_sub))
    if pet_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(CarePlanReminder.pet_id == pet_id)
    if from_due_date is not None:
        q = q.filter(CarePlanReminder.due_date >= from_due_date)
    if to_due_date is not None:
        q = q.filter(CarePlanReminder.due_date <= to_due_date)
    if related_type is not None:
        q = q.filter(CarePlanReminder.related_type == related_type)
    if status is not None:
        q = q.filter(CarePlanReminder.status == status)
    reminders = q.order_by(CarePlanReminder.due_date.asc()).all()
    reminders_models = [CarePlanReminderModel.model_validate(r) for r in reminders]
    session.close()
    return ListCarePlanRemindersResponse(care_plan_reminders=reminders_models)


@app.get(
    "/api/pets/{pet_id}/timeline",
    response_model=PetTimelineResponse,
    summary="Get integrated clinical timeline for a pet",
    description="Return chronological timeline of appointments, vaccine_records, and care_plan_reminders.",
    tags=["timeline"],
    operation_id="get_pet_timeline",
)
async def get_pet_timeline_endpoint(
    pet_id: int = Path(..., description="Pet ID whose timeline to fetch; must belong to user_id=1", example=11),
    from_date: str = Query(..., description="Start date YYYY-MM-DD for timeline entries", example="2024-01-01"),
    to_date: str = Query(..., description="End date YYYY-MM-DD for timeline entries", example="2024-12-31"),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> PetTimelineResponse:
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == pet_id, Pet.user_id == current_user_id()).first()
    entries: List[TimelineEntryModel] = []
    if pet:
        from_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(from_date + "T00:00:00")
        to_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(to_date + "T23:59:59")
        appts = (
            session.query(Appointment)
            .filter(Appointment.pet_id == pet.id, Appointment.start_datetime >= from_dt, Appointment.start_datetime <= to_dt)
            .order_by(Appointment.start_datetime.asc())
            .all()
        )
        for a in appts:
            inv = session.query(Invoice).filter(Invoice.appointment_id == a.id).first()
            appt_data = TimelineAppointmentModel(
                id=a.id,
                clinic_id=a.clinic_id,
                vet_id=a.vet_id,
                appointment_type=a.appointment_type,
                status=a.status,
                start_datetime=a.start_datetime,
                end_datetime=a.end_datetime,
                reason=a.reason,
            )
            inv_data = None
            if inv:
                inv_data = TimelineInvoiceModel(
                    id=inv.id,
                    total_amount=inv.total_amount,
                    currency=inv.currency,
                    status=inv.status,
                    issued_at=inv.issued_at,
                    paid_at=inv.paid_at,
                    metadata=inv.metadata_,
                )
            entry = TimelineEntryModel(
                entry_type="appointment",
                timestamp=a.start_datetime,
                appointment=appt_data,
                invoice=inv_data,
                vaccine_record=None,
                care_plan_reminder=None,
            )
            entries.append(entry)
        vax_records = (
            session.query(VaccineRecord)
            .filter(VaccineRecord.pet_id == pet.id, VaccineRecord.dose_date >= from_date, VaccineRecord.dose_date <= to_date)
            .order_by(VaccineRecord.dose_date.asc())
            .all()
        )
        for r in vax_records:
            dose_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(r.dose_date + "T00:00:00")
            vax_data = TimelineVaccineRecordModel(
                id=r.id,
                vaccine_id=r.vaccine_id,
                clinic_id=r.clinic_id,
                dose_date=r.dose_date,
                due_date=r.due_date,
                dose_number=r.dose_number,
                notes=r.notes,
            )
            entry = TimelineEntryModel(
                entry_type="vaccine_record",
                timestamp=dose_dt,
                appointment=None,
                invoice=None,
                vaccine_record=vax_data,
                care_plan_reminder=None,
            )
            entries.append(entry)
        rems = (
            session.query(CarePlanReminder)
            .filter(
                CarePlanReminder.pet_id == pet.id,
                CarePlanReminder.due_date >= from_dt,
                CarePlanReminder.due_date <= to_dt,
            )
            .order_by(CarePlanReminder.due_date.asc())
            .all()
        )
        for r in rems:
            rem_data = TimelineCarePlanReminderModel(
                id=r.id,
                care_plan_item_id=r.care_plan_item_id,
                related_type=r.related_type,
                related_id=r.related_id,
                due_date=r.due_date,
                notify_at=r.notify_at,
                delivery_channel=r.delivery_channel,
                status=r.status,
            )
            entry = TimelineEntryModel(
                entry_type="care_plan_reminder",
                timestamp=r.due_date,
                appointment=None,
                invoice=None,
                vaccine_record=None,
                care_plan_reminder=rem_data,
            )
            entries.append(entry)
        entries.sort(key=lambda e: e.timestamp)
    session.close()
    return PetTimelineResponse(pet_id=pet_id, from_date=from_date, to_date=to_date, entries=entries)

    description="Convenience lookup of pets row by exact name for user_id=1.",
    tags=["pets", "helpers"],
    operation_id="get_pet_by_name",
)
async def get_pet_by_name_endpoint(
    name: str = Query(..., description="Exact pet name to find among current user pets", example="Luna"),
    species: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Optional species filter to disambiguate", example="Dog"),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> GetPetByNameResponse:
    q = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.user_id == current_user_id(), Pet.name == name)
    if species is not None:
        q = q.filter(Pet.species == species)
    pet = q.first()
    pet_model = PetModel.model_validate(pet) if pet else None
    session.close()
    return GetPetByNameResponse(pet=pet_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/appointments/{appointment_id}/reschedule/next_afternoon",
    response_model=RescheduleNextAfternoonResponse,
    summary="Reschedule appointment to next afternoon slot",
    description="Compute next available afternoon within days at same clinic and type and update times.",
    tags=["appointments", "helpers"],
    operation_id="reschedule_appointment_next_afternoon",
)
async def reschedule_appointment_next_afternoon_endpoint(
    appointment_id: int = Path(..., description="Existing appointment ID to reschedule; must belong to user_id=1 pet", example=101),
    body: RescheduleNextAfternoonRequest = Body(...),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> RescheduleNextAfternoonResponse:
    appt = (
        session.query(Appointment)
        .join(Pet, Appointment.pet_id == Pet.id)
        .filter(Appointment.id == appointment_id, Pet.user_id == current_user_id())
        .first()
    )
    if appt:
        base_start = appt.start_datetime
        duration = appt.end_datetime - appt.start_datetime if appt.end_datetime is not None else timedelta(minutes=30)
        days_ahead = body.days_ahead if body.days_ahead is not None else 7
        afternoon_start_hour = body.afternoon_start_hour if body.afternoon_start_hour is not None else 14
        new_start = base_start
        if new_start.hour < afternoon_start_hour:
            new_start = new_start.replace(hour=afternoon_start_hour, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
        for _ in range(days_ahead):
            conflict = (
                session.query(Appointment)
                .filter(
                    Appointment.clinic_id == appt.clinic_id,
                    Appointment.appointment_type == appt.appointment_type,
                    Appointment.start_datetime == new_start,
                    Appointment.id != appt.id,
                )
                .first()
            )
            if conflict is None:
                break
            new_start = new_start + timedelta(days=1)
            new_start = new_start.replace(hour=afternoon_start_hour, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
        appt.start_datetime = new_start
        appt.end_datetime = new_start + duration
        appt.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(appt)
    appt_model = AppointmentModel.model_validate(appt) if appt else None
    session.close()
    return RescheduleNextAfternoonResponse(appointment=appt_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/vaccine_reminders/generate_for_due",
    response_model=GenerateSmsRemindersResponse,
    summary="Generate SMS reminders for due vaccines",
    description="Create care_plan_reminders with delivery_channel='sms' for due vaccine_records without existing reminder.",
    tags=["care_plan_reminders", "helpers"],
    operation_id="generate_sms_reminders_for_due_vaccines",
)
async def generate_sms_reminders_for_due_vaccines_endpoint(
    body: GenerateSmsRemindersRequest = Body(...),
    session: Session = Depends(get_session),
) -> GenerateSmsRemindersResponse:
    pets_sub = session.query(Pet.id).filter(Pet.user_id == current_user_id()).subquery()
    records = (
        session.query(VaccineRecord)
        .filter(
            VaccineRecord.pet_id.in_(pets_sub),
            VaccineRecord.due_date.isnot(None),
            VaccineRecord.due_date >= body.from_date,
            VaccineRecord.due_date <= body.to_date,
        )
        .all()
    )
    created_reminders: List[CarePlanReminderModel] = []
    notify_offset = body.notify_offset_days if body.notify_offset_days is not None else 7
    for r in records:
        existing = (
            session.query(CarePlanReminder)
            .filter(
                CarePlanReminder.related_type == "vaccine_record",
                CarePlanReminder.related_id == r.id,
                CarePlanReminder.delivery_channel == "sms",
            )
            .first()
        )
        if existing:
            continue
        due_date_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(r.due_date + "T00:00:00")
        notify_at_dt = due_date_dt - timedelta(days=notify_offset)
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        rem = CarePlanReminder(
            pet_id=r.pet_id,
            care_plan_item_id=None,
            related_type="vaccine_record",
            related_id=r.id,
            due_date=due_date_dt,
            notify_at=notify_at_dt,
            delivery_channel="sms",
            status="scheduled",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(rem)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(rem)
        rem_model = CarePlanReminderModel.model_validate(rem)
        created_reminders.append(rem_model)
    session.close()
    return GenerateSmsRemindersResponse(created_reminders=created_reminders)

def to_bool(i: Optional[int]) -> bool:
    return bool(i) if i is not None else False


def json_or_none(text_value: Optional[str]) -> Optional[Dict]:
    if text_value is None:
        return None
    if text_value == "":
        return None
    return json.loads(text_value)

async def list_wallets(
    include_balances: Optional[bool] = Query(False, description="If true, include wallet balances", example=True)
) -> WalletListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    wallets_db = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.user_id == 1).all()
    wallet_models: List[WalletModel] = []
    for w in wallets_db:
        addr_meta = json_or_none(w.address_metadata_json)

        if include_balances:
            balances_db = (
                session.query(WalletBalance, Asset)
                .join(Asset, WalletBalance.asset_id == Asset.id)
                .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == w.id)
                .all()
            )
            balances_list = []
            for wb, asset in balances_db:
                balances_list.append(
                    WalletBalanceModel(
                        asset_id=asset.id,
                        asset_symbol=asset.symbol,
                        balance=wb.balance,
                        updated_at=wb.updated_at,
                    )
                )
        wallet_models.append(
            WalletModel(
                id=w.id,
                user_id=w.user_id,
                name=w.name,
                is_primary=to_bool(w.is_primary),
                address_metadata=addr_meta,
                created_time=w.created_at,
                updated_time=w.updated_at,
                balances=balances_list,

@app.post(
    "/api/wallets",
    summary="Create new wallet for current user",
    description="Create a new wallet for user_id=1 with optional primary flag and metadata",
    tags=["wallets"],
    operation_id="create_wallet",
    response_model=WalletResponse,
)
async def create_wallet(body: CreateWalletRequest = Body(...)) -> WalletResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    is_primary_int = 1 if body.is_primary else 0
    if is_primary_int == 1:
        existing = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.user_id == 1, Wallet.is_primary == 1).all()
        for w in existing:
            w.is_primary = 0
            w.updated_at = now
    addr_meta_str = json.dumps(body.address_metadata_json) if body.address_metadata_json is not None else None
    wallet = Wallet(
        user_id=1,
        name=body.name,
        is_primary=is_primary_int,
        address_metadata_json=addr_meta_str,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(wallet)
    session.commit()
    addr_meta = json_or_none(wallet.address_metadata_json)
    wallet_model = WalletModel(
        id=wallet.id,
        user_id=wallet.user_id,
        name=wallet.name,
        is_primary=to_bool(wallet.is_primary),
        address_metadata=addr_meta,
        created_time=wallet.created_at,
        updated_time=wallet.updated_at,
        balances=None,
    )
    session.close()
    return WalletResponse(wallet=wallet_model)

@app.post(
    "/api/transfers/internal",
    summary="Create internal transfer",
    description="Atomically move funds between two wallets of current user and record transaction",
    tags=["transfers", "transactions"],
    operation_id="create_internal_transfer",
    response_model=InternalTransferResponse,
)
async def create_internal_transfer(body: InternalTransferRequest = Body(...)) -> InternalTransferResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.symbol == body.asset_symbol).first()
    if asset is None:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        asset = Asset(symbol=body.asset_symbol, name=body.asset_symbol, risk_tier=None, is_active=1, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(asset)
        session.commit()
    wallet_from = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == body.wallet_id_from, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    wallet_to = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == body.wallet_id_to, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if wallet_from is not None:
        wb_from = (
            session.query(WalletBalance)
            .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == wallet_from.id, WalletBalance.asset_id == asset.id)
            .first()
        )
        if wb_from is None:
            wb_from = WalletBalance(wallet_id=wallet_from.id, asset_id=asset.id, balance=0.0, updated_at=now)
            session.add(wb_from)
        wb_from.balance = wb_from.balance - body.amount
        wb_from.updated_at = now
    if wallet_to is not None:
        wb_to = (
            session.query(WalletBalance)
            .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == wallet_to.id, WalletBalance.asset_id == asset.id)
            .first()
        )
        if wb_to is None:
            wb_to = WalletBalance(wallet_id=wallet_to.id, asset_id=asset.id, balance=0.0, updated_at=now)
            session.add(wb_to)
        wb_to.balance = wb_to.balance + body.amount
        wb_to.updated_at = now
    tx = Transaction(
        user_id=user_id,
        tx_type="internal_transfer",
        asset_id=asset.id,
        amount=body.amount,
        wallet_id_from=wallet_from.id if wallet_from is not None else None,
        wallet_id_to=wallet_to.id if wallet_to is not None else None,
        deposit_account_id=None,
        staking_position_id=None,
        reference_id=body.reference_id,
        occurred_at=now,
        metadata_json=json.dumps(body.metadata_json) if body.metadata_json is not None else None,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    session.commit()
    tx_model = TransactionModel(
        id=tx.id,
        user_id=tx.user_id,
        tx_type=tx.tx_type,
        asset_id=tx.asset_id,
        asset_symbol=asset.symbol,
        amount=tx.amount,
        wallet_id_from=tx.wallet_id_from,
        wallet_id_to=tx.wallet_id_to,
        deposit_account_id=tx.deposit_account_id,
        staking_position_id=tx.staking_position_id,
        reference_id=tx.reference_id,
        occurred_at=tx.occurred_at,
        metadata_json=json_or_none(tx.metadata_json),
        created_at=tx.created_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return InternalTransferResponse(transaction=tx_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/transactions",
    summary="List user transactions",
    description="Retrieve transactions for current user with filters and pagination",
    tags=["transactions"],
    operation_id="list_transactions",
    response_model=TransactionsListResponse,
)
async def list_transactions(
    tx_types: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Comma-separated transaction types to include", example="interest_credit,staking_reward"),
    asset_symbol: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset symbol", example="USDC"),
    start_time: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Inclusive lower bound for occurred_at", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    end_time: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Exclusive upper bound for occurred_at", example="2025-01-31T00:00:00Z"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(100, description="Max number of records to return", example=100),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Offset for pagination", example=0),
) -> TransactionsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    query = session.query(Transaction, Asset).join(Asset, Transaction.asset_id == Asset.id).filter(Transaction.user_id == user_id)
    if tx_types is not None:
        codes = [t.strip() for t in tx_types.split(",") if t.strip() != ""]
        if len(codes) > 0:
            query = query.filter(Transaction.tx_type.in_(codes))
    if asset_symbol is not None:
        query = query.filter(Asset.symbol == asset_symbol)
    if start_time is not None:
        query = query.filter(Transaction.occurred_at >= start_time)
    if end_time is not None:
        query = query.filter(Transaction.occurred_at < end_time)
    query = query.order_by(Transaction.occurred_at).offset(offset).limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    tx_list: List[TransactionModel] = []
    for tx, asset in rows:
        tx_list.append(
            TransactionModel(
                id=tx.id,
                user_id=tx.user_id,
                tx_type=tx.tx_type,
                asset_id=tx.asset_id,
                asset_symbol=asset.symbol,
                amount=tx.amount,
                wallet_id_from=tx.wallet_id_from,
                wallet_id_to=tx.wallet_id_to,
                deposit_account_id=tx.deposit_account_id,
                staking_position_id=tx.staking_position_id,
                reference_id=tx.reference_id,
                occurred_at=tx.occurred_at,
                metadata_json=json_or_none(tx.metadata_json),
                created_at=tx.created_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return TransactionsListResponse(transactions=tx_list)


@app.get(
    "/api/transactions/interest-and-rewards/aggregate",
    summary="Aggregate interest and rewards",
    description="Aggregate interest_credit and staking_reward transactions per asset for a date range",
    tags=["transactions", "reports"],
    operation_id="aggregate_interest_and_rewards",
    response_model=AggregateInterestRewardsResponse,
)
async def aggregate_interest_and_rewards(
    start_time: datetime = Query(..., description="Inclusive lower bound for occurred_at", example="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    end_time: datetime = Query(..., description="Exclusive upper bound for occurred_at", example="2025-01-31T00:00:00Z"),
) -> AggregateInterestRewardsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    rows = (
        session.query(Transaction, Asset)
        .join(Asset, Transaction.asset_id == Asset.id)
        .filter(Transaction.user_id == user_id)
        .filter(Transaction.tx_type.in_(["interest_credit", "staking_reward"]))
        .filter(Transaction.occurred_at >= start_time)
        .filter(Transaction.occurred_at < end_time)
        .all()
    )
    agg: Dict[int, Dict[str, float]] = {}
    asset_map: Dict[int, str] = {}
    for tx, asset in rows:
        if tx.asset_id not in agg:
            agg[tx.asset_id] = {"interest": 0.0, "reward": 0.0}
            asset_map[tx.asset_id] = asset.symbol
        if tx.tx_type == "interest_credit":
            agg[tx.asset_id]["interest"] += tx.amount
        elif tx.tx_type == "staking_reward":
            agg[tx.asset_id]["reward"] += tx.amount
    summaries: List[InterestRewardsSummaryModel] = []
    for asset_id_value, values in agg.items():
        total_interest = values["interest"]
        total_reward = values["reward"]
        summaries.append(
            InterestRewardsSummaryModel(
                asset_id=asset_id_value,
                asset_symbol=asset_map.get(asset_id_value, ""),
                total_interest_credits=total_interest,
                total_staking_rewards=total_reward,
                total_yield=total_interest + total_reward,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return AggregateInterestRewardsResponse(start_time=start_time, end_time=end_time, asset_summaries=summaries)

@app.post(
    "/api/deposit-accounts",
    summary="Open deposit account",
    description="Create a deposit account for current user without moving wallet funds",
    tags=["deposit_accounts"],
    operation_id="open_deposit_account",

async def open_deposit_account(body: OpenDepositAccountRequest = Body(...)) -> DepositAccountResponse:

    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == body.wallet_id, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    deposit_product = session.query(DepositProduct).filter(DepositProduct.id == body.deposit_product_id).first()
    asset_id_value = deposit_product.asset_id if deposit_product is not None else 0
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.id == asset_id_value).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    da = DepositAccount(
        user_id=user_id,
        wallet_id=wallet.id if wallet is not None else body.wallet_id,
        asset_id=asset_id_value,
        deposit_product_id=body.deposit_product_id,
        principal_amount=body.initial_principal_amount if body.initial_principal_amount is not None else 0.0,
        accrued_interest=0.0,
        status="open",
        opened_at=now,
        closed_at=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(da)
    session.commit()
    asset_symbol_value = asset.symbol if asset is not None else ""
    model = DepositAccountModel(
        id=da.id,
        user_id=da.user_id,
        wallet_id=da.wallet_id,
        asset_id=da.asset_id,
        asset_symbol=asset_symbol_value,
        deposit_product_id=da.deposit_product_id,
        principal_amount=da.principal_amount,
        accrued_interest=da.accrued_interest,
        status=da.status,
        opened_at=da.opened_at,
        closed_at=da.closed_at,
        created_at=da.created_at,
        updated_at=da.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return DepositAccountResponse(deposit_account=model)


@app.post(
    "/api/deposit-accounts/{deposit_account_id}/fund-from-wallet",
    summary="Fund deposit account from wallet",
    description="Move funds from a wallet into a deposit account and record transaction",
    tags=["deposit_accounts", "transfers", "transactions"],
    operation_id="fund_deposit_account_from_wallet",
    response_model=FundDepositAccountResponse,
)
async def fund_deposit_account_from_wallet(
    deposit_account_id: int = Path(..., description="Target deposit account ID", example=30),
    body: FundDepositAccountRequest = Body(...),
) -> FundDepositAccountResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    da = session.query(DepositAccount).filter(DepositAccount.id == deposit_account_id, DepositAccount.user_id == user_id).first()
    if da is None:
        session.close()
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        deposit_part = FundDepositAccountDepositPart(id=deposit_account_id, principal_amount=0.0, accrued_interest=0.0, updated_at=now)
        tx_part = FundDepositAccountTransactionPart(
            id=0,
            tx_type="deposit_funding",
            amount=body.amount,
            wallet_id_from=None,
            deposit_account_id=deposit_account_id,
            occurred_at=now,
            metadata_json=body.metadata_json,
        )
        return FundDepositAccountResponse(deposit_account=deposit_part, transaction=tx_part)
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.id == da.asset_id).first()
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == da.wallet_id, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    da.principal_amount = da.principal_amount + body.amount
    da.updated_at = now
    if wallet is not None and asset is not None:
        wb = (
            session.query(WalletBalance)
            .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == wallet.id, WalletBalance.asset_id == asset.id)
            .first()
        )
        if wb is None:
            wb = WalletBalance(wallet_id=wallet.id, asset_id=asset.id, balance=0.0, updated_at=now)
            session.add(wb)
        wb.balance = wb.balance - body.amount
        wb.updated_at = now
    tx = Transaction(
        user_id=user_id,
        tx_type="deposit_funding",
        asset_id=da.asset_id,
        amount=body.amount,
        wallet_id_from=wallet.id if wallet is not None else None,
        wallet_id_to=None,
        deposit_account_id=da.id,
        staking_position_id=None,
        reference_id=body.reference_id,
        occurred_at=now,
        metadata_json=json.dumps(body.metadata_json) if body.metadata_json is not None else None,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    session.commit()
    deposit_part = FundDepositAccountDepositPart(
        id=da.id,
        principal_amount=da.principal_amount,
        accrued_interest=da.accrued_interest,
        updated_at=da.updated_at,
    )
    tx_part = FundDepositAccountTransactionPart(
        id=tx.id,
        tx_type=tx.tx_type,
        amount=tx.amount,
        wallet_id_from=tx.wallet_id_from,
        deposit_account_id=tx.deposit_account_id,
        occurred_at=tx.occurred_at,
        metadata_json=json_or_none(tx.metadata_json),
    )
    session.close()
    return FundDepositAccountResponse(deposit_account=deposit_part, transaction=tx_part)


@app.post(
    "/api/deposit-accounts/{deposit_account_id}/close",
    summary="Close deposit account",
    description="Close a deposit account and optionally pay out funds to a wallet",
    tags=["deposit_accounts", "transactions"],
    operation_id="close_deposit_account",
    response_model=CloseDepositAccountResponse,
)
async def close_deposit_account(
    deposit_account_id: int = Path(..., description="Deposit account ID to close", example=30),
    body: CloseDepositAccountRequest = Body(...),
) -> CloseDepositAccountResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    da = session.query(DepositAccount).filter(DepositAccount.id == deposit_account_id, DepositAccount.user_id == user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if da is None:
        deposit_part = CloseDepositAccountDepositPart(
            id=deposit_account_id,
            status="closed",
            principal_amount=0.0,
            accrued_interest=0.0,
            closed_at=now,
        )
        tx_part = CloseDepositAccountTransactionPart(
            id=0,
            tx_type="deposit_withdrawal",
            amount=0.0,
            wallet_id_to=body.payout_wallet_id,
            deposit_account_id=deposit_account_id,
            occurred_at=now,
            metadata_json=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return CloseDepositAccountResponse(deposit_account=deposit_part, transaction=tx_part)
    da.status = "closed"
    da.closed_at = now
    da.updated_at = now
    total_payout = da.principal_amount + da.accrued_interest
    payout_wallet_id = body.payout_wallet_id if body.payout_wallet_id is not None else da.wallet_id
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == payout_wallet_id, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.id == da.asset_id).first()
    if wallet is not None and asset is not None:
        wb = (
            session.query(WalletBalance)
            .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == wallet.id, WalletBalance.asset_id == asset.id)
            .first()
        )
        if wb is None:
            wb = WalletBalance(wallet_id=wallet.id, asset_id=asset.id, balance=0.0, updated_at=now)
            session.add(wb)
        wb.balance = wb.balance + total_payout
        wb.updated_at = now
    tx = Transaction(
        user_id=user_id,
        tx_type="deposit_withdrawal",
        asset_id=da.asset_id,
        amount=total_payout,
        wallet_id_from=None,
        wallet_id_to=wallet.id if wallet is not None else payout_wallet_id,
        deposit_account_id=da.id,
        staking_position_id=None,
        reference_id=body.reference_id,
        occurred_at=now,
        metadata_json=None,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    session.commit()
    deposit_part = CloseDepositAccountDepositPart(
        id=da.id,
        status=da.status,
        principal_amount=da.principal_amount,
        accrued_interest=da.accrued_interest,
        closed_at=da.closed_at,
    )
    tx_part = CloseDepositAccountTransactionPart(
        id=tx.id,
        tx_type=tx.tx_type,
        amount=tx.amount,
        wallet_id_to=tx.wallet_id_to,
        deposit_account_id=tx.deposit_account_id,
        occurred_at=tx.occurred_at,
        metadata_json=json_or_none(tx.metadata_json),
    )
    session.close()
    return CloseDepositAccountResponse(deposit_account=deposit_part, transaction=tx_part)


@app.post(
    "/api/interest-schedules",
    summary="Create interest schedule",
    description="Create an interest schedule entry for a deposit account",
    tags=["interest_schedules"],
    operation_id="create_interest_schedule",
    response_model=InterestScheduleResponse,
)
async def create_interest_schedule(body: CreateInterestScheduleRequest = Body(...)) -> InterestScheduleResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    da = session.query(DepositAccount).filter(DepositAccount.id == body.deposit_account_id, DepositAccount.user_id == 1).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    next_credit_at = body.next_credit_at
    if next_credit_at is None:
        next_credit_at = now + timedelta(days=body.credit_interval_days)
    schedule = InterestSchedule(
        deposit_account_id=body.deposit_account_id,
        credit_interval_days=body.credit_interval_days,
        credit_time_utc=body.credit_time_utc,
        next_credit_at=next_credit_at,
        is_active=1 if body.is_active else 0,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(schedule)
    session.commit()
    model = InterestScheduleModel(
        id=schedule.id,
        deposit_account_id=schedule.deposit_account_id,
        credit_interval_days=schedule.credit_interval_days,
        credit_time_utc=schedule.credit_time_utc,
        next_credit_at=schedule.next_credit_at,
        is_active=to_bool(schedule.is_active),
        created_at=schedule.created_at,
        updated_at=schedule.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return InterestScheduleResponse(interest_schedule=model)

    body: UpdateInterestScheduleRequest = Body(...),

        if body.next_credit_at is not None:
            schedule.next_credit_at = body.next_credit_at
        if body.is_active is not None:
            schedule.is_active = 1 if body.is_active else 0
        schedule.updated_at = now
        session.commit()
    model = InterestScheduleModel(

        deposit_account_id=schedule.deposit_account_id if schedule is not None else 0,
        credit_interval_days=schedule.credit_interval_days if schedule is not None else 0,

        next_credit_at=schedule.next_credit_at if schedule is not None else None,

        created_at=schedule.created_at if schedule is not None else now,

    )
    session.close()
    return InterestScheduleResponse(interest_schedule=model)


@app.get(
    "/api/staking-pools",
    summary="List staking pools",
    description="Retrieve active staking pools filtered by asset, name, APY, and stake size",
    tags=["staking_pools"],
    operation_id="list_staking_pools",
    response_model=StakingPoolsListResponse,
)
async def list_staking_pools(
    asset_symbol: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter pools by underlying asset symbol", example="SOL"),
    pool_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by exact pool name", example="Harbor ETH Mainnet Pool"),
    min_pool_apy: Optional[float] = Query(None, description="Filter pools with pool_apy >= this value", example=5.0),
    max_min_stake_amount: Optional[float] = Query(None, description="Filter pools with min_stake_amount <= this value", example=10.0),
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Query(True, description="Filter by active status; default true", example=True),
) -> StakingPoolsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(StakingPool, Asset).join(Asset, StakingPool.asset_id == Asset.id)
    if asset_symbol is not None:
        query = query.filter(Asset.symbol == asset_symbol)
    if pool_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(StakingPool.pool_name == pool_name)
    if min_pool_apy is not None:
        query = query.filter(StakingPool.pool_apy >= min_pool_apy)
    if max_min_stake_amount is not None:
        query = query.filter(StakingPool.min_stake_amount <= max_min_stake_amount)
    if is_active is not None:
        query = query.filter(StakingPool.is_active == (1 if is_active else 0))
    rows = query.all()
    pools: List[StakingPoolModel] = []
    for sp, asset in rows:
        pools.append(
            StakingPoolModel(
                id=sp.id,
                asset_id=sp.asset_id,
                asset_symbol=asset.symbol,
                pool_name=sp.pool_name,
                chain=sp.chain,
                pool_apy=sp.pool_apy,
                min_stake_amount=sp.min_stake_amount,
                is_active=to_bool(sp.is_active),
                metadata_json=json_or_none(sp.metadata_json),
                created_at=sp.created_at,
                updated_at=sp.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return StakingPoolsListResponse(staking_pools=pools)


@app.patch(

                closed_at=sp.closed_at,
                created_at=sp.created_at,
                updated_at=sp.updated_at,

@app.post(
    "/api/staking-positions",
    summary="Create staking position from wallet",
    description="Create a staking position funded from wallet and record staking transaction",
    tags=["staking_positions", "transactions"],
    operation_id="create_staking_position_from_wallet",
    response_model=CreateStakingPositionResponse,
)
async def create_staking_position_from_wallet(
    body: CreateStakingPositionRequest = Body(...),
) -> CreateStakingPositionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    staking_pool = session.query(StakingPool).filter(StakingPool.id == body.staking_pool_id).first()
    asset_id_value = staking_pool.asset_id if staking_pool is not None else 0
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.id == asset_id_value).first()
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == body.wallet_id, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    position = StakingPosition(
        user_id=user_id,
        wallet_id=wallet.id if wallet is not None else body.wallet_id,
        staking_pool_id=body.staking_pool_id,
        asset_id=asset_id_value,
        staked_amount=body.amount,
        rewards_accrued=0.0,
        status="active",
        opened_at=now,
        closed_at=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(position)
    if wallet is not None and asset is not None:
        wb = (
            session.query(WalletBalance)
            .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == wallet.id, WalletBalance.asset_id == asset.id)
            .first()
        )
        if wb is None:
            wb = WalletBalance(wallet_id=wallet.id, asset_id=asset.id, balance=0.0, updated_at=now)
            session.add(wb)
        wb.balance = wb.balance - body.amount
        wb.updated_at = now
    tx = Transaction(
        user_id=user_id,
        tx_type="staking_stake",
        asset_id=asset_id_value,
        amount=body.amount,
        wallet_id_from=wallet.id if wallet is not None else body.wallet_id,
        wallet_id_to=None,
        deposit_account_id=None,
        staking_position_id=None,
        reference_id=body.reference_id,
        occurred_at=now,
        metadata_json=json.dumps(body.metadata_json) if body.metadata_json is not None else None,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    session.commit()
    tx.staking_position_id = position.id
    session.commit()
    asset_symbol_value = asset.symbol if asset is not None else ""
    pos_part = CreateStakingPositionPositionPart(
        id=position.id,
        user_id=position.user_id,
        wallet_id=position.wallet_id,
        staking_pool_id=position.staking_pool_id,
        asset_id=position.asset_id,
        asset_symbol=asset_symbol_value,
        staked_amount=position.staked_amount,
        rewards_accrued=position.rewards_accrued,
        status=position.status,
        opened_at=position.opened_at,
        created_at=position.created_at,
        updated_at=position.updated_at,
    )
    tx_part = CreateStakingPositionTransactionPart(
        id=tx.id,
        tx_type=tx.tx_type,
        amount=tx.amount,
        wallet_id_from=tx.wallet_id_from,
        staking_position_id=position.id,
        occurred_at=tx.occurred_at,
        metadata_json=json_or_none(tx.metadata_json),
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateStakingPositionResponse(staking_position=pos_part, transaction=tx_part)


@app.post(
    "/api/staking-positions/{position_id}/partial-unstake",
    summary="Partially unstake position",
    description="Unstake a portion of a staking position and credit wallet with transaction",
    tags=["staking_positions", "transactions"],
    operation_id="partial_unstake_position",
    response_model=PartialUnstakeResponse,
)
async def partial_unstake_position(
    position_id: int = Path(..., description="Staking position ID to partially unstake", example=120),
    body: PartialUnstakeRequest = Body(...),
) -> PartialUnstakeResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    position = session.query(StakingPosition).filter(StakingPosition.id == position_id, StakingPosition.user_id == user_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if position is None:
        pos_part = PartialUnstakePositionPart(id=position_id, staked_amount=0.0, status="active", updated_at=now)
        tx_part = PartialUnstakeTransactionPart(
            id=0,
            tx_type="staking_unstake",
            amount=body.unstake_amount,
            wallet_id_to=body.payout_wallet_id,
            staking_position_id=position_id,
            occurred_at=now,
            metadata_json=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return PartialUnstakeResponse(staking_position=pos_part, transaction=tx_part)
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.id == position.asset_id).first()
    payout_wallet_id = body.payout_wallet_id if body.payout_wallet_id is not None else position.wallet_id
    wallet = session.query(Wallet).filter(Wallet.id == payout_wallet_id, Wallet.user_id == user_id).first()
    position.staked_amount = position.staked_amount - body.unstake_amount
    if position.staked_amount < 0:
        position.staked_amount = 0.0
    position.updated_at = now
    if wallet is not None and asset is not None:
        wb = (
            session.query(WalletBalance)
            .filter(WalletBalance.wallet_id == wallet.id, WalletBalance.asset_id == asset.id)
            .first()
        )
        if wb is None:
            wb = WalletBalance(wallet_id=wallet.id, asset_id=asset.id, balance=0.0, updated_at=now)
            session.add(wb)
        wb.balance = wb.balance + body.unstake_amount
        wb.updated_at = now
    tx = Transaction(
        user_id=user_id,
        tx_type="staking_unstake",
        asset_id=position.asset_id,
        amount=body.unstake_amount,
        wallet_id_from=None,
        wallet_id_to=wallet.id if wallet is not None else payout_wallet_id,
        deposit_account_id=None,
        staking_position_id=position.id,
        reference_id=body.reference_id,
        occurred_at=now,
        metadata_json=None,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    session.commit()
    pos_part = PartialUnstakePositionPart(
        id=position.id,
        staked_amount=position.staked_amount,
        status=position.status,
        updated_at=position.updated_at,
    )
    tx_part = PartialUnstakeTransactionPart(
        id=tx.id,
        tx_type=tx.tx_type,
        amount=tx.amount,
        wallet_id_to=tx.wallet_id_to,
        staking_position_id=position.id,
        occurred_at=tx.occurred_at,
        metadata_json=json_or_none(tx.metadata_json),
    )
    session.close()
    return PartialUnstakeResponse(staking_position=pos_part, transaction=tx_part)

@app.get(
    "/api/staking-positions/with-upcoming-maintenance",
    summary="Positions with upcoming maintenance",
    description="Return active staking positions whose pools have upcoming maintenance windows",
    tags=["staking_positions", "maintenance"],
    operation_id="find_positions_with_upcoming_maintenance",
    response_model=PositionsWithUpcomingMaintenanceResponse,
)
async def find_positions_with_upcoming_maintenance(
    within_hours: Optional[int] = Query(48, description="Look ahead window in hours; default 48", example=48)
) -> PositionsWithUpcomingMaintenanceResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    future = now + timedelta(hours=within_hours)
    positions_db = session.query(StakingPosition, Asset).join(Asset, StakingPosition.asset_id == Asset.id).filter(
        StakingPosition.user_id == user_id, StakingPosition.status == "active"
    ).all()
    pool_ids = list({p.staking_pool_id for p, _ in positions_db})
    windows_db = (
        session.query(MaintenanceWindow)
        .filter(MaintenanceWindow.staking_pool_id.in_(pool_ids))
        .filter(MaintenanceWindow.start_time < future)
        .filter(MaintenanceWindow.end_time > now)
        .all()
    )
    by_pool: Dict[int, List[MaintenanceWindow]] = {}
    for mw in windows_db:
        by_pool.setdefault(mw.staking_pool_id, []).append(mw)
    result_positions: List[PositionWithMaintenanceModel] = []
    for pos, asset in positions_db:
        windows_for_pool = by_pool.get(pos.staking_pool_id, [])
        if len(windows_for_pool) == 0:
            continue
        windows_models: List[PositionMaintenanceWindowMiniModel] = []
        for mw in windows_for_pool:
            windows_models.append(
                PositionMaintenanceWindowMiniModel(
                    id=mw.id,
                    start_time=mw.start_time,
                    end_time=mw.end_time,
                    description=mw.description,
                )
            )
        result_positions.append(
            PositionWithMaintenanceModel(
                staking_position_id=pos.id,
                staking_pool_id=pos.staking_pool_id,
                asset_symbol=asset.symbol,
                staked_amount=pos.staked_amount,
                maintenance_windows=windows_models,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return PositionsWithUpcomingMaintenanceResponse(within_hours=within_hours, positions=result_positions)


@app.get(
    "/api/price-history",
    summary="Get price history",
    description="Fetch price history records for an asset pair between two dates",
    tags=["price_history"],
    operation_id="get_price_history",
    response_model=PriceHistoryResponse,
)
async def get_price_history(
    asset_symbol: str = Query(..., description="Base asset symbol", example="BTC"),
    quote_asset_symbol: str = Query(..., description="Quote asset symbol", example="USDT"),
    start_time: datetime = Query(..., description="Inclusive start time for price_time", example="2024-07-01T00:00:00Z"),
    end_time: datetime = Query(..., description="Exclusive end time for price_time", example="2024-12-31T00:00:00Z"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(180, description="Max number of price points to return", example=180),
) -> PriceHistoryResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    base_asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.symbol == asset_symbol).first()
    quote_asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.symbol == quote_asset_symbol).first()
    prices: List[PricePointModel] = []
    if base_asset is not None and quote_asset is not None:
        query = (
            session.query(PriceHistory)
            .filter(PriceHistory.asset_id == base_asset.id, PriceHistory.quote_asset_id == quote_asset.id)
            .filter(PriceHistory.price_time >= start_time)
            .filter(PriceHistory.price_time < end_time)
            .order_by(PriceHistory.price_time)
            .limit(limit)
        )
        rows = query.all()
        for ph in rows:
            prices.append(
                PricePointModel(
                    price_time=ph.price_time,
                    price=ph.price,
                    source=ph.source,
                )
            )
    session.close()
    return PriceHistoryResponse(asset_symbol=asset_symbol, quote_asset_symbol=quote_asset_symbol, prices=prices)


@app.post(
    "/api/projected-yield",
    summary="Calculate projected yield",
    description="Compute and store projected yield request for deposit or staking context",
    tags=["projected_yield"],
    operation_id="create_projected_yield_request",
    response_model=ProjectedYieldRequestResponse,
)
async def create_projected_yield_request(
    body: CreateProjectedYieldRequest = Body(...),
) -> ProjectedYieldRequestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    asset = session.query(Asset).filter(Asset.symbol == body.asset_symbol).first()
    if asset is None:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        asset = Asset(symbol=body.asset_symbol, name=body.asset_symbol, risk_tier=None, is_active=1, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(asset)
        session.commit()
    projected_apy_value: Optional[float] = None
    if body.context_type == "deposit" and body.context_id is not None:
        dp = session.query(DepositProduct).filter(DepositProduct.id == body.context_id).first()
        if dp is not None:
            projected_apy_value = dp.base_apy
    if body.context_type == "staking" and body.context_id is not None:
        sp = session.query(StakingPool).filter(StakingPool.id == body.context_id).first()
        if sp is not None:
            projected_apy_value = sp.pool_apy
    if projected_apy_value is None:
        projected_apy_value = 0.0
    projected_yield_amount_value = body.principal_amount * projected_apy_value * (body.duration_days / 365.0) / 100.0
    api_details = {
        "method": "simple",
        "projected_apy": projected_apy_value,
        "duration_days": body.duration_days,
    }
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    req = ProjectedYieldRequest(
        user_id=user_id,
        context_type=body.context_type,
        context_id=body.context_id,
        asset_id=asset.id,
        principal_amount=body.principal_amount,
        duration_days=body.duration_days,
        projected_apy=projected_apy_value,
        projected_yield_amount=projected_yield_amount_value,
        api_response_json=json.dumps(api_details),
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(req)
    session.commit()
    model = ProjectedYieldRequestModel(
        id=req.id,
        user_id=req.user_id,
        context_type=req.context_type,
        context_id=req.context_id,
        asset_id=req.asset_id,
        asset_symbol=asset.symbol,
        principal_amount=req.principal_amount,
        duration_days=req.duration_days,
        projected_apy=req.projected_apy,
        projected_yield_amount=req.projected_yield_amount,
        api_response_json=json_or_none(req.api_response_json),
        created_at=req.created_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return ProjectedYieldRequestResponse(projected_yield_request=model)

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/onboardly_hr_new_hire_portal.db")

engine = create_engine(database_url, future=True)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, expire_on_commit=False, autoflush=False, autocommit=False)

    employee_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("employees.id"), nullable=False, unique=True)
