    account_number = Column(String, nullable=False)
    routing_number = Column(String, nullable=False)
    payment_method = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime)


class DocumentRequest(Base):
    __tablename__ = "document_requests"

class EquipmentRequest(Base):

class TrainingModule(Base):

class EmployeeTrainingAssignment(Base):

class EmployeeTrainingCompletion(Base):

async def create_job_offer(

    job_offer = JobOffer(

        created_by_user_id=1,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=None,
    )
    session.add(job_offer)

    session.refresh(job_offer)
    session.close()
    start_date_str = None
    if job_offer.start_date is not None:
        start_date_str = job_offer.start_date.isoformat()
    job_offer_out = JobOfferOut(
        id=job_offer.id,
        company_id=job_offer.company_id,
        candidate_id=job_offer.candidate_id,
        role_title=job_offer.role_title,
        location=job_offer.location,
        compensation_summary=job_offer.compensation_summary,

        created_by_user_id=job_offer.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=job_offer.created_at,
        updated_at=job_offer.updated_at,

    return JobOfferResponse(job_offer=job_offer_out)

@app.patch(
    "/api/employee_onboarding_tasks/{assignment_id}",
    summary="Update status or completion of an assigned onboarding task",
    description="Partially update employee_onboarding_tasks, e.g. marking task completed.",
    tags=["employee_onboarding_tasks"],
    operation_id="update_employee_onboarding_task",
    response_model=EmployeeOnboardingTaskResponse,
)
async def update_employee_onboarding_task(
    assignment_id: int = Path(..., description="Employee onboarding task assignment id", example=30),
    payload: EmployeeOnboardingTaskUpdateRequest = Body(..., description="Employee onboarding task update payload"),
) -> EmployeeOnboardingTaskResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    assignment = session.query(EmployeeOnboardingTask).filter(EmployeeOnboardingTask.id == assignment_id).first()
    if assignment is not None:
        if payload.status is not None:
            assignment.status = payload.status
        if payload.completion_timestamp is not None:
            if payload.completion_timestamp == "":
                assignment.completion_timestamp = None
            else:
                assignment.completion_timestamp = datetime.fromisoformat(payload.completion_timestamp)
        if payload.due_date is not None:
            if payload.due_date == "":
                assignment.due_date = None
            else:
                assignment.due_date = datetime.strptime(payload.due_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
        assignment.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(assignment)
    session.close()
    if assignment is None:
        assignment_out = EmployeeOnboardingTaskOut(
            id=0,
            employee_id=0,
            onboarding_task_id=0,
            due_date=None,
            status="",
            completion_timestamp=None,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        return EmployeeOnboardingTaskResponse(employee_onboarding_task=assignment_out)
    due_date_str = None
    if assignment.due_date is not None:
        due_date_str = assignment.due_date.isoformat()
    assignment_out = EmployeeOnboardingTaskOut(
        id=assignment.id,
        employee_id=assignment.employee_id,
        onboarding_task_id=assignment.onboarding_task_id,
        due_date=due_date_str,
        status=assignment.status,
        completion_timestamp=assignment.completion_timestamp,
        created_at=assignment.created_at,
        updated_at=assignment.updated_at,
    )
    return EmployeeOnboardingTaskResponse(employee_onboarding_task=assignment_out)


@app.get(
    "/api/employee_personal_details/me",
    summary="Get personal details for the current user’s employee record",
    description="Retrieve employee_personal_details for the employee linked to user_id=1.",
    tags=["employee_personal_details", "me"],
    operation_id="get_my_personal_details",
    response_model=EmployeePersonalDetailResponse,
)
async def get_my_personal_details() -> EmployeePersonalDetailResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    employee = session.query(Employee).filter(Employee.user_id == 1).first()
    if employee is None:
        session.close()
        return EmployeePersonalDetailResponse(personal_details=None)
    details = session.query(EmployeePersonalDetail).filter(EmployeePersonalDetail.employee_id == employee.id).first()
    session.close()
    if details is None:
        return EmployeePersonalDetailResponse(personal_details=None)
    details_out = EmployeePersonalDetailOut(
        id=details.id,
        employee_id=details.employee_id,
        full_name=details.full_name,
        preferred_name=details.preferred_name,
        date_of_birth=details.date_of_birth.isoformat() if details.date_of_birth is not None else None,
        home_address=details.home_address,
        phone_number=details.phone_number,
        created_at=details.created_at,
        updated_at=details.updated_at,
    )
    return EmployeePersonalDetailResponse(personal_details=details_out)

)
async def create_document_request(
    payload: DocumentRequestCreateRequest = Body(..., description="Document request creation payload")
) -> DocumentRequestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    expiration_date_value = None
    if payload.expiration_date is not None and payload.expiration_date != "":

    request_row = DocumentRequest(
        employee_id=payload.employee_id,

        status=payload.status,
        expiration_date=expiration_date_value,
        requested_by_user_id=1,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=None,
    )
    session.add(request_row)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(request_row)
    session.close()
    expiration_date_str = None
    if request_row.expiration_date is not None:
        expiration_date_str = request_row.expiration_date.isoformat()
    out = DocumentRequestOut(
        id=request_row.id,
        employee_id=request_row.employee_id,
        document_type=request_row.document_type,
        status=request_row.status,
        expiration_date=expiration_date_str,
        requested_by_user_id=request_row.requested_by_user_id,

        updated_at=request_row.updated_at,
    )
    return DocumentRequestResponse(document_request=out)

)
async def list_document_requests(
    employee_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by employee_id", example=3177),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by status", example="pending"),
    document_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by document_type", example="Professional Certification (AWS)"),
) -> DocumentRequestsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(DocumentRequest)
    if employee_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(DocumentRequest.employee_id == employee_id)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(DocumentRequest.status == status)
    if document_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(DocumentRequest.document_type == document_type)
    rows = query.all()
    out_list: List[DocumentRequestOut] = []
    for row in rows:
        expiration_date_str = None
        if row.expiration_date is not None:
            expiration_date_str = row.expiration_date.isoformat()
        out_list.append(

                employee_id=row.employee_id,

                status=row.status,

                requested_by_user_id=row.requested_by_user_id,

                updated_at=row.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()

@app.patch(
    "/api/document_requests/{request_id}",
    summary="Update fields of a document request",
    description="Partially update document_requests status or expiration_date.",
    tags=["document_requests"],
    operation_id="update_document_request",
    response_model=DocumentRequestResponse,
)
async def update_document_request(
    request_id: int = Path(..., description="Document request id to update", example=11),
    payload: DocumentRequestUpdateRequest = Body(..., description="Document request update payload"),
) -> DocumentRequestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    request_row = session.query(DocumentRequest).filter(DocumentRequest.id == request_id).first()
    if request_row is not None:
        if payload.status is not None:
            request_row.status = payload.status
        if payload.expiration_date is not None:
            if payload.expiration_date == "":
                request_row.expiration_date = None
            else:
                request_row.expiration_date = datetime.strptime(payload.expiration_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
        request_row.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(request_row)
    session.close()
    if request_row is None:
        out = DocumentRequestOut(
            id=0,
            employee_id=0,
            document_type="",
            status="",
            expiration_date=None,
            requested_by_user_id=None,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        return DocumentRequestResponse(document_request=out)
    expiration_date_str = None
    if request_row.expiration_date is not None:
        expiration_date_str = request_row.expiration_date.isoformat()
    out = DocumentRequestOut(
        id=request_row.id,
        employee_id=request_row.employee_id,
        document_type=request_row.document_type,
        status=request_row.status,
        expiration_date=expiration_date_str,
        requested_by_user_id=request_row.requested_by_user_id,
        created_at=request_row.created_at,
        updated_at=request_row.updated_at,
    )
    return DocumentRequestResponse(document_request=out)

    payload: EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentCreateRequest = Body(..., description="Employee policy acknowledgment creation payload")
) -> EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    acknowledged_at_value = datetime.fromisoformat(payload.acknowledged_at)
    ack = EmployeePolicyAcknowledgment(
        employee_id=payload.employee_id,
        policy_id=payload.policy_id,
        status=payload.status,
        acknowledged_at=acknowledged_at_value,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=None,
    )
    session.add(ack)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(ack)
    session.close()
    ack_out = EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentOut(
        id=ack.id,
        employee_id=ack.employee_id,
        policy_id=ack.policy_id,
        status=ack.status,
        acknowledged_at=ack.acknowledged_at,
        created_at=ack.created_at,
        updated_at=ack.updated_at,
    )
    return EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentResponse(policy_acknowledgment=ack_out)


@app.get(
    "/api/employee_policy_acknowledgments",
    summary="List policy acknowledgments for employees",
    description="Retrieve employee_policy_acknowledgments; filter by employee or policy.",
    tags=["employee_policy_acknowledgments"],
    operation_id="list_employee_policy_acknowledgments",
    response_model=EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentsListResponse,
)
async def list_employee_policy_acknowledgments(
    employee_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter acknowledgments by employee_id", example=1876),
    policy_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by policy_id", example=4),
) -> EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(EmployeePolicyAcknowledgment)
    if employee_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(EmployeePolicyAcknowledgment.employee_id == employee_id)
    if policy_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(EmployeePolicyAcknowledgment.policy_id == policy_id)
    rows = query.all()
    session.close()
    return EmployeePolicyAcknowledgmentsListResponse(policy_acknowledgments=rows)

@app.get(
    "/api/brands",
    summary="List brands for current user",
    description="Retrieve all brands where owner_user_id is the current authenticated user.",
    tags=["brands"],
    operation_id="list_brands_for_current_user",
    response_model=BrandsListResponse,
)
async def list_brands_for_current_user() -> BrandsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    brands = session.query(Brand).filter(Brand.owner_user_id == 1).all()
    result = BrandsListResponse(brands=brands)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.post(
    "/api/brands",
    summary="Create brand for current user",
    description="Create a brand owned by the current authenticated user with a unique name.",
    tags=["brands"],
    operation_id="create_brand_for_current_user",
    response_model=BrandCreateResponse,
)
async def create_brand_for_current_user(payload: BrandCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> BrandCreateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    owner = session.query(User).filter(User.id == 1).first()
    if owner is None:
        owner = User(id=1, username="owner1", email="owner1@example.com", full_name="Owner One")
        session.add(owner)
        session.commit()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    brand = Brand(owner_user_id=1, name=payload.name, created_at=now, updated_at=None)
    session.add(brand)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(brand)
    response = BrandCreateResponse(brand=brand)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.post(
    "/api/members",
    summary="Create or get member by email",
    description="Create a new member or return existing member with same email.",
    tags=["members"],
    operation_id="create_or_get_member",
    response_model=MemberCreateResponse,
)
async def create_or_get_member(payload: MemberCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> MemberCreateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    member = session.query(Member).filter(Member.email == payload.email).first()
    was_created = False
    if member is None:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        member = Member(
            full_name=payload.full_name,
            email=payload.email,
            country_code=payload.country_code,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.add(member)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(member)
        was_created = True
    member_out = MemberCreateResponseMember(
        id=member.id,
        full_name=member.full_name,
        email=member.email,
        country_code=member.country_code,
        created_at=member.created_at,
        updated_at=member.updated_at,
        was_created=was_created,
    )
    response = MemberCreateResponse(member=member_out)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.post(
    "/api/member_accounts",
    summary="Create member account for program",
    description="Create member account record linking a member to a program.",
    tags=["member_accounts"],
    operation_id="create_member_account",
    response_model=MemberAccountCreateResponse,
)
async def create_member_account(payload: MemberAccountCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> MemberAccountCreateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    member = session.query(Member).filter(Member.id == payload.member_id).first()
    program = session.query(LoyaltyProgram).join(Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id).filter(
        LoyaltyProgram.id == payload.program_id, Brand.owner_user_id == 1
    ).first()
    tier = None
    if payload.current_tier_id is not None:
        tier = session.query(ProgramTier).filter(
            ProgramTier.id == payload.current_tier_id, ProgramTier.program_id == payload.program_id
        ).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    account = MemberAccount(
        member_id=payload.member_id,
        program_id=payload.program_id,
        join_date=payload.join_date,
        status=payload.status,
        current_points_balance=payload.current_points_balance if payload.current_points_balance is not None else 0,
        current_tier_id=payload.current_tier_id,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=None,
    )
    session.add(account)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(account)
    response = MemberAccountCreateResponse(member_account=account)
    session.close()
    return response

) -> MemberAccountGetResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    account = session.query(MemberAccount).join(
        LoyaltyProgram, MemberAccount.program_id == LoyaltyProgram.id
    ).join(
        Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id
    ).filter(
        MemberAccount.id == member_account_id,
        Brand.owner_user_id == 1,
    ).first()
    member = account.member
    account_with_member = MemberAccountWithMemberModel(
        id=account.id,
        member_id=account.member_id,
        program_id=account.program_id,
        join_date=account.join_date,
        status=account.status,
        current_points_balance=account.current_points_balance,
        current_tier_id=account.current_tier_id,
        created_at=account.created_at,
        updated_at=account.updated_at,
        member=MemberModel(
            id=member.id,
            full_name=member.full_name,
            email=member.email,
            country_code=member.country_code,
            created_at=member.created_at,
            updated_at=member.updated_at,
        ),
    )
    response = MemberAccountGetResponse(member_account=account_with_member)

    return response

@app.patch(
    "/api/member_accounts/{member_account_id}",
    summary="Update member account",
    description="Update mutable fields like status, points balance, or tier for a member account.",
    tags=["member_accounts"],
    operation_id="update_member_account",
    response_model=MemberAccountUpdateResponse,
)
async def update_member_account(
    member_account_id: int = Path(..., description="Member account ID", example=1023),
    payload: MemberAccountUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> MemberAccountUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    account = session.query(MemberAccount).join(
        LoyaltyProgram, MemberAccount.program_id == LoyaltyProgram.id
    ).join(
        Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id
    ).filter(
        MemberAccount.id == member_account_id,
        Brand.owner_user_id == 1,
    ).first()
    if payload.status is not None:
        account.status = payload.status
    if payload.current_points_balance is not None:
        account.current_points_balance = payload.current_points_balance

@app.get(
    "/api/orders/{order_id}/applicable_earn_rules",
    summary="List applicable purchase earn rules",
    description="Get purchase-type earn rules applicable to given order at its date.",
    tags=["orders", "earn_rules"],
    operation_id="list_applicable_purchase_earn_rules_for_order",
    response_model=PurchaseEarnRulesForOrderResponse,
)
async def list_applicable_purchase_earn_rules_for_order(
    order_id: int = Path(..., description="Internal order row ID", example=501)
) -> PurchaseEarnRulesForOrderResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    order = session.query(Order).join(
        LoyaltyProgram, Order.program_id == LoyaltyProgram.id
    ).join(
        Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id
    ).filter(
        Order.id == order_id,
        Brand.owner_user_id == 1,
    ).first()
    order_date_only = order.order_date.date()
    query = session.query(EarnRule).filter(
        EarnRule.program_id == order.program_id,
        EarnRule.rule_type == "purchase",
        EarnRule.is_active == 1,
        EarnRule.valid_from <= order_date_only,
    ).filter(
        (EarnRule.valid_to == None) | (EarnRule.valid_to >= order_date_only)
    )
    rules = query.all()
    applicable: List[PurchaseEarnRuleForOrderModel] = []
    for r in rules:
        if r.min_order_amount is not None and order.order_amount < r.min_order_amount:
            continue
        if r.currency_code is not None and r.currency_code != order.currency_code:
            continue
        applicable.append(
            PurchaseEarnRuleForOrderModel(
                id=r.id,
                program_id=r.program_id,
                name=r.name,
                rule_type=r.rule_type,
                points_per_currency_unit=r.points_per_currency_unit,
                currency_code=r.currency_code,
                min_order_amount=r.min_order_amount,
                valid_from=r.valid_from,
                valid_to=r.valid_to,
            )
        )
    response = PurchaseEarnRulesForOrderResponse(earn_rules=applicable)
    session.close()
    return response

) -> AvailableRewardsForMemberResponse:

            )

    )
    session.close()

@app.post(
    "/api/points_transactions",
    summary="Create points transaction",
    description="Insert a points transaction and optionally update balance_after_transaction.",
    tags=["points_transactions"],
    operation_id="create_points_transaction",
    response_model=PointsTransactionCreateResponse,
)
async def create_points_transaction(
    payload: PointsTransactionCreateRequest = Body(...)
) -> PointsTransactionCreateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    account = session.query(MemberAccount).join(
        LoyaltyProgram, MemberAccount.program_id == LoyaltyProgram.id
    ).join(
        Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id
    ).filter(
        MemberAccount.id == payload.member_account_id,
        MemberAccount.program_id == payload.program_id,
        Brand.owner_user_id == 1,
    ).first()
    current_balance = account.current_points_balance
    delta = (payload.points_earned if payload.points_earned is not None else 0) - (payload.points_debited if payload.points_debited is not None else 0)
    new_balance = current_balance + delta
    balance_after = payload.balance_after_transaction if payload.balance_after_transaction is not None else new_balance
    expiry = payload.expiry_date
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    tx = PointsTransaction(
        member_account_id=payload.member_account_id,
        program_id=payload.program_id,
        transaction_date=payload.transaction_date,
        transaction_type=payload.transaction_type,
        source_type=payload.source_type,
        source_id=payload.source_id,
        earn_rule_id=payload.earn_rule_id,
        reward_id=payload.reward_id,
        points_earned=payload.points_earned if payload.points_earned is not None else 0,
        points_debited=payload.points_debited if payload.points_debited is not None else 0,
        balance_after_transaction=balance_after,
        expiry_date=expiry,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=None,
    )
    session.add(tx)
    account.current_points_balance = balance_after
    account.updated_at = now
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(tx)
    response = PointsTransactionCreateResponse(points_transaction=tx)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/member_accounts/{member_account_id}/points_ledger",
    summary="Get member points ledger",
    description="Return transactions and summary stats for a member account within a date range.",
    tags=["points_transactions", "member_accounts", "analytics"],
    operation_id="get_member_points_ledger",
    response_model=PointsLedgerResponse,
)
async def get_member_points_ledger(
    member_account_id: int = Path(..., description="Member account ID", example=2045),
    from_date: date = Query(..., description="Start date for ledger filter (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-01-01"),
    to_date: date = Query(..., description="End date for ledger filter (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-06-30"),
) -> PointsLedgerResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    account = session.query(MemberAccount).join(
        LoyaltyProgram, MemberAccount.program_id == LoyaltyProgram.id
    ).join(
        Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id
    ).filter(
        MemberAccount.id == member_account_id,
        Brand.owner_user_id == 1,
    ).first()
    start_dt = datetime.combine(from_date, datetime.min.time())
    end_dt = datetime.combine(to_date, datetime.max.time())
    transactions = session.query(PointsTransaction).filter(
        PointsTransaction.member_account_id == member_account_id,
        PointsTransaction.transaction_date >= start_dt,
        PointsTransaction.transaction_date <= end_dt,
    ).order_by(PointsTransaction.transaction_date.asc()).all()
    tx_models: List[PointsLedgerTransactionModel] = []
    total_earned = 0
    total_debited = 0
    for t in transactions:
        total_earned += t.points_earned
        total_debited += t.points_debited
        tx_models.append(
            PointsLedgerTransactionModel(
                id=t.id,
                transaction_date=t.transaction_date,
                transaction_type=t.transaction_type,
                source_type=t.source_type,
                source_id=t.source_id,
                earn_rule_id=t.earn_rule_id,
                reward_id=t.reward_id,
                points_earned=t.points_earned,
                points_debited=t.points_debited,
                balance_after_transaction=t.balance_after_transaction,
                expiry_date=t.expiry_date,
            )
        )
    today = date.today()
    next_30 = today + timedelta(days=30)
    expiring_points = 0
    earn_txs = session.query(PointsTransaction).filter(
        PointsTransaction.member_account_id == member_account_id,
        PointsTransaction.points_earned > 0,
        PointsTransaction.expiry_date != None,
        PointsTransaction.expiry_date >= today,
        PointsTransaction.expiry_date <= next_30,
    ).all()
    for t in earn_txs:
        expiring_points += t.points_earned
    summary = PointsLedgerSummaryModel(
        total_points_earned=total_earned,
        total_points_redeemed=total_debited,
        points_expiring_next_30_days=expiring_points,
    )
    response = PointsLedgerResponse(member_account_id=member_account_id, transactions=tx_models, summary=summary)
    session.close()
    return response

    session.refresh(history)
    response = TierHistoryCreateResponse(tier_history=history)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/programs/{program_id}/tier_progression_analysis",
    summary="Analyze tier progression",
    description="Aggregate tier history and points transactions to analyze tier movements.",
    tags=["analytics", "tier_history"],
    operation_id="get_tier_progression_analysis",
    response_model=TierProgressionAnalysisResponse,
)
async def get_tier_progression_analysis(
    program_id: int = Path(..., description="Program ID to analyze", example=5),
    from_date: date = Query(..., description="Start date for analysis window (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-04-01"),
    to_date: date = Query(..., description="End date for analysis window (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-06-30"),
) -> TierProgressionAnalysisResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    program = session.query(LoyaltyProgram).join(Brand, LoyaltyProgram.brand_id == Brand.id).filter(
        LoyaltyProgram.id == program_id,
        Brand.owner_user_id == 1,
    ).first()
    start_dt = datetime.combine(from_date, datetime.min.time())
    end_dt = datetime.combine(to_date, datetime.max.time())
    histories = session.query(TierHistory).filter(
        TierHistory.program_id == program_id,
        TierHistory.change_date >= start_dt,
        TierHistory.change_date <= end_dt,
    ).all()
    tier_names: Dict[int, str] = {}
    tiers = session.query(ProgramTier).filter(ProgramTier.program_id == program_id).all()
    for t in tiers:
        tier_names[t.id] = t.name
    tx_by_id: Dict[int, PointsTransaction] = {}
    earn_rule_types: Dict[int, str] = {}
    movements_map: Dict[str, int] = {}
    for h in histories:
        from_name = tier_names.get(h.previous_tier_id) if h.previous_tier_id is not None else None
        to_name = tier_names.get(h.new_tier_id) if h.new_tier_id is not None else None
        earn_type = None
        if h.source_type == "points_transaction" and h.source_id is not None:
            tx = tx_by_id.get(h.source_id)
            if tx is None:
                tx = session.query(PointsTransaction).filter(
                    PointsTransaction.id == h.source_id,
                    PointsTransaction.program_id == program_id,
                ).first()
                if tx is not None:
                    tx_by_id[h.source_id] = tx
            if tx is not None and tx.earn_rule_id is not None:
                et = earn_rule_types.get(tx.earn_rule_id)
                if et is None:
                    er = session.query(EarnRule).filter(
                        EarnRule.id == tx.earn_rule_id,
                        EarnRule.program_id == program_id,
                    ).first()
                    if er is not None:
                        earn_rule_types[tx.earn_rule_id] = er.rule_type
                        et = er.rule_type
                earn_type = et
        key = f"{from_name}|{to_name}|{h.source_type}|{earn_type}"
        count = movements_map.get(key, 0)
        movements_map[key] = count + 1
    movements: List[TierProgressionMovementModel] = []
    for key, count in movements_map.items():
        parts = key.split("|")
        movements.append(
            TierProgressionMovementModel(
                from_tier_name=parts[0] if parts[0] != "None" else None,
                to_tier_name=parts[1] if parts[1] != "None" else None,
                source_type=parts[2] if parts[2] != "None" else None,
                earn_rule_type=parts[3] if parts[3] != "None" else None,
                member_count=count,
            )
        )
    response = TierProgressionAnalysisResponse(
        program_id=program_id,
        from_date=from_date,
        to_date=to_date,
        movements=movements,
    )
    session.close()
    return response

    port = int(os.getenv("PORT", "8000"))
    uvicorn.run(app, host=host, port=port)

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH") or "sqlite:///outputs/databases/surveysprint_form_response_studio.db"

SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, autocommit=False)

@app.get(
    "/api/workspaces",
    summary="List workspaces for current user",
    description="Retrieve all workspaces owned by the authenticated user.",
    tags=["workspaces"],
    operation_id="list_workspaces",
    response_model=WorkspaceListResponse,
)
async def list_workspaces_endpoint(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter workspaces by exact name", example="Customer Research 2025")
) -> WorkspaceListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Workspace).filter(Workspace.owner_user_id == 1)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Workspace.name == name)
    workspaces = query.all()
    session.close()
    return WorkspaceListResponse(workspaces=workspaces)


@app.get(

@app.post(
    "/api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/forms",
    summary="Create a new form in a workspace",
    description="Create a form in the given workspace for user 1.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="create_form_in_workspace",
    response_model=FormModel,
)
async def create_form_in_workspace_endpoint(
    workspace_id: int = Path(..., description="Workspace ID where the form will be created", example=10),
    body: FormCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> FormModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    workspace = (
        session.query(Workspace)
        .filter(Workspace.id == workspace_id, Workspace.owner_user_id == 1)
        .first()
    )
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if body.is_anonymous is None:
        anon_flag = 0
    else:
        anon_flag = 1 if body.is_anonymous else 0
    form = Form(
        workspace_id=workspace.id if workspace is not None else workspace_id,
        title=body.title,
        description=body.description,
        is_anonymous=anon_flag,
        max_responses=body.max_responses,
        open_at=body.open_at,
        close_at=body.close_at,
        status="draft",
        created_by=1,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(form)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(form)
    session.close()
    return FormModel(
        id=form.id,
        workspace_id=form.workspace_id,
        title=form.title,
        description=form.description,
        is_anonymous=bool(form.is_anonymous),
        max_responses=form.max_responses,
        open_at=form.open_at,
        close_at=form.close_at,
        status=form.status,
        created_by=form.created_by,
        created_at=form.created_at,
        updated_at=form.updated_at,
    )


@app.get(
    "/api/forms",
    summary="List forms for current user",
    description="Retrieve forms in workspaces owned by user 1 with optional filters.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="list_forms_for_user",
    response_model=FormListResponse,
)
async def list_forms_for_user_endpoint(
    workspace_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by workspace ID", example=10),
    title: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by exact form title", example="Post-Purchase Satisfaction Survey"),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by form status", example="published"),
) -> FormListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = (
        session.query(Form)
        .join(Workspace, Form.workspace_id == Workspace.id)
        .filter(Workspace.owner_user_id == 1)
    )
    if workspace_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(Form.workspace_id == workspace_id)
    if title is not None:
        query = query.filter(Form.title == title)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Form.status == status)
    forms = query.all()
    result: List[FormModel] = []
    for f in forms:
        result.append(
            FormModel(
                id=f.id,
                workspace_id=f.workspace_id,
                title=f.title,
                description=f.description,
                is_anonymous=bool(f.is_anonymous),
                max_responses=f.max_responses,
                open_at=f.open_at,
                close_at=f.close_at,
                status=f.status,
                created_by=f.created_by,
                created_at=f.created_at,
                updated_at=f.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return FormListResponse(forms=result)

@app.patch(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}",
    summary="Update basic fields of a form",
    description="Partially update form metadata for a form owned by user 1.",
    tags=["forms"],
    operation_id="update_form",
    response_model=FormModel,
)
async def update_form_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID to update", example=100),
    body: FormUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> FormModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    form = (
        session.query(Form)
        .join(Workspace, Form.workspace_id == Workspace.id)
        .filter(Form.id == form_id, Workspace.owner_user_id == 1)
        .first()
    )
    if form is not None:
        if body.title is not None:
            form.title = body.title
        if body.description is not None:
            form.description = body.description
        if body.is_anonymous is not None:
            form.is_anonymous = 1 if body.is_anonymous else 0
        if body.max_responses is not None:
            form.max_responses = body.max_responses
        if body.open_at is not None:
            form.open_at = body.open_at
        if body.close_at is not None:
            form.close_at = body.close_at
        if body.status is not None:
            form.status = body.status
        form.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(form)
    session.close()
    if form is None:
        return FormModel(
            id=0,
            workspace_id=0,
            title="",
            description=None,
            is_anonymous=False,
            max_responses=None,
            open_at=None,
            close_at=None,
            status="draft",
            created_by=1,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
    return FormModel(
        id=form.id,
        workspace_id=form.workspace_id,
        title=form.title,
        description=form.description,
        is_anonymous=bool(form.is_anonymous),
        max_responses=form.max_responses,
        open_at=form.open_at,
        close_at=form.close_at,
        status=form.status,
        created_by=form.created_by,
        created_at=form.created_at,
        updated_at=form.updated_at,
    )

@app.post(

    session.refresh(question)
    session.close()
    return QuestionModel(
        id=question.id,
        form_id=question.form_id,

    )

    return QuestionOptionListResponse(options=options)

@app.get(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/analytics/questions",
    summary="Get per-question analytics for a form",
    description="Return aggregated metrics per question with optional filters.",
    tags=["analytics"],
    operation_id="get_form_question_analytics",
    response_model=FormQuestionAnalyticsResponse,
)
async def get_form_question_analytics_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID to compute analytics for", example=100),
    started_from: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Include responses started on/after this datetime", example="2026-01-05T00:00:00Z"),
    started_to: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="Include responses started on/before this datetime", example="2026-01-20T23:59:59Z"),
    device_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by respondent device_type", example="mobile"),
) -> FormQuestionAnalyticsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    form = (
        session.query(Form)
        .join(Workspace, Form.workspace_id == Workspace.id)
        .filter(Form.id == form_id, Workspace.owner_user_id == 1)
        .first()
    )
    responses_query = (
        session.query(Response)
        .filter(Response.form_id == form_id)
    )
    if started_from is not None:
        responses_query = responses_query.filter(Response.started_at >= started_from)
    if started_to is not None:
        responses_query = responses_query.filter(Response.started_at <= started_to)
    responses = responses_query.all()
    response_ids = [r.id for r in responses]
    respondent_ids = [r.respondent_id for r in responses]
    total_respondents = 0
    if respondent_ids:
        respondents_query = session.query(Respondent).filter(Respondent.id.in_(respondent_ids))
        if device_type is not None:
            respondents_query = respondents_query.filter(Respondent.device_type == device_type)
        respondents = respondents_query.all()
        filtered_respondent_ids = [resp.id for resp in respondents]
        total_respondents = len(filtered_respondent_ids)
        responses = [r for r in responses if r.respondent_id in filtered_respondent_ids]
        response_ids = [r.id for r in responses]
    questions = session.query(Question).filter(Question.form_id == form_id).all()
    items_by_question: Dict[int, List[ResponseItem]] = {}
    if response_ids:
        items = (
            session.query(ResponseItem)
            .filter(ResponseItem.response_id.in_(response_ids))
            .all()
        )
        for item in items:
            items_by_question.setdefault(item.question_id, []).append(item)
    analytics_items: List[AnalyticsQuestionItem] = []
    for q in questions:
        items_for_q = items_by_question.get(q.id, [])
        total_responses_for_q = len(items_for_q)
        completion_rate = 0.0
        if total_respondents > 0:
            completion_rate = total_responses_for_q / float(total_respondents)
        avg_rating: Optional[float] = None
        if q.question_type == "rating" and items_for_q:
            numbers = [i.value_number for i in items_for_q if i.value_number is not None]
            if numbers:
                avg_rating = sum(numbers) / float(len(numbers))
        analytics_items.append(
            AnalyticsQuestionItem(
                question_id=q.id,
                question_title=q.title,
                question_type=q.question_type,
                total_responses=total_responses_for_q,
                completion_rate=completion_rate,
                average_rating=avg_rating,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    filters_echo = AnalyticsFiltersEcho(
        started_from=started_from.isoformat() if started_from is not None else None,
        started_to=started_to.isoformat() if started_to is not None else None,
        device_type=device_type,
    )
    return FormQuestionAnalyticsResponse(
        form_id=form.id if form is not None else form_id,
        filters=filters_echo,
        questions=analytics_items,
    )


@app.get(
    "/api/forms/{form_id}/export/responses",
    summary="Export responses grouped by respondent",
    description="Export responses and items for a form as JSON grouped by respondent.",
    tags=["exports"],
    operation_id="export_form_responses_grouped",
    response_model=ExportFormResponsesResponse,
)
async def export_form_responses_grouped_endpoint(
    form_id: int = Path(..., description="Form ID whose responses are exported", example=100),
    completion_status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter respondents by completion_status", example="completed"),
    distribution_utm_source: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter to respondents whose distribution has this utm_source", example="order_confirmation_email"),
) -> ExportFormResponsesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    form = (
        session.query(Form)
        .join(Workspace, Form.workspace_id == Workspace.id)
        .filter(Form.id == form_id, Workspace.owner_user_id == 1)
        .first()
    )
    respondents_query = session.query(Respondent).filter(Respondent.form_id == form_id)
    if completion_status is not None:
        respondents_query = respondents_query.filter(Respondent.completion_status == completion_status)
    respondents = respondents_query.all()
    if distribution_utm_source is not None and respondents:
        dist_ids = [r.distribution_id for r in respondents if r.distribution_id is not None]
        if dist_ids:
            dists = (
                session.query(Distribution)
                .filter(Distribution.id.in_(dist_ids), Distribution.utm_source == distribution_utm_source)
                .all()
            )
            allowed_dist_ids = {d.id for d in dists}
            respondents = [r for r in respondents if r.distribution_id in allowed_dist_ids]
        else:
            respondents = []
    respondent_ids = [r.id for r in respondents]
    responses: List[Response] = []
    if respondent_ids:
        responses = (
            session.query(Response)
            .filter(Response.form_id == form_id, Response.respondent_id.in_(respondent_ids))
            .all()
        )
    response_ids = [resp.id for resp in responses]
    items: List[ResponseItem] = []
    if response_ids:
        items = (
            session.query(ResponseItem)
            .filter(ResponseItem.response_id.in_(response_ids))
            .all()
        )
    items_by_response: Dict[int, List[ResponseItem]] = {}
    for item in items:
        items_by_response.setdefault(item.response_id, []).append(item)
    responses_by_respondent: Dict[int, List[Response]] = {}
    for resp in responses:
        responses_by_respondent.setdefault(resp.respondent_id, []).append(resp)
    respondent_records: List[ExportRespondentRecord] = []
    for resp_obj in respondents:
        resp_responses = responses_by_respondent.get(resp_obj.id, [])
        response_records: List[ExportResponseRecord] = []
        for r in resp_responses:
            resp_items = items_by_response.get(r.id, [])
            item_records: List[ExportResponseItem] = []
            for it in resp_items:
                item_records.append(
                    ExportResponseItem(
                        item_id=it.id,
                        question_id=it.question_id,
                        option_id=it.option_id,
                        value_text=it.value_text,
                        value_number=it.value_number,
                        value_date=it.value_date,
                    )
                )
            response_records.append(
                ExportResponseRecord(
                    response_id=r.id,
                    started_at=r.started_at,
                    submitted_at=r.submitted_at,
                    items=item_records,
                )
            )
        respondent_records.append(
            ExportRespondentRecord(
                respondent_id=resp_obj.id,
                distribution_id=resp_obj.distribution_id,
                device_type=resp_obj.device_type,
                locale=resp_obj.locale,
                completion_status=resp_obj.completion_status,
                started_at=resp_obj.started_at,
                completed_at=resp_obj.completed_at,
                responses=response_records,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ExportFormResponsesResponse(
        form_id=form.id if form is not None else form_id,
        respondents=respondent_records,
    )

    port = int(os.getenv("PORT", "8000"))
    uvicorn.run(app, host=host, port=port)

CURRENT_USER_ID = 1

def get_current_user_and_org(session):
    user = session.query(User).filter(User.id == CURRENT_USER_ID).first()
    if user is None:
        org = Organization(name="Default Org", created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=datetime.utcnow())
        session.add(org)
        session.commit()
        user = User(organization_id=org.id, username="user1", email="user1@example.com", full_name="User One", created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=datetime.utcnow())
        session.add(user)
        session.commit()
    org = session.query(Organization).filter(Organization.id == user.organization_id).first()
    return user, org

@app.get(
    "/api/users",
    response_model=UserListResponseModel,
    summary="List organization users",
    description="Retrieve users in the current organization with optional department filter",
    tags=["users"],
    operation_id="list_users",
)
async def list_users(department_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter users belonging to a department with this name", example="Finance")) -> UserListResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    query = session.query(User).filter(User.organization_id == user.organization_id)
    if department_name is not None:
        dept = session.query(Department).filter(Department.organization_id == user.organization_id, Department.name == department_name).first()
        if dept is not None:
            user_ids = [ud.user_id for ud in session.query(UserDepartment).filter(UserDepartment.department_id == dept.id).all()]
            if user_ids:
                query = query.filter(User.id.in_(user_ids))
            else:
                query = query.filter(False)
        else:
            query = query.filter(False)
    items = query.all()
    response = UserListResponseModel(users=items)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.patch(
    "/api/policies/{policy_id}",
    response_model=PolicyModel,
    summary="Update policy attributes",
    description="Partially update policy attributes for a specific policy",
    tags=["policies"],
    operation_id="update_policy",
)
async def update_policy(
    policy_id: int = Path(..., description="Policy ID to update", example=100),
    body: PolicyUpdateBodyModel = Body(...),
) -> PolicyModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    policy = session.query(Policy).filter(Policy.organization_id == user.organization_id, Policy.id == policy_id).first()
    if policy is not None:
        if body.category is not None:
            policy.category = body.category
        if body.risk_level is not None:
            policy.risk_level = body.risk_level
        if body.review_cycle is not None:
            policy.review_cycle = body.review_cycle
        policy.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(policy)
    else:
        policy = Policy(
            organization_id=user.organization_id,
            name="",
            category=body.category or "",
            risk_level=body.risk_level,
            review_cycle=body.review_cycle,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
        session.add(policy)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(policy)
    response = PolicyModel.model_validate(policy)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.post(
    "/api/policies/{policy_id}/applicable-departments",
    response_model=PolicyApplicableDepartmentsResponseModel,
    summary="Set applicable departments for a policy",
    description="Replace all applicable departments for a policy with given IDs",
    tags=["policies", "policy_applicability"],
    operation_id="set_policy_applicable_departments",
)
async def set_policy_applicable_departments(
    policy_id: int = Path(..., description="Policy ID whose applicable departments to set", example=100),
    body: PolicyApplicableDepartmentsBodyModel = Body(...),
) -> PolicyApplicableDepartmentsResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    policy = session.query(Policy).filter(Policy.organization_id == user.organization_id, Policy.id == policy_id).first()
    if policy is not None:
        existing = session.query(PolicyApplicableDepartment).filter(PolicyApplicableDepartment.policy_id == policy_id).all()
        for e in existing:
            session.delete(e)
        for dep_id in body.department_ids:
            dept = session.query(Department).filter(Department.organization_id == user.organization_id, Department.id == dep_id).first()
            if dept is not None:
                pad = PolicyApplicableDepartment(policy_id=policy_id, department_id=dep_id)
                session.add(pad)
        session.commit()
    rows = session.query(PolicyApplicableDepartment).filter(PolicyApplicableDepartment.policy_id == policy_id).all()
    items = [PolicyApplicableDepartmentItemModel(department_id=r.department_id) for r in rows]
    response = PolicyApplicableDepartmentsResponseModel(policy_id=policy_id, applicable_departments=items)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.post(
    "/api/policies/{policy_id}/applicable-regions",

    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)

    if policy is not None:
        existing = session.query(PolicyApplicableRegion).filter(PolicyApplicableRegion.policy_id == policy_id).all()
        for e in existing:

        for reg_id in body.region_ids:
            reg = session.query(Region).filter(Region.organization_id == user.organization_id, Region.id == reg_id).first()
            if reg is not None:
                par = PolicyApplicableRegion(policy_id=policy_id, region_id=reg_id)
                session.add(par)
        session.commit()
    rows = session.query(PolicyApplicableRegion).filter(PolicyApplicableRegion.policy_id == policy_id).all()
    items = [PolicyApplicableRegionItemModel(region_id=r.region_id) for r in rows]
    response = PolicyApplicableRegionsResponseModel(policy_id=policy_id, applicable_regions=items)
    session.close()
    return response

async def create_policy_assignment(body: PolicyAssignmentCreateBodyModel = Body(...)) -> PolicyAssignmentModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    assignee = session.query(User).filter(User.id == body.user_id, User.organization_id == user.organization_id).first()
    pv = session.query(PolicyVersion).filter(PolicyVersion.id == body.policy_version_id).first()
    required_ack_value = 1
    if body.required_acknowledgment is not None and body.required_acknowledgment is False:
        required_ack_value = 0
    due_date_value = datetime.strptime(body.due_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    assignment = PolicyAssignment(
        policy_version_id=pv.id if pv is not None else body.policy_version_id,
        user_id=assignee.id if assignee is not None else body.user_id,
        due_date=due_date_value,
        required_acknowledgment=required_ack_value,
        completion_status=body.completion_status,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(assignment)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(assignment)
    response = PolicyAssignmentModel(
        id=assignment.id,
        policy_version_id=assignment.policy_version_id,
        user_id=assignment.user_id,
        due_date=assignment.due_date.isoformat(),
        required_acknowledgment=bool(assignment.required_acknowledgment),
        completion_status=assignment.completion_status,
        created_at=assignment.created_at,
        updated_at=assignment.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return response

@app.post(
    "/api/policy-assignments/bulk/by-departments",
    response_model=PolicyAssignmentBulkByDepartmentsResponseModel,
    summary="Bulk assign a policy version to departments",
    description="Assign a policy_version to all users in given departments",
    tags=["policy_assignments"],
    operation_id="bulk_assign_policy_version_by_departments",
)
async def bulk_assign_policy_version_by_departments(
    body: PolicyAssignmentBulkByDepartmentsBodyModel = Body(...),
) -> PolicyAssignmentBulkByDepartmentsResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    pv = session.query(PolicyVersion).filter(PolicyVersion.id == body.policy_version_id).first()
    due_date_value = datetime.strptime(body.due_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    required_ack_value = 1
    if body.required_acknowledgment is not None and body.required_acknowledgment is False:
        required_ack_value = 0
    dept_ids = body.department_ids
    user_ids: List[int] = []
    for dept_id in dept_ids:
        dept = session.query(Department).filter(Department.id == dept_id, Department.organization_id == user.organization_id).first()
        if dept is not None:
            rows = session.query(UserDepartment).filter(UserDepartment.department_id == dept_id).all()
            for row in rows:
                if row.user_id not in user_ids:
                    user_ids.append(row.user_id)
    created_ids: List[int] = []
    skipped_ids: List[int] = []
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    for uid in user_ids:
        existing = session.query(PolicyAssignment).filter(PolicyAssignment.policy_version_id == body.policy_version_id, PolicyAssignment.user_id == uid).first()
        if existing is not None:
            skipped_ids.append(uid)
        else:
            assignment = PolicyAssignment(
                policy_version_id=pv.id if pv is not None else body.policy_version_id,
                user_id=uid,
                due_date=due_date_value,
                required_acknowledgment=required_ack_value,
                completion_status=body.completion_status,
                created_at=now,
                updated_at=now,
            )
            session.add(assignment)
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(assignment)
            created_ids.append(assignment.id)
    response = PolicyAssignmentBulkByDepartmentsResponseModel(created_assignment_ids=created_ids, skipped_user_ids=skipped_ids)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.post(
    "/api/assessment-control-items/bulk",
    response_model=AssessmentControlItemsBulkResponseModel,
    summary="Bulk add control items to an assessment",
    description="Create assessment_control_items for a list of control_item_ids",
    tags=["assessment_control_items"],
    operation_id="bulk_add_controls_to_assessment",
)
async def bulk_add_controls_to_assessment(
    body: AssessmentControlItemsBulkBodyModel = Body(...),
) -> AssessmentControlItemsBulkResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    assessment = session.query(Assessment).filter(Assessment.id == body.assessment_id, Assessment.organization_id == user.organization_id).first()
    created_ids: List[int] = []
    skipped_ids: List[int] = []
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if assessment is not None:
        for cid in body.control_item_ids:
            control = session.query(ControlItem).filter(ControlItem.id == cid, ControlItem.organization_id == user.organization_id).first()
            if control is not None:
                existing = session.query(AssessmentControlItem).filter(AssessmentControlItem.assessment_id == assessment.id, AssessmentControlItem.control_item_id == cid).first()
                if existing is not None:
                    skipped_ids.append(cid)
                else:
                    aci = AssessmentControlItem(
                        assessment_id=assessment.id,
                        control_item_id=cid,
                        result_status=body.result_status,
                        last_updated_by_user_id=None,
                        last_updated_at=None,
                        created_at=now,
                        updated_at=now,
                    )
                    session.add(aci)
                    session.commit()
                    session.refresh(aci)
                    created_ids.append(aci.id)
    response = AssessmentControlItemsBulkResponseModel(created_assessment_control_item_ids=created_ids, skipped_control_item_ids=skipped_ids)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/incidents",
    response_model=IncidentListResponseModel,
    summary="List incidents with filters",
    description="Retrieve incidents for the current organization filtered by fields",
    tags=["incidents"],
    operation_id="list_incidents",
)
async def list_incidents(
    category: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by incident category", example="data_protection"),
    severity: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by incident severity", example="critical"),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by incident status", example="open"),
    from_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter incidents discovered on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-01-01"),
    to_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter incidents discovered on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2025-12-31"),
) -> IncidentListResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    query = session.query(Incident).filter(Incident.organization_id == user.organization_id)
    if category is not None:
        query = query.filter(Incident.category == category)
    if severity is not None:
        query = query.filter(Incident.severity == severity)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Incident.status == status)
    if from_date is not None and from_date != "":
        dt = datetime.strptime(from_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
        query = query.filter(Incident.discovery_date >= dt)
    if to_date is not None and to_date != "":
        dt = datetime.strptime(to_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
        query = query.filter(Incident.discovery_date <= dt)
    items = query.all()
    incidents: List[IncidentModel] = []
    for i in items:
        incidents.append(
            IncidentModel(
                id=i.id,
                organization_id=i.organization_id,
                category=i.category,
                severity=i.severity,
                discovery_date=i.discovery_date.isoformat(),
                status=i.status,
                policy_id=i.policy_id,
                description=i.description,
                created_at=i.created_at,
                updated_at=i.updated_at,
            )
        )
    response = IncidentListResponseModel(incidents=incidents)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/reports/aml-acknowledgment-completion",
    response_model=AMLAcknowledgmentCompletionReportModel,
    summary="Get AML policy acknowledgment completion rate",
    description="Compute completion rate for published AML policies within a lookback window",
    tags=["reports", "policies"],
    operation_id="get_aml_acknowledgment_completion_rate",
)
async def get_aml_acknowledgment_completion_rate(
    lookback_days: Optional[int] = Query(90, description="Number of days back from today to include", example=90)
) -> AMLAcknowledgmentCompletionReportModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    days = lookback_days if lookback_days is not None else 90
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    from_dt = now - timedelta(days=days)
    policies = session.query(Policy).filter(Policy.organization_id == user.organization_id, Policy.category == "aml").all()
    policy_ids = [p.id for p in policies]
    pv_query = session.query(PolicyVersion).filter(PolicyVersion.policy_id.in_(policy_ids), PolicyVersion.status == "published")
    policy_versions = pv_query.all()
    policy_version_ids = [pv.id for pv in policy_versions]
    assignments = session.query(PolicyAssignment).filter(
        PolicyAssignment.policy_version_id.in_(policy_version_ids),
        PolicyAssignment.created_at >= from_dt,
        PolicyAssignment.created_at <= now,
    ).all()
    acknowledgments = session.query(PolicyAcknowledgment).filter(
        PolicyAcknowledgment.policy_version_id.in_(policy_version_ids),
        PolicyAcknowledgment.acknowledged_at >= from_dt,
        PolicyAcknowledgment.acknowledged_at <= now,
    ).all()
    total_assignments = len(assignments)
    total_acknowledgments = len(acknowledgments)
    completion_rate_value = 0.0
    if total_assignments > 0:
        completion_rate_value = total_acknowledgments / float(total_assignments)
    ack_by_version: Dict[int, List[PolicyAcknowledgment]] = {}
    for a in acknowledgments:
        ack_by_version.setdefault(a.policy_version_id, []).append(a)
    assign_by_version: Dict[int, List[PolicyAssignment]] = {}
    for a in assignments:
        assign_by_version.setdefault(a.policy_version_id, []).append(a)
    breakdown: List[AMLPolicyVersionBreakdownItemModel] = []
    policy_by_id: Dict[int, Policy] = {p.id: p for p in policies}
    for pv in policy_versions:
        assign_list = assign_by_version.get(pv.id, [])
        ack_list = ack_by_version.get(pv.id, [])
        assignments_count = len(assign_list)
        acknowledgments_count = len(ack_list)
        per_rate = 0.0
        if assignments_count > 0:
            per_rate = acknowledgments_count / float(assignments_count)
        policy_name = policy_by_id.get(pv.policy_id).name if pv.policy_id in policy_by_id else ""
        breakdown.append(
            AMLPolicyVersionBreakdownItemModel(
                policy_version_id=pv.id,
                policy_name=policy_name,
                version_number=pv.version_number,
                assignments=assignments_count,
                acknowledgments=acknowledgments_count,
                completion_rate=per_rate,
            )
        )
    response = AMLAcknowledgmentCompletionReportModel(
        lookback_days=days,
        total_assignments=total_assignments,
        total_acknowledgments=total_acknowledgments,
        completion_rate=completion_rate_value,
        policy_version_breakdown=breakdown,
    )
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/reports/overdue-assessments-by-assignee",
    response_model=OverdueAssessmentsReportModel,
    summary="Get overdue assessments grouped by assignee team",
    description="List assessments past scheduled_date and not completed grouped by assignee",
    tags=["reports", "assessments"],
    operation_id="get_overdue_assessments_grouped_by_assignee",
)
async def get_overdue_assessments_grouped_by_assignee(
    as_of_date: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Date to consider as 'today' for overdue logic (YYYY-MM-DD)", example="2026-01-31")
) -> OverdueAssessmentsReportModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    if as_of_date is not None and as_of_date != "":
        as_of = datetime.strptime(as_of_date, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    else:
        as_of = datetime.utcnow().date()
    query = session.query(Assessment).filter(
        Assessment.organization_id == user.organization_id,
        Assessment.scheduled_date < as_of,
        Assessment.status != "completed",
    )
    items = query.all()
    teams = session.query(Team).filter(Team.organization_id == user.organization_id).all()
    team_names: Dict[Optional[int], Optional[str]] = {t.id: t.name for t in teams}
    team_names[None] = None
    grouped: Dict[Optional[int], List[OverdueAssessmentItemModel]] = {}
    for a in items:
        key = a.assignee_team_id
        grouped.setdefault(key, []).append(
            OverdueAssessmentItemModel(
                assessment_id=a.id,
                name=a.name,
                scheduled_date=a.scheduled_date.isoformat(),
                status=a.status,
            )
        )
    groups: List[OverdueAssessmentGroupModel] = []
    for key, vals in grouped.items():
        groups.append(
            OverdueAssessmentGroupModel(
                assignee_team_id=key,
                assignee_team_name=team_names.get(key),
                overdue_assessments=vals,
            )
        )
    response = OverdueAssessmentsReportModel(as_of_date=as_of.isoformat(), groups=groups)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/reports/incidents-by-category-and-severity",
    response_model=IncidentCategorySeverityReportModel,
    summary="Get open and investigating incidents by category severity",
    description="Count incidents with status open or investigating grouped by category and severity",
    tags=["reports", "incidents"],
    operation_id="get_incident_counts_by_category_and_severity",
)
async def get_incident_counts_by_category_and_severity(
    lookback_months: Optional[int] = Query(12, description="Number of months back from today to include incidents", example=12)
) -> IncidentCategorySeverityReportModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user, _ = get_current_user_and_org(session)
    months = lookback_months if lookback_months is not None else 12
    today = datetime.utcnow().date()
    from_month = today.month - months
    year = today.year
    while from_month <= 0:
        from_month += 12
        year -= 1
    from_date_value = date(year, from_month, 1)
    to_date_value = today
    query = session.query(Incident).filter(
        Incident.organization_id == user.organization_id,
        Incident.discovery_date >= from_date_value,
        Incident.discovery_date <= to_date_value,
        Incident.status.in_(["open", "investigating"]),
    )
    items = query.all()
    counts_map: Dict[str, int] = {}
    for inc in items:
        key = inc.category + "|" + inc.severity + "|" + inc.status
        counts_map[key] = counts_map.get(key, 0) + 1
    counts: List[IncidentCategorySeverityCountItemModel] = []
    for key, count_val in counts_map.items():
        parts = key.split("|")
        counts.append(
            IncidentCategorySeverityCountItemModel(
                category=parts[0],
                severity=parts[1],
                status=parts[2],
                count=count_val,
            )
        )
    response = IncidentCategorySeverityReportModel(
        lookback_months=months,
        from_date=from_date_value.isoformat(),
        to_date=to_date_value.isoformat(),
        counts=counts,
    )
    session.close()
    return response

def parse_json_text(text_value: Optional[str]) -> Optional[Dict]:
    if text_value is None:
        return None
    text_str = str(text_value)
    if text_str == "":
        return None
    import json
    return json.loads(text_str)


def dump_json_text(obj: Optional[Dict]) -> Optional[str]:
    if obj is None:
        return None
    import json
    return json.dumps(obj)

@app.get(
    "/api/companies",
    summary="List companies with optional filters",
    description="Retrieve companies; use to find owner or counterparty company IDs by name or type.",
    tags=["companies"],
    operation_id="list_companies",
    response_model=ListCompaniesResponse,
)
async def list_companies(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter companies by exact name", example="CloudLoop Labs"),
    type_filter: Optional[str] = Query(
        None,
        alias="type",
        description="Filter by company type: owner, counterparty, or both",
        example="owner",
    ),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(50, description="Maximum number of records to return", example=50),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Number of records to skip for pagination", example=0),
) -> ListCompaniesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Company)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Company.name == name)
    if type_filter is not None:
        query = query.filter(Company.type == type_filter)
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    companies = query.all()
    items: List[CompanyModel] = []
    for c in companies:
        items.append(
            CompanyModel(
                id=c.id,
                name=c.name,
                type=c.type,
                default_governing_law=c.default_governing_law,
                created_at=c.created_at,
                updated_at=c.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListCompaniesResponse(companies=items)


@app.get(
    "/api/crm/counterparties",
    summary="List CRM counterparties with optional tag filter",
    description="Retrieve CRM counterparties; use this to find all with a given tag such as 'Prospect'.",
    tags=["crm_counterparties"],
    operation_id="list_crm_counterparties",
    response_model=ListCrmCounterpartiesResponse,
)
async def list_crm_counterparties(
    tag_contains: Optional[str] = Query(
        None,
        description="Filter CRM counterparties whose tags field contains this substring",
        example="Prospect",
    ),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(100, description="Maximum number of records to return", example=100),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Records to skip for pagination", example=0),
) -> ListCrmCounterpartiesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(CrmCounterparty)
    if tag_contains is not None:
        query = query.filter(CrmCounterparty.tags.contains(tag_contains))
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    items: List[CrmCounterpartyModel] = []
    for r in rows:
        items.append(
            CrmCounterpartyModel(
                id=r.id,
                crm_id=r.crm_id,
                name=r.name,
                tags=r.tags,
                email=r.email,
                synced_to_company_id=r.synced_to_company_id,
                created_at=r.created_at,
                updated_at=r.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListCrmCounterpartiesResponse(crm_counterparties=items)


@app.post(
    "/api/crm/counterparties/{crm_counterparty_id}/sync_to_company",
    summary="Sync a CRM counterparty into companies table",
    description="Create or link a companies record from a CRM counterparty and update synced_to_company_id.",
    tags=["crm_counterparties", "companies"],
    operation_id="sync_crm_counterparty_to_company",
    response_model=SyncCrmCounterpartyResponse,
)
async def sync_crm_counterparty_to_company(
    crm_counterparty_id: int = Path(..., description="ID of the CRM counterparty to sync", example=10),
    body: SyncCrmCounterpartyBody = Body(...),
) -> SyncCrmCounterpartyResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    crm = session.query(CrmCounterparty).filter(CrmCounterparty.id == crm_counterparty_id).first()
    if crm is None:
        session.close()
        return SyncCrmCounterpartyResponse(
            crm_counterparty=SyncCrmCounterpartyCrmModel(id=0, crm_id="", name="", synced_to_company_id=0),
            company=SyncCrmCounterpartyCompanyModel(id=0, name="", type=body.company_type, default_governing_law=None),
        )
    company = None
    if crm.synced_to_company_id is not None:
        company = session.query(Company).filter(Company.id == crm.synced_to_company_id).first()
    if company is None:
        company = Company(
            name=crm.name,
            type=body.company_type,
            default_governing_law=None,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        )
        session.add(company)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(company)
    crm.synced_to_company_id = company.id
    crm.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    crm_model = SyncCrmCounterpartyCrmModel(
        id=crm.id,
        crm_id=crm.crm_id,
        name=crm.name,
        synced_to_company_id=company.id,
    )
    company_model = SyncCrmCounterpartyCompanyModel(
        id=company.id,
        name=company.name,
        type=company.type,
        default_governing_law=company.default_governing_law,
    )
    session.close()
    return SyncCrmCounterpartyResponse(crm_counterparty=crm_model, company=company_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/contracts",
    summary="Create a new contract record",
    description="Create a contract row with basic attributes and link to owner and counterparty companies.",
    tags=["contracts"],
    operation_id="create_contract",
    response_model=CreateContractResponse,
)
async def create_contract(body: CreateContractBody = Body(...)) -> CreateContractResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    auto_flag = 1 if body.auto_renew_flag else 0
    metadata_text = dump_json_text(body.metadata)
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    contract = Contract(
        contract_uid=body.contract_uid,
        owner_company_id=body.owner_company_id,
        counterparty_company_id=body.counterparty_company_id,
        contract_type=body.contract_type,
        title=body.title,
        effective_date=body.effective_date,
        end_date=body.end_date,
        auto_renew_flag=auto_flag,
        renewal_deadline=body.renewal_deadline,
        notice_period=body.notice_period,
        contract_value=body.contract_value,
        currency=body.currency,
        governing_law=body.governing_law,
        status=body.status,
        current_version_id=None,
        metadata_=metadata_text,
        created_by_user_id=1,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(contract)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(contract)
    contract_model = ContractModel(
        id=contract.id,
        contract_uid=contract.contract_uid,
        owner_company_id=contract.owner_company_id,
        counterparty_company_id=contract.counterparty_company_id,
        contract_type=contract.contract_type,
        title=contract.title,
        effective_date=contract.effective_date,
        end_date=contract.end_date,
        auto_renew_flag=bool(contract.auto_renew_flag),
        renewal_deadline=contract.renewal_deadline,
        notice_period=contract.notice_period,
        contract_value=contract.contract_value,
        currency=contract.currency,
        governing_law=contract.governing_law,
        status=contract.status,
        current_version_id=contract.current_version_id,
        metadata=parse_json_text(contract.metadata_),
        created_by_user_id=contract.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=contract.created_at,
        updated_at=contract.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateContractResponse(contract=contract_model)

@app.patch(
    "/api/contracts/by_uid/{contract_uid}/status",
    summary="Update contract status by contract_uid",
    description="Change the status field for a contract identified by contract_uid.",
    tags=["contracts"],
    operation_id="update_contract_status_by_uid",
    response_model=UpdateContractStatusResponse,
)
async def update_contract_status_by_uid(
    contract_uid: str = Path(..., description="Contract UID whose status should be updated", example="CNT-10239"),
    body: UpdateContractStatusBody = Body(...),
) -> UpdateContractStatusResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    contract = session.query(Contract).filter(Contract.contract_uid == contract_uid).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if contract is not None:
        contract.status = body.status
        contract.updated_at = now
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(contract)
        model = ContractStatusModel(
            id=contract.id,
            contract_uid=contract.contract_uid,
            status=contract.status,
            updated_at=contract.updated_at,
        )
        session.close()
        return UpdateContractStatusResponse(contract=model)
    empty = ContractStatusModel(id=0, contract_uid="", status=body.status, updated_at=now)
    session.close()
    return UpdateContractStatusResponse(contract=empty)


@app.patch(
    "/api/contracts/{contract_uid}",
    summary="Patch mutable fields of a contract by UID",
    description="Apply partial updates such as dates, value, or metadata using contract_uid.",
    tags=["contracts"],
    operation_id="patch_contract_by_uid",
    response_model=PatchContractResponse,
)
async def patch_contract_by_uid(
    contract_uid: str = Path(..., description="Identifier of the contract to update", example="SOW-7744"),
    body: PatchContractBody = Body(...),
) -> PatchContractResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    contract = session.query(Contract).filter(Contract.contract_uid == contract_uid).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if contract is None:
        empty = PatchContractModel(
            id=0,
            contract_uid="",
            effective_date=None,
            end_date=None,
            contract_value=0.0,
            currency="",
            governing_law="",
            status="",
            metadata=None,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.close()
        return PatchContractResponse(contract=empty)
    if body.effective_date is not None:
        contract.effective_date = body.effective_date
    if body.end_date is not None:
        contract.end_date = body.end_date
    if body.contract_value is not None:
        contract.contract_value = body.contract_value
    if body.currency is not None:
        contract.currency = body.currency
    if body.governing_law is not None:
        contract.governing_law = body.governing_law
    if body.status is not None:
        contract.status = body.status
    if body.metadata is not None:
        existing = parse_json_text(contract.metadata_)
        if existing is None:
            existing = {}
        for k, v in body.metadata.items():
            existing[k] = v
        contract.metadata_ = dump_json_text(existing)
    contract.updated_at = now
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(contract)
    model = PatchContractModel(
        id=contract.id,
        contract_uid=contract.contract_uid,
        effective_date=contract.effective_date,
        end_date=contract.end_date,
        contract_value=contract.contract_value,
        currency=contract.currency,
        governing_law=contract.governing_law,
        status=contract.status,
        metadata=parse_json_text(contract.metadata_),
        updated_at=contract.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return PatchContractResponse(contract=model)

async def list_contracts(

    ),
    governing_law: Optional[str] = Query(

        example="England and Wales",
    ),
    contract_type_in: Optional[str] = Query(
        None,
        description="Comma-separated contract_types to include",
        example="MSA,SOW",
    ),
    renewal_deadline_from: Optional[date] = Query(
        None,
