        example="2026-04-01",
    ),
    renewal_deadline_to: Optional[date] = Query(

    limit: Optional[int] = Query(100, description="Maximum contracts to return", example=100),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Number of contracts to skip", example=0),
) -> ListContractsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Contract)
    if status_in is not None:
        statuses = [s.strip() for s in status_in.split(",") if s.strip() != ""]
        if len(statuses) > 0:
            query = query.filter(Contract.status.in_(statuses))
    if governing_law is not None:
        query = query.filter(Contract.governing_law == governing_law)
    if contract_type_in is not None:
        types = [t.strip() for t in contract_type_in.split(",") if t.strip() != ""]
        if len(types) > 0:
            query = query.filter(Contract.contract_type.in_(types))
    if renewal_deadline_from is not None:
        query = query.filter(Contract.renewal_deadline >= renewal_deadline_from)
    if renewal_deadline_to is not None:
        query = query.filter(Contract.renewal_deadline <= renewal_deadline_to)
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    rows = query.all()
    items: List[ListContractItemModel] = []
    for c in rows:
        items.append(
            ListContractItemModel(
                id=c.id,
                contract_uid=c.contract_uid,
                owner_company_id=c.owner_company_id,
                counterparty_company_id=c.counterparty_company_id,
                contract_type=c.contract_type,
                effective_date=c.effective_date,
                end_date=c.end_date,
                auto_renew_flag=bool(c.auto_renew_flag),
                renewal_deadline=c.renewal_deadline,
                notice_period=c.notice_period,
                contract_value=c.contract_value,
                currency=c.currency,
                governing_law=c.governing_law,
                status=c.status,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListContractsResponse(contracts=items)


@app.get(
    "/api/contracts/summary/by_type_and_currency",
    summary="Aggregate contract values by type and currency",
    description="Aggregate total contract_value grouped by contract_type and currency with filters.",
    tags=["contracts", "analytics"],
    operation_id="aggregate_contract_values_by_type_and_currency",
    response_model=ContractsSummaryResponse,
)
async def aggregate_contract_values_by_type_and_currency(
    governing_law: str = Query(..., description="Governing law to filter contracts before aggregation", example="England and Wales"),
    status_in: str = Query(
        ...,
        description="Comma-separated list of statuses to include in aggregation",
        example="active,awaiting_signature",
    ),
) -> ContractsSummaryResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    statuses = [s.strip() for s in status_in.split(",") if s.strip() != ""]
    query = session.query(Contract).filter(Contract.governing_law == governing_law)
    if len(statuses) > 0:
        query = query.filter(Contract.status.in_(statuses))
    rows = query.all()
    aggregate: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]] = {}
    counts: Dict[str, Dict[str, int]] = {}
    for c in rows:
        t = c.contract_type
        cur = c.currency
        if t not in aggregate:
            aggregate[t] = {}
            counts[t] = {}
        if cur not in aggregate[t]:
            aggregate[t][cur] = 0.0
            counts[t][cur] = 0
        aggregate[t][cur] += c.contract_value
        counts[t][cur] += 1
    items: List[ContractsSummaryItemModel] = []
    for t, cur_map in aggregate.items():
        for cur, total in cur_map.items():
            items.append(
                ContractsSummaryItemModel(
                    contract_type=t,
                    currency=cur,
                    total_value=total,
                    contract_count=counts[t][cur],
                )
            )
    session.close()
    return ContractsSummaryResponse(summary=items)


@app.post(
    "/api/contracts/by_uid/{contract_uid}/versions",
    summary="Create a new contract version for a contract UID",
    description="Append a contract_versions row and optionally update contracts.current_version_id.",
    tags=["contract_versions"],
    operation_id="create_contract_version_for_uid",
    response_model=CreateContractVersionResponse,
)
async def create_contract_version_for_uid(
    contract_uid: str = Path(..., description="UID of the contract to version", example="SOW-7744"),
    body: CreateContractVersionBody = Body(...),
) -> CreateContractVersionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    contract = session.query(Contract).filter(Contract.contract_uid == contract_uid).first()
    if contract is None:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        empty_version = ContractVersionModel(
            id=0,
            contract_id=0,
            version_number=0,
            effective_date=None,
            end_date=None,
            contract_value=None,
            currency=None,
            governing_law=None,
            status=None,
            metadata=None,
            created_by_user_id=None,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        empty_contract = ContractVersionContractModel(id=0, contract_uid=contract_uid, current_version_id=None)
        session.close()
        return CreateContractVersionResponse(contract_version=empty_version, contract=empty_contract)
    existing_versions = (
        session.query(ContractVersion)
        .filter(ContractVersion.contract_id == contract.id)
        .order_by(ContractVersion.version_number.desc())
        .all()
    )
    if len(existing_versions) == 0:
        next_version_number = 1
    else:
        next_version_number = existing_versions[0].version_number + 1
    metadata_text = dump_json_text(body.metadata)
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    version = ContractVersion(
        contract_id=contract.id,
        version_number=next_version_number,
        effective_date=body.effective_date,
        end_date=body.end_date,
        contract_value=body.contract_value,
        currency=body.currency,
        governing_law=body.governing_law,
        status=body.status,
        metadata_=metadata_text,
        created_by_user_id=1,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(version)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(version)
    if body.set_as_current:
        contract.current_version_id = version.id
        contract.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(contract)
    version_model = ContractVersionModel(
        id=version.id,
        contract_id=version.contract_id,
        version_number=version.version_number,
        effective_date=version.effective_date,
        end_date=version.end_date,
        contract_value=version.contract_value,
        currency=version.currency,
        governing_law=version.governing_law,
        status=version.status,
        metadata=parse_json_text(version.metadata_),
        created_by_user_id=version.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=version.created_at,
        updated_at=version.updated_at,
    )
    contract_model = ContractVersionContractModel(
        id=contract.id,
        contract_uid=contract.contract_uid,
        current_version_id=contract.current_version_id,
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateContractVersionResponse(contract_version=version_model, contract=contract_model)

) -> PatchContractRequestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    req = session.query(ContractRequest).filter(ContractRequest.id == request_id).first()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    if req is None:
        model = PatchContractRequestModel(
            id=request_id,
            status=body.status if body.status is not None else "",
            linked_contract_id=body.linked_contract_id,
            metadata=body.metadata,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.close()
        return PatchContractRequestResponse(contract_request=model)
    if body.status is not None:
        req.status = body.status
    if body.linked_contract_id is not None:
        req.linked_contract_id = body.linked_contract_id
    if body.metadata is not None:
        existing = parse_json_text(req.metadata_)
        if existing is None:
            existing = {}
        for k, v in body.metadata.items():
            existing[k] = v
        req.metadata_ = dump_json_text(existing)
    req.updated_at = now
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(req)
    model = PatchContractRequestModel(
        id=req.id,
        status=req.status,
        linked_contract_id=req.linked_contract_id,
        metadata=parse_json_text(req.metadata_),
        updated_at=req.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return PatchContractRequestResponse(contract_request=model)


@app.post(
    "/api/renewal_reminders",
    summary="Create a renewal reminder for a contract",
    description="Insert a renewal_reminders row specifying email and days before renewal_deadline.",
    tags=["renewal_reminders"],
    operation_id="create_renewal_reminder",
    response_model=CreateRenewalReminderResponse,
)
async def create_renewal_reminder(
    body: CreateRenewalReminderBody = Body(...),
) -> CreateRenewalReminderResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    reminder = RenewalReminder(
        contract_id=body.contract_id,
        reminder_email=body.reminder_email,
        reminder_days_before=body.reminder_days_before,
        is_sent=0,
        sent_at=None,
        created_by_user_id=1,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(reminder)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(reminder)
    model = RenewalReminderModel(
        id=reminder.id,
        contract_id=reminder.contract_id,
        reminder_email=reminder.reminder_email,
        reminder_days_before=reminder.reminder_days_before,
        is_sent=bool(reminder.is_sent),
        sent_at=reminder.sent_at,
        created_by_user_id=reminder.created_by_user_id,
        created_at=reminder.created_at,
        updated_at=reminder.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateRenewalReminderResponse(renewal_reminder=model)

def now_utc() -> datetime:
    return datetime.utcnow()


def parse_iso_datetime(value: Optional[str]) -> Optional[datetime]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return datetime.fromisoformat(value.replace("Z", "+00:00"))


def format_datetime(dt: Optional[datetime]) -> Optional[str]:
    if dt is None:
        return None
    return dt.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")


def format_date(d: Optional[date]) -> Optional[str]:
    if d is None:
        return None
    return d.isoformat()


def format_time(t: Optional[time]) -> Optional[str]:
    if t is None:
        return None
    return t.strftime("%H:%M")

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/primary",
    summary="Get primary restaurant for current user",
    description="Retrieve the primary restaurant where primary_flag=1 and created_by=current user id 1",
    tags=["restaurants"],
    operation_id="get_primary_restaurant",
    response_model=PrimaryRestaurantResponse,
)
async def get_primary_restaurant() -> PrimaryRestaurantResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    obj = (
        session.query(Restaurant)
        .filter(Restaurant.primary_flag == 1, Restaurant.created_by == 1)
        .order_by(Restaurant.id.asc())
        .first()
    )
    session.close()
    if obj is None:
        return PrimaryRestaurantResponse(restaurant=None)
    return PrimaryRestaurantResponse(restaurant=RestaurantModel.from_orm_obj(obj))

@app.get(
    "/api/dining_rooms/{dining_room_id}/tables",
    summary="List tables in a dining room",
    description="Retrieve tables in a dining room, optionally filtered by type, status, or capacity",
    tags=["tables"],
    operation_id="list_tables",
    response_model=TablesListResponse,
)
async def list_tables(
    dining_room_id: int = Path(..., description="Dining room ID to list tables from", example=5),
    table_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by table_type", example="booth"),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by table status", example="free"),
    min_capacity: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter for tables with capacity >= this value", example=4),
) -> TablesListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Table).filter(Table.dining_room_id == dining_room_id)
    if table_type is not None:
        query = query.filter(Table.table_type == table_type)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Table.status == status)
    if min_capacity is not None:
        query = query.filter(Table.capacity >= min_capacity)
    items = query.order_by(Table.table_number.asc()).all()
    result = TablesListResponse(tables=[TableModel.from_orm_obj(x) for x in items])
    session.close()
    return result


@app.patch(
    "/api/tables/{table_id}",
    summary="Update table attributes",
    description="Update mutable fields of a table row such as status, last_seated_at, or capacity",
    tags=["tables"],
    operation_id="update_table",
    response_model=TableUpdateResponse,
)
async def update_table(
    table_id: int = Path(..., description="Table ID to update", example=12),
    body: TableUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> TableUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    t = session.query(Table).filter(Table.id == table_id).first()
    if body.status is not None:
        t.status = body.status
    if body.capacity is not None:
        t.capacity = body.capacity
    if body.last_seated_at is not None:
        if body.last_seated_at == "null":
            t.last_seated_at = None
        else:
            t.last_seated_at = parse_iso_datetime(body.last_seated_at)
    t.updated_at = now_utc()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(t)
    result = TableUpdateResponse(table=TableModel.from_orm_obj(t))
    session.close()
    return result

@app.get(
    "/api/dining_rooms/{dining_room_id}/mergeable_table_groups/search",
    summary="Search mergeable groups by capacity",
    description="Find mergeable table groups that can seat a party and avoid fully booked status",
    tags=["mergeable_table_groups"],
    operation_id="search_mergeable_groups_by_capacity",
    response_model=MergeableGroupSearchResponse,
)
async def search_mergeable_groups_by_capacity(
    dining_room_id: int = Path(..., description="Dining room ID to search within", example=5),
    required_capacity: int = Query(..., description="Minimum capacity needed from the mergeable group", example=7),
    start_datetime: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Start of time window to check reservations (ISO 8601)", example="2025-01-03T19:00:00Z"),
    end_datetime: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="End of time window to check reservations (ISO 8601)", example="2025-01-03T21:00:00Z"),
) -> MergeableGroupSearchResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    start_dt = parse_iso_datetime(start_datetime) if start_datetime is not None else None
    end_dt = parse_iso_datetime(end_datetime) if end_datetime is not None else None
    groups = (
        session.query(MergeableTableGroup)
        .filter(MergeableTableGroup.dining_room_id == dining_room_id)
        .filter((MergeableTableGroup.max_capacity.is_(None)) | (MergeableTableGroup.max_capacity >= required_capacity))
        .all()
    )
    result_items: List[MergeableGroupSearchItem] = []
    for g in groups:
        if start_dt is not None and end_dt is not None:
            overlapping = (
                session.query(Reservation)
                .filter(Reservation.mergeable_group_id == g.id)
                .filter(Reservation.status.in_(["booked", "confirmed", "seated"]))
                .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime >= start_dt)
                .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime <= end_dt)
                .first()
            )
            if overlapping is not None:
                continue
        table_links = session.query(MergeableGroupTable).filter(MergeableGroupTable.mergeable_group_id == g.id).all()
        table_ids = [tl.table_id for tl in table_links]
        item = MergeableGroupSearchItem(
            id=g.id,
            dining_room_id=g.dining_room_id,
            name=g.name,
            max_capacity=g.max_capacity,
            table_ids=table_ids,
        )
        result_items.append(item)
    result = MergeableGroupSearchResponse(mergeable_groups=result_items)
    session.close()
    return result

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/shifts/current",
    summary="Get current active shift",
    description="Find the shift active at now for a restaurant and optional dining_room_id",
    tags=["shifts"],
    operation_id="get_current_shift",
    response_model=CurrentShiftResponse,
)
async def get_current_shift(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID to search shifts in", example=3),
    dining_room_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Optional dining room ID to scope the shift search", example=5),
    current_datetime: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Override current datetime for testing (ISO 8601)", example="2025-01-02T20:15:00Z"),
) -> CurrentShiftResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now_dt = parse_iso_datetime(current_datetime) if current_datetime is not None else now_utc()
    current_date = now_dt.date()
    current_time = now_dt.time()
    query = session.query(Shift).filter(Shift.restaurant_id == restaurant_id).filter(Shift.shift_date == current_date)
    if dining_room_id is not None:
        query = query.filter((Shift.dining_room_id == dining_room_id) | (Shift.dining_room_id.is_(None)))
    query = query.filter(Shift.start_time <= current_time).filter(Shift.end_time >= current_time)
    s = query.order_by(Shift.dining_room_id.desc().nulls_last(), Shift.id.asc()).first()
    session.close()
    if s is None:
        return CurrentShiftResponse(shift=None)
    return CurrentShiftResponse(shift=ShiftModel.from_orm_obj(s))

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/availability/search",
    summary="Search table availability",
    description="Find free tables or mergeable groups around a target datetime for a party_size",
    tags=["availability", "reservations"],
    operation_id="search_availability",
    response_model=AvailabilitySearchResponse,
)
async def search_availability(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID to search in", example=3),
    dining_room_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Optional dining room ID; if omitted, use main dining room", example=5),
    target_datetime: str = Query(..., description="Target reservation datetime (ISO 8601)", example="2025-01-04T19:30:00Z"),
    party_size: int = Query(..., description="Number of guests in the party", example=5),
    time_tolerance_minutes: Optional[int] = Query(15, description="Maximum minutes before or after target time to consider", example=15),
) -> AvailabilitySearchResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    target_dt = parse_iso_datetime(target_datetime)
    tolerance = time_tolerance_minutes if time_tolerance_minutes is not None else 15
    start_range = target_dt - timedelta(minutes=tolerance)
    end_range = target_dt + timedelta(minutes=tolerance)
    dr_id = dining_room_id
    if dr_id is None:
        main_dr = (
            session.query(DiningRoom)
            .filter(DiningRoom.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
            .filter(DiningRoom.is_main == 1)
            .order_by(DiningRoom.id.asc())
            .first()
        )
        if main_dr is not None:
            dr_id = main_dr.id
    slots: List[AvailabilitySlotModel] = []
    if dr_id is not None:
        tables = (
            session.query(Table)
            .filter(Table.dining_room_id == dr_id)
            .filter(Table.capacity >= party_size)
            .filter(Table.status.in_(["free", "dirty"]))
            .all()
        )
        for t in tables:
            overlapping = (
                session.query(Reservation)
                .filter(Reservation.table_id == t.id)
                .filter(Reservation.status.in_(["booked", "confirmed", "seated"]))
                .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime >= start_range)
                .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime <= end_range)
                .first()
            )
            if overlapping is None:
                slots.append(
                    AvailabilitySlotModel(
                        start_datetime=format_datetime(target_dt) or "",
                        party_size=party_size,
                        table_id=t.id,
                        mergeable_group_id=None,
                        dining_room_id=dr_id,
                        reason="single_table_available",
                    )
                )
    groups = session.query(MergeableTableGroup).filter(MergeableTableGroup.dining_room_id == dr_id).all() if dr_id is not None else []
    for g in groups:
        link_tables = session.query(MergeableGroupTable).filter(MergeableGroupTable.mergeable_group_id == g.id).all()
        table_ids = [lt.table_id for lt in link_tables]
        if not table_ids:
            continue
        total_capacity = 0
        for tid in table_ids:
            tbl = session.query(Table).filter(Table.id == tid).first()
            if tbl is not None:
                total_capacity += tbl.capacity
        if g.max_capacity is not None and g.max_capacity < party_size:
            continue
        if total_capacity < party_size:
            continue
        overlapping_group = (
            session.query(Reservation)
            .filter(Reservation.mergeable_group_id == g.id)
            .filter(Reservation.status.in_(["booked", "confirmed", "seated"]))
            .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime >= start_range)
            .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime <= end_range)
            .first()
        )
        if overlapping_group is None:
            slots.append(
                AvailabilitySlotModel(
                    start_datetime=format_datetime(target_dt) or "",
                    party_size=party_size,
                    table_id=None,
                    mergeable_group_id=g.id,
                    dining_room_id=g.dining_room_id,
                    reason="mergeable_group_available",
                )
            )
    session.close()
    return AvailabilitySearchResponse(slots=slots)

@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/reservations",
    summary="List reservations",
    description="Retrieve reservations for a restaurant filtered by datetime range, status, and party size",
    tags=["reservations"],
    operation_id="list_reservations",
    response_model=ReservationsListResponse,
)
async def list_reservations(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID", example=3),
    start_datetime: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Start datetime filter (ISO 8601)", example="2025-01-02T17:00:00Z"),
    end_datetime: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="End datetime filter (ISO 8601)", example="2025-01-02T23:00:00Z"),
    status_in: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Comma-separated list of statuses to include", example="booked,confirmed"),
    min_party_size: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter for party_size >= this value", example=9),
    shift_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by shift_id", example=9),
) -> ReservationsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
    if start_datetime is not None:
        query = query.filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime >= parse_iso_datetime(start_datetime))
    if end_datetime is not None:
        query = query.filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime <= parse_iso_datetime(end_datetime))
    if status_in is not None:
        statuses = [s.strip() for s in status_in.split(",") if s.strip() != ""]
        if statuses:
            query = query.filter(Reservation.status.in_(statuses))
    if min_party_size is not None:
        query = query.filter(Reservation.party_size >= min_party_size)
    if shift_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(Reservation.shift_id == shift_id)
    reservations = query.order_by(Reservation.reservation_datetime.asc()).all()
    items: List[ReservationsListItem] = []
    for r in reservations:
        items.append(
            ReservationsListItem(
                id=r.id,
                restaurant_id=r.restaurant_id,
                dining_room_id=r.dining_room_id,
                shift_id=r.shift_id,
                table_id=r.table_id,
                mergeable_group_id=r.mergeable_group_id,
                guest_id=r.guest_id,
                reservation_datetime=format_datetime(r.reservation_datetime) or "",
                party_size=r.party_size,
                occasion=r.occasion,
                status=r.status,
                assigned_server_id=r.assigned_server_id,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ReservationsListResponse(reservations=items)

async def create_waitlist_entry(
    body: WaitlistEntryCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> WaitlistEntryCreateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = now_utc()
    w = WaitlistEntry(
        restaurant_id=body.restaurant_id,
        dining_room_id=body.dining_room_id,
        guest_id=body.guest_id,
        guest_name=body.guest_name,
        party_size=body.party_size,
        priority=body.priority,
        estimated_wait_minutes=body.estimated_wait_minutes,
        status=body.status if body.status is not None else "waiting",

        updated_at=None,
        seat_time=None,
        converted_reservation_id=None,
    )
    session.add(w)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(w)
    result = WaitlistEntryCreateResponse(waitlist_entry=WaitlistEntryModel.from_orm_obj(w))
    session.close()
    return result


@app.patch(
    "/api/waitlist_entries/{waitlist_entry_id}",
    summary="Update waitlist entry",
    description="Update mutable fields on waitlist_entries such as status or estimated wait",
    tags=["waitlist"],
    operation_id="update_waitlist_entry",
    response_model=WaitlistEntryUpdateResponse,
)
async def update_waitlist_entry(
    waitlist_entry_id: int = Path(..., description="Waitlist entry ID to update", example=50),
    body: WaitlistEntryUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> WaitlistEntryUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    w = session.query(WaitlistEntry).filter(WaitlistEntry.id == waitlist_entry_id).first()
    if body.estimated_wait_minutes is not None:
        w.estimated_wait_minutes = body.estimated_wait_minutes
    if body.status is not None:
        w.status = body.status
    if body.seat_time is not None:
        if body.seat_time == "null":
            w.seat_time = None
        else:
            w.seat_time = parse_iso_datetime(body.seat_time)
    if body.converted_reservation_id is not None:
        w.converted_reservation_id = body.converted_reservation_id
    w.updated_at = now_utc()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(w)
    result = WaitlistEntryUpdateResponse(waitlist_entry=WaitlistEntryModel.from_orm_obj(w))
    session.close()
    return result


@app.get(
    "/api/restaurants/{restaurant_id}/waitlist_entries",
    summary="List waitlist entries",
    description="Retrieve waitlist_entries for a restaurant filtered by status, priority, or dining room",
    tags=["waitlist"],
    operation_id="list_waitlist_entries",
    response_model=WaitlistEntriesListResponse,
)
async def list_waitlist_entries(
    restaurant_id: int = Path(..., description="Restaurant ID", example=3),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by waitlist status", example="waiting"),
    priority: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by priority: low, medium, high", example="high"),
    dining_room_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by dining_room_id", example=5),
) -> WaitlistEntriesListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(WaitlistEntry).filter(WaitlistEntry.restaurant_id == restaurant_id)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter(WaitlistEntry.status == status)
    if priority is not None:
        query = query.filter(WaitlistEntry.priority == priority)
    if dining_room_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(WaitlistEntry.dining_room_id == dining_room_id)
    entries = query.order_by(WaitlistEntry.created_at.asc()).all()
    items: List[WaitlistEntriesListItem] = []
    for w in entries:
        items.append(
            WaitlistEntriesListItem(
                id=w.id,
                restaurant_id=w.restaurant_id,
                dining_room_id=w.dining_room_id,
                guest_id=w.guest_id,
                guest_name=w.guest_name,
                party_size=w.party_size,
                priority=w.priority,
                estimated_wait_minutes=w.estimated_wait_minutes,
                status=w.status,
                seat_time=format_datetime(w.seat_time),
                converted_reservation_id=w.converted_reservation_id,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return WaitlistEntriesListResponse(waitlist_entries=items)


@app.get(
    "/api/dining_rooms/{dining_room_id}/floor_view",
    summary="Get floor view for dining room",
    description="Retrieve tables and any current reservations for the dining room at the given datetime",
    tags=["floor_view"],
    operation_id="get_floor_view",
    response_model=FloorViewResponse,
)
async def get_floor_view(
    dining_room_id: int = Path(..., description="Dining room ID", example=5),
    current_datetime: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Datetime used to determine current reservations", example="2025-01-02T20:20:00Z"),
) -> FloorViewResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now_dt = parse_iso_datetime(current_datetime) if current_datetime is not None else now_utc()
    window_before = now_dt - timedelta(hours=2)
    window_after = now_dt + timedelta(hours=2)
    tables = session.query(Table).filter(Table.dining_room_id == dining_room_id).order_by(Table.table_number.asc()).all()
    items: List[FloorViewTableItem] = []
    for t in tables:
        res = (
            session.query(Reservation)
            .filter(Reservation.table_id == t.id)
            .filter(Reservation.status.in_(["booked", "confirmed", "seated"]))
            .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime >= window_before)
            .filter(Reservation.reservation_datetime <= window_after)
            .order_by(Reservation.reservation_datetime.asc())
            .first()
        )
        if res is not None:
            res_model = FloorViewReservationModel(
                id=res.id,
                guest_id=res.guest_id,
                reservation_datetime=format_datetime(res.reservation_datetime) or "",
                party_size=res.party_size,
                status=res.status,
            )
        else:
            res_model = None
        items.append(
            FloorViewTableItem(
                table=TableModel.from_orm_obj(t),
                current_reservation=res_model,
            )
        )
    result = FloorViewResponse(
        dining_room_id=dining_room_id,
        current_datetime=format_datetime(now_dt) or "",
        tables=items,
    )
    session.close()
    return result


@app.post(
    "/api/dining_rooms/{dining_room_id}/tables/auto_clean",
    summary="Auto clean dirty tables",
    description="Set status='free' for dirty tables whose last_seated_at is older than threshold minutes",
    tags=["floor_view", "tables"],
    operation_id="auto_clean_tables",
    response_model=AutoCleanTablesResponse,
)
async def auto_clean_tables(
    dining_room_id: int = Path(..., description="Dining room ID", example=5),
    body: AutoCleanTablesRequest = Body(...),
) -> AutoCleanTablesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now_dt = parse_iso_datetime(body.current_datetime) if body.current_datetime is not None else now_utc()
    threshold_minutes = body.threshold_minutes if body.threshold_minutes is not None else 20
    cutoff = now_dt - timedelta(minutes=threshold_minutes)
    dirty_tables = (
        session.query(Table)
        .filter(Table.dining_room_id == dining_room_id)
        .filter(Table.status == "dirty")
        .filter(Table.last_seated_at.isnot(None))
        .filter(Table.last_seated_at <= cutoff)
        .all()
    )
    updated_ids: List[int] = []
    for t in dirty_tables:
        t.status = "free"
        t.updated_at = now_dt
        updated_ids.append(t.id)
    session.commit()
    session.close()
    return AutoCleanTablesResponse(updated_table_ids=updated_ids)

def bool_from_int(v: Optional[int]) -> bool:
    if v is None:
        return False
    return bool(v)


def int_from_bool(v: Optional[bool]) -> int:
    if v is None:
        return 0
    return 1 if v else 0

@app.post(
    "/api/pets",
    summary="Create a new pet profile",
    description="Create a pet row owned by the current user (id=1).",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="create_pet",
    response_model=PetResponse,
)
async def create_pet_endpoint(body: PetCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> PetResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = Pet(
        owner_id=1,
        name=body.name,
        species=body.species,
        breed=body.breed,
        sex=body.sex,
        neuter_status=body.neuter_status,
        date_of_birth=date.fromisoformat(body.date_of_birth) if body.date_of_birth else None,
        microchip_id=body.microchip_id,
        primary_vet_clinic_id=body.primary_vet_clinic_id,
        allergies=body.allergies,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(pet)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pet)
    pet_model = PetModel(
        id=pet.id,
        owner_id=pet.owner_id,
        name=pet.name,
        species=pet.species,
        breed=pet.breed,
        sex=pet.sex,
        neuter_status=pet.neuter_status,
        date_of_birth=pet.date_of_birth.isoformat() if pet.date_of_birth else None,
        microchip_id=pet.microchip_id,
        primary_vet_clinic_id=pet.primary_vet_clinic_id,
        allergies=pet.allergies,
        created_at=pet.created_at,
        updated_at=pet.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return PetResponse(pet=pet_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/pets",
    summary="List pets for current user",
    description="Return all pets for owner_id=1 with optional filters.",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="list_pets",
    response_model=PetsListResponse,
)
async def list_pets_endpoint(
    species: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Optional filter by species", example="dog"),
    name_search: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Substring filter on name", example="Bud"),
) -> PetsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.owner_id == 1)
    if species is not None:
        query = query.filter(Pet.species == species)
    if name_search is not None:
        like = f"%{name_search}%"
        query = query.filter(Pet.name.ilike(like))
    pets = query.all()
    items: List[PetModel] = []
    for pet in pets:
        items.append(
            PetModel(
                id=pet.id,
                owner_id=pet.owner_id,
                name=pet.name,
                species=pet.species,
                breed=pet.breed,
                sex=pet.sex,
                neuter_status=pet.neuter_status,
                date_of_birth=pet.date_of_birth.isoformat() if pet.date_of_birth else None,
                microchip_id=pet.microchip_id,
                primary_vet_clinic_id=pet.primary_vet_clinic_id,
                allergies=pet.allergies,
                created_at=pet.created_at,
                updated_at=pet.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return PetsListResponse(pets=items)

@app.patch(
    "/api/pets/{pet_id}",
    summary="Update fields of a pet",
    description="Partially update a pet row for owner_id=1.",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="update_pet",
    response_model=PetResponse,
)
async def update_pet_endpoint(
    pet_id: int = Path(..., description="Pet id", example=10),
    body: PetUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> PetResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is None:
        pet_model = PetModel(
            id=0,
            owner_id=1,
            name="",
            species="",
            breed=None,
            sex=None,
            neuter_status=None,
            date_of_birth=None,
            microchip_id=None,
            primary_vet_clinic_id=None,
            allergies=None,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return PetResponse(pet=pet_model)
    if body.name is not None:
        pet.name = body.name
    if body.species is not None:
        pet.species = body.species
    if body.breed is not None:
        pet.breed = body.breed
    if body.sex is not None:
        pet.sex = body.sex
    if body.neuter_status is not None:
        pet.neuter_status = body.neuter_status
    if body.date_of_birth is not None:
        pet.date_of_birth = date.fromisoformat(body.date_of_birth)
    if body.microchip_id is not None:
        pet.microchip_id = body.microchip_id
    if body.primary_vet_clinic_id is not None:
        pet.primary_vet_clinic_id = body.primary_vet_clinic_id
    if body.allergies is not None:
        pet.allergies = body.allergies
    pet.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pet)
    pet_model = PetModel(
        id=pet.id,
        owner_id=pet.owner_id,
        name=pet.name,
        species=pet.species,
        breed=pet.breed,
        sex=pet.sex,
        neuter_status=pet.neuter_status,
        date_of_birth=pet.date_of_birth.isoformat() if pet.date_of_birth else None,
        microchip_id=pet.microchip_id,
        primary_vet_clinic_id=pet.primary_vet_clinic_id,
        allergies=pet.allergies,
        created_at=pet.created_at,
        updated_at=pet.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return PetResponse(pet=pet_model)

@app.get(
    "/api/service_providers",
    summary="Search service providers",
    description="Find service providers using optional name and type filters.",
    tags=["service_providers"],
    operation_id="list_service_providers",
    response_model=ServiceProvidersListResponse,
)
async def list_service_providers_endpoint(
    name_search: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Substring filter on name", example="Greenfield"),
    type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by type", example="vet"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Max rows", example=20),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Offset", example=0),
) -> ServiceProvidersListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(ServiceProvider)
    if name_search is not None:
        like = f"%{name_search}%"
        query = query.filter(ServiceProvider.name.ilike(like))
    if type is not None:
        query = query.filter(ServiceProvider.type == type)
    if offset is not None:
        query = query.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        query = query.limit(limit)
    providers = query.all()
    items: List[ServiceProviderModel] = []
    for sp in providers:
        items.append(
            ServiceProviderModel(
                id=sp.id,
                name=sp.name,
                type=sp.type,
                phone=sp.phone,
                email=sp.email,
                address=sp.address,
                notes=sp.notes,
                created_at=sp.created_at,
                updated_at=sp.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ServiceProvidersListResponse(service_providers=items)

@app.post(
    "/api/pets/{pet_id}/care_tasks",
    summary="Create care task",
    description="Insert a care_tasks row tied to a pet with owner_id=1.",
    tags=["care_tasks"],
    operation_id="create_care_task",
    response_model=CareTaskResponse,
)
async def create_care_task_endpoint(
    pet_id: int = Path(..., description="Pet id", example=10),
    body: CareTaskCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> CareTaskResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is None:
        task_model = CareTaskModel(
            id=0,
            pet_id=pet_id,
            title=body.title,
            description=body.description,
            frequency=body.frequency,
            schedule_rules=body.schedule_rules,
            is_active=body.is_active if body.is_active is not None else True,
            default_caregiver_id=body.default_caregiver_id,
            due_time_of_day=body.due_time_of_day,
            notify_if_not_completed_by_time=body.notify_if_not_completed_by_time,
            notify_enabled=body.notify_enabled if body.notify_enabled is not None else True,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return CareTaskResponse(care_task=task_model)
    task = CareTask(
        pet_id=pet_id,
        title=body.title,
        description=body.description,
        frequency=body.frequency,
        schedule_rules=body.schedule_rules,
        is_active=int_from_bool(body.is_active) if body.is_active is not None else 1,
        default_caregiver_id=body.default_caregiver_id,
        due_time_of_day=body.due_time_of_day,
        notify_if_not_completed_by_time=body.notify_if_not_completed_by_time,
        notify_enabled=int_from_bool(body.notify_enabled) if body.notify_enabled is not None else 1,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    if task.default_caregiver_id is not None:
        caregiver = session.query(Caregiver).filter(Caregiver.id == task.default_caregiver_id, Caregiver.owner_id == 1).first()
        if caregiver is None:
            task.default_caregiver_id = None
    session.add(task)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(task)
    task_model = CareTaskModel(
        id=task.id,
        pet_id=task.pet_id,
        title=task.title,
        description=task.description,
        frequency=task.frequency,
        schedule_rules=task.schedule_rules,
        is_active=bool_from_int(task.is_active),
        default_caregiver_id=task.default_caregiver_id,
        due_time_of_day=task.due_time_of_day,
        notify_if_not_completed_by_time=task.notify_if_not_completed_by_time,
        notify_enabled=bool_from_int(task.notify_enabled),
        created_at=task.created_at,
        updated_at=task.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return CareTaskResponse(care_task=task_model)


@app.post(

        care_task_id=care_task_id,
        caregiver_id=body.caregiver_id,
        role=body.role,
        start_date=date.fromisoformat(body.start_date) if body.start_date else None,
        end_date=date.fromisoformat(body.end_date) if body.end_date else None,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(assignment)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(assignment)
    assignment_model = CareTaskAssignmentModel(
        id=assignment.id,
        care_task_id=assignment.care_task_id,
        caregiver_id=assignment.caregiver_id,
        role=assignment.role,
        start_date=assignment.start_date.isoformat() if assignment.start_date else None,
        end_date=assignment.end_date.isoformat() if assignment.end_date else None,
        created_at=assignment.created_at,
        updated_at=assignment.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return CareTaskAssignmentResponse(care_task_assignment=assignment_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/care_logs",
    summary="Create care log entry",
    description="Insert a care_logs row for a care task and pet with owner_id=1.",
    tags=["care_logs"],
    operation_id="create_care_log",
    response_model=CareLogResponse,
)
async def create_care_log_endpoint(
    body: CareLogCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> CareLogResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == body.pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    task = session.query(CareTask).filter(CareTask.id == body.care_task_id).first()
    caregiver = None
    if body.caregiver_id is not None:
        caregiver = session.query(Caregiver).filter(Caregiver.id == body.caregiver_id, Caregiver.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is None or task is None:
        log_model = CareLogModel(
            id=0,
            care_task_id=body.care_task_id,
            pet_id=body.pet_id,
            caregiver_id=body.caregiver_id,
            occurred_at=datetime.fromisoformat(body.occurred_at.replace("Z", "+00:00")),
            notes=body.notes,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return CareLogResponse(care_log=log_model)
    occurred_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(body.occurred_at.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    caregiver_id_val = caregiver.id if caregiver is not None else None
    log = CareLog(
        care_task_id=body.care_task_id,
        pet_id=body.pet_id,
        caregiver_id=caregiver_id_val,
        occurred_at=occurred_dt,
        notes=body.notes,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(log)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(log)
    log_model = CareLogModel(
        id=log.id,
        care_task_id=log.care_task_id,
        pet_id=log.pet_id,
        caregiver_id=log.caregiver_id,
        occurred_at=log.occurred_at,
        notes=log.notes,
        created_at=log.created_at,
        updated_at=log.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return CareLogResponse(care_log=log_model)

@app.post(
    "/api/appointments",
    summary="Create appointment",
    description="Insert appointments row for a pet owned by current user.",
    tags=["appointments"],
    operation_id="create_appointment",
    response_model=AppointmentResponse,
)
async def create_appointment_endpoint(
    body: AppointmentCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> AppointmentResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == body.pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    sp = session.query(ServiceProvider).filter(ServiceProvider.id == body.service_provider_id).first()
    service_ok = True
    tier_ok = True
    if body.service_id is not None:
        service = session.query(ServiceProviderService).filter(
            ServiceProviderService.id == body.service_id,
            ServiceProviderService.service_provider_id == body.service_provider_id,
        ).first()
        if service is None:
            service_ok = False
    if body.pricing_tier_id is not None and body.service_id is not None:
        tier = session.query(ServicePricingTier).filter(
            ServicePricingTier.id == body.pricing_tier_id,
            ServicePricingTier.service_id == body.service_id,
        ).first()
        if tier is None:
            tier_ok = False
    if pet is None or sp is None or not service_ok or not tier_ok:
        start_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(body.start_datetime.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
        end_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(body.end_datetime.replace("Z", "+00:00")) if body.end_datetime else None
        appt_model = AppointmentModel(
            id=0,
            pet_id=body.pet_id,
            owner_id=1,
            service_provider_id=body.service_provider_id,
            service_id=body.service_id,
            pricing_tier_id=body.pricing_tier_id,
            start_datetime=start_dt,
            end_datetime=end_dt,
            notes=body.notes,
            status=body.status if body.status is not None else "scheduled",
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return AppointmentResponse(appointment=appt_model)
    start_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(body.start_datetime.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    end_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(body.end_datetime.replace("Z", "+00:00")) if body.end_datetime else None
    appt = Appointment(
        pet_id=body.pet_id,
        owner_id=1,
        service_provider_id=body.service_provider_id,
        service_id=body.service_id,
        pricing_tier_id=body.pricing_tier_id,
        start_datetime=start_dt,
        end_datetime=end_dt,
        notes=body.notes,
        status=body.status if body.status is not None else "scheduled",
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(appt)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(appt)
    appt_model = AppointmentModel(
        id=appt.id,
        pet_id=appt.pet_id,
        owner_id=appt.owner_id,
        service_provider_id=appt.service_provider_id,
        service_id=appt.service_id,
        pricing_tier_id=appt.pricing_tier_id,
        start_datetime=appt.start_datetime,
        end_datetime=appt.end_datetime,
        notes=appt.notes,
        status=appt.status,
        created_at=appt.created_at,
        updated_at=appt.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return AppointmentResponse(appointment=appt_model)


@app.get(
    "/api/pets/{pet_id}/medications",
    summary="List medications for pet",
    description="Return medications rows for a given pet belonging to user 1.",
    tags=["medications"],
    operation_id="list_medications_for_pet",
    response_model=MedicationsListResponse,
)
async def list_medications_for_pet_endpoint(
    pet_id: int = Path(..., description="Pet id", example=11),
    medication_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Optional exact medication name filter", example="Prednisone"),
) -> MedicationsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is None:
        session.close()
        return MedicationsListResponse(medications=[])
    query = session.query(Medication).filter(Medication.pet_id == pet_id)
    if medication_name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Medication.medication_name == medication_name)
    meds = query.all()
    items: List[MedicationsListItemModel] = []
    for m in meds:
        items.append(
            MedicationsListItemModel(
                id=m.id,
                pet_id=m.pet_id,
                medication_name=m.medication_name,
                dosage_instructions=m.dosage_instructions,
                prescribing_clinic_id=m.prescribing_clinic_id,
                refill_reminder_date=m.refill_reminder_date.isoformat() if m.refill_reminder_date else None,
                created_at=m.created_at,
                updated_at=m.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return MedicationsListResponse(medications=items)


@app.patch(
    "/api/medications/{medication_id}",
    summary="Update medication",
    description="Partially update a medications row belonging to a pet owned by user 1.",
    tags=["medications"],
    operation_id="update_medication",
    response_model=MedicationResponse,
)
async def update_medication_endpoint(
    medication_id: int = Path(..., description="Medication id", example=400),
    body: MedicationUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> MedicationResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    med = session.query(Medication).filter(Medication.id == medication_id).first()
    if med is None:
        med_model = MedicationModel(
            id=0,
            pet_id=0,
            medication_name="",
            dosage_instructions=body.dosage_instructions if body.dosage_instructions is not None else "",
            prescribing_clinic_id=body.prescribing_clinic_id,
            refill_reminder_date=body.refill_reminder_date,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return MedicationResponse(medication=med_model)
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == med.pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is None:
        med_model = MedicationModel(
            id=0,
            pet_id=med.pet_id,
            medication_name=med.medication_name,
            dosage_instructions=med.dosage_instructions,
            prescribing_clinic_id=med.prescribing_clinic_id,
            refill_reminder_date=med.refill_reminder_date.isoformat() if med.refill_reminder_date else None,
            created_at=med.created_at,
            updated_at=med.updated_at,
        )
        session.close()
        return MedicationResponse(medication=med_model)
    if body.dosage_instructions is not None:
        med.dosage_instructions = body.dosage_instructions
    if body.prescribing_clinic_id is not None:
        med.prescribing_clinic_id = body.prescribing_clinic_id
    if body.refill_reminder_date is not None:
        med.refill_reminder_date = date.fromisoformat(body.refill_reminder_date)
    med.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(med)
    med_model = MedicationModel(
        id=med.id,
        pet_id=med.pet_id,
        medication_name=med.medication_name,
        dosage_instructions=med.dosage_instructions,
        prescribing_clinic_id=med.prescribing_clinic_id,
        refill_reminder_date=med.refill_reminder_date.isoformat() if med.refill_reminder_date else None,
        created_at=med.created_at,
        updated_at=med.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return MedicationResponse(medication=med_model)

    summary="Send message in thread",
    description="Insert messages row as user in existing messaging thread.",
    tags=["messages"],
    operation_id="create_message",
    response_model=MessageResponse,
)
async def create_message_endpoint(
    thread_id: int = Path(..., description="Thread id", example=900),
    body: MessageCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> MessageResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    thread = session.query(MessagingThread).filter(MessagingThread.id == thread_id, MessagingThread.owner_id == 1).first()
    if thread is None:
        msg_model = MessageModel(
            id=0,
            thread_id=thread_id,
            sender_type="user",
            sender_user_id=1,
            sender_service_provider_id=None,
            body=body.body,
            sent_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            read_receipt_requested=bool(body.read_receipt_requested) if body.read_receipt_requested is not None else False,
            read_at=None,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return MessageResponse(message=msg_model)
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    msg = Message(
        thread_id=thread_id,
        sender_type="user",
        sender_user_id=1,
        sender_service_provider_id=None,
        body=body.body,
        sent_at=now,
        read_receipt_requested=int_from_bool(body.read_receipt_requested) if body.read_receipt_requested is not None else 0,
        read_at=None,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(msg)
    thread.updated_at = now
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(msg)
    msg_model = MessageModel(
        id=msg.id,
        thread_id=msg.thread_id,
        sender_type=msg.sender_type,
        sender_user_id=msg.sender_user_id,
        sender_service_provider_id=msg.sender_service_provider_id,
        body=msg.body,
        sent_at=msg.sent_at,
        read_receipt_requested=bool_from_int(msg.read_receipt_requested),
        read_at=msg.read_at,
        created_at=msg.created_at,
        updated_at=msg.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return MessageResponse(message=msg_model)


@app.post(
    "/api/record_imports",
    summary="Create record import metadata",
    description="Insert record_imports row without file content.",
    tags=["record_imports"],
    operation_id="create_record_import",
    response_model=RecordImportResponse,
)
async def create_record_import_endpoint(
    body: RecordImportCreateRequest = Body(...),
) -> RecordImportResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == body.pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is None:
        ri_model = RecordImportModel(
            id=0,
            pet_id=body.pet_id,
            owner_id=1,
            file_name=body.file_name,
            source_system=body.source_system,
            import_date=body.import_date,
            file_size_bytes=body.file_size_bytes,
            storage_uri=body.storage_uri,
            created_at=None,
            updated_at=None,
        )
        session.close()
        return RecordImportResponse(record_import=ri_model)
    ri = RecordImport(
        pet_id=body.pet_id,
        owner_id=1,
        file_name=body.file_name,
        source_system=body.source_system,
        import_date=date.fromisoformat(body.import_date),
        file_size_bytes=body.file_size_bytes,
        storage_uri=body.storage_uri,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(ri)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(ri)
    ri_model = RecordImportModel(
        id=ri.id,
        pet_id=ri.pet_id,
        owner_id=ri.owner_id,
        file_name=ri.file_name,
        source_system=ri.source_system,
        import_date=ri.import_date.isoformat(),
        file_size_bytes=ri.file_size_bytes,
        storage_uri=ri.storage_uri,
        created_at=ri.created_at,
        updated_at=ri.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return RecordImportResponse(record_import=ri_model)

)

database_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_PATH", "sqlite:///outputs/databases/fursit_home_pet_sitting_network.db")
engine = create_engine(database_url, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False} if database_url.startswith("sqlite") else {})
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

@app.post(
    "/api/pets",
    response_model=PetResponse,
    summary="Create a new pet profile",
    description="Create a pet and optional behavior tags for the fixed owner user_id=1.",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="create_pet_with_behavior_tags",
)
async def create_pet_with_behavior_tags(request: PetCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> PetResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    owner_id = 1
    pet = Pet(
        owner_id=owner_id,
        name=request.name,
        species=request.species,
        breed=request.breed,
        sex=request.sex,
        age_years=request.age_years,
        neutered_spayed=request.neutered_spayed,
        feeding_schedule=request.feeding_schedule,
        medication_needs=request.medication_needs,
        emergency_contact=request.emergency_contact,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(pet)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pet)
    tags_list: List[PetBehaviorTagEntry] = []
    if request.behavior_tags:
        for t in request.behavior_tags:
            tag_row = PetBehaviorTag(pet_id=pet.id, tag=t)
            session.add(tag_row)
            tags_list.append(PetBehaviorTagEntry(tag_value=t))
        session.commit()
    pet_response = PetResponse(
        id=pet.id,
        owner_id=pet.owner_id,
        name=pet.name,
        species=pet.species,
        breed=pet.breed,
        sex=pet.sex,
        age_years=pet.age_years,
        neutered_spayed=pet.neutered_spayed,
        feeding_schedule=pet.feeding_schedule,
        medication_needs=pet.medication_needs,
        emergency_contact=pet.emergency_contact,
        behavior_tags=tags_list,
        created_at=pet.created_at,
        updated_at=pet.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return pet_response


@app.get(
    "/api/pets",
    response_model=PetsListResponse,
    summary="List pets for current owner",
    description="Return all pets owned by the fixed user_id=1 including behavior tags.",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="list_my_pets",
)
async def list_my_pets() -> PetsListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    owner_id = 1
    pets = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.owner_id == owner_id).all()
    pets_list: List[PetResponse] = []
    for pet in pets:
        tag_rows = session.query(PetBehaviorTag).filter(PetBehaviorTag.pet_id == pet.id).all()
        tags_list = [PetBehaviorTagEntry(tag_value=tr.tag) for tr in tag_rows]
        pets_list.append(
            PetResponse(
                id=pet.id,
                owner_id=pet.owner_id,
                name=pet.name,
                species=pet.species,
                breed=pet.breed,
                sex=pet.sex,
                age_years=pet.age_years,
                neutered_spayed=pet.neutered_spayed,
                feeding_schedule=pet.feeding_schedule,
                medication_needs=pet.medication_needs,
                emergency_contact=pet.emergency_contact,
                behavior_tags=tags_list,
                created_at=pet.created_at,
                updated_at=pet.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return PetsListResponse(pets=pets_list)


@app.post(
    "/api/pets/{pet_id}/behavior-tags",
    response_model=AddBehaviorTagsResponse,
    summary="Add behavior tags to an existing pet",
    description="Attach behavior tags to a pet owned by the fixed user_id=1.",
    tags=["pets"],
    operation_id="add_pet_behavior_tags",
)
async def add_pet_behavior_tags(
    pet_id: int = Path(..., description="Pet ID to add tags to", example=10),
    request: AddBehaviorTagsRequest = Body(...),
) -> AddBehaviorTagsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    pet = session.query(Pet).filter(Pet.id == pet_id, Pet.owner_id == 1).first()
    if pet is not None:
        for t in request.tags:
            existing = session.query(PetBehaviorTag).filter(PetBehaviorTag.pet_id == pet.id, PetBehaviorTag.tag == t).first()
            if existing is None:
                session.add(PetBehaviorTag(pet_id=pet.id, tag=t))
        session.commit()
        tag_rows = session.query(PetBehaviorTag).filter(PetBehaviorTag.pet_id == pet.id).all()
        tags_list = [PetBehaviorTagEntry(tag_value=tr.tag) for tr in tag_rows]
        response = AddBehaviorTagsResponse(pet_id=pet.id, behavior_tags=tags_list)
        session.close()
        return response
    else:
        response = AddBehaviorTagsResponse(pet_id=pet_id, behavior_tags=[])
        session.close()
        return response


@app.get(
    "/api/sitter-profiles/me",
    response_model=SitterProfileResponse,
    summary="Get current user's sitter profile",
    description="Retrieve sitter profile for fixed user_id=1 with areas and availability.",
    tags=["sitters"],
    operation_id="get_my_sitter_profile",
)
async def get_my_sitter_profile() -> SitterProfileResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    sitter = session.query(SitterProfile).filter(SitterProfile.user_id == user_id).first()
    if sitter is None:
        sitter = SitterProfile(user_id=user_id, experience_level=None, bio=None, created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=datetime.utcnow())
        session.add(sitter)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(sitter)
    areas_rows = session.query(SitterServiceArea).filter(SitterServiceArea.sitter_id == sitter.id).all()
    areas_list = [SitterServiceAreaEntry(zip_code=a.zip_code) for a in areas_rows]
    avail_rows = session.query(SitterAvailability).filter(SitterAvailability.sitter_id == sitter.id).all()
    avail_list = [
        SitterAvailabilityEntry(
            id=a.id,
            start_datetime=a.start_datetime,
            end_datetime=a.end_datetime,
            service_type=a.service_type,
            is_recurring=a.is_recurring,
            recurrence_rule=a.recurrence_rule,
        )
        for a in avail_rows
    ]
    response = SitterProfileResponse(
        id=sitter.id,
        user_id=sitter.user_id,

    "/api/sitter-profiles/me/service-areas",
    response_model=ServiceAreasSetResponse,
    summary="Replace my sitter service areas",
    description="Replace sitter service areas for the current sitter profile.",
    tags=["sitters"],
    operation_id="set_my_sitter_service_areas",
)
async def set_my_sitter_service_areas(request: ServiceAreasSetRequest = Body(...)) -> ServiceAreasSetResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    user_id = 1
    sitter = session.query(SitterProfile).filter(SitterProfile.user_id == user_id).first()
    if sitter is None:
        sitter = SitterProfile(user_id=user_id, experience_level=None, bio=None, created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=datetime.utcnow())
        session.add(sitter)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(sitter)
    existing = session.query(SitterServiceArea).filter(SitterServiceArea.sitter_id == sitter.id).all()
    for e in existing:
        session.delete(e)
    for z in request.zip_codes:
        session.add(SitterServiceArea(sitter_id=sitter.id, zip_code=z))
    session.commit()
    rows = session.query(SitterServiceArea).filter(SitterServiceArea.sitter_id == sitter.id).all()
    areas_list = [SitterServiceAreaEntry(zip_code=r.zip_code) for r in rows]
    response = ServiceAreasSetResponse(sitter_id=sitter.id, service_areas=areas_list)
    session.close()
    return response

@app.get(
    "/api/service-listings/search",
    response_model=ServiceListingSearchResponse,
    summary="Search service listings",
    description="Search active service listings by type, zip, pets, and date range.",
    tags=["service_listings", "search"],
    operation_id="search_service_listings",
)
async def search_service_listings(
    service_type: str = Query(..., description="Required service type to search for", example="overnight_stay"),
    location_zip: str = Query(..., description="Owner's ZIP code to match sitter service areas", example="60614"),
    num_pets: int = Query(..., description="Number of pets needing the service", example=2),
    start_datetime: str = Query(..., description="Requested service start datetime in ISO format", example="2026-07-03T18:00:00"),
    end_datetime: str = Query(..., description="Requested service end datetime in ISO format", example="2026-07-07T09:00:00"),
) -> ServiceListingSearchResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    start_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(start_datetime)
    end_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(end_datetime)
    listings = (
        session.query(ServiceListing)
        .filter(ServiceListing.service_type == service_type, ServiceListing.is_active == 1, ServiceListing.max_pets >= num_pets)
        .all()
    )
    results: List[ServiceListingSearchResult] = []
    for listing in listings:
        areas = session.query(SitterServiceArea).filter(SitterServiceArea.sitter_id == listing.sitter_id, SitterServiceArea.zip_code == location_zip).all()
        if not areas:
            continue
        sitter = session.query(SitterProfile).filter(SitterProfile.id == listing.sitter_id).first()
        avail = (
            session.query(SitterAvailability)
            .filter(
                SitterAvailability.sitter_id == listing.sitter_id,
                SitterAvailability.service_type == service_type,
                SitterAvailability.start_datetime <= start_dt,
                SitterAvailability.end_datetime >= end_dt,
            )
            .first()
        )
        available_flag = True if avail is not None else False
        area_entries = [SitterServiceAreaEntry(zip_code=a.zip_code) for a in areas]
        result = ServiceListingSearchResult(
            listing=ServiceListingSearchResponseListing(
                id=listing.id,
                sitter_id=listing.sitter_id,
                service_type=listing.service_type,
                duration=listing.duration,
                base_price=listing.base_price,
                max_pets=listing.max_pets,
                is_active=listing.is_active,
            ),
            sitter_profile=ServiceListingSearchResponseSitter(
                id=sitter.id if sitter else 0,
                experience_level=sitter.experience_level if sitter else None,
            ),
            service_areas=area_entries,
            available=available_flag,
        )
        results.append(result)
    session.close()
    return ServiceListingSearchResponse(results=results)

    tags=["bookings"],
    operation_id="create_booking",
)
async def create_booking(request: BookingCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> BookingResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    owner_id = 1
    booking_id_value = request.booking_id if request.booking_id is not None else f"BK{int(datetime.utcnow().timestamp())}"
    start_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(request.start_datetime)
    end_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(request.end_datetime)
    booking = Booking(
        id=booking_id_value,
        owner_id=owner_id,
        sitter_id=request.sitter_id,
        listing_id=request.listing_id,
        thread_id=request.thread_id,
        status=request.status,
        service_type=request.service_type,
        start_datetime=start_dt,
        end_datetime=end_dt,
        location_zip=request.location_zip,
        num_pets=request.num_pets,
        total_base_price=request.total_base_price,
        care_instructions_id=None,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(booking)
    session.commit()
    for pid in request.selected_pet_ids:
        bp = BookingPet(booking_id=booking.id, pet_id=pid)
        session.add(bp)
    session.commit()
    pets_rows = session.query(BookingPet).filter(BookingPet.booking_id == booking.id).all()
    selected_pets = [BookingSelectedPetEntry(pet_id=pr.pet_id) for pr in pets_rows]
    response = BookingResponse(
        id=booking.id,
        owner_id=booking.owner_id,
        sitter_id=booking.sitter_id,
        listing_id=booking.listing_id,
        thread_id=booking.thread_id,
        status=booking.status,
        service_type=booking.service_type,
        start_datetime=booking.start_datetime,
        end_datetime=booking.end_datetime,
        location_zip=booking.location_zip,
        num_pets=booking.num_pets,
        total_base_price=booking.total_base_price,
        care_instructions_id=booking.care_instructions_id,
        selected_pets=selected_pets,
        created_at=booking.created_at,
        updated_at=booking.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return response

    response_model=VisitUpdateResponse,
    summary="Create a visit update for a booking",
    description="Create a visit update for an active booking with optional photos.",
    tags=["visit_updates"],
    operation_id="create_visit_update",
)
async def create_visit_update(request: VisitUpdateCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> VisitUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    sitter = session.query(SitterProfile).filter(SitterProfile.user_id == 1).first()
    if sitter is None:
        sitter = SitterProfile(user_id=1, experience_level=None, bio=None, created_at=datetime.utcnow(), updated_at=datetime.utcnow())
        session.add(sitter)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(sitter)
    visit = VisitUpdate(
        booking_id=request.booking_id,
        sitter_id=sitter.id,
        check_in_time=datetime.fromisoformat(request.check_in_time),
        check_out_time=datetime.fromisoformat(request.check_out_time),
        brief_notes=request.brief_notes,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(visit)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(visit)
    photos_list: List[VisitPhotoResponseEntry] = []
    if request.photos:
        for p in request.photos:
            vp = VisitPhoto(
                visit_update_id=visit.id,

                    id=vp.id,
                    photo_url=vp.photo_url,
                    metadata=vp.metadata_,
                )
            )
    response = VisitUpdateResponse(
        id=visit.id,
        booking_id=visit.booking_id,

@app.get(
    "/api/sitters/{sitter_id}/rating",
    response_model=SitterRatingResponse,
    summary="Get average rating for a sitter",
    description="Calculate average rating and review count for a sitter.",
    tags=["reviews"],
    operation_id="get_sitter_average_rating",
)
async def get_sitter_average_rating(
    sitter_id: int = Path(..., description="Sitter profile ID to compute rating for", example=5)
) -> SitterRatingResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    reviews = session.query(Review).filter(Review.sitter_id == sitter_id).all()
    if reviews:
        total = sum(r.rating for r in reviews)
        count = len(reviews)
        avg = total / count
    else:
        avg = 0.0
        count = 0
    response = SitterRatingResponse(
        sitter_id=sitter_id,
        average_rating=avg,
        review_count=count,
    )
    session.close()
    return response

async def estimate_quote_from_price_rules(request: QuoteEstimateRequest = Body(...)) -> QuoteEstimateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rules = (
        session.query(PriceRule)
        .filter(
            PriceRule.sitter_id == request.sitter_id,
            PriceRule.service_type == request.service_type,
            PriceRule.is_active == 1,
        )
        .all()
    )
    base_component = 0.0
    additional_component = 0.0
    weekend_component = 0.0
    service_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(request.service_datetime)
    is_weekend_flag = service_dt.weekday() >= 5
    for rule in rules:
        if rule.rule_type == "per_pet":
            if rule.base_price is not None:
                base_component += rule.base_price
            if rule.extra_per_additional_pet is not None and request.num_pets > 1:
                additional_component += rule.extra_per_additional_pet * (request.num_pets - 1)
        if rule.rule_type == "weekend_surcharge" and is_weekend_flag:
            if rule.weekend_surcharge_percent is not None and rule.base_price is not None:
                weekend_component += (rule.base_price + additional_component) * (rule.weekend_surcharge_percent / 100.0)
    total = base_component + additional_component + weekend_component
    response = QuoteEstimateResponse(
        sitter_id=request.sitter_id,
        service_type=request.service_type,
        num_pets=request.num_pets,
        is_weekend=is_weekend_flag,
        base_component=base_component,
        additional_pets_component=additional_component,
        weekend_surcharge_component=weekend_component,
        total_estimated_price=total,
    )
    session.close()
    return response


@app.post(
    "/api/admin/booking-flags",
    response_model=BookingFlagResponse,
    summary="Flag a booking for admin review",
    description="Create a booking flag row with reason text for a booking.",
    tags=["admin", "booking_flags"],
    operation_id="admin_flag_booking",
)
async def admin_flag_booking(request: BookingFlagCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> BookingFlagResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    admin_id = 1
    flag = BookingFlag(
        booking_id=request.booking_id,
        flagged_by_admin_id=admin_id,
        reason=request.reason,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(flag)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(flag)
    response = BookingFlagResponse(
        id=flag.id,
        booking_id=flag.booking_id,
        flagged_by_admin_id=flag.flagged_by_admin_id,
        reason=flag.reason,
        created_at=flag.created_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return response


@app.post(

async def admin_create_dispute_record(request: DisputeRecordCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> DisputeRecordResponse:

    return response


@app.get(
    "/api/admin/sitters/{sitter_id}/performance-dashboard",
    response_model=SitterPerformanceDashboardResponse,
    summary="Get sitter performance metrics for admins",
    description="Return aggregate statistics for a sitter for admin dashboards.",
    tags=["admin", "sitters"],
    operation_id="admin_get_sitter_performance_dashboard",
)
async def admin_get_sitter_performance_dashboard(
    sitter_id: int = Path(..., description="Sitter profile ID to compute performance metrics for", example=5)
) -> SitterPerformanceDashboardResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    bookings = session.query(Booking).filter(Booking.sitter_id == sitter_id, Booking.status == "completed").all()
    total_completed = len(bookings)
    reviews = session.query(Review).filter(Review.sitter_id == sitter_id).all()
    if reviews:
        total_rating = sum(r.rating for r in reviews)
        review_count = len(reviews)
        avg_rating = total_rating / review_count
    else:
        avg_rating = 0.0
        review_count = 0
    disputes = session.query(DisputeRecord).filter(DisputeRecord.sitter_id == sitter_id).all()
    dispute_count = len(disputes)
    response = SitterPerformanceDashboardResponse(
        sitter_id=sitter_id,
        total_completed_bookings=total_completed,
        average_rating=avg_rating,
        review_count=review_count,
        dispute_count=dispute_count,
    )
    session.close()
    return response
