@app.get(
    "/api/projects",
    summary="List projects with filters and pagination",
    description="Retrieve projects filtered by status, country, theme, and ordering.",
    tags=["projects"],
    operation_id="list_projects",
    response_model=ProjectListResponseModel,
)
async def list_projects(
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by project status.", example="active"),
    country: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter projects by country.", example="Kenya"),
    theme_code: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by theme code.", example="education"),
    ordering: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Sort by 'percent_funded_asc' or 'percent_funded_desc'.", example="percent_funded_asc"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(20, description="Maximum number of projects to return.", example=20),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Number of records to skip.", example=0),
) -> ProjectListResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    q = session.query(Project)
    if status is not None:
        q = q.filter(Project.status == status)
    if country is not None:
        q = q.filter(Project.country == country)
    if theme_code is not None:
        theme = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.code == theme_code).first()
        if theme is not None:
            pt_project_ids = [pt.project_id for pt in session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.theme_id == theme.id).all()]
            if pt_project_ids:
                q = q.filter(Project.id.in_(pt_project_ids))
            else:
                q = q.filter(Project.id == -1)
        else:
            q = q.filter(Project.id == -1)
    total_count = q.count()
    projects = q.offset(offset if offset is not None else 0).limit(limit if limit is not None else 20).all()
    project_ids = [p.id for p in projects]
    themes_map: Dict[int, List[ProjectThemeModel]] = {}
    if project_ids:
        pts = session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.project_id.in_(project_ids)).all()
        theme_ids = list({pt.theme_id for pt in pts})
        themes = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.id.in_(theme_ids)).all()
        theme_by_id = {t.id: t for t in themes}
        for pt in pts:
            if pt.project_id not in themes_map:
                themes_map[pt.project_id] = []
            t = theme_by_id.get(pt.theme_id)
            if t is not None:
                themes_map[pt.project_id].append(ProjectThemeModel(code=t.code, name=t.name))
    donations = session.query(Donation).filter(Donation.project_id.in_(project_ids), Donation.payment_status == "succeeded").all() if project_ids else []
    donations_by_project: Dict[int, float] = {}
    for d in donations:
        donations_by_project[d.project_id] = donations_by_project.get(d.project_id, 0.0) + (d.amount if d.amount is not None else 0.0)
    project_items: List[ProjectListItemModel] = []
    for p in projects:
        amount_raised = donations_by_project.get(p.id, 0.0)
        percent_funded = 0.0
        if p.goal_amount and p.goal_amount > 0:
            percent_funded = (amount_raised / p.goal_amount) * 100.0
        item = ProjectListItemModel(
            project_code=p.project_code,
            id=p.id,
            organization_id=p.organization_id,
            title=p.title,
            description=p.description,
            country=p.country,
            goal_amount=p.goal_amount,
            currency=p.currency,
            status=p.status,
            start_date=p.start_date,
            end_date=p.end_date,
            themes=themes_map.get(p.id, []),
            amount_raised=amount_raised,
            percent_funded=percent_funded,
            created_at=p.created_at,
            updated_at=p.updated_at,
        )
        project_items.append(item)
    if ordering in ("percent_funded_asc", "percent_funded_desc"):
        reverse = ordering == "percent_funded_desc"
        project_items.sort(key=lambda x: x.percent_funded, reverse=reverse)
    session.close()
    return ProjectListResponseModel(projects=project_items, total_count=total_count)

@app.post(
    "/api/projects",
    summary="Create a new project under an organization",
    description="Create a project for an organization and attach theme codes and budget items.",
    tags=["projects"],
    operation_id="create_project",
    response_model=CreateProjectResponseModel,
)
async def create_project(
    input_data: CreateProjectInputModel = Body(..., description="Project creation payload."),
) -> CreateProjectResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    org = session.query(Organization).filter(Organization.id == input_data.organization_id).first()
    if org is None:
        org = Organization(id=input_data.organization_id, name="Org", type="nonprofit", country=None, website=None, owner_user_id=1, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(org)
        session.commit()
    existing_project = session.query(Project).filter(Project.project_code == input_data.project_code).first()
    if existing_project is None:
        project = Project(
            project_code=input_data.project_code,
            organization_id=input_data.organization_id,
            title=input_data.title,
            description=input_data.description,
            country=input_data.country,
            goal_amount=input_data.goal_amount,
            currency=input_data.currency if input_data.currency is not None else "USD",
            status=input_data.status if input_data.status is not None else "draft",
            start_date=None,
            end_date=None,
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(project)
        session.commit()
    else:
        project = existing_project
    themes_list: List[ProjectThemeModel] = []
    for code in input_data.theme_codes:
        theme = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.code == code).first()
        if theme is None:
            theme = Theme(code=code, name=code.capitalize(), description=None, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
            session.add(theme)
            session.commit()
        existing_pt = session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.project_id == project.id, ProjectTheme.theme_id == theme.id).first()
        if existing_pt is None:
            pt = ProjectTheme(project_id=project.id, theme_id=theme.id)
            session.add(pt)
            session.commit()
        themes_list.append(ProjectThemeModel(code=theme.code, name=theme.name))
    budget_items_models: List[BudgetItemModel] = []
    if input_data.budget_items is not None:
        for b in input_data.budget_items:
            bi = ProjectBudgetItem(
                project_id=project.id,
                category_name=b.category_name,
                description=b.description,
                amount=b.amount,
                currency=b.currency if b.currency is not None else project.currency,
                sort_order=b.sort_order,
                created_at=now,
                updated_at=now,
            )
            session.add(bi)
            session.commit()
            budget_items_models.append(
                BudgetItemModel(
                    id=bi.id,
                    category_name=bi.category_name,
                    description=bi.description,
                    amount=bi.amount,
                    currency=bi.currency,
                    sort_order=bi.sort_order,
                )
            )
    project_model = ProjectCreatedModel(
        id=project.id,
        project_code=project.project_code,
        organization_id=project.organization_id,
        title=project.title,
        description=project.description,
        country=project.country,
        goal_amount=project.goal_amount,
        currency=project.currency,
        status=project.status,
        themes=themes_list,
        budget_items=budget_items_models,
        created_at=project.created_at,
        updated_at=project.updated_at,
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateProjectResponseModel(project=project_model)

@app.get(
    "/api/projects/{project_code}",
    summary="Get detailed project by project_code",
    description="Retrieve a single project with themes, budget, milestones, and updates.",
    tags=["projects"],
    operation_id="get_project_by_code",

)
async def get_project_by_code(
    project_code: str = Path(..., description="Unique project code to retrieve.", example="PROJ-WASH-7788"),
) -> ProjectDetailResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    project = session.query(Project).filter(Project.project_code == project_code).first()
    if project is None:
        session.close()
        empty = ProjectDetailModel(
            id=0,
            project_code=project_code,
            organization_id=0,
            title="",
            description=None,
            country="",
            goal_amount=0.0,
            currency="USD",
            status="draft",
            start_date=None,
            end_date=None,
            themes=[],
            budget_items=[],
            milestones=[],
            status_updates=[],
            disbursement_preferences=None,
        )
        return ProjectDetailResponseModel(project=empty)
    pts = session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.project_id == project.id).all()
    theme_ids = [pt.theme_id for pt in pts]
    themes = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.id.in_(theme_ids)).all() if theme_ids else []
    themes_models = [ProjectThemeModel(code=t.code, name=t.name) for t in themes]
    budget_items = session.query(ProjectBudgetItem).filter(ProjectBudgetItem.project_id == project.id).order_by(ProjectBudgetItem.sort_order.is_(None), ProjectBudgetItem.sort_order).all()
    budget_models = [
        BudgetItemModel(
            id=bi.id,
            category_name=bi.category_name,
            description=bi.description,
            amount=bi.amount,
            currency=bi.currency,
            sort_order=bi.sort_order,
        )
        for bi in budget_items
    ]
    milestones = session.query(ProjectMilestone).filter(ProjectMilestone.project_id == project.id).all()
    milestones_models = [
        ProjectMilestoneModel(
            id=m.id,
            project_id=m.project_id,
            title=m.title,
            description=m.description,
            target_date=m.target_date,
            status=m.status if m.status is not None else "planned",
            created_at=m.created_at,
        )
        for m in milestones
    ]
    status_updates = session.query(ProjectStatusUpdate).filter(ProjectStatusUpdate.project_id == project.id).order_by(ProjectStatusUpdate.created_at.desc()).all()
    status_updates_models = [
        ProjectStatusUpdateModel(
            id=s.id,
            project_id=s.project_id,
            author_user_id=s.author_user_id,
            content=s.content,
            created_at=s.created_at,
        )
        for s in status_updates
    ]
    disb = session.query(ProjectDisbursementPreference).filter(ProjectDisbursementPreference.project_id == project.id).first()
    disb_model: Optional[DisbursementPreferenceModel] = None

            id=disb.id,
            project_id=disb.project_id,
            organization_id=disb.organization_id,
            method=disb.method,
            schedule=disb.schedule,
            currency=disb.currency,
            bank_account_json=disb.bank_account_json,
            created_at=disb.created_at,
            updated_at=disb.updated_at,
        )
    project_model = ProjectDetailModel(
        id=project.id,
        project_code=project.project_code,
        organization_id=project.organization_id,
        title=project.title,
        description=project.description,
        country=project.country,
        goal_amount=project.goal_amount,
        currency=project.currency,
        status=project.status,
        start_date=project.start_date,
        end_date=project.end_date,
        themes=themes_models,
        budget_items=budget_models,
        milestones=milestones_models,
        status_updates=status_updates_models,
        disbursement_preferences=disb_model,
    )
    session.close()
    return ProjectDetailResponseModel(project=project_model)

        user = User(id=current_user_id, username="user1", email="user1@example.com", full_name=None, profile_json=None, created_at=now, updated_at=now)

@app.get(
    "/api/donations/history",
    summary="List current user's donations with filters",
    description="Retrieve the current user's donations over a time range with filters.",
    tags=["donations"],
    operation_id="list_user_donations",
    response_model=DonationHistoryResponseModel,
)
async def list_user_donations(
    start_date: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Filter donations with donation_date on or after this date.", example="2024-01-01"),
    end_date: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Filter donations with donation_date on or before this date.", example="2024-12-31"),
    theme_code: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter donations where the project has this theme.", example="health"),
    country: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter donations by project country.", example="Kenya"),
    payment_status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by payment_status.", example="succeeded"),
) -> DonationHistoryResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    current_user_id = 1
    q = session.query(Donation).filter(Donation.user_id == current_user_id)
    if start_date is not None:
        start_dt = datetime.combine(start_date, datetime.min.time())
        q = q.filter(Donation.donation_date >= start_dt)
    if end_date is not None:
        end_dt = datetime.combine(end_date, datetime.max.time())
        q = q.filter(Donation.donation_date <= end_dt)
    if payment_status is not None:
        q = q.filter(Donation.payment_status == payment_status)
    donations = q.all()
    project_ids = list({d.project_id for d in donations})
    projects = session.query(Project).filter(Project.id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    project_by_id = {p.id: p for p in projects}
    if country is not None:
        allowed_project_ids = [p.id for p in projects if p.country == country]
        donations = [d for d in donations if d.project_id in allowed_project_ids]
    if theme_code is not None:
        theme = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.code == theme_code).first()
        if theme is not None:
            pts = session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.theme_id == theme.id).all()
            themed_project_ids = {pt.project_id for pt in pts}
            donations = [d for d in donations if d.project_id in themed_project_ids]
        else:
            donations = []
    project_ids = list({d.project_id for d in donations})
    projects = session.query(Project).filter(Project.id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    project_by_id = {p.id: p for p in projects}
    pts = session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.project_id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    theme_ids = list({pt.theme_id for pt in pts})
    themes = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.id.in_(theme_ids)).all() if theme_ids else []
    theme_by_id = {t.id: t for t in themes}
    project_themes_map: Dict[int, List[DonationHistoryItemThemeModel]] = {}
    for pt in pts:
        if pt.project_id not in project_themes_map:
            project_themes_map[pt.project_id] = []
        theme_obj = theme_by_id.get(pt.theme_id)
        if theme_obj is not None:
            project_themes_map[pt.project_id].append(DonationHistoryItemThemeModel(code=theme_obj.code, name=theme_obj.name))
    items: List[DonationHistoryItemModel] = []
    for d in donations:
        project = project_by_id.get(d.project_id)
        if project is None:
            continue
        items.append(
            DonationHistoryItemModel(
                id=d.id,
                project_id=d.project_id,
                project_code=project.project_code,
                project_title=project.title,
                project_country=project.country,
                themes=project_themes_map.get(project.id, []),
                amount=d.amount,
                currency=d.currency,
                donation_date=d.donation_date,

@app.get(
    "/api/donations/history/summary-by-country",
    summary="Summarize current user's donations by country",
    description="Compute total donation amount and per-country breakdown for the user.",
    tags=["donations", "analytics"],
    operation_id="summarize_user_donations_by_country",
    response_model=DonationSummaryByCountryResponseModel,
)
async def summarize_user_donations_by_country(
    start_date: date = Query(..., description="Start date (inclusive) for donation_date filter.", example="2024-01-01"),
    end_date: date = Query(..., description="End date (inclusive) for donation_date filter.", example="2024-12-31"),
    theme_code: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter to donations where project has this theme.", example="health"),
    payment_status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by donation payment_status, default 'succeeded'.", example="succeeded"),
) -> DonationSummaryByCountryResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    current_user_id = 1
    start_dt = datetime.combine(start_date, datetime.min.time())
    end_dt = datetime.combine(end_date, datetime.max.time())
    q = session.query(Donation).filter(Donation.user_id == current_user_id, Donation.donation_date >= start_dt, Donation.donation_date <= end_dt)
    if payment_status is not None:
        q = q.filter(Donation.payment_status == payment_status)
    donations = q.all()
    project_ids = list({d.project_id for d in donations})
    projects = session.query(Project).filter(Project.id.in_(project_ids)).all() if project_ids else []
    project_by_id = {p.id: p for p in projects}
    if theme_code is not None:
        theme = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.code == theme_code).first()
        if theme is not None:
            pts = session.query(ProjectTheme).filter(ProjectTheme.theme_id == theme.id).all()
            themed_project_ids = {pt.project_id for pt in pts}
            donations = [d for d in donations if d.project_id in themed_project_ids]
        else:
            donations = []
    total_amount = 0.0
    by_country_map: Dict[str, float] = {}
    for d in donations:
        project = project_by_id.get(d.project_id)
        if project is None:
            continue
        country_key = project.country if project.country is not None else ""
        amt = d.amount if d.amount is not None else 0.0
        total_amount += amt
        by_country_map[country_key] = by_country_map.get(country_key, 0.0) + amt
    by_country_items = [DonationSummaryCountryItemModel(country=k, amount=v) for k, v in by_country_map.items()]
    currency = donations[0].currency if donations else "USD"
    session.close()
    return DonationSummaryByCountryResponseModel(total_amount=total_amount, currency=currency, by_country=by_country_items)

async def update_recurring_donation(
    recurring_id: int = Path(..., description="Recurring donation ID to update.", example=8001),
    input_data: UpdateRecurringDonationInputModel = Body(..., description="Recurring donation update payload."),
) -> UpdateRecurringDonationResponseModel:

            id=recurring_id,
            user_id=1,
            project_id=0,
            amount=0.0,
            currency="USD",
            frequency="monthly",
            start_date=date.today(),
            end_date=input_data.end_date,
            status=input_data.status if input_data.status is not None else "active",

@app.post(
    "/api/corporate-campaigns",
    summary="Create a new corporate giving campaign",
    description="Create a corporate campaign for the current user's corporate organization.",
    tags=["corporate_campaigns"],
    operation_id="create_corporate_campaign",
    response_model=CreateCorporateCampaignResponseModel,
)
async def create_corporate_campaign(
    input_data: CreateCorporateCampaignInputModel = Body(..., description="Corporate campaign creation payload."),
) -> CreateCorporateCampaignResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    current_user_id = 1
    user = session.query(User).filter(User.id == current_user_id).first()
    if user is None:
        user = User(id=current_user_id, username="user1", email="user1@example.com", full_name=None, profile_json=None, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(user)
        session.commit()
    org = session.query(Organization).filter(Organization.id == input_data.organization_id).first()
    if org is None:
        org = Organization(id=input_data.organization_id, org_code=None, name="Corporate Org", type="corporate", country=None, website=None, owner_user_id=current_user_id, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
        session.add(org)
        session.commit()
    campaign = CorporateCampaign(
        campaign_code=input_data.campaign_code,
        organization_id=input_data.organization_id,
        title=input_data.title,
        description=input_data.description,
        start_date=input_data.start_date,
        end_date=input_data.end_date,
        owner_user_id=current_user_id,
        match_ratio_employee=input_data.match_ratio_employee if input_data.match_ratio_employee is not None else 1.0,
        match_ratio_corporate=input_data.match_ratio_corporate,
        max_match_per_employee=input_data.max_match_per_employee,
        currency=input_data.currency if input_data.currency is not None else "USD",
        theme_scope=input_data.theme_scope,
        active=1,
        weekly_summary_emails_enabled=1 if input_data.weekly_summary_emails_enabled else 0,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(campaign)
    session.commit()
    theme_filters_models: List[CorporateCampaignThemeModel] = []
    if input_data.theme_scope == "custom" and input_data.custom_theme_codes is not None:
        for code in input_data.custom_theme_codes:
            theme = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.code == code).first()
            if theme is None:
                theme = Theme(code=code, name=code.capitalize(), description=None, created_at=now, updated_at=now)
                session.add(theme)
                session.commit()
            ctf = CampaignThemeFilter(campaign_id=campaign.id, theme_id=theme.id)
            session.add(ctf)
            session.commit()
            theme_filters_models.append(CorporateCampaignThemeModel(code=theme.code, name=theme.name))
    model = CorporateCampaignModel(
        id=campaign.id,
        campaign_code=campaign.campaign_code,
        organization_id=campaign.organization_id,
        title=campaign.title,
        description=campaign.description,
        start_date=campaign.start_date,
        end_date=campaign.end_date,
        owner_user_id=campaign.owner_user_id,
        match_ratio_employee=campaign.match_ratio_employee,
        match_ratio_corporate=campaign.match_ratio_corporate,
        max_match_per_employee=campaign.max_match_per_employee,
        currency=campaign.currency,
        theme_scope=campaign.theme_scope,
        weekly_summary_emails_enabled=True if campaign.weekly_summary_emails_enabled == 1 else False,
        active=True if campaign.active == 1 else False,
        theme_filters=theme_filters_models,
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateCorporateCampaignResponseModel(campaign=model)

    tags=["gift_cards"],
    operation_id="create_gift_cards",

)
async def create_gift_cards(
    input_data: CreateGiftCardsInputModel = Body(..., description="Gift card creation payload."),
) -> CreateGiftCardsResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    current_user_id = 1

        session.add(user)
        session.commit()
    created_cards: List[GiftCardModel] = []
    for i in range(input_data.quantity):
        suffix = f"{int(now.timestamp())}{i}"
        code = f"GC-{now.year}-{suffix}"

        if input_data.recipient_emails is not None and i < len(input_data.recipient_emails):

        gc = GiftCard(

            label=input_data.label,
            purchaser_user_id=current_user_id,
            initial_amount=input_data.amount,
            remaining_amount=input_data.amount,
            currency=input_data.currency if input_data.currency is not None else "USD",
            recipient_email=recipient_email,
            message=input_data.message,
            status="active",
            created_at=now,
            updated_at=now,
        )
        session.add(gc)
        session.commit()
        created_cards.append(
            GiftCardModel(
                id=gc.id,
                code=gc.code,
                label=gc.label,
                purchaser_user_id=gc.purchaser_user_id,
                initial_amount=gc.initial_amount,
                remaining_amount=gc.remaining_amount,
                currency=gc.currency,
                recipient_email=gc.recipient_email,
                message=gc.message,
                status=gc.status,
                created_at=gc.created_at,
                updated_at=gc.updated_at,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return CreateGiftCardsResponseModel(gift_cards=created_cards)

@app.get(
    "/api/impact-metrics/summary",
    summary="Summarize impact metrics for user's donated projects",
    description="Aggregate impact metrics for projects the current user donated to in a period.",
    tags=["impact_metrics", "analytics"],
    operation_id="summarize_user_impact_metrics",
    response_model=ImpactMetricsSummaryResponseModel,
)
async def summarize_user_impact_metrics(
    months_back: Optional[int] = Query(12, description="Number of months back from today to consider donations; default 12.", example=12),
    metric_types: Optional[List[str]] = Query(None, description="Metric types to include.", example=["trees_planted", "students_reached", "patients_served"]),
) -> ImpactMetricsSummaryResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    current_user_id = 1
    months_value = months_back if months_back is not None else 12
    end_dt = datetime.utcnow()
    start_dt = end_dt - timedelta(days=30 * months_value)
    donations = session.query(Donation).filter(Donation.user_id == current_user_id, Donation.donation_date >= start_dt, Donation.donation_date <= end_dt, Donation.payment_status == "succeeded").all()
    project_ids = list({d.project_id for d in donations})
    metrics_q = session.query(ImpactMetric).filter(ImpactMetric.project_id.in_(project_ids)) if project_ids else session.query(ImpactMetric).filter(ImpactMetric.id == -1)
    if metric_types is not None and len(metric_types) > 0:
        metrics_q = metrics_q.filter(ImpactMetric.metric_type.in_(metric_types))
    metrics = metrics_q.all()
    theme_ids = [m.theme_id for m in metrics if m.theme_id is not None]
    themes = session.query(Theme).filter(Theme.id.in_(theme_ids)).all() if theme_ids else []
    theme_by_id = {t.id: t for t in themes}
    summary_map: Dict[str, Dict[str, ImpactMetricItemModel]] = {}
    theme_name_map: Dict[str, Optional[str]] = {}
    for m in metrics:
        if m.theme_id is not None and m.theme_id in theme_by_id:
            theme_obj = theme_by_id[m.theme_id]
            theme_code_val = theme_obj.code
            theme_name_val = theme_obj.name
        else:
            theme_code_val = "unknown"
            theme_name_val = None
        if theme_code_val not in summary_map:
            summary_map[theme_code_val] = {}
            theme_name_map[theme_code_val] = theme_name_val
        metric_key = m.metric_type
        existing = summary_map[theme_code_val].get(metric_key)
        if existing is None:
            summary_map[theme_code_val][metric_key] = ImpactMetricItemModel(metric_type=m.metric_type, quantity=m.quantity, unit=m.unit)
        else:
            existing.quantity = existing.quantity + m.quantity
    theme_summaries: List[ImpactMetricThemeSummaryModel] = []
    for theme_code_val, metrics_dict in summary_map.items():
        theme_summaries.append(
            ImpactMetricThemeSummaryModel(
                theme_code=theme_code_val,
                theme_name=theme_name_map.get(theme_code_val),
                metrics=list(metrics_dict.values()),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ImpactMetricsSummaryResponseModel(summary_by_theme=theme_summaries)

    session.close()
    return GetDisbursementPreferenceResponseModel(disbursement_preferences=model)

@app.get(
    "/api/organizations/{org_code}",
    summary="Get organization by org_code",
    description="Retrieve a single organization record by its org_code.",
    tags=["organizations"],
    operation_id="get_organization_by_code",
    response_model=GetOrganizationResponseModel,
)
async def get_organization_by_code(
    org_code: str = Path(..., description="Organization code to look up.", example="ORG-9823"),
) -> GetOrganizationResponseModel:
    session = SessionLocal()
    org = session.query(Organization).filter(Organization.org_code == org_code).first()
    if org is None:
        session.close()
        return GetOrganizationResponseModel(organization=None)
    model = OrganizationModel(
        id=org.id,
        org_code=org.org_code,
        name=org.name,
        type=org.type,
        country=org.country,
        website=org.website,
        owner_user_id=org.owner_user_id,
    )
    session.close()
    return GetOrganizationResponseModel(organization=model)

def now_utc_iso() -> str:
    return datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z"


def to_bool(value: Optional[int]) -> Optional[bool]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return bool(value)


def parse_date(d: str) -> date:
    return datetime.strptime(d, "%Y-%m-%d").date()


def daterange(start_d: date, end_d: date) -> List[date]:
    days: List[date] = []
    cur = start_d
    while cur <= end_d:
        days.append(cur)
        cur += timedelta(days=1)
    return days

@app.get(
    "/api/cities",
    summary="List cities with optional filters",
    description="Retrieve cities by name and country with pagination support.",
    tags=["cities", "metadata"],
    operation_id="list_cities",
    response_model=ListCitiesResponse,
)
async def list_cities(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by city name (case insensitive, partial match).", example="Paris"),
    country: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by country name (case insensitive, exact match).", example="France"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(20, description="Maximum number of cities to return.", example=20),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Offset for pagination.", example=0),
) -> ListCitiesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    q = session.query(City)
    if name is not None:
        q = q.filter(City.name.ilike(f"%{name}%"))
    if country is not None:
        q = q.filter(City.country.ilike(country))
    if offset is not None:
        q = q.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        q = q.limit(limit)
    cities = q.all()
    items: List[CityModel] = []
    for c in cities:
        items.append(
            CityModel(
                id=c.id,
                name=c.name,
                country=c.country,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListCitiesResponse(cities=items)


@app.get(
    "/api/property-types",
    summary="List all property types",
    description="Retrieve available property types such as hotel or serviced apartment.",
    tags=["property_types", "metadata"],
    operation_id="list_property_types",
    response_model=ListPropertyTypesResponse,
)
async def list_property_types() -> ListPropertyTypesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rows = session.query(PropertyType).all()
    items: List[PropertyTypeModel] = []
    for r in rows:
        items.append(PropertyTypeModel(id=r.id, name=r.name))
    session.close()
    return ListPropertyTypesResponse(property_types=items)

async def set_property_amenities(
    property_id: int = Path(..., description="Property id whose amenities will be replaced.", example=910),

) -> SetPropertyAmenitiesResponse:

    prop = session.query(Property).filter(Property.id == property_id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).first()

@app.get(
    "/api/availability",
    summary="Get availability for room types",
    description="Retrieve availability rows for given property, room type, and date range.",
    tags=["availability"],
    operation_id="get_availability",
    response_model=GetAvailabilityResponse,
)
async def get_availability(
    property_id: int = Query(..., description="Property id to query availability for.", example=144),
    room_type_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Optional room type filter.", example=37),
    start_date: str = Query(..., description="Start date inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-09-01"),
    end_date: str = Query(..., description="End date inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-09-20"),
) -> GetAvailabilityResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    prop = session.query(Property).filter(Property.id == property_id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).first()
    if prop is None:
        session.close()
        return GetAvailabilityResponse(availability=[])
    sd = parse_date(start_date)
    ed = parse_date(end_date)
    q = session.query(AvailabilityCalendar).filter(
        AvailabilityCalendar.property_id == property_id,
        AvailabilityCalendar.date >= sd,
        AvailabilityCalendar.date <= ed,
    )
    if room_type_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(AvailabilityCalendar.room_type_id == room_type_id)
    rows = q.all()
    items: List[AvailabilityModel] = []
    for r in rows:
        items.append(
            AvailabilityModel(
                id=r.id,
                property_id=r.property_id,
                room_type_id=r.room_type_id,
                date_str=r.date.isoformat(),
                total_units=r.total_units,
                blocked_units=r.blocked_units,
                reason=r.reason,
                created_at=(r.created_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(r.created_at, datetime) else str(r.created_at),
                updated_at=(r.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(r.updated_at, datetime) else str(r.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return GetAvailabilityResponse(availability=items)


@app.post(
    "/api/availability/bulk-block",
    summary="Bulk block units for maintenance or reasons",
    description="Bulk update availability to block units for a date range.",
    tags=["availability"],
    operation_id="bulk_block_availability",
    response_model=BulkBlockAvailabilityResponse,
)
async def bulk_block_availability(body: BulkBlockAvailabilityBody = Body(...)) -> BulkBlockAvailabilityResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    prop = session.query(Property).filter(Property.id == body.property_id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).first()
    if prop is None:
        session.close()
        return BulkBlockAvailabilityResponse(
            updated_rows=0,
            property_id=body.property_id,
            room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
            start_date=body.start_date,
            end_date=body.end_date,
        )
    sd = parse_date(body.start_date)
    ed = parse_date(body.end_date)
    dates = daterange(sd, ed)
    updated_rows = 0
    for d in dates:
        row = (
            session.query(AvailabilityCalendar)
            .filter(
                AvailabilityCalendar.property_id == body.property_id,
                AvailabilityCalendar.room_type_id == body.room_type_id,
                AvailabilityCalendar.date == d,
            )
            .first()
        )
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        if row is None:
            row = AvailabilityCalendar(
                property_id=body.property_id,
                room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
                date=d,
                total_units=0,
                blocked_units=0,
                reason=body.reason,
                created_at=now,
                updated_at=now,
            )
            session.add(row)
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(row)
        if body.block_all:
            row.blocked_units = row.total_units
        row.reason = body.reason
        row.updated_at = now
        session.commit()
        updated_rows += 1
    session.close()
    return BulkBlockAvailabilityResponse(
        updated_rows=updated_rows,
        property_id=body.property_id,
        room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
        start_date=body.start_date,
        end_date=body.end_date,
    )


@app.post(
    "/api/availability/bulk-adjust",
    summary="Bulk adjust available unit counts",
    description="Bulk adjust total and blocked units by multipliers or percentages.",
    tags=["availability"],
    operation_id="bulk_adjust_availability",
    response_model=BulkAdjustAvailabilityResponse,
)
async def bulk_adjust_availability(body: BulkAdjustAvailabilityBody = Body(...)) -> BulkAdjustAvailabilityResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    prop = session.query(Property).filter(Property.id == body.property_id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).first()
    if prop is None:
        session.close()
        return BulkAdjustAvailabilityResponse(
            updated_rows=0,
            property_id=body.property_id,
            room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
        )
    sd = parse_date(body.start_date)
    ed = parse_date(body.end_date)
    dates = daterange(sd, ed)
    updated_rows = 0
    for d in dates:
        row = (
            session.query(AvailabilityCalendar)
            .filter(
                AvailabilityCalendar.property_id == body.property_id,
                AvailabilityCalendar.room_type_id == body.room_type_id,
                AvailabilityCalendar.date == d,
            )
            .first()
        )
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        if row is None:
            row = AvailabilityCalendar(
                property_id=body.property_id,
                room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
                date=d,
                total_units=0,
                blocked_units=0,
                reason=body.reason,
                created_at=now,
                updated_at=now,
            )
            session.add(row)
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(row)
        if body.total_units_multiplier is not None:
            new_total = int(round(row.total_units * body.total_units_multiplier))
            if new_total < 0:
                new_total = 0
            row.total_units = new_total
        if body.block_percentage is not None:
            if row.total_units <= 0:
                row.blocked_units = 0
            else:
                new_blocked = int(round(row.total_units * body.block_percentage))
                if new_blocked < 0:
                    new_blocked = 0
                if new_blocked > row.total_units:
                    new_blocked = row.total_units
                row.blocked_units = new_blocked
        if body.reason is not None:
            row.reason = body.reason
        row.updated_at = now
        session.commit()
        updated_rows += 1
    session.close()
    return BulkAdjustAvailabilityResponse(
        updated_rows=updated_rows,
        property_id=body.property_id,
        room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
    )


@app.get(
    "/api/rate-plans",
    summary="List rate plans with filters",
    description="Retrieve rate plans filtered by property, room type, and flexibility.",
    tags=["rate_plans"],
    operation_id="list_rate_plans",
    response_model=ListRatePlansResponse,
)
async def list_rate_plans(
    property_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by property_id (must belong to current user).", example=4821),
    room_type_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by room_type_id.", example=12),
    is_flexible: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter flexible (true) or non-flexible (false) plans.", example=True),
    code: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by rate plan code.", example="FLEX"),
) -> ListRatePlansResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    q = session.query(RatePlan)
    if property_id is not None:
        prop = session.query(Property).filter(Property.id == property_id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).first()
        if prop is None:
            session.close()
            return ListRatePlansResponse(rate_plans=[])
        q = q.filter(RatePlan.property_id == property_id)
    else:
        props = session.query(Property.id).filter(Property.owner_user_id == 1).all()
        prop_ids = [p.id for p in props]
        if prop_ids:
            q = q.filter(RatePlan.property_id.in_(prop_ids))
        else:
            session.close()
            return ListRatePlansResponse(rate_plans=[])
    if room_type_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(RatePlan.room_type_id == room_type_id)
    if is_flexible is not None:
        q = q.filter(RatePlan.is_flexible == (1 if is_flexible else 0))
    if code is not None:
        q = q.filter(RatePlan.code == code)
    rows = q.all()
    items: List[RatePlanModel] = []
    for r in rows:
        items.append(
            RatePlanModel(
                id=r.id,
                property_id=r.property_id,
                room_type_id=r.room_type_id,
                name=r.name,
                code=r.code,
                is_default=to_bool(r.is_default) or False,
                cancellation_policy_id=r.cancellation_policy_id,
                base_nightly_rate=r.base_nightly_rate,
                currency=r.currency,
                min_stay_nights=r.min_stay_nights,
                max_stay_nights=r.max_stay_nights,
                is_flexible=to_bool(r.is_flexible) or False,
                created_at=(r.created_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(r.created_at, datetime) else str(r.created_at),
                updated_at=(r.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(r.updated_at, datetime) else str(r.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListRatePlansResponse(rate_plans=items)

@app.post(
    "/api/rate-plan-overrides/bulk-update",
    summary="Bulk create or update rate plan overrides",
    description="Bulk upsert rate plan overrides for specific dates.",
    tags=["rate_plans", "rate_plan_overrides"],
    operation_id="bulk_update_rate_plan_overrides",
    response_model=BulkUpdateRatePlanOverridesResponse,
)
async def bulk_update_rate_plan_overrides(
    body: BulkUpdateRatePlanOverridesBody = Body(...)
) -> BulkUpdateRatePlanOverridesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rp = session.query(RatePlan).filter(RatePlan.id == body.rate_plan_id).first()
    if rp is None:
        session.close()
        return BulkUpdateRatePlanOverridesResponse(
            rate_plan_id=body.rate_plan_id,
            overrides_created=0,
            overrides_updated=0,
        )
    prop = session.query(Property).filter(Property.id == rp.property_id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).first()
    if prop is None:
        session.close()
        return BulkUpdateRatePlanOverridesResponse(
            rate_plan_id=body.rate_plan_id,
            overrides_created=0,
            overrides_updated=0,
        )
    sd = parse_date(body.start_date)
    ed = parse_date(body.end_date)
    dates = daterange(sd, ed)
    created_count = 0
    updated_count = 0
    for d in dates:
        if body.days_of_week is not None:
            dow = d.weekday()
            if dow not in body.days_of_week:
                continue
        row = (
            session.query(RatePlanOverride)
            .filter(RatePlanOverride.rate_plan_id == body.rate_plan_id, RatePlanOverride.date == d)
            .first()
        )
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        rate_value: Optional[float] = None
        if body.nightly_rate is not None:
            rate_value = body.nightly_rate
        elif body.rate_multiplier is not None:
            rate_value = rp.base_nightly_rate * body.rate_multiplier
        if row is None:
            row = RatePlanOverride(
                rate_plan_id=body.rate_plan_id,
                date=d,
                nightly_rate=rate_value,
                min_stay_nights=body.min_stay_nights,
                is_closed=1 if (body.is_closed is True) else (0 if (body.is_closed is False) else None),
                created_at=now,
                updated_at=now,
            )
            session.add(row)
            session.commit()
            created_count += 1
        else:
            if rate_value is not None:
                row.nightly_rate = rate_value
            if body.min_stay_nights is not None:
                row.min_stay_nights = body.min_stay_nights
            if body.is_closed is not None:
                row.is_closed = 1 if body.is_closed else 0
            row.updated_at = now
            session.commit()
            updated_count += 1
    session.close()
    return BulkUpdateRatePlanOverridesResponse(
        rate_plan_id=body.rate_plan_id,
        overrides_created=created_count,
        overrides_updated=updated_count,
    )


def compute_rate_plan_pricing(
    session: SessionLocal, rate_plan_id: int, checkin: date, checkout: date
) -> (List[StayQuoteNightModel], float, int, Optional[int], bool):
    rp = session.query(RatePlan).filter(RatePlan.id == rate_plan_id).first()
    if rp is None:
        return [], 0.0, 0, None, False
    nights_dates: List[date] = []
    cur = checkin
    while cur < checkout:
        nights_dates.append(cur)
        cur += timedelta(days=1)
    breakdown: List[StayQuoteNightModel] = []
    for d in nights_dates:
        ov = (
            session.query(RatePlanOverride)
            .filter(RatePlanOverride.rate_plan_id == rate_plan_id, RatePlanOverride.date == d)
            .first()
        )
        rate = rp.base_nightly_rate
        if ov is not None and ov.nightly_rate is not None:
            rate = ov.nightly_rate
        breakdown.append(StayQuoteNightModel(date_str=d.isoformat(), nightly_rate=rate))
    total = sum(n.nightly_rate for n in breakdown)
    nights_count = len(nights_dates)
    effective_min = rp.min_stay_nights
    effective_max = rp.max_stay_nights
    for d in nights_dates:
        ov = (
            session.query(RatePlanOverride)
            .filter(RatePlanOverride.rate_plan_id == rate_plan_id, RatePlanOverride.date == d)
            .first()
        )
        if ov is not None:
            if ov.min_stay_nights is not None and ov.min_stay_nights > effective_min:
                effective_min = ov.min_stay_nights
            if ov.is_closed == 1:
                effective_min = 9999999
    is_bookable = nights_count >= effective_min and (effective_max is None or nights_count <= effective_max)
    return breakdown, total, effective_min, effective_max, is_bookable


@app.get(
    "/api/rate-plans/{rate_plan_id}/stay-quote",
    summary="Get stay price quote for rate plan",
    description="Calculate total price and validate min/max stay for given dates.",
    tags=["rate_plans", "pricing"],
    operation_id="get_rate_plan_stay_quote",
    response_model=StayQuoteResponse,
)
async def get_rate_plan_stay_quote(
    rate_plan_id: int = Path(..., description="Rate plan id used for pricing.", example=301),
    checkin_date: str = Query(..., description="Check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-03-03"),
    checkout_date: str = Query(..., description="Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-03-08"),
    num_adults: int = Query(..., description="Number of adult guests.", example=2),
    num_children: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Number of child guests.", example=0),
) -> StayQuoteResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rp = session.query(RatePlan).filter(RatePlan.id == rate_plan_id).first()
    if rp is None:
        session.close()
        return StayQuoteResponse(
            rate_plan_id=rate_plan_id,
            currency="",
            nights=0,
            nightly_breakdown=[],
            total_price=0.0,
            min_stay_nights=0,
            max_stay_nights=None,
            is_bookable=False,
        )
    cin = parse_date(checkin_date)
    cout = parse_date(checkout_date)
    breakdown, total, effective_min, effective_max, is_bookable = compute_rate_plan_pricing(session, rate_plan_id, cin, cout)
    nights = len(breakdown)
    session.close()
    return StayQuoteResponse(
        rate_plan_id=rate_plan_id,
        currency=rp.currency,
        nights=nights,
        nightly_breakdown=breakdown,
        total_price=total,
        min_stay_nights=effective_min,
        max_stay_nights=effective_max,
        is_bookable=is_bookable,
    )

)
async def create_or_get_guest(body: CreateOrGetGuestBody = Body(...)) -> CreateOrGetGuestResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    existing = session.query(Guest).filter(Guest.email == body.email).first()
    if existing is not None:
        model = GuestModel(
            id=existing.id,
            first_name=existing.first_name,
            last_name=existing.last_name,
            full_name=existing.full_name,
            email=existing.email,
            phone=existing.phone,
            created_at=(existing.created_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(existing.created_at, datetime) else str(existing.created_at),
            updated_at=(existing.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(existing.updated_at, datetime) else str(existing.updated_at),
        )
        session.close()
        return CreateOrGetGuestResponse(guest=model, is_new=False)
    name_full = body.full_name
    if (name_full is None or name_full == "") and body.first_name is not None and body.last_name is not None:
        name_full = body.first_name + " " + body.last_name
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    obj = Guest(
        first_name=body.first_name,
        last_name=body.last_name,
        full_name=name_full,
        email=body.email,
        phone=body.phone,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(obj)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(obj)
    model = GuestModel(
        id=obj.id,
        first_name=obj.first_name,
        last_name=obj.last_name,
        full_name=obj.full_name,
        email=obj.email,
        phone=obj.phone,
        created_at=obj.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
        updated_at=obj.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )

    return CreateOrGetGuestResponse(guest=model, is_new=True)

            type="",
            last4=None,
            card_brand=None,
            exp_month=None,
            exp_year=None,
            billing_name=None,
            billing_address=None,
            is_default=False,
            created_at=now_utc_iso(),
            updated_at=now_utc_iso(),
        )
        return CreatePaymentMethodResponse(payment_method=empty)
    if body.is_default:
        others = session.query(PaymentMethod).filter(PaymentMethod.guest_id == guest_id, PaymentMethod.is_default == 1).all()
        for o in others:
            o.is_default = 0
        session.commit()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    pm = PaymentMethod(
        guest_id=guest_id,
        type=body.type,
        last4=body.last4,
        card_brand=body.card_brand,
        exp_month=body.exp_month,
        exp_year=body.exp_year,
        billing_name=body.billing_name,
        billing_address=body.billing_address,
        is_default=1 if body.is_default else 0,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(pm)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pm)
    model = PaymentMethodModel(
        id=pm.id,
        guest_id=pm.guest_id,
        type=pm.type,
        last4=pm.last4,
        card_brand=pm.card_brand,
        exp_month=pm.exp_month,
        exp_year=pm.exp_year,
        billing_name=pm.billing_name,
        billing_address=pm.billing_address,
        is_default=to_bool(pm.is_default) or False,
        created_at=pm.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
        updated_at=pm.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    session.close()
    return CreatePaymentMethodResponse(payment_method=model)

@app.get(
    "/api/search/available-room-types",
    summary="Search available room types with filters",
    description="Search for available room types by city, dates, occupancy, and amenities.",
    tags=["search", "reservations"],
    operation_id="search_available_room_types",
    response_model=SearchAvailableRoomTypesResponse,
)
async def search_available_room_types(
    city_name: str = Query(..., description="City name for search (case insensitive).", example="Paris"),
    country: str = Query(..., description="Country name for search.", example="France"),
    checkin_date: str = Query(..., description="Check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-05-10"),
    checkout_date: str = Query(..., description="Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-05-14"),
    num_adults: int = Query(..., description="Number of adult guests.", example=2),
    num_children: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Number of child guests.", example=0),
    property_type_name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter properties by property_types.name.", example="Serviced Apartment"),
    room_amenities: Optional[List[str]] = Query(None, description="Required room amenity names (AND filter).", example=["Wi-Fi", "Kitchen"]),
    property_amenities: Optional[List[str]] = Query(None, description="Required property amenity names (AND filter).", example=["Wi-Fi"]),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(3, description="Max number of room types to return (sorted by total_price asc).", example=3),
) -> SearchAvailableRoomTypesResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    sd = parse_date(checkin_date)
    ed = parse_date(checkout_date)
    nights_dates: List[date] = []
    cur = sd
    while cur < ed:
        nights_dates.append(cur)
        cur += timedelta(days=1)
    if not nights_dates:
        session.close()
        return SearchAvailableRoomTypesResponse(results=[])
    city = (
        session.query(City)
        .filter(City.name.ilike(city_name), City.country.ilike(country))
        .first()
    )
    if city is None:
        session.close()
        return SearchAvailableRoomTypesResponse(results=[])
    prop_q = session.query(Property).filter(Property.city_id == city.id)
    if property_type_name is not None:
        pt = session.query(PropertyType).filter(PropertyType.name == property_type_name).first()
        if pt is None:
            session.close()
            return SearchAvailableRoomTypesResponse(results=[])
        prop_q = prop_q.filter(Property.property_type_id == pt.id)
    props = prop_q.all()
    results: List[SearchRoomTypeResultModel] = []
    for p in props:
        if property_amenities is not None:
            pa_ids = session.query(PropertyAmenity.amenity_id).filter(PropertyAmenity.property_id == p.id).all()
            pa_ids_list = [x[0] for x in pa_ids]
            ok_prop = True
            for an in property_amenities:
                am = session.query(Amenity).filter(Amenity.name == an).first()
                if am is None or am.id not in pa_ids_list:
                    ok_prop = False
                    break
            if not ok_prop:
                continue
        rts = session.query(RoomType).filter(RoomType.property_id == p.id, RoomType.max_occupancy >= num_adults + (num_children or 0)).all()
        for rt in rts:
            if room_amenities is not None:
                rta_ids = session.query(RoomTypeAmenity.amenity_id).filter(RoomTypeAmenity.room_type_id == rt.id).all()
                rta_ids_list = [x[0] for x in rta_ids]
                ok_rt = True
                for an in room_amenities:
                    am = session.query(Amenity).filter(Amenity.name == an).first()
                    if am is None or am.id not in rta_ids_list:
                        ok_rt = False
                        break
                if not ok_rt:
                    continue
            availability_ok = True
            for d in nights_dates:
                row = (
                    session.query(AvailabilityCalendar)
                    .filter(
                        AvailabilityCalendar.property_id == p.id,
                        AvailabilityCalendar.room_type_id == rt.id,
                        AvailabilityCalendar.date == d,
                    )
                    .first()
                )
                if row is None:
                    continue
                if row.total_units - row.blocked_units <= 0:
                    availability_ok = False
                    break
            if not availability_ok:
                continue
            rps = session.query(RatePlan).filter(
                RatePlan.property_id == p.id,
                RatePlan.room_type_id == rt.id,
            ).all()
            best_result: Optional[SearchRoomTypeResultModel] = None
            best_price: Optional[float] = None
            for rp in rps:
                nightly_breakdown, total, eff_min, eff_max, is_bookable = compute_rate_plan_pricing(session, rp.id, sd, ed)
                if not is_bookable:
                    continue
                if best_price is None or total < best_price:
                    pol = None
                    if rp.cancellation_policy_id is not None:
                        pol_obj = session.query(Policy).filter(Policy.id == rp.cancellation_policy_id).first()
                        if pol_obj is not None:
                            pol = SearchCancellationPolicyModel(
                                id=pol_obj.id,
                                code=pol_obj.code,
                                description=pol_obj.description,
                            )
                    else:
                        pol = SearchCancellationPolicyModel(id=None, code=None, description=None)
                    best_price = total
                    best_result = SearchRoomTypeResultModel(
                        property_id=p.id,
                        property_name=p.name,
                        room_type_id=rt.id,
                        room_type_name=rt.name,
                        max_occupancy=rt.max_occupancy,
                        has_kitchen=to_bool(rt.has_kitchen) or False,
                        rate_plan_id=rp.id,
                        rate_plan_name=rp.name,
                        currency=rp.currency,
                        nights=len(nightly_breakdown),
                        total_price=total,
                        nightly_breakdown=[
                            SearchNightBreakdownModel(date_str=n.date_str, nightly_rate=n.nightly_rate) for n in nightly_breakdown
                        ],
                        cancellation_policy=pol,
                    )
            if best_result is not None:
                results.append(best_result)
    results.sort(key=lambda r: r.total_price)
    if limit is not None:
        results = results[:limit]
    session.close()
    return SearchAvailableRoomTypesResponse(results=results)


@app.post(
    "/api/reservations",
    summary="Create reservation with pricing and payment",
    description="Create a reservation, lock pricing from rate plan, and optionally payment.",
    tags=["reservations", "payments"],
    operation_id="create_reservation",
    response_model=CreateReservationResponse,
)
async def create_reservation(body: CreateReservationBody = Body(...)) -> CreateReservationResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    rp = session.query(RatePlan).filter(RatePlan.id == body.rate_plan_id).first()
    if rp is None:
        session.close()
        empty_res = ReservationModel(
            id=0,
            property_id=body.property_id,
            room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
            unit_id=None,
            guest_id=body.guest_id,
            rate_plan_id=body.rate_plan_id,
            status=body.status or "confirmed",
            checkin_date=body.checkin_date,
            checkout_date=body.checkout_date,
            num_adults=body.num_adults,
            num_children=body.num_children or 0,
            total_price=0.0,
            currency=body.currency or "",
            payment_status="pending",
            payment_method_id=body.payment_method_id,
            internal_note=body.internal_note,
            created_at=now_utc_iso(),
            updated_at=now_utc_iso(),
        )
        return CreateReservationResponse(reservation=empty_res, payment=None)
    cin = parse_date(body.checkin_date)
    cout = parse_date(body.checkout_date)
    nightly_breakdown, total, eff_min, eff_max, is_bookable = compute_rate_plan_pricing(session, rp.id, cin, cout)
    total_price = body.force_total_price if body.force_total_price is not None else total
    currency = body.currency if body.currency is not None else rp.currency
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    res = Reservation(
        property_id=body.property_id,
        room_type_id=body.room_type_id,
        unit_id=None,
        guest_id=body.guest_id,
        rate_plan_id=body.rate_plan_id,
        status=body.status or "confirmed",
        checkin_date=cin,
        checkout_date=cout,
        num_adults=body.num_adults,
        num_children=body.num_children or 0,
        total_price=total_price,
        currency=currency,
        payment_status="pending",
        payment_method_id=body.payment_method_id,
        internal_note=body.internal_note,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(res)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(res)
    payment_model: Optional[PaymentModel] = None
    if body.payment_method_id is not None:
        amount = body.charge_amount if body.charge_amount is not None else total_price
        pay = Payment(
            reservation_id=res.id,
            payment_method_id=body.payment_method_id,
            amount=amount,
            currency=currency,
            direction="charge",
            status="succeeded",
            processor_reference=None,
            created_at=now,
        )
        session.add(pay)
        res.payment_status = "paid"
        res.payment_method_id = body.payment_method_id
        res.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(res)
        session.refresh(pay)
        payment_model = PaymentModel(
            id=pay.id,
            reservation_id=pay.reservation_id,
            payment_method_id=pay.payment_method_id,
            amount=pay.amount,
            currency=pay.currency,
            direction=pay.direction,
            status=pay.status,
            processor_reference=pay.processor_reference,
            created_at=pay.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
        )
    res_model = ReservationModel(
        id=res.id,
        property_id=res.property_id,
        room_type_id=res.room_type_id,
        unit_id=res.unit_id,
        guest_id=res.guest_id,
        rate_plan_id=res.rate_plan_id,
        status=res.status,
        checkin_date=res.checkin_date.isoformat(),
        checkout_date=res.checkout_date.isoformat(),
        num_adults=res.num_adults,
        num_children=res.num_children,
        total_price=res.total_price,
        currency=res.currency,
        payment_status=res.payment_status,
        payment_method_id=res.payment_method_id,
        internal_note=res.internal_note,
        created_at=res.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
        updated_at=res.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateReservationResponse(reservation=res_model, payment=payment_model)

async def reprice_reservation(
    reservation_id: int = Path(..., description="Reservation id to reprice.", example=97543)

            reservation_id=reservation_id,
            old_total_price=0.0,
            new_total_price=0.0,
            currency="",
            nightly_breakdown=[],

        reservation_id=reservation_id,

        new_total_price=total,
        currency=r.currency,
        nightly_breakdown=breakdown,
    )


@app.patch(
    "/api/reservations/{reservation_id}/status",
    summary="Change reservation status with history",
    description="Update reservation.status and record a status history entry.",
    tags=["reservations", "status_history"],
    operation_id="update_reservation_status",
    response_model=UpdateReservationStatusResponse,
)
async def update_reservation_status(
    reservation_id: int = Path(..., description="Reservation id whose status will be changed.", example=56321),
    body: UpdateReservationStatusBody = Body(...),
) -> UpdateReservationStatusResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    r = session.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.id == reservation_id).first()
    if r is None:
        session.close()
        empty_res = UpdateReservationStatusReservationModel(
            id=reservation_id,
            status="",
            updated_at=now_utc_iso(),
        )
        empty_hist = ReservationStatusHistoryModel(
            id=0,
            reservation_id=reservation_id,
            old_status=None,
            new_status="",
            change_reason=None,
            created_at=now_utc_iso(),
        )
        return UpdateReservationStatusResponse(reservation=empty_res, status_history_entry=empty_hist)
    old_status = r.status
    r.status = body.new_status
    r.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    hist = ReservationStatusHistory(
        reservation_id=reservation_id,
        old_status=old_status,
        new_status=body.new_status,
        change_reason=body.change_reason,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(hist)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(r)
    session.refresh(hist)
    res_model = UpdateReservationStatusReservationModel(
        id=r.id,
        status=r.status,
        updated_at=r.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    hist_model = ReservationStatusHistoryModel(
        id=hist.id,
        reservation_id=hist.reservation_id,
        old_status=hist.old_status,
        new_status=hist.new_status,
        change_reason=hist.change_reason,
        created_at=hist.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    session.close()
    return UpdateReservationStatusResponse(reservation=res_model, status_history_entry=hist_model)

@app.post(
    "/api/reservations/{reservation_id}/payments",
    summary="Create a payment for reservation",
    description="Create a payment row and update reservation payment_status.",
    tags=["payments", "reservations"],
    operation_id="create_reservation_payment",
    response_model=CreateReservationPaymentResponse,
)
async def create_reservation_payment(
    reservation_id: int = Path(..., description="Reservation associated with the payment.", example=97543),
    body: CreateReservationPaymentBody = Body(...),
) -> CreateReservationPaymentResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    r = session.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.id == reservation_id).first()
    if r is None:
        session.close()
        empty = PaymentModel(
            id=0,
            reservation_id=reservation_id,
            payment_method_id=body.payment_method_id,
            amount=body.amount,
            currency=body.currency,
            direction=body.direction,
            status=body.status,
            processor_reference=body.processor_reference,
            created_at=now_utc_iso(),
        )
        return CreateReservationPaymentResponse(payment=empty, reservation_payment_status="")
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    pay = Payment(
        reservation_id=reservation_id,
        payment_method_id=body.payment_method_id,
        amount=body.amount,
        currency=body.currency,
        direction=body.direction,
        status=body.status,
        processor_reference=body.processor_reference,
        created_at=now,
    )
    session.add(pay)
    total_charges = 0.0
    payments = session.query(Payment).filter(Payment.reservation_id == reservation_id).all()
    for p in payments:
        if p.direction == "charge" and p.status == "succeeded":
            total_charges += p.amount
        if p.direction == "refund" and p.status == "succeeded":
            total_charges -= p.amount
    total_after = total_charges + (body.amount if body.direction == "charge" and body.status == "succeeded" else 0.0) - (
        body.amount if body.direction == "refund" and body.status == "succeeded" else 0.0
    )
    if total_after >= r.total_price:
        r.payment_status = "paid"
    elif total_after > 0:
        r.payment_status = "partially_paid"
    else:
        r.payment_status = "pending"
    r.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(pay)
    session.refresh(r)
    model = PaymentModel(
        id=pay.id,
        reservation_id=pay.reservation_id,
        payment_method_id=pay.payment_method_id,
        amount=pay.amount,
        currency=pay.currency,
        direction=pay.direction,
        status=pay.status,
        processor_reference=pay.processor_reference,
        created_at=pay.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateReservationPaymentResponse(payment=model, reservation_payment_status=r.payment_status)


@app.get(
    "/api/reservations/report",
    summary="Export reservations report as CSV",
    description="Generate a CSV-like JSON structure for reservations in city/date range.",
    tags=["reservations", "reports"],
    operation_id="export_reservations_report",
    response_model=ReservationsReportResponse,
)
async def export_reservations_report(
    city_name: str = Query(..., description="City name filter.", example="Lisbon"),
    country: str = Query(..., description="Country filter.", example="Portugal"),
    start_date: str = Query(..., description="Reservation check-in start date (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-01-01"),
    end_date: str = Query(..., description="Reservation check-out end date (YYYY-MM-DD).", example="2025-03-31"),
    status: Optional[str] = Query("confirmed", description="Reservation status filter; default 'confirmed'.", example="confirmed"),
) -> ReservationsReportResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    city = (
        session.query(City)
        .filter(City.name.ilike(city_name), City.country.ilike(country))
        .first()
    )
    if city is None:
        session.close()
        return ReservationsReportResponse(columns=[], rows=[])
    props = session.query(Property).filter(Property.city_id == city.id, Property.owner_user_id == 1).all()
    prop_ids = [p.id for p in props]
    if not prop_ids:
        session.close()
        return ReservationsReportResponse(columns=[], rows=[])
    sd = parse_date(start_date)
    ed = parse_date(end_date)
    q = session.query(Reservation).filter(
        Reservation.property_id.in_(prop_ids),
        Reservation.checkin_date >= sd,
        Reservation.checkout_date <= ed,
    )
    if status is not None:
        q = q.filter(Reservation.status == status)
    rows = q.all()
    columns = [
        "reservation_id",
        "guest_name",
        "checkin_date",
        "checkout_date",
        "room_type",
        "total_price",
        "payment_status",
        "admin_notes",
    ]
    data_rows: List[List[str]] = []
    for r in rows:
        guest = session.query(Guest).filter(Guest.id == r.guest_id).first()
        room_type = session.query(RoomType).filter(RoomType.id == r.room_type_id).first()
        guest_name = ""
        if guest is not None:
            if guest.full_name:
                guest_name = guest.full_name
            elif guest.first_name or guest.last_name:
                guest_name = (guest.first_name or "") + " " + (guest.last_name or "")
        rt_name = room_type.name if room_type is not None else ""
        data_rows.append(
            [
                str(r.id),
                guest_name,
                r.checkin_date.isoformat(),
                r.checkout_date.isoformat(),
                rt_name,
                f"{r.total_price:.2f} {r.currency}",
                r.payment_status,
                r.internal_note or "",
            ]
        )
    session.close()
    return ReservationsReportResponse(columns=columns, rows=data_rows)


@app.post(
    "/api/webhooks/subscriptions",
    summary="Create webhook subscription for user",
    description="Create a webhook subscription scoped to city and event type.",
    tags=["webhooks"],
    operation_id="create_webhook_subscription",
    response_model=CreateWebhookSubscriptionResponse,
)
async def create_webhook_subscription(
    body: CreateWebhookSubscriptionBody = Body(...)
) -> CreateWebhookSubscriptionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    sub = WebhookSubscription(
        user_id=1,
        target_url=body.target_url,
        event_type=body.event_type,
        city_id=body.city_id,
        is_active=1 if (body.is_active is None or body.is_active) else 0,
        created_at=now,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(sub)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(sub)
    model = WebhookSubscriptionModel(
        id=sub.id,
        user_id=sub.user_id,
        target_url=sub.target_url,
        event_type=sub.event_type,
        city_id=sub.city_id,
        is_active=to_bool(sub.is_active) or False,
        created_at=sub.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
        updated_at=sub.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    session.close()
    return CreateWebhookSubscriptionResponse(subscription=model)


@app.get(
    "/api/webhooks/subscriptions",
    summary="List webhook subscriptions for user",
    description="List webhook subscriptions for current user with optional filters.",
    tags=["webhooks"],
    operation_id="list_webhook_subscriptions",
    response_model=ListWebhookSubscriptionsResponse,
)
async def list_webhook_subscriptions(
    event_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by event_type.", example="reservation.status_changed"),
    city_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by city_id.", example=17),
    is_active: Optional[bool] = Query(None, description="Filter by active status.", example=True),
) -> ListWebhookSubscriptionsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    q = session.query(WebhookSubscription).filter(WebhookSubscription.user_id == 1)
    if event_type is not None:
        q = q.filter(WebhookSubscription.event_type == event_type)
    if city_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(WebhookSubscription.city_id == city_id)
    if is_active is not None:
        q = q.filter(WebhookSubscription.is_active == (1 if is_active else 0))
    rows = q.all()
    items: List[WebhookSubscriptionModel] = []
    for s in rows:
        items.append(
            WebhookSubscriptionModel(
                id=s.id,
                user_id=s.user_id,
                target_url=s.target_url,
                event_type=s.event_type,
                city_id=s.city_id,
                is_active=to_bool(s.is_active) or False,
                created_at=(s.created_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(s.created_at, datetime) else str(s.created_at),
                updated_at=(s.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(s.updated_at, datetime) else str(s.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListWebhookSubscriptionsResponse(subscriptions=items)


@app.patch(
    "/api/webhooks/subscriptions/{subscription_id}",
    summary="Update webhook subscription",
    description="Patch webhook subscription fields like is_active or target_url.",
    tags=["webhooks"],
    operation_id="update_webhook_subscription",
    response_model=UpdateWebhookSubscriptionResponse,
)
async def update_webhook_subscription(
    subscription_id: int = Path(..., description="Subscription id to update.", example=6001),
    body: UpdateWebhookSubscriptionBody = Body(...),
) -> UpdateWebhookSubscriptionResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    sub = session.query(WebhookSubscription).filter(WebhookSubscription.id == subscription_id, WebhookSubscription.user_id == 1).first()
    if sub is None:
        session.close()
        empty = WebhookSubscriptionModel(
            id=0,
            user_id=1,
            target_url="",
            event_type="",
            city_id=None,
            is_active=False,
            created_at=now_utc_iso(),
            updated_at=now_utc_iso(),
        )
        return UpdateWebhookSubscriptionResponse(subscription=empty)
    if body.target_url is not None:
        sub.target_url = body.target_url
    if body.is_active is not None:
        sub.is_active = 1 if body.is_active else 0
    sub.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(sub)
    model = WebhookSubscriptionModel(
        id=sub.id,
        user_id=sub.user_id,
        target_url=sub.target_url,
        event_type=sub.event_type,
        city_id=sub.city_id,
        is_active=to_bool(sub.is_active) or False,
        created_at=sub.created_at.isoformat() + "Z",
        updated_at=sub.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z",
    )
    session.close()
    return UpdateWebhookSubscriptionResponse(subscription=model)


@app.get(
    "/api/webhooks/events",
    summary="List webhook events for monitoring",
    description="List webhook events generated for current user's subscriptions.",
    tags=["webhooks"],
    operation_id="list_webhook_events",
    response_model=ListWebhookEventsResponse,
)
async def list_webhook_events(
    subscription_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by subscription id.", example=6001),
    status: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter events by delivery status.", example="pending"),
    limit: Optional[int] = Query(50, description="Limit number of events returned.", example=50),
    offset: Optional[int] = Query(0, description="Offset for pagination.", example=0),
) -> ListWebhookEventsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    subs_q = session.query(WebhookSubscription.id).filter(WebhookSubscription.user_id == 1)
    subs = subs_q.all()
    sub_ids = [s.id for s in subs]
    if not sub_ids:
        session.close()
        return ListWebhookEventsResponse(events=[])
    q = session.query(WebhookEvent).filter(WebhookEvent.subscription_id.in_(sub_ids))
    if subscription_id is not None:
        q = q.filter(WebhookEvent.subscription_id == subscription_id)
    if status is not None:
        q = q.filter(WebhookEvent.status == status)
    if offset is not None:
        q = q.offset(offset)
    if limit is not None:
        q = q.limit(limit)
    rows = q.all()
    items: List[WebhookEventModel] = []
    for e in rows:
        payload_dict: Dict[str, Any]
        try:
            payload_dict = {}
            if isinstance(e.payload, bytes):
                text = e.payload.decode("utf-8")
                import json

                payload_dict = json.loads(text)
        except Exception:
            payload_dict = {}
        items.append(
            WebhookEventModel(
                id=e.id,
                subscription_id=e.subscription_id,
                reservation_id=e.reservation_id,
                payload=payload_dict,
                status=e.status,
                last_attempt_at=e.last_attempt_at.isoformat() + "Z" if isinstance(e.last_attempt_at, datetime) else None,
                created_at=(e.created_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(e.created_at, datetime) else str(e.created_at),
                updated_at=(e.updated_at.isoformat() + "Z") if isinstance(e.updated_at, datetime) else str(e.updated_at),
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ListWebhookEventsResponse(events=items)

def bool_from_int(value: Optional[int]) -> Optional[bool]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return bool(value)

def int_from_bool(value: Optional[bool]) -> Optional[int]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return 1 if value else 0
