@app.post(
    "/api/programs",
    response_model=ProgramResponse,
    summary="Create a new program",
    description="Create a new program record with basic fields and implicit creator user 1",
    tags=["programs"],
    operation_id="create_program",
)
async def create_program(request: ProgramCreateRequest = Body(...)) -> ProgramResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    program = Program(
        name=request.name,
        category=request.category,
        region=request.region,
        capacity=request.capacity,
        created_by=1,
        created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
        updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    session.add(program)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(program)
    data = ProgramResponse.model_validate(program)
    session.close()
    return data


@app.get(
    "/api/programs",
    response_model=ProgramListResponse,
    summary="List programs with optional filters",
    description="Retrieve a list of programs filtered by name, category, or region",
    tags=["programs"],
    operation_id="list_programs",
)
async def list_programs(
    name: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter programs by exact name", example="2026 First-Gen College Scholarship"),
    category: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter programs by category", example="scholarship"),
    region: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter programs by region", example="Northeast"),
) -> ProgramListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Program).filter(Program.created_by == 1)
    if name is not None:
        query = query.filter(Program.name == name)
    if category is not None:
        query = query.filter(Program.category == category)
    if region is not None:
        query = query.filter(Program.region == region)
    programs = query.all()
    items = [ProgramResponse.model_validate(p) for p in programs]
    session.close()
    return ProgramListResponse(programs=items)


@app.get(
    "/api/programs/{program_id}",
    response_model=ProgramResponse,
    summary="Get a single program by ID",
    description="Retrieve a program record using its ID and creator user 1",
    tags=["programs"],
    operation_id="get_program_by_id",
)
async def get_program_by_id(
    program_id: int = Path(..., description="Program ID to retrieve", example=10)
) -> ProgramResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    program = session.query(Program).filter(Program.id == program_id, Program.created_by == 1).first()
    if program is None:
        program = Program(
            id=0,
            name="",
            category="",
            region=None,
            capacity=None,
            created_by=1,
            created_at=datetime.utcnow(),

@app.post(
    "/api/eligibility/screener",
    response_model=EligibilityScreenerResponse,
    summary="Run eligibility screener for an applicant profile",
    description="Evaluate which programs an applicant qualifies for based on age, income, and residency",
    tags=["eligibility"],
    operation_id="run_eligibility_screener",
)
async def run_eligibility_screener(
    request: EligibilityScreenerRequest = Body(...),
) -> EligibilityScreenerResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    ref_date = datetime.utcnow().date()
    if request.reference_date is not None and request.reference_date != "":
        ref_date = datetime.fromisoformat(request.reference_date).date()
    dob = datetime.fromisoformat(request.date_of_birth).date()
    age = ref_date.year - dob.year - ((ref_date.month, ref_date.day) < (dob.month, dob.day))
    rules = session.query(ProgramEligibilityRule).all()
    qualified: List[ScreenerQualifiedProgram] = []
    for rule in rules:
        program = session.query(Program).filter(Program.id == rule.program_id).first()
        if program is None:
            continue
        age_ok = True
        if rule.min_age is not None and age < rule.min_age:
            age_ok = False
        if rule.max_age is not None and age > rule.max_age:
            age_ok = False
        income_ok = True
        if rule.income_threshold is not None and request.household_income > rule.income_threshold:
            income_ok = False
        residency_ok = True
        if rule.residency_states is not None and rule.residency_states != "":
            states = [s.strip().upper() for s in rule.residency_states.split(",") if s.strip() != ""]
            if len(states) > 0 and request.residency_state.upper() not in states:
                residency_ok = False
        if age_ok and income_ok and residency_ok:
            matched = ScreenerMatchedRules(
                min_age=rule.min_age,
                max_age=rule.max_age,
                income_threshold=rule.income_threshold,
                residency_states=rule.residency_states,
                currency=rule.currency,
            )
            qp = ScreenerQualifiedProgram(
                program_id=program.id,
                program_name=program.name,
                category=program.category,
                region=program.region,
                matched_rules=matched,
            )
            qualified.append(qp)
    session.close()
    return EligibilityScreenerResponse(qualified_programs=qualified)

@app.patch(
    "/api/applications/bulk/status",
    response_model=ApplicationBulkStatusUpdateResponse,
    summary="Bulk update status for matching applications",
    description="Update status of applications filtered by program, intake, current status, and screener score",
    tags=["applications"],
    operation_id="bulk_update_application_status",
)
async def bulk_update_application_status(
    request: ApplicationBulkStatusUpdateRequest = Body(...),
) -> ApplicationBulkStatusUpdateResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    query = session.query(Application)
    if request.program_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(Application.program_id == request.program_id)
    if request.intake_id is not None:
        query = query.filter(Application.intake_id == request.intake_id)
    if request.current_status is not None:
        query = query.filter(Application.status == request.current_status)
    if request.min_screener_score is not None:
        query = query.filter(Application.screener_score >= request.min_screener_score)
    applications = query.all()
    updated_ids: List[int] = []
    for a in applications:
        a.status = request.new_status
        a.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
        updated_ids.append(a.id)
    session.commit()
    count = len(updated_ids)
    session.close()
    return ApplicationBulkStatusUpdateResponse(updated_count=count, application_ids=updated_ids)

    response_model=ApplicationAnswerResponse,
    summary="Create or update a single answer for an application",

    tags=["application_answers"],
    operation_id="upsert_application_answer",
)
async def upsert_application_answer(
    application_id: int = Path(..., description="Application ID to attach the answer to", example=300),
    request: ApplicationAnswerUpsertRequest = Body(...),
) -> ApplicationAnswerResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    ans = session.query(ApplicationAnswer).filter(
        ApplicationAnswer.application_id == application_id,
        ApplicationAnswer.question_id == request.question_id,
    ).first()
    v_date = None

@app.post(

    request: ApplicationAnswerBulkUpsertRequest = Body(...),
) -> ApplicationAnswerBulkUpsertResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    result_items: List[ApplicationAnswerBulkUpsertItemResponse] = []
    for item in request.answers:

            ApplicationAnswer.application_id == application_id,
            ApplicationAnswer.question_id == item.question_id,
        ).first()
        v_date = None
        if item.value_date is not None and item.value_date != "":
            v_date = datetime.fromisoformat(item.value_date).date()
        if ans is None:
            ans = ApplicationAnswer(
                application_id=application_id,
                question_id=item.question_id,
                value_text=item.value_text,
                value_number=item.value_number,
                value_date=v_date,
                created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
                updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            )
            session.add(ans)
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(ans)
        else:
            ans.value_text = item.value_text
            ans.value_number = item.value_number
            ans.value_date = v_date
            ans.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(ans)
        result_items.append(
            ApplicationAnswerBulkUpsertItemResponse(
                id=ans.id,
                question_id=ans.question_id,
                value_text=ans.value_text,
                value_number=ans.value_number,
                value_date=ans.value_date,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return ApplicationAnswerBulkUpsertResponse(application_id=application_id, answers=result_items)

@app.post(
    "/api/outcome_surveys/{survey_id}/assignments/bulk_by_case_filters",
    response_model=OutcomeSurveyAssignmentBulkByCaseFiltersResponse,
    summary="Bulk assign a survey to case files by filters",
    description="Assign a survey to all case files matching engagement status and start date criteria",
    tags=["outcome_survey_assignments"],
    operation_id="bulk_assign_survey_by_case_filters",
)
async def bulk_assign_survey_by_case_filters(
    survey_id: int = Path(..., description="Outcome survey ID to assign in bulk", example=600),
    request: OutcomeSurveyAssignmentBulkByCaseFiltersRequest = Body(...),
) -> OutcomeSurveyAssignmentBulkByCaseFiltersResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    cf_query = session.query(CaseFile).filter(CaseFile.program_id == request.program_id)
    if request.engagement_status is not None:
        cf_query = cf_query.filter(CaseFile.engagement_status == request.engagement_status)
    if request.started_before is not None and request.started_before != "":
        cf_query = cf_query.filter(CaseFile.start_date < datetime.fromisoformat(request.started_before).date())
    if request.started_after is not None and request.started_after != "":
        cf_query = cf_query.filter(CaseFile.start_date > datetime.fromisoformat(request.started_after).date())
    case_files = cf_query.all()
    created_ids: List[int] = []
    for cf in case_files:
        existing = session.query(OutcomeSurveyAssignment).filter(
            OutcomeSurveyAssignment.survey_id == survey_id,
            OutcomeSurveyAssignment.case_file_id == cf.id,
        ).first()
        if existing is None:
            assignment = OutcomeSurveyAssignment(
                survey_id=survey_id,
                case_file_id=cf.id,
                assigned_at=datetime.utcnow(),
                completed_at=None,
                created_at=datetime.utcnow(),
                updated_at=datetime.utcnow(),
            )
            session.add(assignment)
            session.commit()
            session.refresh(assignment)
            created_ids.append(assignment.id)
    count = len(created_ids)
    session.close()
    return OutcomeSurveyAssignmentBulkByCaseFiltersResponse(
        survey_id=survey_id,
        assigned_count=count,
        assignment_ids=created_ids,
    )

                question_id=ans.question_id,
                value_text=ans.value_text,
                value_number=ans.value_number,
                value_date=ans.value_date,
            )
        )
    session.close()
    return OutcomeSurveyAnswerBulkUpsertResponse(assignment_id=assignment_id, answers=result_items)


@app.get(
    "/api/outcome_survey_assignments/{assignment_id}/answers",
    response_model=OutcomeSurveyAnswerListResponse,
    summary="List answers for a survey assignment",
    description="Retrieve all answers associated with a survey assignment",
    tags=["outcome_survey_answers"],
    operation_id="list_outcome_survey_answers",
)
async def list_outcome_survey_answers(
    assignment_id: int = Path(..., description="Survey assignment ID whose answers to list", example=700)
) -> OutcomeSurveyAnswerListResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    answers = session.query(OutcomeSurveyAnswer).filter(OutcomeSurveyAnswer.assignment_id == assignment_id).all()
    items = [OutcomeSurveyAnswerResponse.model_validate(a) for a in answers]
    session.close()
    return OutcomeSurveyAnswerListResponse(answers=items)


@app.get(
    "/api/intakes/{intake_id}/metrics",
    response_model=IntakeMetricsResponse,
    summary="Get aggregated metrics for an intake",
    description="Return aggregate counts for applications and case files related to an intake",
    tags=["reporting"],
    operation_id="get_intake_metrics",
)
async def get_intake_metrics(
    intake_id: int = Path(..., description="Intake ID for which to compute metrics", example=21)
) -> IntakeMetricsResponse:
    session = SessionLocal()
    intake = session.query(Intake).filter(Intake.id == intake_id).first()
    program_id = 0
    if intake is not None:
        program_id = intake.program_id
    apps = session.query(Application).filter(Application.intake_id == intake_id).all()
    total_applications = len(apps)
    accepted_applications = 0
    waitlisted_applications = 0
    declined_applications = 0
    applicant_ids: List[int] = []
    for a in apps:
        if a.decision_status == "accepted":
            accepted_applications += 1
        if a.decision_status == "waitlisted":
            waitlisted_applications += 1
        if a.decision_status == "declined":
            declined_applications += 1
        applicant_ids.append(a.applicant_id)
    accepted_percentage = 0.0
    if total_applications > 0:
        accepted_percentage = (accepted_applications / total_applications) * 100.0
    completed_case_files = 0
    if len(applicant_ids) > 0 and program_id != 0:
        case_files = session.query(CaseFile).filter(
            CaseFile.program_id == program_id,
            CaseFile.engagement_status == "completed",
            CaseFile.applicant_id.in_(applicant_ids),
        ).all()
        completed_case_files = len(case_files)
    resp = IntakeMetricsResponse(
        intake_id=intake_id,
        program_id=program_id,
        total_applications=total_applications,
        accepted_applications=accepted_applications,
        accepted_percentage=accepted_percentage,
        waitlisted_applications=waitlisted_applications,
        declined_applications=declined_applications,
        completed_case_files=completed_case_files,
    )
    session.close()
    return resp

    uvicorn.run(app, host=host, port=port)
